'C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\style.css' -Value @'\n\n/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */\n.search-page {\n  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);\n  display: grid;\n  place-items: center;\n  padding: 2rem 1rem;\n}\n\n.search-card {\n  width: min(900px, 100%);\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: var(--radius);\n  padding: 1.6rem;\n}\n\n.search-header h1 {\n  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);\n  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.search-header p {\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;\n}\n\n.search-form {\n  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;\n}\n\n.search-form label {\n  display: block;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.92rem;\n}\n\n.search-row {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 0.7rem;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.search-row input {\n  flex: 1;\n  min-width: 220px;\n  background: #0f1015;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  color: var(--text-primary);\n  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;\n}\n\n.search-row input:focus {\n  outline: none;\n  border-color: var(--accent-alt);\n}\n\n.tmdb-health {\n  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n  padding-top: 1rem;\n}\n\n.tmdb-health h2 {\n  font-size: 1.1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.tmdb-status {\n  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  border: 1px solid transparent;\n  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;\n  font-size: 0.95rem;\n}\n\n.tmdb-status.info {\n  color: #c8d3e5;\n  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);\n  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);\n}\n\n.tmdb-status.success {\n  color: #b5f5c4;\n  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);\n  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);\n}\n\n.tmdb-status.error {\n  color: #ffd4d8;\n  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);\n  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);\n}\n'@;\n\n@'\n# KinoRate - DIG4503C Midterm Project\n\n**KinoRate** is a Letterboxd-style movie review web application built with vanilla JavaScript and Supabase Auth.\n\n## Current Status\n\n### Phase 1: Completed\n- User account signup/login via Supabase Auth\n- Client-side session guards for protected page routing\n- Logout from protected pages\n\n### Phase 2: In Progress\n**Movie Search and Reviews**\n\n- [x] Connect to TMDB API for movie search (connection test page)\n- [ ] Display movie results with poster, title, and year\n- [ ] Write a review with star rating and text\n- [ ] Save reviews to Supabase database\n- [ ] Edit and delete your own reviews\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n| Layer | Technology |\n|-------|-----------|\n| Auth + Session | Supabase Auth (JS SDK) |\n| Movie Data | TMDB API |\n| Frontend | HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript |\n| Hosting | GitHub Pages |\n\n## Running Locally\n\nYou can run this as a static site.\n\n1. Ensure `js/supabase-config.js` has your credentials and API key:\n\n```js\nconst SUPABASE_URL = \"your-project-url\";\nconst SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = \"your-anon-key\";\nconst TMDB_API_BASE_URL = \"https://api.themoviedb.org/3\";\nconst TMDB_API_KEY = \"your-tmdb-api-key\";\n```\n\n2. Open `auth.html` and sign in.\n3. Navigate to `search.html` to verify TMDB connectivity.\n\n## Deploying to GitHub Pages\n\n1. Push this repo to GitHub.\n2. In repository settings, open **Pages**.\n3. Set source to **Deploy from a branch**.\n4. Choose branch (usually `main`) and folder `/ (root)`.\n5. Save and wait for deployment.\n6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\n.\n├── index.html              # Protected home page\n├── auth.html               # Signup/login page\n├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check\n├── style.css               # Shared styling\n└── js/\n    ├── supabase-config.js  # Supabase + TMDB config\n    ├── auth.js             # Auth logic and route guards\n    └── search.js           # TMDB connection test logic\n```\n'@ | Set-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\README.md' -Encoding UTF8;\n\ngit --no-pager status --short"

### ✅ `view`

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\auth.js

<details>
<summary>176 lines</summary>

```
1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. let isRedirecting = false;
9. 
10. function redirectTo(path) {
11.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14.   isRedirecting = true;
15.   window.location.replace(path);
16. }
17. 
18. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
19.   if (!authMessage) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22. 
23.   authMessage.textContent = message;
24.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
25.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
26. }
27. 
28. function showApp() {
29.   if (appShell) {
30.     appShell.hidden = false;
31.   }
32. }
33. 
34. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
35.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
36.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
37.     return;
38.   }
39. 
40.   if (appShell) {
41.     appShell.hidden = false;
42.   }
43. 
44.   if (authMessage) {
45.     setMessage(message, true);
46.     return;
47.   }
48. 
49.   window.alert(message);
50. }
51. 
52. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
53.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
54.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
55. }
56. 
57. async function getSession() {
58.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
59.   if (error) {
60.     throw error;
61.   }
62.   return data.session;
63. }
64. 
65. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
66.   const session = await getSession();
67. 
68.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") && !session) {
69.     redirectTo("auth.html");
70.     return null;
71.   }
72. 
73.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
74.     redirectTo("index.html");
75.     return session;
76.   }
77. 
78.   if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
79.     navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
80.   }
81. 
82.   showApp();
83.   return session;
84. }
85. 
86. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
87.   if (navUser) {
88.     navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
89.   }
90. 
91.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search")) {
92.     redirectTo("auth.html");
93.   }
94. 
95.   if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
96.     redirectTo("index.html");
97.   }
98. });
99. 
100. enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
101.   showApp();
102.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
103.     redirectTo("auth.html");
104.     return;
105.   }
106. 
107.   setMessage(`Session check failed: ${error.message}`, true);
108. });
109. 
110. if (signupForm) {
111.   signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
112.     event.preventDefault();
113. 
114.     const email = signupForm.email.value.trim();
115.     const password = signupForm.password.value;
116. 
117.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
118.       email,
119.       password,
120.     });
121. 
122.     if (error) {
123.       setMessage(`Sign up failed: ${error.message}`, true);
124.       return;
125.     }
126. 
127.     if (data.user && !data.session) {
128.       setMessage("Sign up successful. Check your email to confirm your account.");
129.       return;
130.     }
131. 
132.     setMessage("Sign up successful. You are now logged in.");
133.     signupForm.reset();
134.   });
135. }
136. 
137. if (loginForm) {
138.   loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
139.     event.preventDefault();
140. 
141.     const email = loginForm.email.value.trim();
142.     const password = loginForm.password.value;
143. 
144.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
145.       email,
146.       password,
147.     });
148. 
149.     if (error) {
150.       setMessage(`Login failed: ${error.message}`, true);
151.       return;
152.     }
153. 
154.     setMessage("Login successful.");
155.     loginForm.reset();
156.     redirectTo("index.html");
157.   });
158. }
159. 
160. if (logoutButton) {
161.   logoutButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
162.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
163. 
164.     if (error) {
165.       if (authMessage) {
166.         setMessage(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`, true);
167.       } else {
168.         window.alert(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`);
169.       }
170.       return;
171.     }
172. 
173.     redirectTo("auth.html");
174.   });
175. }
176.
```

</details>

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\README.md (lines 1-120)

<details>
<summary>68 lines</summary>

````
1. # KinoRate - DIG4503C Midterm Project
2. 
3. **KinoRate** is a Letterboxd-style movie review web application built with vanilla JavaScript and Supabase Auth.
4. 
5. ## Current Status
6. 
7. ### Phase 1: Completed
8. - User account signup/login via Supabase Auth
9. - Client-side session guards for protected page routing
10. - Logout from protected pages
11. 
12. ### Phase 2: In Progress
13. **Movie Search and Reviews**
14. 
15. - [x] Connect to TMDB API for movie search (connection test page)
16. - [ ] Display movie results with poster, title, and year
17. - [ ] Write a review with star rating and text
18. - [ ] Save reviews to Supabase database
19. - [ ] Edit and delete your own reviews
20. 
21. ## Tech Stack
22. 
23. | Layer | Technology |
24. |-------|-----------|
25. | Auth + Session | Supabase Auth (JS SDK) |
26. | Movie Data | TMDB API |
27. | Frontend | HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript |
28. | Hosting | GitHub Pages |
29. 
30. ## Running Locally
31. 
32. You can run this as a static site.
33. 
34. 1. Ensure `js/supabase-config.js` has your credentials and API key:
35. 
36. ```js
37. const SUPABASE_URL = "your-project-url";
38. const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = "your-anon-key";
39. const TMDB_API_BASE_URL = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3";
40. const TMDB_API_KEY = "your-tmdb-api-key";
41. ```
42. 
43. 2. Open `auth.html` and sign in.
44. 3. Navigate to `search.html` to verify TMDB connectivity.
45. 
46. ## Deploying to GitHub Pages
47. 
48. 1. Push this repo to GitHub.
49. 2. In repository settings, open **Pages**.
50. 3. Set source to **Deploy from a branch**.
51. 4. Choose branch (usually `main`) and folder `/ (root)`.
52. 5. Save and wait for deployment.
53. 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.
54. 
55. ## Project Structure
56. 
57. ```
58. .
59. ├── index.html              # Protected home page
60. ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
61. ├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
62. ├── style.css               # Shared styling
63. └── js/
64.     ├── supabase-config.js  # Supabase + TMDB config
65.     ├── auth.js             # Auth logic and route guards
66.     └── search.js           # TMDB connection test logic
67. ```
68.
````

</details>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — Phase 2 TMDB foundation is now in place without building full search yet.

### What I added

- New protected page: `search.html`
  - Search bar UI scaffold
  - TMDB connection status panel
  - “Run Connection Test” button

- New script: `js/search.js`
  - Calls TMDB `/configuration` endpoint to verify API connectivity
  - Shows clear success/error/info status messages
  - Keeps search submit as placeholder only (no result rendering yet)

- Updated `js/supabase-config.js`
  - Added:
    - `TMDB_API_BASE_URL`
    - `TMDB_API_KEY`
  - Exposes `window.appConfig.tmdb`

- Updated `js/auth.js`
  - Route guard now also protects `search.html`

- Updated nav in `index.html` to link to `search.html`
- Added search-page styles in `style.css`
- Updated `README.md` for Phase 2 + TMDB setup

### Your required edit

Set `TMDB_API_KEY` in `js/supabase-config.js` to test real connectivity.

<sub>⏱️ 1200m 7s</sub>

### 👤 User

TMDB has an api key listed but i dont see a base url. what should i put there?

---

<sub>⏱️ 1200m 13s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Use this exact value:

`https://api.themoviedb.org/3`

So your config should be:

```js
const TMDB_API_BASE_URL = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3";
const TMDB_API_KEY = "your_tmdb_api_key_here";
```

TMDB usually gives you the key, not the base URL, because the base URL is standard for everyone.  
(There’s also an image base URL, but we’ll fetch that later from `/configuration` when building results.)

33. 
34. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
35.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
36.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
37.     return;
38.   }
39. 
40.   if (appShell) {
41.     appShell.hidden = false;
42.   }
43. 
44.   if (authMessage) {
45.     setMessage(message, true);
46.     return;
47.   }
48. 
49.   window.alert(message);
50. }
51. 
52. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
53.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
54.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
55. }
56. 
57. async function getSession() {
58.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
59.   if (error) {
60.     throw error;
61.   }
62.   return data.session;
63. }
64. 
65. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
66.   const session = await getSession();
67. 
68.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") && !session) {
69.     redirectTo("auth.html");
70.     return null;
71.   }
72. 
73.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
74.     redirectTo("index.html");
75.     return session;
76.   }
77. 
78.   if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
79.     navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
80.   }
81. 
82.   showApp();
83.   return session;
84. }
85. 
86. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
87.   if (navUser) {
88.     navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
89.   }
90.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1203m 41s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Found it: there was a JavaScript syntax break in `js/supabase-config.js` (`apiBaseUrl: https: "//..."`) which prevented the file from loading, so `window.supabaseClient` never got set.

I fixed it to use the proper constants again.

Now set your key in one place only:

```js
const TMDB_API_KEY = "your_key_here";
```

Then hard refresh (`Ctrl+F5`). I’ll mark this fix complete after you confirm auth loads.You were right — I found the cause and fixed it.

In `js/supabase-config.js`, this line had invalid syntax:

`apiBaseUrl: https: "//api.themoviedb.org/3",`

That breaks the whole script, so `window.supabaseClient` never initializes and auth fails.

I changed it back to safe config constants:

- `apiBaseUrl: TMDB_API_BASE_URL`
- `apiKey: TMDB_API_KEY`

Now just set:

```js
const TMDB_API_KEY = "your_tmdb_key";
```

Then hard refresh (`Ctrl+F5`) and reload `auth.html`.

1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const testButton = document.getElementById("tmdb-test-button");
3. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
4. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
5. 
6. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
7.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
8.     return;
9.   }
10. 
11.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
12.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
13.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
14. }
15. 
16. async function testTmdbConnection() {
17.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
18. 
19.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
20.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
21.     return;
22.   }
23. 
24.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/configuration?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}`;
25. 
26.   setTmdbStatus("Checking TMDB connection...", "info");
27. 
28.   try {
29.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
30.     const payload = await response.json();
31. 
32.     if (!response.ok) {
33.       const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Unknown TMDB error.";
34.       setTmdbStatus(`TMDB connection failed: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
35.       return;
36.     }
37. 
38.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB connection successful. API is reachable.", "success");
39.   } catch (error) {
40.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB connection failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
41.   }
42. }
43. 
44. if (searchForm) {
45.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
46.     event.preventDefault();
47. 
48.     const query = searchInput ? searchInput.value.trim() : "";
49.     if (!query) {
50.       setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title. Search results UI will be added next phase.", "info");
51.       return;
52.     }
53. 
54.     setTmdbStatus("Search UI is ready. Result rendering is intentionally not implemented yet.", "info");
55.   });
56. }
57. 
58. if (testButton) {
59.   testButton.addEventListener("click", testTmdbConnection);
60. }
61. 
62. testTmdbConnection();
63.
```

</details>

366. .nav-user {
367.   color: var(--text-muted);
368.   font-size: 0.9rem;
369. }
370. 
371. .btn-sm {
372.   padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem;
373.   font-size: 0.85rem;
374. }
375. 
376. #app-shell[hidden] {
377.   display: none;
378. }
379. 
380. /* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */
381. .search-page {
382.   min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);
383.   display: grid;
384.   place-items: center;
385.   padding: 2rem 1rem;
386. }
387. 
388. .search-card {
389.   width: min(900px, 100%);
390.   background: var(--bg-card);
391.   border: 1px solid var(--border);
392.   border-radius: var(--radius);
393.   padding: 1.6rem;
394. }
395. 
396. .search-header h1 {
397.   font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
398.   margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
399. }
400. 
401. .search-header p {
402.   color: var(--text-muted);
403.   margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
404. }
405. 
406. .search-form {
407.   margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
408. }
409. 
410. .search-form label {
411.   display: block;
412.   color: var(--text-muted);
413.   margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
414.   font-size: 0.92rem;
415. }
416. 
417. .search-row {
418.   display: flex;
419.   gap: 0.7rem;
420.   flex-wrap: wrap;
421. }
422. 
423. .search-row input {
424.   flex: 1;
425.   min-width: 220px;
426.   background: #0f1015;
427.   border: 1px solid var(--border);
428.   border-radius: 8px;
429.   color: var(--text-primary);
430.   padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
431. }
432. 
433. .search-row input:focus {
434.   outline: none;
435.   border-color: var(--accent-alt);
436. }
437. 
438. .tmdb-health {
439.   border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
440.   padding-top: 1rem;
441. }
442. 
443. .tmdb-health h2 {
444.   font-size: 1.1rem;
445.   margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
446. }
447. 
448. .tmdb-status {
449.   margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
450.   border-radius: 8px;
451.   border: 1px solid transparent;
452.   padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
453.   font-size: 0.95rem;
454. }
455. 
456. .tmdb-status.info {
457.   color: #c8d3e5;
458.   background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
459.   border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
460. }
461. 
462. .tmdb-status.success {
463.   color: #b5f5c4;
464.   background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
465.   border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
466. }
467. 
468. .tmdb-status.error {
469.   color: #ffd4d8;
470.   background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
471.   border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
472. }
473.

       <h3>Top&nbsp;5 Favorites</h3>\n          <p>Pin up to five all-time favorite movies on your public profile for everyone to see.</p>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"card\">\n          <div src=\"js/index-search.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n'@ | Set-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\index.html' -Encoding UTF8;\n\n@'\nconst indexSearchInput = document.getElementById(\"index-movie-query\");\nconst suggestionList = document.getElementById(\"index-suggestion-list\");\n\nif (indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {\n  const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;\n  let debounceHandle;\n  let requestCounter = 0;\n\n  function renderSuggestionItems(items) {\n    suggestionList.innerHTML = \"\";\n\n    for (const item of items) {\n      const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n      li.className = \"suggestion-item\";\n      li.setAttribute(\"role\", \"option\");\n      li.tabIndex = -1;\n\n      const title = item.title || \"Untitled\";\n      const releaseYear = item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : \"Unknown\";\n      li.textContent = `${title} (${releaseYear})`;\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", (event) => {\n        event.preventDefault();\n      });\n\n      suggestionList.appendChild(li);\n    }\n\n    suggestionList.classList.add(\"open\");\n  }\n\n  function renderInfo(message, state = \"info\") {\n    suggestionList.innerHTML = `<li class=\"suggestion-item suggestion-${state}\" role=\"option\">${message}</li>`;\n    suggestionList.classList.add(\"open\");\n  }\n\n  function closeSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.classList.remove(\"open\");\n    suggestionList.innerHTML = \"\";\n  }\n\n  async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {\n    if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {\n      renderInfo(\"TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js\", \"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;\n\n    renderInfo(\"Searching...\", \"loading\");\n\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(endpoint);\n      const payload = await response.json();\n\n      if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        const errorMessage = payload.status_message || \"Search failed.\";\n        renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, \"error\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];\n\n      if (results.length === 0) {\n        renderInfo(\"No matches yet.\", \"info\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      renderSuggestionItems(results);\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {\n        return;\n      }\n      renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, \"error\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", () => {\n    const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();\n\n    clearTimeout(debounceHandle);\n\n    if (!query) {\n      closeSuggestions();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {\n      requestCounter += 1;\n      fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);\n    }, 300);\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"focus\", () => {\n    if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {\n      suggestionList.classList.add(\"open\");\n    }\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"blur\", () => {\n    setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);\n  });\n}\n'@ | Set-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\js\\index-search.js' -Encoding UTF8;\n\nAdd-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\style.css' -Value @'\n\n/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */\n.index-search {\n  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;\n}\n\n.index-search-wrap {\n  max-width: 760px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.index-search-wrap label {\n  display: block;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  font-size: 0.92rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;\n}\n\n.index-search-input-wrap {\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.index-search-input-wrap input {\n  width: 100%;\n  background: #0f1015;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  color: var(--text-primary);\n  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;\n  font-size: 1rem;\n}\n\n.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {\n  outline: none;\n  border-color: var(--accent-alt);\n}\n\n.suggestion-list {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  list-style: none;\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 0.3rem;\n  background: #161821;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  max-height: 360px;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  display: none;\n  z-index: 60;\n}\n\n.suggestion-list.open {\n  display: block;\n}\n\n.suggestion-item {\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;\n  font-size: 0.95rem;\n  color: var(--text-primary);\n  cursor: default;\n}\n\n.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {\n  margin-top: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.suggestion-item:hover {\n  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);\n}\n\n.suggestion-loading,\n.suggestion-info {\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.suggestion-error {\n  color: #ffd4d8;\n}\n'@;\n\ngit --no-pager status --short"

<sub>⏱️ 1209m 33s</sub>

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js.**

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js

<details>
<summary>108 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
2. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
3. 
4. if (indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
5.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
6.   let debounceHandle;
7.   let requestCounter = 0;
8. 
9.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
10.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
11. 
12.     for (const item of items) {
13.       const li = document.createElement("li");
14.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
15.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
16.       li.tabIndex = -1;
17. 
18.       const title = item.title || "Untitled";
19.       const releaseYear = item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
20.       li.textContent = `${title} (${releaseYear})`;
21. 
22.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
23.         event.preventDefault();
24.       });
25. 
26.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
27.     }
28. 
29.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
30.   }
31. 
32.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
33.     suggestionList.innerHTML = `<li class="suggestion-item suggestion-${state}" role="option">${message}</li>`;
34.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
35.   }
36. 
37.   function closeSuggestions() {
38.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
39.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
40.   }
41. 
42.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
43.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
44.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
45.       return;
46.     }
47. 
48.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
49. 
50.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
51. 
52.     try {
53.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
54.       const payload = await response.json();
55. 
56.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
57.         return;
58.       }
59. 
60.       if (!response.ok) {
61.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
62.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
63.         return;
64.       }
65. 
66.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
67. 
68.       if (results.length === 0) {
69.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
70.         return;
71.       }
72. 
73.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
74.     } catch (error) {
75.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
76.         return;
77.       }
78.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
79.     }
80.   }
81. 
82.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
83.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
84. 
85.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
86. 
87.     if (!query) {
88.       closeSuggestions();
89.       return;
90.     }
91. 
92.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
93.       requestCounter += 1;
94.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
95.     }, 300);
96.   });
97. 
98.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
99.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
100.       suggestionList.classList.add("open");
101.     }
102.   });
103. 
104.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
105.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
106.   });
107. }
108.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1209m 36s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — I implemented exactly that scope on `index.html`.

### What changed

- Reformatted index to include a built-in movie search section (`#movie-search`).
- Added a typeahead input with dropdown suggestions.
- Added debounced TMDB requests (300ms delay) while typing.
- Fetches from TMDB search endpoint and shows up to **10** suggestions.
- Suggestions are displayed as:
  - `Movie Title (Year)`
- Clicking suggestions does nothing yet (intentionally inert via `mousedown` prevent default).

### Files updated

- `index.html` (search section + script include)
- `js/index-search.js` (debounced fetch + dropdown rendering)
- `style.css` (typeahead/dropdown styling)

If you want next, I can add keyboard navigation (up/down/enter) without adding click behavior yet.

diff --git a/style.css b/style.css
index 4d41d62..8021272 100644
--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -376,3 +376,179 @@
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js.**

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js

<details>
<summary>108 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
2. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
3. 
4. if (indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
5.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
6.   let debounceHandle;
7.   let requestCounter = 0;
8. 
9.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
10.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
11. 
12.     for (const item of items) {
13.       const li = document.createElement("li");
14.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
15.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
16.       li.tabIndex = -1;
17. 
18.       const title = item.title || "Untitled";
19.       const releaseYear = item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
20.       li.textContent = `${title} (${releaseYear})`;
21. 
22.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
23.         event.preventDefault();
24.       });
25. 
26.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
27.     }
28. 
29.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
30.   }
31. 
32.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
33.     suggestionList.innerHTML = `<li class="suggestion-item suggestion-${state}" role="option">${message}</li>`;
34.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
35.   }
36. 
37.   function closeSuggestions() {
38.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
39.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
40.   }
41. 
42.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
43.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
44.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
45.       return;
46.     }
47. 
48.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
49. 
50.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
51. 
52.     try {
53.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
54.       const payload = await response.json();
55. 
56.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
57.         return;
58.       }
59. 
60.       if (!response.ok) {
61.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
62.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
63.         return;
64.       }
65. 
66.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
67. 
68.       if (results.length === 0) {
69.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
70.         return;
71.       }
72. 
73.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
74.     } catch (error) {
75.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
76.         return;
77.       }
78.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
79.     }
80.   }
81. 
82.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
83.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
84. 
85.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
86. 
87.     if (!query) {
88.       closeSuggestions();
89.       return;
90.     }
91. 
92.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
93.       requestCounter += 1;
94.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
95.     }, 300);
96.   });
97. 
98.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
99.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
100.       suggestionList.classList.add("open");
101.     }
102.   });
103. 
104.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
105.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
106.   });
107. }
108.
```

</details>

<summary>63 lines</summary>

```
1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const testButton = document.getElementById("tmdb-test-button");
3. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
4. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
5. 
6. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
7.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
8.     return;
9.   }
10. 
11.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
12.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
13.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
14. }
15. 
16. async function testTmdbConnection() {
17.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
18. 
19.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
20.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
21.     return;
22.   }
23. 
24.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/configuration?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}`;
25. 
26.   setTmdbStatus("Checking TMDB connection...", "info");
27. 
28.   try {
29.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
30.     const payload = await response.json();
31. 
32.     if (!response.ok) {
33.       const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Unknown TMDB error.";
34.       setTmdbStatus(`TMDB connection failed: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
35.       return;
36.     }
37. 
38.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB connection successful. API is reachable.", "success");
39.   } catch (error) {
40.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB connection failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
41.   }
42. }
43. 
44. if (searchForm) {
45.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
46.     event.preventDefault();
47. 
48.     const query = searchInput ? searchInput.value.trim() : "";
49.     if (!query) {
50.       setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title. Search results UI will be added next phase.", "info");
51.       return;
52.     }
53. 
54.     setTmdbStatus("Search UI is ready. Result rendering is intentionally not implemented yet.", "info");
55.   });
56. }
57. 
58. if (testButton) {
59.   testButton.addEventListener("click", testTmdbConnection);
60. }
61. 
62. testTmdbConnection();
63.
```

</details>

### ✅ `view`

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\auth.js

<details>
<summary>176 lines</summary>

```
1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. let isRedirecting = false;
9. 
10. function redirectTo(path) {
11.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14.   isRedirecting = true;
15.   window.location.replace(path);
16. }
17. 
18. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
19.   if (!authMessage) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22. 
23.   authMessage.textContent = message;
24.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
25.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
26. }
27. 
28. function showApp() {
29.   if (appShell) {
30.     appShell.hidden = false;
31.   }
32. }
33. 
34. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
35.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
36.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
37.     return;
38.   }
39. 
40.   if (appShell) {
41.     appShell.hidden = false;
42.   }
43. 
44.   if (authMessage) {
45.     setMessage(message, true);
46.     return;
47.   }
48. 
49.   window.alert(message);
50. }
51. 
52. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
53.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
54.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
55. }
56. 
57. async function getSession() {
58.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
59.   if (error) {
60.     throw error;
61.   }
62.   return data.session;
63. }
64. 
65. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
66.   const session = await getSession();
67. 
68.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") && !session) {
69.     redirectTo("auth.html");
70.     return null;
71.   }
72. 
73.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
74.     redirectTo("index.html");
75.     return session;
76.   }
77. 
78.   if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
79.     navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
80.   }
81. 
82.   showApp();
83.   return session;
84. }
85. 
86. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
87.   if (navUser) {
88.     navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
89.   }
90. 
91.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search")) {
92.     redirectTo("auth.html");
93.   }
94. 
95.   if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
96.     redirectTo("index.html");
97.   }
98. });
99. 
100. enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
101.   showApp();
102.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
103.     redirectTo("auth.html");
104.     return;
105.   }
106. 
107.   setMessage(`Session check failed: ${error.message}`, true);
108. });
109. 
110. if (signupForm) {
111.   signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
112.     event.preventDefault();
113. 
114.     const email = signupForm.email.value.trim();
115.     const password = signupForm.password.value;
116. 
117.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
118.       email,
119.       password,
120.     });
121. 
122.     if (error) {
123.       setMessage(`Sign up failed: ${error.message}`, true);
124.       return;
125.     }
126. 
127.     if (data.user && !data.session) {
128.       setMessage("Sign up successful. Check your email to confirm your account.");
129.       return;
130.     }
131. 
132.     setMessage("Sign up successful. You are now logged in.");
133.     signupForm.reset();
134.   });
135. }
136. 
137. if (loginForm) {
138.   loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
139.     event.preventDefault();
140. 
141.     const email = loginForm.email.value.trim();
142.     const password = loginForm.password.value;
143. 
144.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
145.       email,
146.       password,
147.     });
148. 
149.     if (error) {
150.       setMessage(`Login failed: ${error.message}`, true);
151.       return;
152.     }
153. 
154.     setMessage("Login successful.");
155.     loginForm.reset();
156.     redirectTo("index.html");
157.   });
158. }
159. 
160. if (logoutButton) {
161.   logoutButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
162.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
163. 
164.     if (error) {
165.       if (authMessage) {
166.         setMessage(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`, true);
167.       } else {
168.         window.alert(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`);
169.       }
170.       return;
171.     }
172. 
173.     redirectTo("auth.html");
174.   });
175. }
176.
```

</details>

### 💬 Copilot

## Issue: TMDB API Key Exposed in Client-Side Code
**File:** js/supabase-config.js:5
**Severity:** Critical
**Problem:** The TMDB API key is hardcoded as a constant and exposed in client-side JavaScript. This key can be extracted by any user viewing the page source or network traffic, allowing unauthorized API usage under your account which could lead to rate limit exhaustion or billing charges.
**Evidence:** Line 5 contains `const TMDB_API_KEY = "0b615fd08549b8b6e1416543024f6940";` which is directly accessible in the browser. Lines 48 and 24 in index-search.js and search.js respectively show the key being sent as a URL parameter in plaintext: `?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}`.
**Suggested fix:** Use a backend proxy to handle TMDB API requests, or implement domain restrictions in TMDB API settings if available. Never expose API keys in client-side code.

---

## Issue: Race Condition in Debounced Search Requests
**File:** js/index-search.js:56-58
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** The request counter check happens after `await fetch()` completes, but the check should occur immediately after parsing to prevent rendering stale results. If a slow request completes after a faster subsequent request, the counter check at line 56 prevents rendering, but the error path at lines 75-76 only checks before rendering errors, allowing a stale error message to display.
**Evidence:** Lines 56-58 check `localRequestId !== requestCounter` after network completion but before rendering results. However, lines 75-78 have the same check in the catch block but could still render an error from an older request if a newer request hasn't reached the error catch yet.
**Suggested fix:** Add the request counter check immediately at the start of the catch block before line 75 to ensure consistent behavior for both success and error paths.

---

## Issue: Supabase Anon Key Exposed in Client-Side Code
**File:** js/supabase-config.js:2
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** While Supabase anon keys are designed to be public, exposing them in public GitHub repositories allows anyone to access your Supabase project's public API endpoints. Combined with the fact this will be on GitHub Pages (as mentioned in README.md line 36), malicious actors could spam your database or exhaust quotas.
**Evidence:** Line 2 contains the full anon key. The README.md indicates this will be "Hosting | GitHub Pages" which means the source code with this key will be publicly accessible.
**Suggested fix:** Use environment variables or a build process to inject credentials, and add js/supabase-config.js to .gitignore. Document in README that users must create their own config file. Consider implementing Row Level Security (RLS) policies in Supabase as defense-in-depth.

---

No other significant issues found in the reviewed changes.


---

<sub>⏱️ 1211m 53s</sub>

Code review complete. High-signal findings:

- **Critical:** TMDB API key is committed in `js/supabase-config.js` and exposed client-side.
- **High:** Supabase anon key is also committed/exposed publicly.
- **Medium:** Potential stale async error race in `js/index-search.js` around request sequencing.

Recommendation: rotate both leaked keys immediately and remove hardcoded secrets from tracked files (`supabase-config.js` should be local-only template workflow). I can patch this now by converting to `supabase-config.example.js`, updating `.gitignore`, and tightening the race handling in `index-search.js`.

<details>
<summary>68 lines</summary>

````
1. # KinoRate - DIG4503C Midterm Project
2. 
3. **KinoRate** is a Letterboxd-style movie review web application built with vanilla JavaScript and Supabase Auth.
4. 
5. ## Current Status
6. 
7. ### Phase 1: Completed
8. - User account signup/login via Supabase Auth
9. - Client-side session guards for protected page routing
10. - Logout from protected pages
11. 
12. ### Phase 2: In Progress
13. **Movie Search and Reviews**
14. 
15. - [x] Connect to TMDB API for movie search (connection test page)
16. - [ ] Display movie results with poster, title, and year
17. - [ ] Write a review with star rating and text
18. - [ ] Save reviews to Supabase database
19. - [ ] Edit and delete your own reviews
20. 
21. ## Tech Stack
22. 
23. | Layer | Technology |
24. |-------|-----------|
25. | Auth + Session | Supabase Auth (JS SDK) |
26. | Movie Data | TMDB API |
27. | Frontend | HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript |
28. | Hosting | GitHub Pages |
29. 
30. ## Running Locally
31. 
32. You can run this as a static site.
33. 
34. 1. Ensure `js/supabase-config.js` has your credentials and API key:
35. 
36. ```js
37. const SUPABASE_URL = "your-project-url";
38. const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = "your-anon-key";
39. const TMDB_API_BASE_URL = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3";
40. const TMDB_API_KEY = "your-tmdb-api-key";
41. ```
42. 
43. 2. Open `auth.html` and sign in.
44. 3. Navigate to `search.html` to verify TMDB connectivity.
45. 
46. ## Deploying to GitHub Pages
47. 
48. 1. Push this repo to GitHub.
49. 2. In repository settings, open **Pages**.
50. 3. Set source to **Deploy from a branch**.
51. 4. Choose branch (usually `main`) and folder `/ (root)`.
52. 5. Save and wait for deployment.
53. 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.
54. 
55. ## Project Structure
56. 
57. ```
58. .
59. ├── index.html              # Protected home page
60. ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
61. ├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
62. ├── style.css               # Shared styling
63. └── js/
64.     ├── supabase-config.js  # Supabase + TMDB config
65.     ├── auth.js             # Auth logic and route guards
66.     └── search.js           # TMDB connection test logic
67. ```
68.
````

<sub>⏱️ 1217m 27s</sub>

### 👤 User

tmdb key hasnt been uploaded to github. is it even possible to put this on github if im ignoring the keys? i may just have to ignore the keys being up publically for this assignment

---

<sub>⏱️ 1217m 30s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Yes — it’s absolutely possible to host on GitHub while ignoring keys, **but not for pure client-side API calls**.

For GitHub Pages:

- Supabase **anon key** can be public (that’s normal), with strict RLS.
- TMDB key in browser JS will always be visible to users at runtime, even if gitignored.

So your options:

- For assignment simplicity: keep TMDB key client-side (accepted in many class projects).
- More secure: use a backend proxy/serverless function for TMDB calls.

Since this is coursework, your practical path is:
rotate keys, keep RLS strict, and proceed.

---

<sub>⏱️ 1218m 39s</sub>

### 👤 User

so is all i currently need to do replace the supabase key? will this all still work on github pages if supabaseconfig.js is ignored in git

---

<sub>⏱️ 1218m 45s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Short answer: **No** — if `js/supabase-config.js` is ignored, GitHub Pages won’t have that file, and your site will break.

For GitHub Pages to work, one of these must be true:

- `js/supabase-config.js` is committed, or
- you use a GitHub Actions deploy step that generates it during build.

For your assignment, simplest is to commit it and rotate keys first.

Also, don’t just rotate Supabase: rotate **TMDB too** if it was ever committed or shared.  
Supabase anon key being public is okay if your RLS policies are strict.

---

<details>
<summary>108 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
2. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
3. 
4. if (indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
5.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
6.   let debounceHandle;
7.   let requestCounter = 0;
8. 
9.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
10.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
11. 
12.     for (const item of items) {
13.       const li = document.createElement("li");
14.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
15.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
16.       li.tabIndex = -1;
17. 
18.       const title = item.title || "Untitled";
19.       const releaseYear = item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
20.       li.textContent = `${title} (${releaseYear})`;
21. 
22.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
23.         event.preventDefault();
24.       });
25. 
26.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
27.     }
28. 
29.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
30.   }
31. 
32.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
33.     suggestionList.innerHTML = `<li class="suggestion-item suggestion-${state}" role="option">${message}</li>`;
34.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
35.   }
36. 
37.   function closeSuggestions() {
38.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
39.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
40.   }
41. 
42.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
43.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
44.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
45.       return;
46.     }
47. 
48.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
49. 
50.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
51. 
52.     try {
53.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
54.       const payload = await response.json();
55. 
56.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
57.         return;
58.       }
59. 
60.       if (!response.ok) {
61.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
62.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
63.         return;
64.       }
65. 
66.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
67. 
68.       if (results.length === 0) {
69.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
70.         return;
71.       }
72. 
73.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
74.     } catch (error) {
75.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
76.         return;
77.       }
78.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
79.     }
80.   }
81. 
82.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
83.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
84. 
85.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
86. 
87.     if (!query) {
88.       closeSuggestions();
89.       return;
90.     }
91. 
92.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
93.       requestCounter += 1;
94.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
95.     }, 300);
96.   });
97. 
98.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
99.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
100.       suggestionList.classList.add("open");
101.     }
102.   });
103. 
104.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
105.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
106.   });
107. }
108.

1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const testButton = document.getElementById("tmdb-test-button");
3. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
4. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
5. 
6. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
7.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
8.     return;
9.   }
10. 
11.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
12.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
13.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
14. }
15. 
16. async function testTmdbConnection() {
17.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
18. 
19.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
20.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
21.     return;
22.   }
23. 
24.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/configuration?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}`;
25. 
26.   setTmdbStatus("Checking TMDB connection...", "info");
27. 
28.   try {
29.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
30.     const payload = await response.json();
31. 
32.     if (!response.ok) {
33.       const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Unknown TMDB error.";
34.       setTmdbStatus(`TMDB connection failed: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
35.       return;
36.     }
37. 
38.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB connection successful. API is reachable.", "success");
39.   } catch (error) {
40.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB connection failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
41.   }
42. }
43. 
44. if (searchForm) {
45.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
46.     event.preventDefault();
47. 
48.     const query = searchInput ? searchInput.value.trim() : "";
49.     if (!query) {
50.       setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title. Search results UI will be added next phase.", "info");
51.       return;
52.     }
53. 
54.     setTmdbStatus("Search UI is ready. Result rendering is intentionally not implemented yet.", "info");
55.   });
56. }
57. 
58. if (testButton) {
59.   testButton.addEventListener("click", testTmdbConnection);
60. }
61. 
62. testTmdbConnection();
63.
```

\"https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342\";\n\nfunction setTmdbStatus(message, kind = \"info\") {\n  if (!tmdbStatus) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  tmdbStatus.textContent = message;\n  tmdbStatus.classList.remove(\"success\", \"error\", \"info\");\n  tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);\n}\n\nfunction getYear(dateString) {\n  return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : \"Unknown\";\n}\n\nfunction getDirector(credits) {\n  const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];\n  const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === \"Director\");\n  return director?.name || \"Unknown\";\n}\n\nfunction getCast(credits) {\n  const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];\n  if (cast.length === 0) {\n    return \"Unknown\";\n  }\n  return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(\", \");\n}\n\nfunction createResultCard(movie) {\n  const poster = movie.poster_path\n    ? `<img class=\"result-poster\" = typeof movie.vote_average === \"number\" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : \"N/A\";\n  const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : \"Runtime unavailable\";\n  const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0\n    ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(\", \")\n    : \"Genres unavailable\";\n\n  return `\n    <article class=\"result-card\">\n      ${poster}\n      <div class=\"result-content\">\n        <h2>${movie.title || \"Untitled\"} <span>(${getYear(movie.release_date)})</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"result-meta\">⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}</p>\n        <p class=\"result-meta\"><strong>Director:</strong> ${movie.director || \"Unknown\"}</p>\n        <p class=\"result-meta\"><strong>Cast:</strong> ${movie.cast || \"Unknown\"}</p>\n        <p class=\"result-meta\"><strong>Genres:</strong> ${genres}</p>\n        <p class=\"result-overview\">${movie.overview || \"No overview available.\"}</p>\n      </div>\n    </article>\n  `;\n}\n\nasync function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {\n  const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;\n  const response = await fetch(endpoint);\n  const payload = await response.json();\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    throw new Error(payload.status_message || \"Failed to load movie details.\");\n  }\n\n  return {\n    ...payload,\n    director: getDirector(payload.credits),\n    cast: getCast(payload.credits),\n  };\n}\n\nasync function performSearch(rawQuery) {\n  const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;\n  const query = rawQuery.trim();\n\n  if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {\n    setTmdbStatus(\"TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.\", \"error\");\n    resultsGrid.innerHTML = \"\";\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!query) {\n    setTmdbStatus(\"Enter a movie title to search.\", \"info\");\n    resultsGrid.innerHTML = \"\";\n    return;\n  }\n\n  setTmdbStatus(\"Searching TMDB...\", \"info\");\n  resultsGrid.innerHTML = '<p class=\"results-loading\">Loading results...</p>';\n\n  try {\n    const searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;\n    const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);\n    const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();\n\n    if (!searchResponse.ok) {\n      throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || \"TMDB search failed.\");\n    }\n\n    const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];\n\n    if (baseResults.length === 0) {\n      setTmdbStatus(\"No movies matched your search.\", \"info\");\n      resultsGrid.innerHTML = '<p class=\"results-empty\">No results found.</p>';\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const detailedResults = await Promise.all(\n      baseResults.map((movie) => fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: \"Unknown\", cast: \"Unknown\" })))\n    );\n\n    resultsGrid.innerHTML = detailedResults.map(createResultCard).join(\"\");\n    setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for \"${query}\".`, \"success\");\n  } catch (error) {\n    setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, \"error\");\n    resultsGrid.innerHTML = '<p class=\"results-empty\">Unable to load results right now.</p>';\n  }\n}\n\nif (searchForm && searchInput) {\n  searchForm.addEventListener(\"submit\", (event) => {\n    event.preventDefault();\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    params.set(\"query\", query);\n    const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;\n    window.history.replaceState({}, \"\", nextUrl);\n    performSearch(query);\n  });\n\n  const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get(\"query\") || \"\";\n  if (urlQuery) {\n    searchInput.value = urlQuery;\n    performSearch(urlQuery);\n  }\n}\n'@ | Set-Content -Path @'\n\n.search-submit-btn {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 50%;\n  right: 0.45rem;\n  transform: translateY(-50%);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  background: #23252f;\n  color: <details>
<summary>203 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
6.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
7.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
8.   let debounceHandle;
9.   let requestCounter = 0;
10.   let activeIndex = -1;
11.   let currentResults = [];
12. 
13.   function getMovieYear(item) {
14.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
15.   }
16. 
17.   function openSuggestions() {
18.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
19.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
20.   }
21. 
22.   function closeSuggestions() {
23.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
24.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
25.     activeIndex = -1;
26.   }
27. 
28.   function syncActiveItem() {
29.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
30.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
31.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
32.         item.classList.add("active");
33.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
34.       } else {
35.         item.classList.remove("active");
36.       }
37.     });
38.   }
39. 
40.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
41.     const trimmed = query.trim();
42.     if (!trimmed) {
43.       return;
44.     }
45.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
46.   }
47. 
48.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
49.     currentResults = items;
50.     suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
51.     activeIndex = -1;
52. 
53.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
54.       const li = document.createElement("li");
55.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
56.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
57.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
58.       li.tabIndex = -1;
59. 
60.       const posterPath = item.poster_path ? `${imageBase}${item.poster_path}` : "";
61.       const posterHtml = posterPath
62.         ? `<img class="suggestion-poster" src="${posterPath}" alt="${item.title || "Movie"} poster" loading="lazy" />`
63.         : '<div class="suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback">No image</div>';
64. 
65.       li.innerHTML = `
66.         ${posterHtml}
67.         <div class="suggestion-text">
68.           <span class="suggestion-title">${item.title || "Untitled"}</span>
69.           <span class="suggestion-year">${getMovieYear(item)}</span>
70.         </div>
71.       `;
72. 
73.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
74.         event.preventDefault();
75.       });
76. 
77.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
78.         activeIndex = index;
79.         syncActiveItem();
80.       });
81. 
82.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
83.     }
84. 
85.     openSuggestions();
86.   }
87. 
88.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
89.     currentResults = [];
90.     activeIndex = -1;
91.     suggestionList.innerHTML = `<li class="suggestion-item suggestion-${state}" role="option">${message}</li>`;
92.     openSuggestions();
93.   }
94. 
95.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
96.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
97.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
98.       return;
99.     }
100. 
101.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
102.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
103. 
104.     try {
105.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
106.       const payload = await response.json();
107. 
108.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
109.         return;
110.       }
111. 
112.       if (!response.ok) {
113.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
114.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
115.         return;
116.       }
117. 
118.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
119. 
120.       if (results.length === 0) {
121.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
122.         return;
123.       }
124. 
125.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
126.     } catch (error) {
127.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
128.         return;
129.       }
130.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
131.     }
132.   }
133. 
134.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
135.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
136.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
137. 
138.     if (!query) {
139.       closeSuggestions();
140.       suggestionList.innerHTML = "";
141.       currentResults = [];
142.       return;
143.     }
144. 
145.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
146.       requestCounter += 1;
147.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
148.     }, 300);
149.   });
150. 
151.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
152.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
153. 
154.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
155.       event.preventDefault();
156.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
157.       syncActiveItem();
158.       openSuggestions();
159.       return;
160.     }
161. 
162.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
163.       event.preventDefault();
164.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
165.       syncActiveItem();
166.       openSuggestions();
167.       return;
168.     }
169. 
170.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
171.       closeSuggestions();
172.       return;
173.     }
174. 
175.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
176.       event.preventDefault();
177.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
178.         goToSearchPage(currentResults[activeIndex].title || indexSearchInput.value);
179.         return;
180.       }
181.       goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
182.     }
183.   });
184. 
185.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
186.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
187.       openSuggestions();
188.     }
189.   });
190. 
191.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
192.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
193.   });
194. 
195.   indexSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
196.     event.preventDefault();
197.     const query = activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]
198.       ? currentResults[activeIndex].title || indexSearchInput.value
199.       : indexSearchInput.value;
200.     goToSearchPage(query);
201.   });
202. }
203.
```

108.     if (baseResults.length === 0) {
109.       setTmdbStatus("No movies matched your search.", "info");
110.       resultsGrid.innerHTML = '<p class="results-empty">No results found.</p>';
111.       return;
112.     }
113. 
114.     const detailedResults = await Promise.all(
115.       baseResults.map((movie) => fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: "Unknown", cast: "Unknown" })))
116.     );
117. 
118.     resultsGrid.innerHTML = detailedResults.map(createResultCard).join("");
119.     setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for "${query}".`, "success");
120.   } catch (error) {
121.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
122.     resultsGrid.innerHTML = '<p class="results-empty">Unable to load results right now.</p>';
123.   }
124. }
125. 
126. if (searchForm && searchInput) {
127.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
128.     event.preventDefault();
129.     const query = searchInput.value.trim();
130.     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
131.     params.set("query", query);
132.     const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
133.     window.history.replaceState({}, "", nextUrl);
134.     performSearch(query);
135.   });
136. 
137.   const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("query") || "";
138.   if (urlQuery) {
139.     searchInput.value = urlQuery;
140.     performSearch(urlQuery);
141.   }
142. }
143.
```

</details>

Implemented — and stayed within your requested scope.

### Added on `index` search

- Keyboard controls:
  - `ArrowDown` / `ArrowUp` cycles suggestions
  - `Enter` submits (active suggestion or typed query)

- Form submit + Enter both navigate to:
  - `search.html?query=...`
- Dropdown now shows small poster thumbnails + title + year (5–10 results)

diff --git a/style.css b/style.css
index 4d41d62..b15044e 100644
--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -376,3 +376,331 @@
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
