<details>
<summary>176 lines</summary>

```
1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. let isRedirecting = false;
9. 
10. function redirectTo(path) {
11.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14.   isRedirecting = true;
15.   window.location.replace(path);
16. }
17. 
18. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
19.   if (!authMessage) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22. 
23.   authMessage.textContent = message;
24.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
25.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
26. }
27. 
28. function showApp() {
29.   if (appShell) {
30.     appShell.hidden = false;
31.   }
32. }
33. 
34. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
35.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
36.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
37.     return;
38.   }
39. 
40.   if (appShell) {
41.     appShell.hidden = false;
42.   }
43. 
44.   if (authMessage) {
45.     setMessage(message, true);
46.     return;
47.   }
48. 
49.   window.alert(message);
50. }
51. 
52. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
53.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
54.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
55. }
56. 
57. async function getSession() {
58.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
59.   if (error) {
60.     throw error;
61.   }
62.   return data.session;
63. }
64. 
65. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
66.   const session = await getSession();
67. 
68.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") && !session) {
69.     redirectTo("auth.html");
70.     return null;
71.   }
72. 
73.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
74.     redirectTo("index.html");
75.     return session;
76.   }
77. 
78.   if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
79.     navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
80.   }
81. 
82.   showApp();
83.   return session;
84. }
85. 
86. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
87.   if (navUser) {
88.     navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
89.   }
90. 
91.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search")) {
92.     redirectTo("auth.html");
93.   }
94. 
95.   if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
96.     redirectTo("index.html");
97.   }
98. });
99. 
100. enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
101.   showApp();
102.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search") {
103.     redirectTo("auth.html");
104.     return;
105.   }
106. 
107.   setMessage(`Session check failed: ${error.message}`, true);
108. });
109. 
110. if (signupForm) {
111.   signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
112.     event.preventDefault();
113. 
114.     const email = signupForm.email.value.trim();
115.     const password = signupForm.password.value;
116. 
117.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
118.       email,
119.       password,
120.     });
121. 
122.     if (error) {
123.       setMessage(`Sign up failed: ${error.message}`, true);
124.       return;
125.     }
126. 
127.     if (data.user && !data.session) {
128.       setMessage("Sign up successful. Check your email to confirm your account.");
129.       return;
130.     }
131. 
132.     setMessage("Sign up successful. You are now logged in.");
133.     signupForm.reset();
134.   });
135. }
136. 
137. if (loginForm) {
138.   loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
139.     event.preventDefault();
140. 
141.     const email = loginForm.email.value.trim();
142.     const password = loginForm.password.value;
143. 
144.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
145.       email,
146.       password,
147.     });
148. 
149.     if (error) {
150.       setMessage(`Login failed: ${error.message}`, true);
151.       return;
152.     }
153. 
154.     setMessage("Login successful.");
155.     loginForm.reset();
156.     redirectTo("index.html");
157.   });
158. }
159. 
160. if (logoutButton) {
161.   logoutButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
162.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
163. 
164.     if (error) {
165.       if (authMessage) {
166.         setMessage(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`, true);
167.       } else {
168.         window.alert(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`);
169.       }
170.       return;
171.     }
172. 
173.     redirectTo("auth.html");
174.   });
175. }
176.
```

1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");

3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
6.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
7.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
8.   let debounceHandle;
9.   let requestCounter = 0;
10.   let activeIndex = -1;
11.   let currentResults = [];
12. 
13.   function getMovieYear(item) {
14.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
15.   }
16. 
17.   function clearSuggestions() {
18.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
19.   }
20. 
21.   function openSuggestions() {
22.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
23.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
24.   }
25. 
26.   function closeSuggestions() {
27.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
28.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
29.     activeIndex = -1;
30.   }
31. 
32.   function syncActiveItem() {
33.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
34.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
35.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
36.         item.classList.add("active");
37.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
38.       } else {
39.         item.classList.remove("active");
40.       }
41.     });
42.   }
43. 
44.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
45.     const trimmed = query.trim();
46.     if (!trimmed) {
47.       return;
48.     }
49.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
50.   }
51. 
52.   function createPosterElement(item) {
53.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
54. 
55.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
56.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
57.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
58.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
59.       return fallback;
60.     }
61. 
62.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
63.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
64.     poster.loading = "lazy";
65.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
66.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
67.     return poster;
68.   }
69. 
70.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
71.     currentResults = items;
72.     clearSuggestions();
73.     activeIndex = -1;
74. 
75.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
76.       const li = document.createElement("li");
77.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
78.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
79.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
80.       li.tabIndex = -1;
81. 
82.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
83. 
84.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
85.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
86. 
87.       const title = document.createElement("span");
88.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
89.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
90. 
91.       const year = document.createElement("span");
92.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
93.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
94. 
95.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
96.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
97.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
98. 
99.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
100.         event.preventDefault();
101.       });
102. 
103.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
104.         activeIndex = index;
105.         syncActiveItem();
106.       });
107. 
108.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
109.     }
110. 
111.     openSuggestions();
112.   }
113. 
114.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
115.     currentResults = [];
116.     activeIndex = -1;
117.     clearSuggestions();
118. 
119.     const li = document.createElement("li");
120.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
121.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
122.     li.textContent = message;
123.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
124. 
125.     openSuggestions();
126.   }
127. 
128.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {

130.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
131.       return;
132.     }
133. 
134.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
135.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
136. 
137.     try {
138.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);

140.

142.         return;
143.       }
144.

146.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
147.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
148.         return;
149.       }
150.

152. 
153.       if (results.length === 0) {

155.         return;
156.       }
157. 
158.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
159.     } catch (error) {
160.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
161.         return;
162.       }
163.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
164.     }
165.   }
166. 
167.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
168.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
169.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
170. 
171.     if (!query) {
172.       closeSuggestions();
173.       clearSuggestions();

175.       return;
176.     }

183. 
184.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {

198.       syncActiveItem();

205.       return;
206.     }

210.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {

<details>
<summary>398 lines</summary>

```
1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
3. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
4. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("search-suggestion-list");
5. const resultsGrid = document.getElementById("search-results");
6. 
7. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342";
8. const SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9. 
10. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
11.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14. 
15.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
16.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
17.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
18. }
19. 
20. function getYear(dateString) {
21.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
22. }
23. 
24. function getDirector(credits) {
25.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
26.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
27.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getCast(credits) {
31.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
32.   if (cast.length === 0) {
33.     return "Unknown";
34.   }
35.   return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
36. }
37. 
38. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
39.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
40.   if (className) {
41.     el.className = className;
42.   }
43.   if (typeof text === "string") {
44.     el.textContent = text;
45.   }
46.   return el;
47. }
48. 
49. function createPoster(movie) {
50.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
51. 
52.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
53.     return makeElement("div", "result-poster result-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
54.   }
55. 
56.   const img = makeElement("img", "result-poster");
57.   img.loading = "lazy";
58.   img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
59.   img.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
60.   return img;
61. }
62. 
63. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
64.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
65.   if (!label) {
66.     p.textContent = value;
67.     return p;
68.   }
69. 
70.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
71.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
72.   p.appendChild(strong);
73.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
74.   return p;
75. }
76. 
77. function createResultCard(movie) {
78.   const article = makeElement("article", "result-card");
79.   article.appendChild(createPoster(movie));
80. 
81.   const content = makeElement("div", "result-content");
82. 
83.   const titleRow = makeElement("h2");
84.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(movie.title || "Untitled"));
85.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
86.   const year = makeElement("span", "", `(${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
87.   titleRow.appendChild(year);
88. 
89.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
90.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
91.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
92.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
93.     : "Genres unavailable";
94. 
95.   content.appendChild(titleRow);
96.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("", `⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}`));
97.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", movie.director || "Unknown"));
98.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", movie.cast || "Unknown"));
99.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
100.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
101. 
102.   article.appendChild(content);
103.   return article;
104. }
105. 
106. function setResultsMessage(className, text) {
107.   resultsGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("p", className, text));
108. }
109. 
110. async function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {
111.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
112.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
113.   const payload = await response.json();
114. 
115.   if (!response.ok) {
116.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
117.   }
118. 
119.   return {
120.     ...payload,
121.     director: getDirector(payload.credits),
122.     cast: getCast(payload.credits),
123.   };
124. }
125. 
126. async function performSearch(rawQuery) {
127.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
128.   const query = rawQuery.trim();
129. 
130.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
131.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
132.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
133.     return;
134.   }
135. 
136.   if (!query) {
137.     setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title to search.", "info");
138.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
139.     return;
140.   }
141. 
142.   setTmdbStatus("Searching TMDB...", "info");
143.   setResultsMessage("results-loading", "Loading results...");
144. 
145.   try {
146.     const searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
147.     const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);
148.     const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();
149. 
150.     if (!searchResponse.ok) {
151.       throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || "TMDB search failed.");
152.     }
153. 
154.     const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];
155. 
156.     if (baseResults.length === 0) {
157.       setTmdbStatus("No movies matched your search.", "info");
158.       setResultsMessage("results-empty", "No results found.");
159.       return;
160.     }
161. 
162.     const detailedResults = await Promise.all(
163.       baseResults.map((movie) =>
164.         fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: "Unknown", cast: "Unknown" }))
165.       )
166.     );
167. 
168.     const cards = detailedResults.map(createResultCard);
169.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
170.     setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for "${query}".`, "success");
171.   } catch (error) {
172.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
173.     setResultsMessage("results-empty", "Unable to load results right now.");
174.   }
175. }
176. 
177. if (searchForm && searchInput && suggestionList) {
178.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
179.   let debounceHandle;
180.   let requestCounter = 0;
181.   let activeIndex = -1;
182.   let currentSuggestions = [];
183. 
184.   function clearSuggestions() {
185.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
186.   }
187. 
188.   function openSuggestions() {
189.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
190.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
191.   }
192. 
193.   function closeSuggestions() {
194.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
195.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
196.     activeIndex = -1;
197.   }
198. 
199.   function syncActiveSuggestion() {
200.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
201.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
202.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
203.         item.classList.add("active");
204.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
205.       } else {
206.         item.classList.remove("active");
207.       }
208.     });
209.   }
210. 
211.   function renderSuggestionInfo(message, state = "info") {
212.     currentSuggestions = [];
213.     activeIndex = -1;
214.     clearSuggestions();
215. 
216.     const li = makeElement("li", `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`, message);
217.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
218.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
219.     openSuggestions();
220.   }
221. 
222.   function createSuggestionPoster(movie) {
223.     const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
224. 
225.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
226.       return makeElement("div", "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback", "No image");
227.     }
228. 
229.     const img = makeElement("img", "suggestion-poster");
230.     img.loading = "lazy";
231.     img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
232.     img.src = `${SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
233.     return img;
234.   }
235. 
236.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
237.     currentSuggestions = items;
238.     activeIndex = -1;
239.     clearSuggestions();
240. 
241.     items.forEach((movie, index) => {
242.       const li = makeElement("li", "suggestion-item");
243.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
244.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
245.       li.tabIndex = -1;
246. 
247.       li.appendChild(createSuggestionPoster(movie));
248. 
249.       const textWrap = makeElement("div", "suggestion-text");
250.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-title", movie.title || "Untitled"));
251.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-year", getYear(movie.release_date)));
252.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
253. 
254.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
255.         event.preventDefault();
256.       });
257. 
258.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
259.         activeIndex = index;
260.         syncActiveSuggestion();
261.       });
262. 
263.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
264.     });
265. 
266.     openSuggestions();
267.   }
268. 
269.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
270.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
271.       renderSuggestionInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
272.       return;
273.     }
274. 
275.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
276.     renderSuggestionInfo("Searching...", "loading");
277. 
278.     try {
279.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
280.       const payload = await response.json();
281. 
282.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
283.         return;
284.       }
285. 
286.       if (!response.ok) {
287.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
288.         renderSuggestionInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
289.         return;
290.       }
291. 
292.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
293. 
294.       if (results.length === 0) {
295.         renderSuggestionInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
296.         return;
297.       }
298. 
299.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
300.     } catch (error) {
301.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
302.         return;
303.       }
304.       renderSuggestionInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
305.     }
306.   }
307. 
308.   function submitQuery(query) {
309.     const trimmed = query.trim();
310.     if (!trimmed) {
311.       return;
312.     }
313. 
314.     searchInput.value = trimmed;
315.     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
316.     params.set("query", trimmed);
317.     const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
318.     window.history.replaceState({}, "", nextUrl);
319.     closeSuggestions();
320.     performSearch(trimmed);
321.   }
322. 
323.   searchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
324.     const query = searchInput.value.trim();
325.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
326. 
327.     if (!query) {
328.       closeSuggestions();
329.       clearSuggestions();
330.       currentSuggestions = [];
331.       return;
332.     }
333. 
334.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
335.       requestCounter += 1;
336.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
337.     }, 300);
338.   });
339. 
340.   searchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
341.     const hasSelectable = currentSuggestions.length > 0;
342. 
343.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
344.       event.preventDefault();
345.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentSuggestions.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
346.       syncActiveSuggestion();
347.       openSuggestions();
348.       return;
349.     }
350. 
351.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
352.       event.preventDefault();
353.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentSuggestions.length - 1;
354.       syncActiveSuggestion();
355.       openSuggestions();
356.       return;
357.     }
358. 
359.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
360.       closeSuggestions();
361.       return;
362.     }
363. 
364.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
365.       event.preventDefault();
366.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
367.         submitQuery(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].title || searchInput.value);
368.         return;
369.       }
370.       submitQuery(searchInput.value);
371.     }
372.   });
373. 
374.   searchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
375.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
376.       openSuggestions();
377.     }
378.   });
379. 
380.   searchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
381.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
382.   });
383. 
384.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
385.     event.preventDefault();
386.     const query = activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]
387.       ? currentSuggestions[activeIndex].title || searchInput.value
388.       : searchInput.value;
389.     submitQuery(query);
390.   });
391. 
392.   const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("query") || "";
393.   if (urlQuery) {
394.     searchInput.value = urlQuery;
395.     performSearch(urlQuery);
396.   }
397. }
398.
```

</details>

query.trim();\n    if (!trimmed) {\n      return;\n    }\n    window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;\n  }\n\n  function goToMoviePage(movieId) {\n    if (!movieId) {\n      return;\n    }\n    window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;\n  }\n\n  function createPosterElement(item) {\n    const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === \"string\" ? item.poster_path : \"\";\n\n    if (!posterPath.startsWith(\"/\")) {\n      const fallback = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      fallback.className = \"suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback\";\n      fallback.textContent = \"No image\";\n      return fallback;\n    }\n\n    const poster = document.createElement(\"img\");\n    poster.className = \"suggestion-poster\";\n    poster.loading = \"lazy\";\n    poster.alt = `${item.title || \"Movie\"} poster`;\n    poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;\n    return poster;\n  }\n\n  function renderSuggestionItems(items) {\n    currentResults = items;\n    clearSuggestions();\n    activeIndex = -1;\n\n    for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {\n      const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n      li.className = \"suggestion-item\";\n      li.setAttribute(\"role\", \"option\");\n      li.setAttribute(\"data-index\", String(index));\n      li.tabIndex = -1;\n\n      li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));\n\n      const textWrap = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      textWrap.className = \"suggestion-text\";\n\n      const title = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      title.className = \"suggestion-title\";\n      title.textContent = item.title || \"Untitled\";\n\n      const year = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      year.className = \"suggestion-year\";\n      year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);\n\n      textWrap.appendChild(title);\n      textWrap.appendChild(year);\n      li.appendChild(textWrap);\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", (event) => {\n        event.preventDefault();\n      });\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mouseenter\", () => {\n        activeIndex = index;\n        syncActiveItem();\n      });\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n        goToMoviePage(item.id);\n      });\n\n      suggestionList.appendChild(li);\n    }\n\n    openSuggestions();\n  }\n\n  function renderInfo(message, state = \"info\") {\n    currentResults = [];\n    activeIndex = -1;\n    clearSuggestions();\n\n    const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n    li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;\n    li.setAttribute(\"role\", \"option\");\n    li.textContent = message;\n    suggestionList.appendChild(li);\n\n    openSuggestions();\n  }\n\n  async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {\n    if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {\n      renderInfo(\"TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js\", \"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;\n    renderInfo(\"Searching...\", \"loading\");\n\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(endpoint);\n      const payload = await response.json();\n\n      if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        const errorMessage = payload.status_message || \"Search failed.\";\n        renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, \"error\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];\n\n      if (results.length === 0) {\n        renderInfo(\"No matches yet.\", \"info\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      renderSuggestionItems(results);\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {\n        return;\n      }\n      renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, \"error\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", () => {\n    const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();\n    clearTimeout(debounceHandle);\n\n    if (!query) {\n      closeSuggestions();\n      clearSuggestions();\n      currentResults = [];\n      return;\n    }\n\n    debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {\n      requestCounter += 1;\n      fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);\n    }, 300);\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n    const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;\n\n    if (event.key === \"ArrowDown\" && hasSelectable) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;\n      syncActiveItem();\n      openSuggestions();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (event.key === \"ArrowUp\" && hasSelectable) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : }\n      goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);\n    }\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"focus\", () => {\n    if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {\n      openSuggestions();\n    }\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"blur\", () => {\n    setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);\n  });\n\n  indexSearchForm.addEventListener(\"submit\", (event) => {\n    event.preventDefault();\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {\n      goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);\n      return;\n    }\n document.getElementById(\"tmdb-status\");\nconst searchForm = document.getElementById(\"movie-search-form\");\nconst searchInput = document.getElementById(\"movie-query\");\nconst suggestionList = SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE = \"https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92\";\n\nfunction setTmdbStatus(message, kind = \"info\") {\n  if (!tmdbStatus) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  tmdbStatus.textContent = message;\n  tmdbStatus.classList.remove(\"success\", \"error\", \"info\");\n  tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);\n}\n\nfunction getYear(dateString) {\n  return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : \"Unknown\";\n}\n\nfunction getDirector(credits) {\n  const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];\n  const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === \"Director\");\n  return director?.name || \"Unknown\";\n}\n\nfunction getCast(credits) {\n  const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];\n  if (cast.length === 0) {\n    return \"Unknown\";\n  }\n  return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(\", \");\n}\n\nfunction makeElement(tag, className, text) {\n  const el = document.createElement(tag);\n  if (className) {\n    el.className = className;\n  }\n  if (typeof text === \"string\") {\n    el.textContent = text;\n  }\n  return el;\n}\n\nfunction createPoster(movie) {\n  const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === \"string\" ? movie.poster_path : \"\";\n\n  if (!posterPath.startsWith(\"/\")) {\n    return makeElement(\"div\", \"result-poster result-poster-fallback\", \"No Poster\");\n  }\n\n  const img = makeElement(\"img\", \"result-poster\");\n  img.loading = \"lazy\";\n  img.alt = `${movie.title || \"Movie\"} poster`;\n  img.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;\n  return img;\n}\n\nfunction createMetaLine(label, value) {\n  const p = makeElement(\"p\", \"result-meta\");\n  if (!label) {\n    p.textContent = value;\n    return p;\n  }\n\n  const strong = document.createElement(\"strong\");\n  strong.textContent = `${label}: `;\n  p.appendChild(strong);\n  p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));\n  return p;\n}\n\nfunction goToMoviePage(movieId) {\n  if (!movieId) {\n    return;\n  }\n  window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;\n}\n\nfunction createResultCard(movie) {\n  const article = makeElement(\"article\", \"result-card\");\n  article.tabIndex = 0;\n  article.setAttribute(\"role\", \"button\");\n\n  article.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n    goToMoviePage(movie.id);\n  });\n\n  article.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n    if (event.key === \"Enter\" || event.key === \" \") {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      goToMoviePage(movie.id);\n    }\n  });\n\n  article.appendChild(createPoster(movie));\n\n  const content = makeElement(\"div\", \"result-content\");\n\n  const titleRow = makeElement(\"h2\");\n  titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(movie.title || \"Untitled\"));\n  titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(\" \"));\n  const year = makeElement(\"span\", \"\", `(${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);\n  titleRow.appendChild(year);\n\n  const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === \"number\" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : \"N/A\";\n  const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : \"Runtime unavailable\";\n  const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0\n    ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(\", \")\n    : \"Genres unavailable\";\n\n  content.appendChild(titleRow);\n  content.appendChild(createMetaLine(\"\", `⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}`));\n  content.appendChild(createMetaLine(\"Director\", movie.director || \"Unknown\"));\n  content.appendChild(createMetaLine(\"Cast\", movie.cast || \"Unknown\"));\n  content.appendChild(createMetaLine(\"Genres\", genres));\n  content.appendChild(makeElement(\"p\", \"result-overview\", movie.overview || \"No overview available.\"));\n\n  article.appendChild(content);\n  return article;\n}\n\nfunction setResultsMessage(className, text) {\n  resultsGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement(\"p\", className, text));\n}\n\nasync function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {\n  const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;\n  const response = await fetch(endpoint);\n  const payload = await response.json();\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    throw new Error(payload.status_message || \"Failed to load movie details.\");\n  }\n\n  return {\n    ...payload,\n    director: getDirector(payload.credits),\n    cast: getCast(payload.credits),\n  };\n}\n\nasync function performSearch(rawQuery) {\n  const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;\n  const query = rawQuery.trim();\n\n  if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {\n    setTmdbStatus(\"TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.\", \"error\");\n    resultsGrid.replaceChildren();\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!query) {\n    setTmdbStatus(\"Enter a movie title to search.\", \"info\");\n searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;\n    const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);\n    const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();\n\n    if (!searchResponse.ok) {\n      throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || \"TMDB search failed.\");\n    }\n\n    const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];\n\n    if (baseResults.length === 0) {\n      setTmdbStatus(\"No movies matched your search.\", \"info\");\n      setResultsMessage(\"results-empty\", \"No results found.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const detailedResults = await Promise.all(\n      baseResults.map((movie) =>\n        fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: \"Unknown\", cast: \"Unknown\" }))\n      )\n    );\n\n    const cards = detailedResults.map(createResultCard);\n    resultsGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);\n    setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for \"${query}\".`, \"success\");\n  } catch (error) {\n    setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: window.appConfig?.tmdb;\n  let debounceHandle;\n  let requestCounter = 0;\n  let activeIndex = -1;\n  let currentSuggestions = [];\n\n  function clearSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.replaceChildren();\n  }\n\n  function openSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.classList.add(\"open\");\n    searchInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n  }\n\n  function closeSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.classList.remove(\"open\");\n    searchInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n    activeIndex = -1;\n  }\n\n  function syncActiveSuggestion() {\n    const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(\".suggestion-item[data-index]\");\n    items.forEach((item, idx) => {\n      if (idx === activeIndex) {\n        item.classList.add(\"active\");\n li.appendChild(createSuggestionPoster(movie));\n\n      const textWrap = makeElement(\"div\", \"suggestion-text\");\n      textWrap.appendChild(makeElement(\"span\", \"suggestion-title\", movie.title || \"Untitled\"));\n      textWrap.appendChild(makeElement(\"span\", \"suggestion-year\", getYear(movie.release_date)));\n      li.appendChild(textWrap);\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", li.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n        goToMoviePage(movie.id);\n      });\n\n      suggestionList.appendChild(li);\n    });\n\n    openSuggestions();\n  }\n\n  async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {\n    if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {\n      renderSuggestionInfo(\"TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js\", \"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n renderSuggestionInfo(\"Searching...\", \"loading\");\n\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(endpoint);\n      const payload = await response.json();\n\n      if (localRequestId !== searchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", () => {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    clearTimeout(debounceHandle);\n\n    if (!query) {\n      closeSuggestions();\n p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));\n  return p;\n}\n\nfunction renderMovieDetail(movie) {\n  movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();\n\n  const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === \"string\" ? movie.poster_path : \"\";\n  const poster = posterPath.startsWith(\"/\")\n    ? makeElement(\"img\", \"movie-poster\")\n    : makeElement(\"div\", \"movie-poster movie-poster-fallback\", (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);\n  heading.appendChild(year);\n\n  const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === \"number\" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : \"N/A\";\n  const runtime = movie.runtime content.appendChild(createMetaLine(\"Cast\", getCast(movie.credits)));\n  content.appendChild(createMetaLine(\"Genres\", genres));\n  content.appendChild(makeElement(\"p\", \"result-overview\", ### ✅ `view`

**view the file at C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js.**

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js

<details>
<summary>131 lines</summary>

```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. 
4. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
5. 
6. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
7.   if (!movieStatus) {
8.     return;
9.   }
10.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
11.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
12.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
13. }
14. 
15. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
16.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
17.   if (className) {
18.     el.className = className;
19.   }
20.   if (typeof text === "string") {
21.     el.textContent = text;
22.   }
23.   return el;
24. }
25. 
26. function getYear(dateString) {
27.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getDirector(credits) {
31.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
32.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
33.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
34. }
35. 
36. function getCast(credits) {
37.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
38.   if (cast.length === 0) {
39.     return "Unknown";
40.   }
41.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
42. }
43. 
44. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
45.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
46.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
47.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
48.   p.appendChild(strong);
49.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
50.   return p;
51. }
52. 
53. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
54.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
55. 
56.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
57.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
58.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
59.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
60. 
61.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
62.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
63.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
64.     poster.loading = "lazy";
65.   }
66. 
67.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
68.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
69.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
70.   heading.appendChild(year);
71. 
72.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
73.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
74.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
75.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
76.     : "Genres unavailable";
77. 
78.   content.appendChild(heading);
79.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
80.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
81.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
82.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
83.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
84.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
85.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
86. 
87.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review (Coming Soon)");
88.   reviewButton.type = "button";
89.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
90.     setMovieStatus("Write Review is not active yet.", "info");
91.   });
92.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
93. 
94.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
95.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
96. }
97. 
98. async function loadMoviePage() {
99.   const movieId = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
100.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
101. 
102.   if (!movieId) {
103.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
104.     return;
105.   }
106. 
107.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
108.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
109.     return;
110.   }
111. 
112.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
113. 
114.   try {
115.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(movieId)}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
116.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
117.     const payload = await response.json();
118. 
119.     if (!response.ok) {
120.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
121.     }
122. 
123.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
124.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
125.   } catch (error) {
126.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
127.   }
128. }
129. 
130. loadMoviePage();
131.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1243m 5s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Implemented.

### New behavior

- Clicking a movie in either dropdown now opens:
  - `movie.html?id=\<tmdb_movie_id\>`
- Clicking a movie card in extended search results now opens the same movie page.
- Keyboard Enter on highlighted suggestion also opens the movie page.

### New page added

- `movie.html` + `js/movie.js`
  - Shows same core info as results page (poster, title/year, rating, runtime, release date, director, cast, genres, overview)
  - Has a `Write Review (Coming Soon)` button (placeholder only)
  - Includes an empty “User Reviews” section for future community reviews

### Also updated

- Auth guard now protects `movie` page too (`data-page="movie"` in `auth.js`)
- Added styling for movie detail layout + reviews placeholder in `style.css`

18.  ## Current Status

55.  const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = "your-anon-key";

63.

324. +/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */
325. +.search-page {
326. +  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);
327. +  display: grid;
328. +  place-items: center;
329. +  padding: 2rem 1rem;
330. +}
331. +
332. +.search-card {
333. +  width: min(900px, 100%);
334. +  background: var(--bg-card);
335. +  border: 1px solid var(--border);
336. +  border-radius: var(--radius);
337. +  padding: 1.6rem;
338. +}
339. +
340. +.search-header h1 {
341. +  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
342. +  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
343. +}
344. +
345. +.search-header p {
346. +  color: var(--text-muted);
347. +  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
348. +}
349. +
350. +.search-form {
351. +  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
352. +}
353. +
354. +.search-form label {
355. +  display: block;
356. +  color: var(--text-muted);
357. +  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
358. +  font-size: 0.92rem;
359. +}
360. +
361. +.search-row {
362. +  display: flex;
363. +  gap: 0.7rem;
364. +  flex-wrap: wrap;
365. +}
366. +
367. +.search-row input {
368. +  flex: 1;
369. +  min-width: 220px;
370. +  background: #0f1015;
371. +  border: 1px solid var(--border);
372. +  border-radius: 8px;
373. +  color: var(--text-primary);
374. +  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
375. +}
376. +
377. +.search-row input:focus {
378. +  outline: none;
379. +  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
380. +}
381. +
382. +.tmdb-health {
383. +  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
384. +  padding-top: 1rem;
385. +}
386. +
387. +.tmdb-health h2 {
388. +  font-size: 1.1rem;
389. +  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
390. +}
391. +
392. +.tmdb-status {
393. +  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
394. +  border-radius: 8px;
395. +  border: 1px solid transparent;
396. +  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
397. +  font-size: 0.95rem;
398. +}
399. +
400. +.tmdb-status.info {
401. +  color: #c8d3e5;
402. +  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
403. +  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
404. +}
405. +
406. +.tmdb-status.success {
407. +  color: #b5f5c4;
408. +  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
409. +  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
410. +}
411. +
412. +.tmdb-status.error {
413. +  color: #ffd4d8;
414. +  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
415. +  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
416. +}
417. +
418. +/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
419. +.index-search {
420. +  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
421. +}
422. +
423. +.index-search-wrap {
424. +  max-width: 760px;
425. +  margin: 0 auto;
426. +}
427. +
428. +.index-search-wrap label {
429. +  display: block;
430. +  color: var(--text-muted);
431. +  font-size: 0.92rem;
432. +  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
433. +}
434. +
435. +.index-search-input-wrap {
436. +  position: relative;
437. +}
438. +
439. +.index-search-input-wrap input {
440. +  width: 100%;
441. +  background: #0f1015;
442. +  border: 1px solid var(--border);
443. +  border-radius: 10px;
444. +  color: var(--text-primary);
445. +  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
446. +  font-size: 1rem;
447. +}
448. +
449. +.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
450. +  outline: none;
451. +  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
452. +}
453. +
454. +.suggestion-list {
455. +  position: absolute;
456. +  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
457. +  left: 0;
458. +  right: 0;
459. +  list-style: none;
460. +  margin: 0;
461. +  padding: 0.3rem;
462. +  background: #161821;
463. +  border: 1px solid var(--border);
464. +  border-radius: 10px;
465. +  max-height: 360px;
466. +  overflow-y: auto;
467. +  display: none;
468. +  z-index: 60;
469. +}
470. +
471. +.suggestion-list.open {
472. +  display: block;
473. +}
474. +
475. +.suggestion-item {
476. +  border-radius: 8px;
477. +  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
478. +  font-size: 0.95rem;
479. +  color: var(--text-primary);
480. +  cursor: default;
481. +}
482. +
483. +.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
484. +  margin-top: 0.2rem;
485. +}
486. +
487. +.suggestion-item:hover {
488. +  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
489. +}
490. +
491. +.suggestion-loading,
492. +.suggestion-info {
493. +  color: var(--text-muted);
494. +}
495. +
496. +.suggestion-error {
497. +  color: #ffd4d8;
498. +}
499. +
500. +.search-submit-btn {
501. +  position: absolute;
502. +  top: 50%;
503. +  right: 0.45rem;
504. +  transform: translateY(-50%);
505. +  border: 1px solid var(--border);
506. +  background: #23252f;
507. +  color: var(--text-primary);
508. +  border-radius: 8px;
509. +  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
510. +  cursor: pointer;
511. +}
512. +
513. +.search-submit-btn:hover {
514. +  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
515. +  color: var(--accent-alt);
516. +}
517. +
518. +.index-search-input-wrap input {
519. +  padding-right: 3rem;
520. +}
521. +
522. +.suggestion-item {
523. +  display: grid;
524. +  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
525. +  align-items: center;
526. +  gap: 0.65rem;
527. +}
528. +
529. +.suggestion-item.active {
530. +  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
531. +}
532. +
533. +.suggestion-poster {
534. +  width: 46px;
535. +  height: 68px;
536. +  object-fit: cover;
537. +  border-radius: 6px;
538. +  border: 1px solid var(--border);
539. +}
540. +

542. +  width: 46px;
543. +  height: 68px;
544. +  border-radius: 6px;
545. +  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
546. +  color: var(--text-muted);
547. +  font-size: 0.7rem;
548. +  display: grid;
549. +  place-items: center;
550. +}
551. +
552. +.suggestion-text {

555. +}
556. +
557. +.suggestion-title {

565. +}
566. +
567. +.search-results-page {
568. +  max-width: 1200px;
569. +  margin: 0 auto;
570. +  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
571. +}
572. +

575. +}
576. +

581. +}

603. +  border-radius: 8px;

```
1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
6.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
7.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
8.   let debounceHandle;
9.   let requestCounter = 0;
10.   let activeIndex = -1;
11.   let currentResults = [];
12. 
13.   function getMovieYear(item) {
14.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
15.   }
16. 
17.   function clearSuggestions() {
18.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
19.   }
20. 
21.   function openSuggestions() {
22.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
23.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
24.   }
25. 
26.   function closeSuggestions() {
27.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
28.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
29.     activeIndex = -1;
30.   }
31. 
32.   function syncActiveItem() {
33.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
34.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
35.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
36.         item.classList.add("active");
37.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
38.       } else {
39.         item.classList.remove("active");
40.       }
41.     });
42.   }
43. 
44.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
45.     const trimmed = query.trim();
46.     if (!trimmed) {
47.       return;
48.     }
49.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
50.   }
51. 
52.   function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
53.     if (!movieId) {
54.       return;
55.     }
56.     window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
57.   }
58. 
59.   function createPosterElement(item) {
60.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
61. 
62.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
63.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
64.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
65.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
66.       return fallback;
67.     }
68. 
69.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
70.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
71.     poster.loading = "lazy";
72.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
73.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
74.     return poster;
75.   }
76. 
77.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
78.     currentResults = items;
79.     clearSuggestions();
80.     activeIndex = -1;
81. 
82.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
83.       const li = document.createElement("li");
84.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
85.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
86.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
87.       li.tabIndex = -1;
88. 
89.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
90. 
91.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
92.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
93. 
94.       const title = document.createElement("span");
95.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
96.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
97. 
98.       const year = document.createElement("span");
99.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
100.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
101. 
102.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
103.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
104.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
105. 
106.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
107.         event.preventDefault();
108.       });
109. 
110.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
111.         activeIndex = index;
112.         syncActiveItem();
113.       });
114. 
115.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
116.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
117.       });
118. 
119.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
120.     }
121. 
122.     openSuggestions();
123.   }
124. 
125.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
126.     currentResults = [];
127.     activeIndex = -1;
128.     clearSuggestions();
129. 
130.     const li = document.createElement("li");
131.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
132.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
133.     li.textContent = message;
134.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
135. 
136.     openSuggestions();
137.   }
138. 
139.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
140.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
141.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
142.       return;
143.     }
144. 
145.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
146.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
147. 
148.     try {
149.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
150.       const payload = await response.json();
151. 
152.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
153.         return;
154.       }
155. 
156.       if (!response.ok) {
157.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
158.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
159.         return;
160.       }
161. 
162.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
163. 
164.       if (results.length === 0) {
165.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
166.         return;
167.       }
168. 
169.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
170.     } catch (error) {
171.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
172.         return;
173.       }
174.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
175.     }
176.   }
177. 
178.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
179.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
180.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
181. 
182.     if (!query) {
183.       closeSuggestions();
184.       clearSuggestions();
185.       currentResults = [];
186.       return;
187.     }
188. 
189.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
190.       requestCounter += 1;
191.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
192.     }, 300);
193.   });
194. 
195.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
196.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
197. 
198.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
199.       event.preventDefault();
200.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
201.       syncActiveItem();
202.       openSuggestions();
203.       return;
204.     }
205. 
206.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
207.       event.preventDefault();
208.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
209.       syncActiveItem();
210.       openSuggestions();
211.       return;
212.     }
213. 
214.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
215.       closeSuggestions();
216.       return;
217.     }
218. 
219.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
220.       event.preventDefault();
221.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
222.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
223.         return;
224.       }
225.       goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
226.     }
227.   });
228. 
229.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
230.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
231.       openSuggestions();
232.     }
233.   });
234. 
235.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
236.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
237.   });
238. 
239.   indexSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
240.     event.preventDefault();
241.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
242.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
243.       return;
244.     }
245.     goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
246.   });
247. }
248.
```

<details>
<summary>424 lines</summary>

```
1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
3. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
4. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("search-suggestion-list");
5. const resultsGrid = document.getElementById("search-results");
6. 
7. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342";
8. const SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9. 
10. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
11.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14. 
15.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
16.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
17.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
18. }
19. 
20. function getYear(dateString) {
21.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
22. }
23. 
24. function getDirector(credits) {
25.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
26.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
27.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getCast(credits) {
31.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
32.   if (cast.length === 0) {
33.     return "Unknown";
34.   }
35.   return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
36. }
37. 
38. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
39.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
40.   if (className) {
41.     el.className = className;
42.   }
43.   if (typeof text === "string") {
44.     el.textContent = text;
45.   }
46.   return el;
47. }
48. 
49. function createPoster(movie) {
50.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
51. 
52.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
53.     return makeElement("div", "result-poster result-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
54.   }
55. 
56.   const img = makeElement("img", "result-poster");
57.   img.loading = "lazy";
58.   img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
59.   img.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
60.   return img;
61. }
62. 
63. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
64.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
65.   if (!label) {
66.     p.textContent = value;
67.     return p;
68.   }
69. 
70.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
71.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
72.   p.appendChild(strong);
73.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
74.   return p;
75. }
76. 
77. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
78.   if (!movieId) {
79.     return;
80.   }
81.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
82. }
83. 
84. function createResultCard(movie) {
85.   const article = makeElement("article", "result-card");
86.   article.tabIndex = 0;
87.   article.setAttribute("role", "button");
88. 
89.   article.addEventListener("click", () => {
90.     goToMoviePage(movie.id);
91.   });
92. 
93.   article.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
94.     if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
95.       event.preventDefault();
96.       goToMoviePage(movie.id);
97.     }
98.   });
99. 
100.   article.appendChild(createPoster(movie));
101. 
102.   const content = makeElement("div", "result-content");
103. 
104.   const titleRow = makeElement("h2");
105.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(movie.title || "Untitled"));
106.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
107.   const year = makeElement("span", "", `(${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
108.   titleRow.appendChild(year);
109. 
110.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
111.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
112.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
113.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
114.     : "Genres unavailable";
115. 
116.   content.appendChild(titleRow);
117.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("", `⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}`));
118.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", movie.director || "Unknown"));
119.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", movie.cast || "Unknown"));
120.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
121.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
122. 
123.   article.appendChild(content);
124.   return article;
125. }
126. 
127. function setResultsMessage(className, text) {
128.   resultsGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("p", className, text));
129. }
130. 
131. async function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {
132.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
133.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
134.   const payload = await response.json();
135. 
136.   if (!response.ok) {
137.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
138.   }
139. 
140.   return {
141.     ...payload,
142.     director: getDirector(payload.credits),
143.     cast: getCast(payload.credits),
144.   };
145. }
146. 
147. async function performSearch(rawQuery) {
148.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
149.   const query = rawQuery.trim();
150. 
151.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
152.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
153.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
154.     return;
155.   }
156. 
157.   if (!query) {
158.     setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title to search.", "info");
159.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
160.     return;
161.   }
162. 
163.   setTmdbStatus("Searching TMDB...", "info");
164.   setResultsMessage("results-loading", "Loading results...");
165. 
166.   try {
167.     const searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
168.     const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);
169.     const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();
170. 
171.     if (!searchResponse.ok) {
172.       throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || "TMDB search failed.");
173.     }
174. 
175.     const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];
176. 
177.     if (baseResults.length === 0) {
178.       setTmdbStatus("No movies matched your search.", "info");
179.       setResultsMessage("results-empty", "No results found.");
180.       return;
181.     }
182. 
183.     const detailedResults = await Promise.all(
184.       baseResults.map((movie) =>
185.         fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: "Unknown", cast: "Unknown" }))
186.       )
187.     );
188. 
189.     const cards = detailedResults.map(createResultCard);
190.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
191.     setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for "${query}".`, "success");
192.   } catch (error) {
193.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
194.     setResultsMessage("results-empty", "Unable to load results right now.");
195.   }
196. }
197. 
198. if (searchForm && searchInput && suggestionList) {
199.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
200.   let debounceHandle;
201.   let requestCounter = 0;
202.   let activeIndex = -1;
203.   let currentSuggestions = [];
204. 
205.   function clearSuggestions() {
206.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
207.   }
208. 
209.   function openSuggestions() {
210.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
211.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
212.   }
213. 
214.   function closeSuggestions() {
215.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
216.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
217.     activeIndex = -1;
218.   }
219. 
220.   function syncActiveSuggestion() {
221.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
222.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
223.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
224.         item.classList.add("active");
225.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
226.       } else {
227.         item.classList.remove("active");
228.       }
229.     });
230.   }
231. 
232.   function renderSuggestionInfo(message, state = "info") {
233.     currentSuggestions = [];
234.     activeIndex = -1;
235.     clearSuggestions();
236. 
237.     const li = makeElement("li", `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`, message);
238.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
239.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
240.     openSuggestions();
241.   }
242. 
243.   function createSuggestionPoster(movie) {
244.     const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
245. 
246.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
247.       return makeElement("div", "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback", "No image");
248.     }
249. 
250.     const img = makeElement("img", "suggestion-poster");
251.     img.loading = "lazy";
252.     img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
253.     img.src = `${SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
254.     return img;
255.   }
256. 
257.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
258.     currentSuggestions = items;
259.     activeIndex = -1;
260.     clearSuggestions();
261. 
262.     items.forEach((movie, index) => {
263.       const li = makeElement("li", "suggestion-item");
264.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
265.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
266.       li.tabIndex = -1;
267. 
268.       li.appendChild(createSuggestionPoster(movie));
269. 
270.       const textWrap = makeElement("div", "suggestion-text");
271.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-title", movie.title || "Untitled"));
272.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-year", getYear(movie.release_date)));
273.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
274. 
275.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
276.         event.preventDefault();
277.       });
278. 
279.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
280.         activeIndex = index;
281.         syncActiveSuggestion();
282.       });
283. 
284.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
285.         goToMoviePage(movie.id);
286.       });
287. 
288.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
289.     });
290. 
291.     openSuggestions();
292.   }
293. 
294.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
295.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
296.       renderSuggestionInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
297.       return;
298.     }
299. 
300.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
301.     renderSuggestionInfo("Searching...", "loading");
302. 
303.     try {
304.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
305.       const payload = await response.json();
306. 
307.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
308.         return;
309.       }
310. 
311.       if (!response.ok) {
312.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
313.         renderSuggestionInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
314.         return;
315.       }
316. 
317.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
318. 
319.       if (results.length === 0) {
320.         renderSuggestionInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
321.         return;
322.       }
323. 
324.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
325.     } catch (error) {
326.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
327.         return;
328.       }
329.       renderSuggestionInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
330.     }
331.   }
332. 
333.   function submitQuery(query) {
334.     const trimmed = query.trim();
335.     if (!trimmed) {
336.       return;
337.     }
338. 
339.     searchInput.value = trimmed;
340.     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
341.     params.set("query", trimmed);
342.     const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
343.     window.history.replaceState({}, "", nextUrl);
344.     closeSuggestions();
345.     performSearch(trimmed);
346.   }
347. 
348.   searchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
349.     const query = searchInput.value.trim();
350.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
351. 
352.     if (!query) {
353.       closeSuggestions();
354.       clearSuggestions();
355.       currentSuggestions = [];
356.       return;
357.     }
358. 
359.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
360.       requestCounter += 1;
361.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
362.     }, 300);
363.   });
364. 
365.   searchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
366.     const hasSelectable = currentSuggestions.length > 0;
367. 
368.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
369.       event.preventDefault();
370.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentSuggestions.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
371.       syncActiveSuggestion();
372.       openSuggestions();
373.       return;
374.     }
375. 
376.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
377.       event.preventDefault();
378.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentSuggestions.length - 1;
379.       syncActiveSuggestion();
380.       openSuggestions();
381.       return;
382.     }
383. 
384.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
385.       closeSuggestions();
386.       return;
387.     }
388. 
389.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
390.       event.preventDefault();
391.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
392.         goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
393.         return;
394.       }
395.       submitQuery(searchInput.value);
396.     }
397.   });
398. 
399.   searchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
400.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
401.       openSuggestions();
402.     }
403.   });
404. 
405.   searchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
406.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
407.   });
408. 
409.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
410.     event.preventDefault();
411.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
412.       goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
413.       return;
414.     }
415.     submitQuery(searchInput.value);
416.   });
417. 
418.   const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("query") || "";
419.   if (urlQuery) {
420.     searchInput.value = urlQuery;
421.     performSearch(urlQuery);
422.   }
423. }
424.
```

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js

<details>
<summary>131 lines</summary>

```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. 
4. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
5. 
6. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
7.   if (!movieStatus) {
8.     return;
9.   }
10.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
11.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
12.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
13. }
14. 
15. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
16.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
17.   if (className) {
18.     el.className = className;
19.   }
20.   if (typeof text === "string") {
21.     el.textContent = text;
22.   }
23.   return el;
24. }
25. 
26. function getYear(dateString) {
27.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getDirector(credits) {
31.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
32.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
33.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
34. }
35. 
36. function getCast(credits) {
37.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
38.   if (cast.length === 0) {
39.     return "Unknown";
40.   }
41.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
42. }
43. 
44. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
45.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
46.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
47.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
48.   p.appendChild(strong);
49.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
50.   return p;
51. }
52. 
53. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
54.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
55. 
56.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
57.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
58.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
59.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
60. 
61.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
62.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
63.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
64.     poster.loading = "lazy";
65.   }
66. 
67.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
68.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
69.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
70.   heading.appendChild(year);
71. 
72.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
73.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
74.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
75.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
76.     : "Genres unavailable";
77. 
78.   content.appendChild(heading);
79.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
80.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
81.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
82.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
83.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
84.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
85.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
86. 
87.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review (Coming Soon)");
88.   reviewButton.type = "button";
89.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
90.     setMovieStatus("Write Review is not active yet.", "info");
91.   });
92.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
93. 
94.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
95.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
96. }
97. 
98. async function loadMoviePage() {
99.   const movieId = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
100.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
101. 
102.   if (!movieId) {
103.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
104.     return;
105.   }
106. 
107.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
108.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
109.     return;
110.   }
111. 
112.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
113. 
114.   try {
115.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(movieId)}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
116.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
117.     const payload = await response.json();
118. 
119.     if (!response.ok) {
120.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
121.     }
122. 
123.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
124.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
125.   } catch (error) {
126.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
127.   }
128. }
129. 
130. loadMoviePage();
131.
```

</details>
