```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. 
18. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
19.   if (!movieStatus) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
23.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
24.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
25. }
26. 
27. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
28.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
29.     return;
30.   }
31. 
32.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
33.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
34.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
35.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
36. }
37. 
38. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
39.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
40.     return;
41.   }
42.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
43.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
44.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
45. }
46. 
47. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
48.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
49.   if (className) {
50.     el.className = className;
51.   }
52.   if (typeof text === "string") {
53.     el.textContent = text;
54.   }
55.   return el;
56. }
57. 
58. function getYear(dateString) {
59.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
60. }
61. 
62. function getDirector(credits) {
63.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
64.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
65.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
66. }
67. 
68. function getCast(credits) {
69.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
70.   if (cast.length === 0) {
71.     return "Unknown";
72.   }
73.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
74. }
75. 
76. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
77.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
78.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
79.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
80.   p.appendChild(strong);
81.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
82.   return p;
83. }
84. 
85. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
86.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "You have not reviewed this movie yet."));
87. }
88. 
89. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
90.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
91.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
92.     return;
93.   }
94. 
95.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
96.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
97.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
98.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
99.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
100.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
101. 
102.     card.appendChild(heading);
103.     card.appendChild(body);
104.     card.appendChild(stamp);
105.     return card;
106.   });
107. 
108.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
109. }
110. 
111. async function loadUserReviews(movieId, userId) {
112.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
113. 
114.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
115.     .from("movie_reviews")
116.     .select("id, rating, review_text, created_at")
117.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
118.     .eq("user_id", userId)
119.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
120. 
121.   if (error) {
122.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load your reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
123.     return;
124.   }
125. 
126.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
127. }
128. 
129. function openReviewModal() {
130.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
131.     return;
132.   }
133. 
134.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
135.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
136.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
137.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
138.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
139. 
140.   clearReviewFormStatus();
141.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
142. }
143. 
144. function closeReviewModal() {
145.   if (!reviewModal) {
146.     return;
147.   }
148.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
149.   clearReviewFormStatus();
150. }
151. 
152. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
153.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
154.   currentMovie = movie;
155. 
156.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
157.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
158.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
159.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
160. 
161.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
162.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
163.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
164.     poster.loading = "lazy";
165.   }
166. 
167.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
168.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
169.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
170.   heading.appendChild(year);
171. 
172.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
173.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
174.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
175.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
176.     : "Genres unavailable";
177. 
178.   content.appendChild(heading);
179.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
180.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
181.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
182.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
183.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
184.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
185.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
186. 
187.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
188.   reviewButton.type = "button";
189.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
190.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
191. 
192.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
193.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
194. }
195. 
196. async function loadMoviePage() {
197.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
198.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
199. 
200.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
201.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
202.     return;
203.   }
204. 
205.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
206.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
207.     return;
208.   }
209. 
210.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
211.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
212.     return;
213.   }
214. 
215.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
216.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
217.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
218.     return;
219.   }
220. 
221.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
222.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
223. 
224.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
225. 
226.   try {
227.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
228.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
229.     const payload = await response.json();
230. 
231.     if (!response.ok) {
232.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
233.     }
234. 
235.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
236.     await loadUserReviews(movieId, currentSession.user.id);
237.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
238.   } catch (error) {
239.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
240.   }
241. }
242. 
243. if (reviewModalClose) {
244.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
245. }
246. 
247. if (reviewModal) {
248.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
249.     const target = event.target;
250.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
251.       closeReviewModal();
252.     }
253.   });
254. }
255. 
256. if (reviewForm) {
257.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
258.     event.preventDefault();
259. 
260.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
261.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
262.       return;
263.     }
264. 
265.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
266.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
267. 
268.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
269.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
270.       return;
271.     }
272. 
273.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
274.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
275.       return;
276.     }
277. 
278.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
279. 
280.     const payload = {
281.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
282.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
283.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
284.       rating: ratingValue,
285.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
286.     };
287. 
288.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
289.       .from("movie_reviews")
290.       .insert(payload);
291. 
292.     if (error) {
293.       setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
294.       return;
295.     }
296. 
297.     setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
298.     await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id, currentSession.user.id);
299.     reviewForm.reset();
300.     setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
301.   });
302. }
303. 
304. loadMoviePage();
305.
```

</details>

```
1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
6.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
7.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
8.   let debounceHandle;
9.   let requestCounter = 0;
10.   let activeIndex = -1;
11.   let currentResults = [];
12. 
13.   function getMovieYear(item) {
14.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
15.   }
16. 
17.   function clearSuggestions() {
18.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
19.   }
20. 
21.   function openSuggestions() {
22.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
23.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
24.   }
25. 
26.   function closeSuggestions() {
27.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
28.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
29.     activeIndex = -1;
30.   }
31. 
32.   function syncActiveItem() {
33.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
34.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
35.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
36.         item.classList.add("active");
37.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
38.       } else {
39.         item.classList.remove("active");
40.       }
41.     });
42.   }
43. 
44.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
45.     const trimmed = query.trim();
46.     if (!trimmed) {
47.       return;
48.     }
49.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
50.   }
51. 
52.   function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
53.     if (!movieId) {
54.       return;
55.     }
56.     window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
57.   }
58. 
59.   function createPosterElement(item) {
60.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
61. 
62.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
63.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
64.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
65.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
66.       return fallback;
67.     }
68. 
69.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
70.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
71.     poster.loading = "lazy";
72.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
73.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
74.     return poster;
75.   }
76. 
77.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
78.     currentResults = items;
79.     clearSuggestions();
80.     activeIndex = -1;
81. 
82.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
83.       const li = document.createElement("li");
84.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
85.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
86.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
87.       li.tabIndex = -1;
88. 
89.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
90. 
91.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
92.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
93. 
94.       const title = document.createElement("span");
95.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
96.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
97. 
98.       const year = document.createElement("span");
99.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
100.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
101. 
102.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
103.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
104.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
105. 
106.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
107.         event.preventDefault();
108.       });
109. 
110.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
111.         activeIndex = index;
112.         syncActiveItem();
113.       });
114. 
115.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
116.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
117.       });
118. 
119.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
120.     }
121. 
122.     openSuggestions();
123.   }
124. 
125.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
126.     currentResults = [];
127.     activeIndex = -1;
128.     clearSuggestions();
129. 
130.     const li = document.createElement("li");
131.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
132.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
133.     li.textContent = message;
134.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
135. 
136.     openSuggestions();
137.   }
138. 
139.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
140.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
141.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
142.       return;
143.     }
144. 
145.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
146.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
147. 
148.     try {
149.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
150.       const payload = await response.json();
151. 
152.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
153.         return;
154.       }
155. 
156.       if (!response.ok) {
157.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
158.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
159.         return;
160.       }
161. 
162.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
163. 
164.       if (results.length === 0) {
165.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
166.         return;
167.       }
168. 
169.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
170.     } catch (error) {
171.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
172.         return;
173.       }
174.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
175.     }
176.   }
177. 
178.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
179.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
180.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
181. 
182.     if (!query) {
183.       closeSuggestions();
184.       clearSuggestions();
185.       currentResults = [];
186.       return;
187.     }
188. 
189.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
190.       requestCounter += 1;
191.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
192.     }, 300);
193.   });
194. 
195.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
196.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
197. 
198.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
199.       event.preventDefault();
200.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
201.       syncActiveItem();
202.       openSuggestions();
203.       return;
204.     }
205. 
206.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
207.       event.preventDefault();
208.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
209.       syncActiveItem();
210.       openSuggestions();
211.       return;
212.     }
213. 
214.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
215.       closeSuggestions();
216.       return;
217.     }
218. 
219.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
220.       event.preventDefault();
221.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
222.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
223.         return;
224.       }
225.       goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
226.     }
227.   });
228. 
229.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
230.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
231.       openSuggestions();
232.     }
233.   });
234. 
235.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
236.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
237.   });
238. 
239.   indexSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
240.     event.preventDefault();
241.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
242.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
243.       return;
244.     }
245.     goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
246.   });
247. }
248.
```

```
1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
3. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
4. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("search-suggestion-list");
5. const resultsGrid = document.getElementById("search-results");
6. 
7. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342";
8. const SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9. 
10. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
11.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14. 
15.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
16.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
17.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
18. }
19. 
20. function getYear(dateString) {
21.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
22. }
23. 
24. function getDirector(credits) {
25.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
26.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
27.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getCast(credits) {
31.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
32.   if (cast.length === 0) {
33.     return "Unknown";
34.   }
35.   return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
36. }
37. 
38. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
39.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
40.   if (className) {
41.     el.className = className;
42.   }
43.   if (typeof text === "string") {
44.     el.textContent = text;
45.   }
46.   return el;
47. }
48. 
49. function createPoster(movie) {
50.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
51. 
52.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
53.     return makeElement("div", "result-poster result-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
54.   }
55. 
56.   const img = makeElement("img", "result-poster");
57.   img.loading = "lazy";
58.   img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
59.   img.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
60.   return img;
61. }
62. 
63. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
64.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
65.   if (!label) {
66.     p.textContent = value;
67.     return p;
68.   }
69. 
70.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
71.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
72.   p.appendChild(strong);
73.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
74.   return p;
75. }
76. 
77. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
78.   if (!movieId) {
79.     return;
80.   }
81.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
82. }
83. 
84. function createResultCard(movie) {
85.   const article = makeElement("article", "result-card");
86.   article.tabIndex = 0;
87.   article.setAttribute("role", "button");
88. 
89.   article.addEventListener("click", () => {
90.     goToMoviePage(movie.id);
91.   });
92. 
93.   article.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
94.     if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
95.       event.preventDefault();
96.       goToMoviePage(movie.id);
97.     }
98.   });
99. 
100.   article.appendChild(createPoster(movie));
101. 
102.   const content = makeElement("div", "result-content");
103. 
104.   const titleRow = makeElement("h2");
105.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(movie.title || "Untitled"));
106.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
107.   const year = makeElement("span", "", `(${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
108.   titleRow.appendChild(year);
109. 
110.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
111.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
112.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
113.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
114.     : "Genres unavailable";
115. 
116.   content.appendChild(titleRow);
117.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("", `⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}`));
118.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", movie.director || "Unknown"));
119.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", movie.cast || "Unknown"));
120.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
121.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
122. 
123.   article.appendChild(content);
124.   return article;
125. }
126. 
127. function setResultsMessage(className, text) {
128.   resultsGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("p", className, text));
129. }
130. 
131. async function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {
132.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
133.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
134.   const payload = await response.json();
135. 
136.   if (!response.ok) {
137.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
138.   }
139. 
140.   return {
141.     ...payload,
142.     director: getDirector(payload.credits),
143.     cast: getCast(payload.credits),
144.   };
145. }
146. 
147. async function performSearch(rawQuery) {
148.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
149.   const query = rawQuery.trim();
150. 
151.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
152.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
153.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
154.     return;
155.   }
156. 
157.   if (!query) {
158.     setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title to search.", "info");
159.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
160.     return;
161.   }
162. 
163.   setTmdbStatus("Searching TMDB...", "info");
164.   setResultsMessage("results-loading", "Loading results...");
165. 
166.   try {
167.     const searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
168.     const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);
169.     const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();
170. 
171.     if (!searchResponse.ok) {
172.       throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || "TMDB search failed.");
173.     }
174. 
175.     const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];
176. 
177.     if (baseResults.length === 0) {
178.       setTmdbStatus("No movies matched your search.", "info");
179.       setResultsMessage("results-empty", "No results found.");
180.       return;
181.     }
182. 
183.     const detailedResults = await Promise.all(
184.       baseResults.map((movie) =>
185.         fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: "Unknown", cast: "Unknown" }))
186.       )
187.     );
188. 
189.     const cards = detailedResults.map(createResultCard);
190.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
191.     setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for "${query}".`, "success");
192.   } catch (error) {
193.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
194.     setResultsMessage("results-empty", "Unable to load results right now.");
195.   }
196. }
197. 
198. if (searchForm && searchInput && suggestionList) {
199.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
200.   let debounceHandle;
201.   let requestCounter = 0;
202.   let activeIndex = -1;
203.   let currentSuggestions = [];
204. 
205.   function clearSuggestions() {
206.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
207.   }
208. 
209.   function openSuggestions() {
210.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
211.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
212.   }
213. 
214.   function closeSuggestions() {
215.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
216.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
217.     activeIndex = -1;
218.   }
219. 
220.   function syncActiveSuggestion() {
221.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
222.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
223.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
224.         item.classList.add("active");
225.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
226.       } else {
227.         item.classList.remove("active");
228.       }
229.     });
230.   }
231. 
232.   function renderSuggestionInfo(message, state = "info") {
233.     currentSuggestions = [];
234.     activeIndex = -1;
235.     clearSuggestions();
236. 
237.     const li = makeElement("li", `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`, message);
238.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
239.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
240.     openSuggestions();
241.   }
242. 
243.   function createSuggestionPoster(movie) {
244.     const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
245. 
246.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
247.       return makeElement("div", "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback", "No image");
248.     }
249. 
250.     const img = makeElement("img", "suggestion-poster");
251.     img.loading = "lazy";
252.     img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
253.     img.src = `${SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
254.     return img;
255.   }
256. 
257.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
258.     currentSuggestions = items;
259.     activeIndex = -1;
260.     clearSuggestions();
261. 
262.     items.forEach((movie, index) => {
263.       const li = makeElement("li", "suggestion-item");
264.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
265.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
266.       li.tabIndex = -1;
267. 
268.       li.appendChild(createSuggestionPoster(movie));
269. 
270.       const textWrap = makeElement("div", "suggestion-text");
271.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-title", movie.title || "Untitled"));
272.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-year", getYear(movie.release_date)));
273.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
274. 
275.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
276.         event.preventDefault();
277.       });
278. 
279.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
280.         activeIndex = index;
281.         syncActiveSuggestion();
282.       });
283. 
284.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
285.         goToMoviePage(movie.id);
286.       });
287. 
288.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
289.     });
290. 
291.     openSuggestions();
292.   }
293. 
294.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
295.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
296.       renderSuggestionInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
297.       return;
298.     }
299. 
300.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
301.     renderSuggestionInfo("Searching...", "loading");
302. 
303.     try {
304.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
305.       const payload = await response.json();
306. 
307.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
308.         return;
309.       }
310. 
311.       if (!response.ok) {
312.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
313.         renderSuggestionInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
314.         return;
315.       }
316. 
317.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
318. 
319.       if (results.length === 0) {
320.         renderSuggestionInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
321.         return;
322.       }
323. 
324.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
325.     } catch (error) {
326.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
327.         return;
328.       }
329.       renderSuggestionInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
330.     }
331.   }
332. 
333.   function submitQuery(query) {
334.     const trimmed = query.trim();
335.     if (!trimmed) {
336.       return;
337.     }
338. 
339.     searchInput.value = trimmed;
340.     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
341.     params.set("query", trimmed);
342.     const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
343.     window.history.replaceState({}, "", nextUrl);
344.     closeSuggestions();
345.     performSearch(trimmed);
346.   }
347. 
348.   searchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
349.     const query = searchInput.value.trim();
350.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
351. 
352.     if (!query) {
353.       closeSuggestions();
354.       clearSuggestions();
355.       currentSuggestions = [];
356.       return;
357.     }
358. 
359.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
360.       requestCounter += 1;
361.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
362.     }, 300);
363.   });
364. 
365.   searchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
366.     const hasSelectable = currentSuggestions.length > 0;
367. 
368.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
369.       event.preventDefault();
370.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentSuggestions.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
371.       syncActiveSuggestion();
372.       openSuggestions();
373.       return;
374.     }
375. 
376.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
377.       event.preventDefault();
378.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentSuggestions.length - 1;
379.       syncActiveSuggestion();
380.       openSuggestions();
381.       return;
382.     }
383. 
384.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
385.       closeSuggestions();
386.       return;
387.     }
388. 
389.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
390.       event.preventDefault();
391.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
392.         goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
393.         return;
394.       }
395.       submitQuery(searchInput.value);
396.     }
397.   });
398. 
399.   searchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
400.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
401.       openSuggestions();
402.     }
403.   });
404. 
405.   searchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
406.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
407.   });
408. 
409.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
410.     event.preventDefault();
411.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
412.       goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
413.       return;
414.     }
415.     submitQuery(searchInput.value);
416.   });
417. 
418.   const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("query") || "";
419.   if (urlQuery) {
420.     searchInput.value = urlQuery;
421.     performSearch(urlQuery);
422.   }
423. }
424.
```

</details>

```
256. if (reviewForm) {
257.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
258.     event.preventDefault();
259. 
260.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
261.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
262.       return;
263.     }
264. 
265.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
266.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
267. 
268.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
269.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
270.       return;
```

```
196. async function loadMoviePage() {
197.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
198.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
199. 
200.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
201.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
202.     return;
203.   }
204. 
205.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
206.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
207.     return;
208.   }
209. 
210.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
211.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
212.     return;
213.   }
214. 
215.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
216.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
217.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
218.     return;
219.   }
220. 
221.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
222.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
223. 
224.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
225. 
226.   try {
227.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
228.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
229.     const payload = await response.json();
230. 
231.     if (!response.ok) {
232.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
233.     }
234. 
235.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
236.     await loadUserReviews(movieId, currentSession.user.id);
237.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
238.   } catch (error) {
239.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
240.   }
241. }
```

### 💬 Copilot

Based on my comprehensive review of the movie review feature implementation, I've identified the following critical issues:

## Issue: Multiple concurrent review submissions allowed (duplicate reviews)
**File:** js/movie.js:257-302
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** The review form submit handler does not disable the submit button or prevent multiple rapid submissions. A user can click "Save Review" multiple times before the first request completes, creating duplicate reviews in the database for the same movie.
**Evidence:** Lines 257-302 show no button disabling, no submission-in-progress flag, and the form remains interactive during the async database operation. The `.insert(payload)` call at line 290 will execute multiple times if the form is submitted rapidly.
**Suggested fix:** Add a submission flag or disable the submit button at line 278 before the database call, then re-enable it after completion or error. Example: Store submit button reference and set `submitButton.disabled = true` before line 288, then restore it in both success (line 297) and error (line 294) paths.

## Issue: API credentials hardcoded in version control
**File:** js/supabase-config.js:1-5
**Severity:** Critical
**Problem:** Production TMDB API key (`0b615fd08549b8b6e1416543024f6940`) and Supabase credentials are hardcoded in a file that should be gitignored. This exposes API keys publicly if the repository is public or shared, allowing unauthorized API usage and potential quota exhaustion or abuse.
**Evidence:** The file js/supabase-config.js contains actual credentials (lines 1-5) and is tracked in git (visible in git diff output). The README mentions this should be created from an example file, but the actual config file with real credentials is committed.
**Suggested fix:** Immediately revoke and rotate the exposed API keys. Add `js/supabase-config.js` to `.gitignore`, remove it from git history with `git rm --cached js/supabase-config.js`, and ensure only `js/supabase-config.example.js` is tracked.

## Issue: Integer overflow potential for movie IDs
**File:** js/movie.js:205-222
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** The validation checks if `Number(movieIdRaw) \<= 0` but doesn't validate against `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER` (9007199254740991). JavaScript loses integer precision above this value. While TMDB IDs are currently much smaller, a malicious or corrupted URL parameter exceeding this limit could cause precision loss, potentially loading the wrong movie or causing unexpected behavior.
**Evidence:** Line 205 validates format and positive value, line 222 converts to Number without checking safe integer range. JavaScript's `Number()` conversion for values like "9999999999999999" will succeed but may not preserve exact value if beyond safe integer range.
**Suggested fix:** Add validation: `if (Number(movieIdRaw) \> Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER)` after line 205 to reject oversized IDs before conversion.

No significant issues found in the reviewed changes.

```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");

9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");

12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. 
18. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
19.   if (!movieStatus) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
23.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
24.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
25. }
26. 
27. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
28.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
29.     return;
30.   }
31. 
32.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
33.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
34.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
35.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
36. }
37. 
38. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
39.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
40.     return;
41.   }
42.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
43.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
44.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
45. }
46. 
47. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
48.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
49.   if (className) {
50.     el.className = className;
51.   }
52.   if (typeof text === "string") {
53.     el.textContent = text;
54.   }
55.   return el;
56. }
57. 
58. function getYear(dateString) {
59.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
60. }
61. 
62. function getDirector(credits) {
63.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
64.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
65.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
66. }
67. 
68. function getCast(credits) {
69.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
70.   if (cast.length === 0) {
71.     return "Unknown";
72.   }
73.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
74. }
75. 
76. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
77.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
78.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
79.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
80.   p.appendChild(strong);
81.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
82.   return p;
83. }
84. 
85. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
86.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "You have not reviewed this movie yet."));
87. }
88. 
89. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
90.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
91.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
92.     return;
93.   }
94. 
95.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
96.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
97.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
98.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
99.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
100.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
101. 
102.     card.appendChild(heading);
103.     card.appendChild(body);
104.     card.appendChild(stamp);
105.     return card;
106.   });
107. 
108.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
109. }
110. 
111. async function loadUserReviews(movieId, userId) {
112.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
113. 
114.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
115.     .from("movie_reviews")
116.     .select("id, rating, review_text, created_at")
117.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
118.     .eq("user_id", userId)
119.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
120. 
121.   if (error) {
122.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load your reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
123.     return;
124.   }
125. 
126.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
127. }
128. 
129. function openReviewModal() {
130.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
131.     return;
132.   }
133. 
134.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
135.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
136.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
137.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
138.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
139. 
140.   clearReviewFormStatus();
141.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
142. }
143. 
144. function closeReviewModal() {
145.   if (!reviewModal) {
146.     return;
147.   }
148.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
149.   clearReviewFormStatus();
150. }
151. 
152. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
153.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
154.   currentMovie = movie;
155. 
156.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
157.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
158.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
159.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
160. 
161.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
162.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
163.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
164.     poster.loading = "lazy";
165.   }
166. 
167.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
168.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
169.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
170.   heading.appendChild(year);
171. 
172.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
173.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
174.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
175.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
176.     : "Genres unavailable";
177. 
178.   content.appendChild(heading);
179.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
180.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
181.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
182.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
183.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
184.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
185.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
186. 
187.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
188.   reviewButton.type = "button";
189.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
190.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
191. 
192.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
193.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
194. }
195. 
196. async function loadMoviePage() {
197.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
198.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
199. 
200.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
201.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
202.     return;
203.   }
204. 
205.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
206.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
207.     return;
208.   }
209. 
210.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
211.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
212.     return;
213.   }
214. 
215.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
216.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
217.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
218.     return;
219.   }
220. 
221.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
222.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
223. 
224.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
225. 
226.   try {
227.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
228.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
229.     const payload = await response.json();
230. 
231.     if (!response.ok) {
232.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
233.     }
234. 
235.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
236.     await loadUserReviews(movieId, currentSession.user.id);
237.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
238.   } catch (error) {
239.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
240.   }
241. }
242. 
243. if (reviewModalClose) {
244.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
245. }
246. 
247. if (reviewModal) {
248.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
249.     const target = event.target;
250.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
251.       closeReviewModal();
252.     }
253.   });
254. }
255. 
256. if (reviewForm) {
257.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
258.     event.preventDefault();
259. 
260.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
261.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
262.       return;
263.     }
264. 
265.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
266.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
267. 
268.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
269.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
270.       return;
271.     }
272. 
273.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
274.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
275.       return;
276.     }
277. 
278.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
279. 
280.     const payload = {
281.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
282.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
283.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
284.       rating: ratingValue,
285.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
286.     };
287. 
288.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
289.       .from("movie_reviews")
290.       .insert(payload);
291. 
292.     if (error) {
293.       setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
294.       return;
295.     }
296. 
297.     setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
298.     await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id, currentSession.user.id);
299.     reviewForm.reset();
300.     setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
301.   });
302. }
303. 
304. loadMoviePage();
305.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1264m 30s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — both are patched.

### 1) Duplicate submit prevention
In `js/movie.js` I added:

- `isReviewSubmitting` guard to block concurrent submits
- submit button disable/enable during async save
- `try/finally` to always re-enable, even on errors

### 2) Username on reviews
Reviews now show a byline like:

- `By \<username\>`

Username is resolved from session metadata in this order:
- `user_metadata.username`
- `display_name`
- `full_name`
- email prefix fallback

Also added `.user-review-byline` styling in `style.css`.

username should be pulled from supabase if possible so it will still work when other user reviews are added

<details>
<summary>345 lines</summary>

```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
19. 
20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "You have not reviewed this movie yet."));
107. }
108. 
109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline", `By ${currentUsername}`);
118.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
119.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
120.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
121.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
122. 
123.     card.appendChild(byline);
124.     card.appendChild(heading);
125.     card.appendChild(body);
126.     card.appendChild(stamp);
127.     return card;
128.   });
129. 
130.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
131. }
132. 
133. async function loadUserReviews(movieId, userId) {
134.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
135. 
136.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
137.     .from("movie_reviews")
138.     .select("id, rating, review_text, created_at")
139.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
140.     .eq("user_id", userId)
141.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
142. 
143.   if (error) {
144.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load your reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
145.     return;
146.   }
147. 
148.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
149. }
150. 
151. function openReviewModal() {
152.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
153.     return;
154.   }
155. 
156.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
157.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
158.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
159.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
160.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
161. 
162.   clearReviewFormStatus();
163.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
164. }
165. 
166. function closeReviewModal() {
167.   if (!reviewModal) {
168.     return;
169.   }
170.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
171.   clearReviewFormStatus();
172. }
173. 
174. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
175.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
176.   currentMovie = movie;
177. 
178.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
179.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
180.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
181.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
182. 
183.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
184.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
185.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
186.     poster.loading = "lazy";
187.   }
188. 
189.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
190.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
191.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
192.   heading.appendChild(year);
193. 
194.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
195.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
196.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
197.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
198.     : "Genres unavailable";
199. 
200.   content.appendChild(heading);
201.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
202.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
203.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
204.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
205.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
206.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
207.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
208. 
209.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
210.   reviewButton.type = "button";
211.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
212.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
213. 
214.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
215.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
216. }
217. 
218. async function loadMoviePage() {
219.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
220.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
221. 
222.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
223.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
224.     return;
225.   }
226. 
227.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
228.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
229.     return;
230.   }
231. 
232.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
233.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
234.     return;
235.   }
236. 
237.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
238.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
239.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
240.     return;
241.   }
242. 
243.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
244.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
245.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
246. 
247.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
248. 
249.   try {
250.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
251.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
252.     const payload = await response.json();
253. 
254.     if (!response.ok) {
255.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
256.     }
257. 
258.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
259.     await loadUserReviews(movieId, currentSession.user.id);
260.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
261.   } catch (error) {
262.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
263.   }
264. }
265. 
266. if (reviewModalClose) {
267.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
268. }
269. 
270. if (reviewModal) {
271.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
272.     const target = event.target;
273.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
274.       closeReviewModal();
275.     }
276.   });
277. }
278. 
279. if (reviewForm) {
280.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
281.     event.preventDefault();
282. 
283.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
284.       return;
285.     }
286. 
287.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
288. 
289.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
290.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
291.       return;
292.     }
293. 
294.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
295.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
296. 
297.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
298.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
299.       return;
300.     }
301. 
302.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
303.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
304.       return;
305.     }
306. 
307.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
308.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
309.     if (submitButton) {
310.       submitButton.disabled = true;
311.     }
312. 
313.     const payload = {
314.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
315.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
316.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
317.       rating: ratingValue,
318.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
319.     };
320. 
321.     try {
322.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
323.         .from("movie_reviews")
324.         .insert(payload);
325. 
326.       if (error) {
327.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
328.         return;
329.       }
330. 
331.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
332.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id, currentSession.user.id);
333.       reviewForm.reset();
334.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
335.     } finally {
336.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
337.       if (submitButton) {
338.         submitButton.disabled = false;
339.       }
340.     }
341.   });
342. }
343. 
344. loadMoviePage();
345.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1266m 33s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — usernames now come from Supabase review records (not just session display).

### What I changed

In `js/movie.js`:

- Review insert now includes:
  - `username: currentUsername`
- Review query now selects:
  - `username`
- Rendering uses `review.username` first, then fallback.

So when you later show other users’ reviews, names are already stored per review row.

### One DB migration needed

Run this once in Supabase SQL Editor:

```sql
alter table public.movie_reviews
add column if not exists username text not null default 'Unknown';
```

Optional backfill (for older rows):
```sql
update public.movie_reviews
set username = 'Unknown'
where username is null or trim(username) = '';
```

<sub>⏱️ 1269m 55s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Patched.

Now if a review row has `username = 'Unknown'` (or blank), the UI falls back to your resolved Supabase/session username instead of showing “By Unknown”.

So existing rows should display your name immediately after refresh.

If you also want to permanently fix old rows in DB, run:

```sql
update public.movie_reviews
set username = split_part((select email from auth.users where auth.users.id = movie_reviews.user_id), '@', 1)
where username is null or trim(username) = '' or lower(username) = 'unknown';
```

```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";

15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;

20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "You have not reviewed this movie yet."));
107. }
108. 
109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
118.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
119.       ? storedUsername
120.       : currentUsername;
121.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline", `By ${reviewUsername}`);
122.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
123.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
124.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
125.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
126. 
127.     card.appendChild(byline);
128.     card.appendChild(heading);
129.     card.appendChild(body);
130.     card.appendChild(stamp);
131.     return card;
132.   });
133. 
134.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
135. }
136. 
137. async function loadUserReviews(movieId, userId) {
138.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
139. 
140.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
141.     .from("movie_reviews")
142.     .select("id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
143.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
144.     .eq("user_id", userId)
145.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
146. 
147.   if (error) {
148.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load your reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
149.     return;
150.   }
151. 
152.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
153. }
154. 
155. function openReviewModal() {
156.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
157.     return;
158.   }
159. 
160.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
161.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
162.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
163.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
164.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
165. 
166.   clearReviewFormStatus();
167.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
168. }
169. 
170. function closeReviewModal() {
171.   if (!reviewModal) {
172.     return;
173.   }
174.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
175.   clearReviewFormStatus();
176. }
177. 
178. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
179.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
180.   currentMovie = movie;
181. 
182.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
183.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
184.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
185.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
186. 
187.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
188.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
189.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
190.     poster.loading = "lazy";
191.   }
192. 
193.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
194.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
195.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
196.   heading.appendChild(year);
197. 
198.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
199.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
200.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
201.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
202.     : "Genres unavailable";
203. 
204.   content.appendChild(heading);
205.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
206.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
207.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
208.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
209.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
210.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
211.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
212. 
213.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
214.   reviewButton.type = "button";
215.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
216.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
217. 
218.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
219.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
220. }
221. 
222. async function loadMoviePage() {
223.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
224.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
225. 
226.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
227.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
228.     return;
229.   }
230. 
231.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
232.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
233.     return;
234.   }
235. 
236.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
237.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
238.     return;
239.   }
240. 
241.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
242.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
243.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
244.     return;
245.   }
246. 
247.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
248.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
249.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
250. 
251.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
252. 
253.   try {
254.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
255.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
256.     const payload = await response.json();
257. 
258.     if (!response.ok) {
259.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
260.     }
261. 
262.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
263.     await loadUserReviews(movieId, currentSession.user.id);
264.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
265.   } catch (error) {
266.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
267.   }
268. }
269. 
270. if (reviewModalClose) {
271.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
272. }
273. 
274. if (reviewModal) {
275.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
276.     const target = event.target;
277.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
278.       closeReviewModal();
279.     }
280.   });
281. }
282. 
283. if (reviewForm) {
284.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
285.     event.preventDefault();
286. 
287.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
288.       return;
289.     }
290. 
291.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
292. 
293.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
294.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
295.       return;
296.     }
297. 
298.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
299.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
300. 
301.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
302.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
303.       return;
304.     }
305. 
306.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
307.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
308.       return;
309.     }
310. 
311.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
312.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
313.     if (submitButton) {
314.       submitButton.disabled = true;
315.     }
316. 
317.     const payload = {
318.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
319.       username: currentUsername,
320.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
321.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
322.       rating: ratingValue,
323.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
324.     };
325. 
326.     try {
327.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
328.         .from("movie_reviews")
329.         .insert(payload);
330. 
331.       if (error) {
332.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
333.         return;
334.       }
335. 
336.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
337.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id, currentSession.user.id);
338.       reviewForm.reset();
339.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
340.     } finally {
341.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
342.       if (submitButton) {
343.         submitButton.disabled = false;
344.       }
345.     }
346.   });
347. }
348. 
349. loadMoviePage();
350.
```

<sub>⏱️ 1273m 12s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — movie pages now show **all users’ reviews** for that specific movie only.

### What changed

- Removed user-only filter in reviews query.
- Kept strict movie filter:
  - `.eq("movie_id", movieId)` (so only relevant movie reviews appear)
- Review cards now show author byline from stored username.
- Your own reviews are labeled with **`(You)`**.
- Updated section copy in `movie.html` to reflect shared movie reviews.

So now each movie page aggregates reviews tied to that movie ID, regardless of author.
