<sub>⏱️ 1277m 21s</sub>

### 👤 User

give me an insert query for supabase to add some test data for users and reviews. just put all reviews on the movie click (id 9339 i believe) for now. make 3 users and have a review from each

---

<sub>⏱️ 1277m 34s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Use this flow:

1) Create 3 auth users first in **Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users** (easy/manual).  
2) Then run this SQL to seed 1 review per user for movie `9339`:

```sql
with seed(email, username, rating, review_text) as (
  values
    ('alice@test.com', 'alice', 8.5, 'Great pacing and atmosphere.'),
    ('bob@test.com',   'bob',   7.0, 'Solid movie, a bit uneven in the middle.'),
    ('cara@test.com',  'cara',  9.0, 'Loved it. Strong performances and direction.')
),
resolved as (
  select u.id as user_id, s.username, s.rating, s.review_text
  from seed s
  join auth.users u on lower(u.email) = lower(s.email)
)
insert into public.movie_reviews (user_id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text)
select user_id, username, 9339, 'Click', rating, review_text
from resolved;
```

If you want, I can also give a quick query to verify inserts.

---

<sub>⏱️ 1278m 34s</sub>

### 👤 User

would it mess anything up to add those reviews without adding users?

---

<sub>⏱️ 1278m 37s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Yes — it would fail (or should fail) with your current schema.

`movie_reviews.user_id` references `auth.users(id)` and is `NOT NULL`, so inserting reviews without real users will violate foreign key constraints.

So you need real users first (dashboard-created test users is easiest), then insert reviews tied to those `user_id`s.

If you want temporary fake-only data, you’d have to alter schema (remove FK / allow null), which I do **not** recommend.

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js.**

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js

<details>
<summary>248 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
6.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
7.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
8.   let debounceHandle;
9.   let requestCounter = 0;
10.   let activeIndex = -1;
11.   let currentResults = [];
12. 
13.   function getMovieYear(item) {
14.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
15.   }
16. 
17.   function clearSuggestions() {
18.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
19.   }
20. 
21.   function openSuggestions() {
22.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
23.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
24.   }
25. 
26.   function closeSuggestions() {
27.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
28.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
29.     activeIndex = -1;
30.   }
31. 
32.   function syncActiveItem() {
33.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
34.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
35.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
36.         item.classList.add("active");
37.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
38.       } else {
39.         item.classList.remove("active");
40.       }
41.     });
42.   }
43. 
44.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
45.     const trimmed = query.trim();
46.     if (!trimmed) {
47.       return;
48.     }
49.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
50.   }
51. 
52.   function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
53.     if (!movieId) {
54.       return;
55.     }
56.     window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
57.   }
58. 
59.   function createPosterElement(item) {
60.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
61. 
62.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
63.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
64.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
65.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
66.       return fallback;
67.     }
68. 
69.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
70.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
71.     poster.loading = "lazy";
72.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
73.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
74.     return poster;
75.   }
76. 
77.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
78.     currentResults = items;
79.     clearSuggestions();
80.     activeIndex = -1;
81. 
82.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
83.       const li = document.createElement("li");
84.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
85.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
86.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
87.       li.tabIndex = -1;
88. 
89.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
90. 
91.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
92.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
93. 
94.       const title = document.createElement("span");
95.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
96.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
97. 
98.       const year = document.createElement("span");
99.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
100.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
101. 
102.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
103.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
104.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
105. 
106.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
107.         event.preventDefault();
108.       });
109. 
110.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
111.         activeIndex = index;
112.         syncActiveItem();
113.       });
114. 
115.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
116.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
117.       });
118. 
119.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
120.     }
121. 
122.     openSuggestions();
123.   }
124. 
125.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
126.     currentResults = [];
127.     activeIndex = -1;
128.     clearSuggestions();
129. 
130.     const li = document.createElement("li");
131.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
132.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
133.     li.textContent = message;
134.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
135. 
136.     openSuggestions();
137.   }
138. 
139.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
140.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
141.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
142.       return;
143.     }
144. 
145.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
146.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
147. 
148.     try {
149.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
150.       const payload = await response.json();
151. 
152.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
153.         return;
154.       }
155. 
156.       if (!response.ok) {
157.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
158.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
159.         return;
160.       }
161. 
162.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
163. 
164.       if (results.length === 0) {
165.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
166.         return;
167.       }
168. 
169.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
170.     } catch (error) {
171.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
172.         return;
173.       }
174.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
175.     }
176.   }
177. 
178.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
179.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
180.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
181. 
182.     if (!query) {
183.       closeSuggestions();
184.       clearSuggestions();
185.       currentResults = [];
186.       return;
187.     }
188. 
189.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
190.       requestCounter += 1;
191.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
192.     }, 300);
193.   });
194. 
195.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
196.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
197. 
198.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
199.       event.preventDefault();
200.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
201.       syncActiveItem();
202.       openSuggestions();
203.       return;
204.     }
205. 
206.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
207.       event.preventDefault();
208.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
209.       syncActiveItem();
210.       openSuggestions();
211.       return;
212.     }
213. 
214.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
215.       closeSuggestions();
216.       return;
217.     }
218. 
219.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
220.       event.preventDefault();
221.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
222.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
223.         return;
224.       }
225.       goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
226.     }
227.   });
228. 
229.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
230.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
231.       openSuggestions();
232.     }
233.   });
234. 
235.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
236.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
237.   });
238. 
239.   indexSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
240.     event.preventDefault();
241.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
242.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
243.       return;
244.     }
245.     goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
246.   });
247. }
248.
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Arguments</summary>

```json

src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2\"></script>\n  <script src=\"js/supabase-config.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"js/auth.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"js/index-search.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n'@ | Set-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\index.html' -Encoding UTF8;\n\n@'\nconst indexSearchForm = document.getElementById(\"index-search-form\");\nconst indexSearchInput = document.getElementById(\"index-movie-query\");\nconst suggestionList = document.getElementById(\"index-suggestion-list\");\nconst recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById(\"recent-reviews-rail\");\n\nif (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {\n  const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;\n  const imageBase = \"https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92\";\n  let debounceHandle;\n  let requestCounter = 0;\n  let activeIndex = -1;\n  let currentResults = [];\n\n  function getMovieYear(item) {\n    return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : \"Unknown\";\n  }\n\n  function clearSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.replaceChildren();\n  }\n\n  function openSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.classList.add(\"open\");\n    indexSearchInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n  }\n\n  function closeSuggestions() {\n    suggestionList.classList.remove(\"open\");\n    indexSearchInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n    activeIndex = -1;\n  }\n\n  function syncActiveItem() {\n    const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(\".suggestion-item[data-index]\");\n    items.forEach((item, idx) => {\n      if (idx === activeIndex) {\n        item.classList.add(\"active\");\n        item.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      } else {\n        item.classList.remove(\"active\");\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  function goToSearchPage(query) {\n    const trimmed = query.trim();\n    if (!trimmed) {\n      return;\n    }\n    window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;\n  }\n\n  function goToMoviePage(movieId) {\n    if (!movieId) {\n      return;\n    }\n    window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;\n  }\n\n  function createPosterElement(item) {\n    const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === \"string\" ? item.poster_path : \"\";\n\n    if (!posterPath.startsWith(\"/\")) {\n      const fallback = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      fallback.className = \"suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback\";\n      fallback.textContent = \"No image\";\n      return fallback;\n    }\n\n    const poster = document.createElement(\"img\");\n    poster.className = \"suggestion-poster\";\n    poster.loading = \"lazy\";\n    poster.alt = `${item.title || \"Movie\"} poster`;\n    poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;\n    return poster;\n  }\n\n  function renderSuggestionItems(items) {\n    currentResults = items;\n    clearSuggestions();\n    activeIndex = -1;\n\n    for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {\n      const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n      li.className = \"suggestion-item\";\n      li.setAttribute(\"role\", \"option\");\n      li.setAttribute(\"data-index\", String(index));\n      li.tabIndex = -1;\n\n      li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));\n\n      const textWrap = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      textWrap.className = \"suggestion-text\";\n\n      const title = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      title.className = \"suggestion-title\";\n      title.textContent = item.title || \"Untitled\";\n\n      const year = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      year.className = \"suggestion-year\";\n      year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);\n\n      textWrap.appendChild(title);\n      textWrap.appendChild(year);\n      li.appendChild(textWrap);\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", (event) => {\n        event.preventDefault();\n      });\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mouseenter\", () => {\n        activeIndex = index;\n        syncActiveItem();\n      });\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n        goToMoviePage(item.id);\n      });\n\n      suggestionList.appendChild(li);\n    }\n\n    openSuggestions();\n  }\n\n  function renderInfo(message, state = \"info\") {\n    currentResults = [];\n    activeIndex = -1;\n    clearSuggestions();\n\n    const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n    li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;\n    li.setAttribute(\"role\", \"option\");\n    li.textContent = message;\n    suggestionList.appendChild(li);\n\n    openSuggestions();\n  }\n\n  async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {\n    if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {\n      renderInfo(\"TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js\", \"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;\n    renderInfo(\"Searching...\", \"loading\");\n\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(endpoint);\n      const payload = await response.json();\n\n      if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        const errorMessage = payload.status_message || \"Search failed.\";\n        renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, \"error\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];\n\n      if (results.length === 0) {\n        renderInfo(\"No matches yet.\", \"info\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      renderSuggestionItems(results);\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {\n        return;\n      }\n      renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, \"error\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function loadRecentReviews() {\n    if (!recentReviewsRail) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();\n    const loading = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    loading.className = \"recent-review-card recent-review-card-info\";\n    loading.textContent = \"Loading recent reviews...\";\n    recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);\n\n    const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient\n      .from(\"movie_reviews\")\n      .select(\"id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at\")\n      .order(\"created_at\", { ascending: false })\n      .limit(20);\n\n    recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();\n\n    if (error) {\n      const failure = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      failure.className = \"recent-review-card recent-review-card-info\";\n      failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;\n      recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!data || data.length === 0) {\n      const empty = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      empty.className = \"recent-review-card recent-review-card-info\";\n      empty.textContent = \"No reviews yet.\";\n      recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const cards = data.map((review) => {\n      const card = document.createElement(\"article\");\n      card.className = \"recent-review-card\";\n      card.tabIndex = 0;\n\n      const title = document.createElement(\"h3\");\n      title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;\n\n      const byline = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      byline.className = \"recent-review-byline\";\n      byline.textContent = `By ${review.username || \"Unknown\"}`;\n\n      const rating = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      rating.className = \"recent-review-rating\";\n      rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;\n\n      const snippet = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      snippet.className = \"recent-review-snippet\";\n      snippet.textContent = review.review_text || \"\";\n\n      const timestamp = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      timestamp.className = \"recent-review-time\";\n      timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : \"\";\n\n      card.appendChild(title);\n      card.appendChild(byline);\n      card.appendChild(rating);\n      card.appendChild(snippet);\n      card.appendChild(timestamp);\n\n      const openMovie = () => {\n        if (!review.movie_id) {\n          return;\n        }\n        goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);\n      };\n\n      card.addEventListener(\"click\", openMovie);\n      card.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n        if (event.key === \"Enter\" || event.key === \" \") {\n          event.preventDefault();\n          openMovie();\n        }\n      });\n\n      return card;\n    });\n\n    recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);\n  }\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", () => {\n    const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();\n    clearTimeout(debounceHandle);\n\n    if (!query) {\n      closeSuggestions();\n      clearSuggestions();\n      currentResults = [];\n      return;\n    }\n\n    debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {\n      requestCounter += 1;\n      fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);\n    }, 300);\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n    const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;\n\n    if (event.key === \"ArrowDown\" && hasSelectable) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;\n      syncActiveItem();\n      openSuggestions();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (event.key === \"ArrowUp\" && hasSelectable) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;\n      syncActiveItem();\n      openSuggestions();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n      closeSuggestions();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (event.key === \"Enter\") {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {\n        goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);\n        return;\n      }\n      goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);\n    }\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"focus\", () => {\n    if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {\n      openSuggestions();\n    }\n  });\n\n  indexSearchInput.addEventListener(\"blur\", () => {\n    setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);\n  });\n\n  indexSearchForm.addEventListener(\"submit\", (event) => {\n    event.preventDefault();\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {\n      goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);\n      return;\n    }\n    goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);\n  });\n\n  loadRecentReviews();\n}\n'@ | left;\n}\n\n.disabled-search-shell input {\n  opacity: 0.65;\n  cursor: not-allowed;\n}\n\n.recent-reviews {\n  padding: 3.2rem 1.5rem;\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.recent-reviews-rail {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-auto-flow: column;\n  grid-auto-columns: minmax(250px, 310px);\n  gap: 0.9rem;\n  overflow-x: auto;\n  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.recent-review-card {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: var(--radius);\n  padding: 0.9rem;\n  min-height: 180px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;\n}\n\n.recent-review-card:hover {\n  border-color: var(--accent-alt);\n  transform: translateY(-2px);\n}\n\n.recent-review-card:focus {\n  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n.recent-review-card h3 {\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;\n}\n\n.recent-review-byline,\n.recent-review-time {\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  font-size: 0.82rem;\n}\n\n.recent-review-rating {\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  margin: 0.45rem 0;\n}\n\n.recent-review-snippet {\n  color: #d4dbea;\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  display: -webkit-box;\n  -webkit-line-clamp: 4;\n  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.recent-review-card-info {\n  cursor: default;\n}\n\n.recent-review-card-info:hover {\n  border-color: var(--border);\n  transform: none;\n}\n'@;\n\nnode --check C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\js\\index-search.js && git --no-pager status --short"

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js.**

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js (lines 1-380)

<details>
<summary>337 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
5. 
6. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
7.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
8.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9.   let debounceHandle;
10.   let requestCounter = 0;
11.   let activeIndex = -1;
12.   let currentResults = [];
13. 
14.   function getMovieYear(item) {
15.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
16.   }
17. 
18.   function clearSuggestions() {
19.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
20.   }
21. 
22.   function openSuggestions() {
23.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
24.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
25.   }
26. 
27.   function closeSuggestions() {
28.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
29.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
30.     activeIndex = -1;
31.   }
32. 
33.   function syncActiveItem() {
34.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
35.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
36.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
37.         item.classList.add("active");
38.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
39.       } else {
40.         item.classList.remove("active");
41.       }
42.     });
43.   }
44. 
45.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
46.     const trimmed = query.trim();
47.     if (!trimmed) {
48.       return;
49.     }
50.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
51.   }
52. 
53.   function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
54.     if (!movieId) {
55.       return;
56.     }
57.     window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
58.   }
59. 
60.   function createPosterElement(item) {
61.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
62. 
63.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
64.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
65.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
66.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
67.       return fallback;
68.     }
69. 
70.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
71.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
72.     poster.loading = "lazy";
73.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
74.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
75.     return poster;
76.   }
77. 
78.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
79.     currentResults = items;
80.     clearSuggestions();
81.     activeIndex = -1;
82. 
83.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
84.       const li = document.createElement("li");
85.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
86.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
87.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
88.       li.tabIndex = -1;
89. 
90.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
91. 
92.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
93.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
94. 
95.       const title = document.createElement("span");
96.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
97.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
98. 
99.       const year = document.createElement("span");
100.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
101.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
102. 
103.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
104.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
105.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
106. 
107.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
108.         event.preventDefault();
109.       });
110. 
111.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
112.         activeIndex = index;
113.         syncActiveItem();
114.       });
115. 
116.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
117.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
118.       });
119. 
120.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
121.     }
122. 
123.     openSuggestions();
124.   }
125. 
126.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
127.     currentResults = [];
128.     activeIndex = -1;
129.     clearSuggestions();
130. 
131.     const li = document.createElement("li");
132.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
133.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
134.     li.textContent = message;
135.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
136. 
137.     openSuggestions();
138.   }
139. 
140.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
141.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
142.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
143.       return;
144.     }
145. 
146.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
147.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
148. 
149.     try {
150.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
151.       const payload = await response.json();
152. 
153.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
154.         return;
155.       }
156. 
157.       if (!response.ok) {
158.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
159.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
160.         return;
161.       }
162. 
163.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
164. 
165.       if (results.length === 0) {
166.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
167.         return;
168.       }
169. 
170.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
171.     } catch (error) {
172.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
173.         return;
174.       }
175.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
176.     }
177.   }
178. 
179.   async function loadRecentReviews() {
180.     if (!recentReviewsRail) {
181.       return;
182.     }
183. 
184.     recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
185.     const loading = document.createElement("div");
186.     loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
187.     loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
188.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
189. 
190.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
191.       .from("movie_reviews")
192.       .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
193.       .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
194.       .limit(20);
195. 
196.     recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
197. 
198.     if (error) {
199.       const failure = document.createElement("div");
200.       failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
201.       failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
202.       recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
203.       return;
204.     }
205. 
206.     if (!data || data.length === 0) {
207.       const empty = document.createElement("div");
208.       empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
209.       empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
210.       recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
211.       return;
212.     }
213. 
214.     const cards = data.map((review) => {
215.       const card = document.createElement("article");
216.       card.className = "recent-review-card";
217.       card.tabIndex = 0;
218. 
219.       const title = document.createElement("h3");
220.       title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
221. 
222.       const byline = document.createElement("p");
223.       byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
224.       byline.textContent = `By ${review.username || "Unknown"}`;
225. 
226.       const rating = document.createElement("p");
227.       rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
228.       rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
229. 
230.       const snippet = document.createElement("p");
231.       snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
232.       snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
233. 
234.       const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
235.       timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
236.       timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
237. 
238.       card.appendChild(title);
239.       card.appendChild(byline);
240.       card.appendChild(rating);
241.       card.appendChild(snippet);
242.       card.appendChild(timestamp);
243. 
244.       const openMovie = () => {
245.         if (!review.movie_id) {
246.           return;
247.         }
248.         goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
249.       };
250. 
251.       card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
252.       card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
253.         if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
254.           event.preventDefault();
255.           openMovie();
256.         }
257.       });
258. 
259.       return card;
260.     });
261. 
262.     recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
263.   }
264. 
265.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
266.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
267.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
268. 
269.     if (!query) {
270.       closeSuggestions();
271.       clearSuggestions();
272.       currentResults = [];
273.       return;
274.     }
275. 
276.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
277.       requestCounter += 1;
278.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
279.     }, 300);
280.   });
281. 
282.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
283.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
284. 
285.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
286.       event.preventDefault();
287.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
288.       syncActiveItem();
289.       openSuggestions();
290.       return;
291.     }
292. 
293.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
294.       event.preventDefault();
295.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
296.       syncActiveItem();
297.       openSuggestions();
298.       return;
299.     }
300. 
301.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
302.       closeSuggestions();
303.       return;
304.     }
305. 
306.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
307.       event.preventDefault();
308.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
309.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
310.         return;
311.       }
312.       goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
313.     }
314.   });
315. 
316.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
317.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
318.       openSuggestions();
319.     }
320.   });
321. 
322.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
323.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
324.   });
325. 
326.   indexSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
327.     event.preventDefault();
328.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
329.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
330.       return;
331.     }
332.     goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
333.   });
334. 
335.   loadRecentReviews();
336. }
337.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1281m 43s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — both changes are in place.

### What I changed

- Moved the **main search bar** up into the hero section so it’s visible immediately on page load.
- Added a **Recent Reviews** section on index with a horizontally scrollable rail.
- It fetches latest rows from `movie_reviews` (`order by created_at desc`, limit 20).
- Each review card shows movie title, username, rating, snippet, and timestamp.
- Clicking a review card navigates to that movie’s detail page.

If you want, I can next replace the old lower “Find a Movie” section entirely instead of leaving the placeholder block.

**view the file at C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js.**

C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\index-search.js

<details>
<summary>337 lines</summary>

```
1. const indexSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const indexSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
5. 
6. if (indexSearchForm && indexSearchInput && suggestionList) {
7.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
8.   const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9.   let debounceHandle;
10.   let requestCounter = 0;
11.   let activeIndex = -1;
12.   let currentResults = [];
13. 
14.   function getMovieYear(item) {
15.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
16.   }
17. 
18.   function clearSuggestions() {
19.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
20.   }
21. 
22.   function openSuggestions() {
23.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
24.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
25.   }
26. 
27.   function closeSuggestions() {
28.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
29.     indexSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
30.     activeIndex = -1;
31.   }
32. 
33.   function syncActiveItem() {
34.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
35.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
36.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
37.         item.classList.add("active");
38.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
39.       } else {
40.         item.classList.remove("active");
41.       }
42.     });
43.   }
44. 
45.   function goToSearchPage(query) {
46.     const trimmed = query.trim();
47.     if (!trimmed) {
48.       return;
49.     }
50.     window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
51.   }
52. 
53.   function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
54.     if (!movieId) {
55.       return;
56.     }
57.     window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
58.   }
59. 
60.   function createPosterElement(item) {
61.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
62. 
63.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
64.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
65.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
66.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
67.       return fallback;
68.     }
69. 
70.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
71.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
72.     poster.loading = "lazy";
73.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
74.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
75.     return poster;
76.   }
77. 
78.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
79.     currentResults = items;
80.     clearSuggestions();
81.     activeIndex = -1;
82. 
83.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
84.       const li = document.createElement("li");
85.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
86.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
87.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
88.       li.tabIndex = -1;
89. 
90.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
91. 
92.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
93.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
94. 
95.       const title = document.createElement("span");
96.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
97.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
98. 
99.       const year = document.createElement("span");
100.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
101.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
102. 
103.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
104.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
105.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
106. 
107.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
108.         event.preventDefault();
109.       });
110. 
111.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
112.         activeIndex = index;
113.         syncActiveItem();
114.       });
115. 
116.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
117.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
118.       });
119. 
120.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
121.     }
122. 
123.     openSuggestions();
124.   }
125. 
126.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
127.     currentResults = [];
128.     activeIndex = -1;
129.     clearSuggestions();
130. 
131.     const li = document.createElement("li");
132.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
133.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
134.     li.textContent = message;
135.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
136. 
137.     openSuggestions();
138.   }
139. 
140.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
141.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
142.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
143.       return;
144.     }
145. 
146.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
147.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
148. 
149.     try {
150.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
151.       const payload = await response.json();
152. 
153.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
154.         return;
155.       }
156. 
157.       if (!response.ok) {
158.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
159.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
160.         return;
161.       }
162. 
163.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
164. 
165.       if (results.length === 0) {
166.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
167.         return;
168.       }
169. 
170.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
171.     } catch (error) {
172.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
173.         return;
174.       }
175.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
176.     }
177.   }
178. 
179.   async function loadRecentReviews() {
180.     if (!recentReviewsRail) {
181.       return;
182.     }
183. 
184.     recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
185.     const loading = document.createElement("div");
186.     loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
187.     loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
188.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
189. 
190.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
191.       .from("movie_reviews")
192.       .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
193.       .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
194.       .limit(20);
195. 
196.     recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
197. 
198.     if (error) {
199.       const failure = document.createElement("div");
200.       failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
201.       failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
202.       recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
203.       return;
204.     }
205. 
206.     if (!data || data.length === 0) {
207.       const empty = document.createElement("div");
208.       empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
209.       empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
210.       recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
211.       return;
212.     }
213. 
214.     const cards = data.map((review) => {
215.       const card = document.createElement("article");
216.       card.className = "recent-review-card";
217.       card.tabIndex = 0;
218. 
219.       const title = document.createElement("h3");
220.       title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
221. 
222.       const byline = document.createElement("p");
223.       byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
224.       byline.textContent = `By ${review.username || "Unknown"}`;
225. 
226.       const rating = document.createElement("p");
227.       rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
228.       rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
229. 
230.       const snippet = document.createElement("p");
231.       snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
232.       snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
233. 
234.       const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
235.       timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
236.       timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
237. 
238.       card.appendChild(title);
239.       card.appendChild(byline);
240.       card.appendChild(rating);
241.       card.appendChild(snippet);
242.       card.appendChild(timestamp);
243. 
244.       const openMovie = () => {
245.         if (!review.movie_id) {
246.           return;
247.         }
248.         goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
249.       };
250. 
251.       card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
252.       card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
253.         if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
254.           event.preventDefault();
255.           openMovie();
256.         }
257.       });
258. 
259.       return card;
260.     });
261. 
262.     recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
263.   }
264. 
265.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
266.     const query = indexSearchInput.value.trim();
267.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
268. 
269.     if (!query) {
270.       closeSuggestions();
271.       clearSuggestions();
272.       currentResults = [];
273.       return;
274.     }
275. 
276.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
277.       requestCounter += 1;
278.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
279.     }, 300);
280.   });
281. 
282.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
283.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
284. 
285.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
286.       event.preventDefault();
287.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
288.       syncActiveItem();
289.       openSuggestions();
290.       return;
291.     }
292. 
293.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
294.       event.preventDefault();
295.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
296.       syncActiveItem();
297.       openSuggestions();
298.       return;
299.     }
300. 
301.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
302.       closeSuggestions();
303.       return;
304.     }
305. 
306.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
307.       event.preventDefault();
308.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
309.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
310.         return;
311.       }
312.       goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
313.     }
314.   });
315. 
316.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
317.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
318.       openSuggestions();
319.     }
320.   });
321. 
322.   indexSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
323.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
324.   });
325. 
326.   indexSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
327.     event.preventDefault();
328.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
329.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
330.       return;
331.     }
332.     goToSearchPage(indexSearchInput.value);
333.   });
334. 
335.   loadRecentReviews();
336. }
337.
```

</details>

736.   border: 1px solid var(--border);
737.   border-radius: var(--radius);
738.   padding: 1.2rem;
739. }
740. 
741. .movie-poster {
742.   width: 100%;
743.   max-width: 280px;
744.   border-radius: 10px;
745.   border: 1px solid var(--border);
746. }
747. 
748. .movie-poster-fallback {
749.   min-height: 420px;
750.   border: 1px dashed var(--border);
751.   display: grid;
752.   place-items: center;
753.   color: var(--text-muted);
754. }
755. 
756. .movie-detail-content h1 {
757.   font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
758.   margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
759. }
760.
```

</details>

  return;\n  }\n  window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;\n}\n\nfunction setupMovieTypeahead() {\n  if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  let debounceHandle;\n  let requestCounter = 0;\n  let activeIndex = -1;\n  let currentResults = [];\n\n  function getMovieYear(item) {\n    return movieSuggestionList.classList.add(\"open\");\n    movieSearchInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n  }\n\n  function closeSuggestions() {\n    movieSuggestionList.classList.remove(\"open\");\n    movieSearchInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n    activeIndex = -1;\n  }\n\n  function syncActiveItem() {\n    const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(\".suggestion-item[data-index]\");\n    items.forEach((item, idx) => {\n      if (idx === activeIndex) {\n        item.classList.add(\"active\");\n        item.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      } else {\n        item.classList.remove(\"active\");\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  function createPosterElement(item) {\n    const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === \"string\" ? item.poster_path : \"\";\n\n    if (!posterPath.startsWith(\"/\")) {\n      const fallback = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      fallback.className = \"suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback\";\n      fallback.textContent = \"No image\";\n      return fallback;\n    }\n\n    const poster = document.createElement(\"img\");\n    poster.className = \"suggestion-poster\";\n    poster.loading = \"lazy\";\n    poster.alt = `${item.title || \"Movie\"} poster`;\n    poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;\n    return poster;\n  }\n\n  function renderSuggestionItems(items) {\n    currentResults = items;\n    clearSuggestions();\n    activeIndex = -1;\n\n    for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {\n      const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n      li.className = \"suggestion-item\";\n      li.setAttribute(\"role\", \"option\");\n      li.setAttribute(\"data-index\", String(index));\n      li.tabIndex = -1;\n\n      li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));\n\n      const textWrap = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      textWrap.className = \"suggestion-text\";\n\n      const title = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      title.className = \"suggestion-title\";\n      title.textContent = item.title || \"Untitled\";\n\n      const year = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      year.className = \"suggestion-year\";\n      year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);\n\n      textWrap.appendChild(title);\n      textWrap.appendChild(year);\n      li.appendChild(textWrap);\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", (event) => {\n        event.preventDefault();\n      });\n\n      li.addEventListener(\"mouseenter\", () => {\n        activeIndex = index;\n openSuggestions();\n  }\n\n  function renderInfo(message, state = \"info\") {\n    currentResults = [];\n    activeIndex = -1;\n    clearSuggestions();\n\n    const li = recent-review-card-info\";\n  loading.textContent = \"Loading recent reviews...\";\n  recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);\n\n  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient\n recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();\n\n  if (error) {\n    const failure = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    failure.className = \"recent-review-card recent-review-card-info\";\n return;\n  }\n\n  const cards = data.map((review) => {\n    const card = document.createElement(\"article\");\n    card.className = \"recent-review-card\";\n    card.tabIndex = 0;\n\n    const title = 1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
30.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   let debounceHandle;
35.   let requestCounter = 0;
36.   let activeIndex = -1;
37.   let currentResults = [];
38. 
39.   function getMovieYear(item) {
40.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
41.   }
42. 
43.   function clearSuggestions() {
44.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
45.   }
46. 
47.   function openSuggestions() {
48.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
49.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
50.   }
51. 
52.   function closeSuggestions() {
53.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
54.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
55.     activeIndex = -1;
56.   }
57. 
58.   function syncActiveItem() {
59.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
60.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
61.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
62.         item.classList.add("active");
63.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
64.       } else {
65.         item.classList.remove("active");
66.       }
67.     });
68.   }
69. 
70.   function createPosterElement(item) {
71.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
72. 
73.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
74.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
75.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
76.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
77.       return fallback;
78.     }
79. 
80.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
81.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
82.     poster.loading = "lazy";
83.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
84.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
85.     return poster;
86.   }
87. 
88.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
89.     currentResults = items;
90.     clearSuggestions();
91.     activeIndex = -1;
92. 
93.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
94.       const li = document.createElement("li");
95.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
96.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
97.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
98.       li.tabIndex = -1;
99. 
100.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
101. 
102.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
103.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
104. 
105.       const title = document.createElement("span");
106.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
107.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
108. 
109.       const year = document.createElement("span");
110.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
111.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
112. 
113.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
114.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
115.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
116. 
117.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
118.         event.preventDefault();
119.       });
120. 
121.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
122.         activeIndex = index;
123.         syncActiveItem();
124.       });
125. 
126.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
127.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
128.       });
129. 
130.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
131.     }
132. 
133.     openSuggestions();
134.   }
135. 
136.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
137.     currentResults = [];
138.     activeIndex = -1;
139.     clearSuggestions();
140. 
141.     const li = document.createElement("li");
142.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
143.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
144.     li.textContent = message;
145.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
146. 
147.     openSuggestions();
148.   }
149. 
150.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
151.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
152.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
153.       return;
154.     }
155. 
156.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
157.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
158. 
159.     try {
160.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
161.       const payload = await response.json();
162. 
163.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
164.         return;
165.       }
166. 
167.       if (!response.ok) {
168.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
169.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
170.         return;
171.       }
172. 
173.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
174. 
175.       if (results.length === 0) {
176.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
177.         return;
178.       }
179. 
180.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
181.     } catch (error) {
182.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
183.         return;
184.       }
185.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
186.     }
187.   }
188. 
189.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
190.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
191.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
192. 
193.     if (!query) {
194.       closeSuggestions();
195.       clearSuggestions();
196.       currentResults = [];
197.       return;
198.     }
199. 
200.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
201.       requestCounter += 1;
202.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
203.     }, 300);
204.   });
205. 
206.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
207.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
208. 
209.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
210.       event.preventDefault();
211.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
212.       syncActiveItem();
213.       openSuggestions();
214.       return;
215.     }
216. 
217.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
218.       event.preventDefault();
219.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
220.       syncActiveItem();
221.       openSuggestions();
222.       return;
223.     }
224. 
225.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
226.       closeSuggestions();
227.       return;
228.     }
229. 
230.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
231.       event.preventDefault();
232.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
233.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
234.         return;
235.       }
236.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
237.     }
238.   });
239. 
240.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
241.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
242.       openSuggestions();
243.     }
244.   });
245. 
246.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
247.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
248.   });
249. 
250.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
251.     event.preventDefault();
252.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
253.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
254.       return;
255.     }
256.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
257.   });
258. }
259. 
260. function setupUserTypeahead() {
261.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
262.     return;
263.   }
264. 
265.   let debounceHandle;
266.   let requestCounter = 0;
267.   let activeIndex = -1;
268.   let currentResults = [];
269. 
270.   function clearSuggestions() {
271.     userSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
272.   }
273. 
274.   function openSuggestions() {
275.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
276.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
277.   }
278. 
279.   function closeSuggestions() {
280.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
281.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
282.     activeIndex = -1;
283.   }
284. 
285.   function syncActiveItem() {
286.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
287.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
288.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
289.         item.classList.add("active");
290.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
291.       } else {
292.         item.classList.remove("active");
293.       }
294.     });
295.   }
296. 
297.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
298.     currentResults = [];
299.     activeIndex = -1;
300.     clearSuggestions();
301. 
302.     const li = document.createElement("li");
303.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
304.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
305.     li.textContent = message;
306.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
307. 
308.     openSuggestions();
309.   }
310. 
311.   function createUserAvatar(username) {
312.     const avatar = document.createElement("div");
313.     avatar.className = "suggestion-avatar";
314.     avatar.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
315.     return avatar;
316.   }
317. 
318.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
319.     currentResults = items;
320.     clearSuggestions();
321.     activeIndex = -1;
322. 
323.     for (const [index, username] of items.entries()) {
324.       const li = document.createElement("li");
325.       li.className = "suggestion-item";

327.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
328.       li.tabIndex = -1;
329. 
330.       li.appendChild(createUserAvatar(username));
331. 
332.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");

334. 
335.       const name = document.createElement("span");

338.

342. 
343.       textWrap.appendChild(name);

345.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
346.

348.         event.preventDefault();
349.       });
350. 
351.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {

367.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
368.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
369. 
370.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
371.       .from("movie_reviews")
372.       .select("username")
373.       .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)

381.

383.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
384.       return;
385.     }
386. 
387.     const uniqueUsernames = [...new Set((data || [])
388.       .map((row) => (typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : ""))
389.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0))]
390.       .slice(0, 10);
391. 
392.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
393.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
394.       return;
395.     }
396. 
397.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
398.   }

468. 
469. async function loadRecentReviews() {
470.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
471.     return;
472.   }
473. 
474.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
475.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
476.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
477.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
478.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
479. 
480.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
481.     .from("movie_reviews")
482.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
483.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
484.     .limit(20);
485. 
486.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
487. 
488.   if (error) {
489.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
490.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
491.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
492.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
493.     return;
494.   }
495. 
496.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
497.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
498.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
499.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
500.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
501.     return;
502.   }
503. 
504.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
505.     const card = document.createElement("article");
506.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
507.     card.tabIndex = 0;
508. 
509.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
510.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
511. 
512.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
513.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
514.     byline.textContent = `By ${review.username || "Unknown"}`;
515. 
516.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
517.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
518.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
519. 
520.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
521.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
522.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
523. 
524.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
525.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
526.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
527. 
528.     card.appendChild(title);
529.     card.appendChild(byline);
530.     card.appendChild(rating);
531.     card.appendChild(snippet);
532.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
533. 
534.     const openMovie = () => {
535.       if (!review.movie_id) {
536.         return;
537.       }
538.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
539.     };
540. 
541.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
542.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
543.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
544.         event.preventDefault();
545.         openMovie();
546.       }
547.     });
548. 
549.     return card;
550.   });
551. 
552.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
553. }
554. 
555. setupMovieTypeahead();
556. setupUserTypeahead();
557. loadRecentReviews();
558.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1288m 1s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Implemented ✅ I added a **Search users** bar directly under the movie search bar on `index`.

  
It now works like the movie typeahead behavior: debounced input, dropdown suggestions, keyboard navigation (`↑/↓/Enter/Escape`), mouse hover/click selection, and loading/empty/error states.

  
Per your request, it does **not** navigate anywhere yet. Selecting a user just fills the input and closes the dropdown.

  
Technical note: usernames are currently sourced from Supabase `movie_reviews.username` (deduped), so it works now without profile pages/tables. If you later add a dedicated `profiles` table, I can switch the query cleanly.

260. function setupUserTypeahead() {
261.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
262.     return;

265.   let debounceHandle;
266.   let requestCounter = 0;

277.   }
278. 
279.   function closeSuggestions() {
280.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
281.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
282.     activeIndex = -1;
283.   }
284. 
285.   function syncActiveItem() {
286.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
287.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
288.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
289.         item.classList.add("active");
290.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
291.       } else {
292.         item.classList.remove("active");
293.       }
294.     });
295.   }
296. 
297.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
298.     currentResults = [];
299.     activeIndex = -1;
300.     clearSuggestions();
301. 
302.     const li = document.createElement("li");

304.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
305.     li.textContent = message;
306.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
307. 
308.     openSuggestions();
309.   }

314.     avatar.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
315.     return avatar;
316.   }
317.

319.     currentResults = items;

321.     activeIndex = -1;
322.

327.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
328.       li.tabIndex = -1;
329.

338.

342.

346.

348.         event.preventDefault();
349.       });

363.

367.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
368.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
369. 
370.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
371.       .from("movie_reviews")
372.       .select("username")
373.       .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)

375.       .order("username", { ascending: true })

379.       return;
380.     }
381.

384.       return;
385.     }
386. 
387.     const uniqueUsernames = [...new Set((data || [])

391.

461.     event.preventDefault();
462.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
463.       userSearchInput.value = currentResults[activeIndex];
464.       closeSuggestions();
465.     }
466.   });
467. }

<sub>⏱️ 1289m 54s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Yep, you found a real gap — it was only searching usernames from `movie_reviews`, so a user with no reviews wouldn’t appear.

  
I patched it so user search now merges:

- usernames from `movie_reviews.username`
- the **currently signed-in user** from Supabase auth (`user_metadata.username` fallback to email prefix like `john` from `john@gmail.com`)

  
So typing `john` should now show up even before any reviews exist.

  
If you want, next I can make this query a dedicated `profiles` table once you add it, so it lists all users globally.

---

<sub>⏱️ 1291m 12s</sub>

### 👤 User

will i need a users table for having user pages that can be visited and show data not just from the signed in user

---

<sub>⏱️ 1291m 14s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Short answer: **yes** — for public/visit-able user pages, you should add a separate profile table.

  
`auth.users` is private and not meant for direct public reads from the client. A `profiles` (or `user_profiles`) table lets you safely expose only what you want (username, bio, avatar, etc.) and query any user by username/id.

  
Typical setup:
- `profiles.id` UUID PK = `auth.users.id`
- public fields: `username` (unique), `display_name`, `bio`, `avatar_url`
- RLS: public `SELECT`, owner-only `INSERT/UPDATE`

  
If you want, I can give you the exact Supabase SQL + JS wiring next.

---

1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. let isRedirecting = false;
9. 
10. function redirectTo(path) {
11.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14.   isRedirecting = true;
15.   window.location.replace(path);
16. }
17. 
18. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
19.   if (!authMessage) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22. 
23.   authMessage.textContent = message;
24.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
25.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
26. }
27. 
28. function showApp() {
29.   if (appShell) {
30.     appShell.hidden = false;
31.   }
32. }
33. 
34. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
35.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
36.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
37.     return;
38.   }
39. 
40.   if (appShell) {
41.     appShell.hidden = false;
42.   }
43. 
44.   if (authMessage) {
45.     setMessage(message, true);
46.     return;
47.   }
48. 
49.   window.alert(message);
50. }
51. 
52. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
53.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
54.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
55. }
56. 
57. async function getSession() {
58.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
59.   if (error) {
60.     throw error;
61.   }
62.   return data.session;
63. }
64. 
65. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
66.   const session = await getSession();
67. 
68.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") && !session) {
69.     redirectTo("auth.html");
70.     return null;
71.   }
72. 
73.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
74.     redirectTo("index.html");
75.     return session;
76.   }
77. 
78.   if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
79.     navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
80.   }
81. 
82.   showApp();
83.   return session;
84. }
85. 
86. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
87.   if (navUser) {
88.     navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
89.   }
90. 
91.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie")) {
92.     redirectTo("auth.html");
93.   }
94. 
95.   if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
96.     redirectTo("index.html");
97.   }
98. });
99. 
100. enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
101.   showApp();
102.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
103.     redirectTo("auth.html");
104.     return;
105.   }
106. 
107.   setMessage(`Session check failed: ${error.message}`, true);
108. });
109. 
110. if (signupForm) {
111.   signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
112.     event.preventDefault();
113. 
114.     const email = signupForm.email.value.trim();
115.     const password = signupForm.password.value;
116. 
117.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
118.       email,
119.       password,
120.     });
121. 
122.     if (error) {
123.       setMessage(`Sign up failed: ${error.message}`, true);
124.       return;
125.     }
126. 
127.     if (data.user && !data.session) {
128.       setMessage("Sign up successful. Check your email to confirm your account.");
129.       return;
130.     }
131. 
132.     setMessage("Sign up successful. You are now logged in.");
133.     signupForm.reset();
134.   });
135. }
136. 
137. if (loginForm) {
138.   loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
139.     event.preventDefault();
140. 
141.     const email = loginForm.email.value.trim();
142.     const password = loginForm.password.value;
143. 
144.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
145.       email,
146.       password,
147.     });
148. 
149.     if (error) {
150.       setMessage(`Login failed: ${error.message}`, true);
151.       return;
152.     }
153. 
154.     setMessage("Login successful.");
155.     loginForm.reset();
156.     redirectTo("index.html");
157.   });
158. }
159. 
160. if (logoutButton) {
161.   logoutButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
162.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
163. 
164.     if (error) {
165.       if (authMessage) {
166.         setMessage(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`, true);
167.       } else {
168.         window.alert(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`);
169.       }
170.       return;
171.     }
172. 
173.     redirectTo("auth.html");
174.   });
175. }
176.
```

</details>

<details>
