```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
19. 
20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
107. }
108. 
109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
118.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
119.       ? storedUsername
120.       : "Unknown User";
121.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
122.     const bylineText = ownReview ? `By ${reviewUsername} (You)` : `By ${reviewUsername}`;
123.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline", bylineText);
124.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
125.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
126.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
127.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
128. 
129.     card.appendChild(byline);
130.     card.appendChild(heading);
131.     card.appendChild(body);
132.     card.appendChild(stamp);
133.     return card;
134.   });
135. 
136.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
137. }
138. 
139. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
140.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
141. 
142.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
143.     .from("movie_reviews")
144.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
145.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
146.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
147. 
148.   if (error) {
149.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
150.     return;
151.   }
152. 
153.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
154. }
155. 
156. function openReviewModal() {
157.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
158.     return;
159.   }
160. 
161.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
162.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
163.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
164.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
165.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
166. 
167.   clearReviewFormStatus();
168.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
169. }
170. 
171. function closeReviewModal() {
172.   if (!reviewModal) {
173.     return;
174.   }
175.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
176.   clearReviewFormStatus();
177. }
178. 
179. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
180.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
181.   currentMovie = movie;
182. 
183.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
184.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
185.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
186.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
187. 
188.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
189.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
190.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
191.     poster.loading = "lazy";
192.   }
193. 
194.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
195.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
196.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
197.   heading.appendChild(year);
198. 
199.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
200.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
201.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
202.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
203.     : "Genres unavailable";
204. 
205.   content.appendChild(heading);
206.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
207.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
208.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
209.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
210.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
211.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
212.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
213. 
214.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
215.   reviewButton.type = "button";
216.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
217.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
218. 
219.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
220.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>71 lines</summary>

````
1. # KinoRate - DIG4503C Midterm Project
2. 
3. **KinoRate** is a Letterboxd-style movie review web application built with vanilla JavaScript and Supabase Auth.
4. 
5. ## Current Status
6. 
7. ### Phase 1: Completed
8. - User account signup/login via Supabase Auth
9. - Client-side session guards for protected page routing
10. - Logout from protected pages
11. 
12. ### Phase 2: In Progress
13. **Movie Search and Reviews**
14. 
15. - [x] Connect to TMDB API for movie search (connection test page)
16. - [ ] Display movie results with poster, title, and year
17. - [ ] Write a review with star rating and text
18. - [ ] Save reviews to Supabase database
19. - [ ] Edit and delete your own reviews
20. 
21. ## Tech Stack
22. 
23. | Layer | Technology |
24. |-------|-----------|
25. | Auth + Session | Supabase Auth (JS SDK) |
26. | Movie Data | TMDB API |
27. | Frontend | HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript |
28. | Hosting | GitHub Pages |
29. 
30. ## Running Locally
31. 
32. You can run this as a static site.
33. 
34. 1. Create `js/supabase-config.js` from `js/supabase-config.example.js`, then fill in your credentials and API key:
35. 
36. ```js
37. const SUPABASE_URL = "your-project-url";
38. const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = "your-anon-key";
39. const TMDB_API_BASE_URL = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3";
40. const TMDB_API_KEY = "your-tmdb-api-key";
41. ```
42. 
43. 2. Open `auth.html` and sign in.
44. 3. Navigate to `search.html` to verify TMDB connectivity.
45. 
46. ## Deploying to GitHub Pages
47. 
48. 1. Push this repo to GitHub.
49. 2. In repository settings, open **Pages**.
50. 3. Set source to **Deploy from a branch**.
51. 4. Choose branch (usually `main`) and folder `/ (root)`.
52. 5. Save and wait for deployment.
53. 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.
54. 
55. ## Project Structure
56. 
57. ```
58. .
59. ├── index.html              # Protected home page
60. ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
61. ├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
62. ├── style.css               # Shared styling
63. └── js/
64.     ├── supabase-config.example.js  # Template config (safe to commit)
65.     ├── supabase-config.js          # Local secrets (gitignored)
66.     ├── auth.js                     # Auth logic and route guards
67.     ├── index-search.js             # Index typeahead search
68.     └── search.js                   # TMDB connection test logic
69. ```
70. 
71.
````

</details>

220.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
221. }
222. 
223. async function loadMoviePage() {
224.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
225.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
226. 
227.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
228.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
229.     return;
230.   }
231. 
232.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
233.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
234.     return;
235.   }
236. 
237.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
238.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
239.     return;
240.   }
241. 
242.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
243.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
244.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
245.     return;
246.   }
247. 
248.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
249.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
250.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
251. 
252.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
253. 
254.   try {
255.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
256.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
257.     const payload = await response.json();
258. 
259.     if (!response.ok) {
260.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
261.     }
262. 
263.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
264.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
265.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
266.   } catch (error) {
267.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
268.   }
269. }
270. 
271. if (reviewModalClose) {
272.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
273. }
274. 
275. if (reviewModal) {
276.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
277.     const target = event.target;
278.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
279.       closeReviewModal();
280.     }
281.   });
282. }
283. 
284. if (reviewForm) {
285.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
286.     event.preventDefault();
287. 
288.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
289.       return;
290.     }
291. 
292.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
293. 
294.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
295.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
296.       return;
297.     }
298. 
299.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
300.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
301. 
302.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
303.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
304.       return;
305.     }
306. 
307.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
308.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
309.       return;
310.     }
311. 
312.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
313.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
314.     if (submitButton) {
315.       submitButton.disabled = true;
316.     }
317. 
318.     const payload = {
319.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
320.       username: currentUsername,
321.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
322.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
323.       rating: ratingValue,
324.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
325.     };
326. 
327.     try {
328.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
329.         .from("movie_reviews")
330.         .insert(payload);
331. 
332.       if (error) {
333.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
334.         return;
335.       }
336. 
337.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
338.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
339.       reviewForm.reset();
340.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
341.     } finally {
342.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
343.       if (submitButton) {
344.         submitButton.disabled = false;
345.       }
346.     }
347.   });
348. }
349. 
350. loadMoviePage();
351.
```

</details>

366. 
367.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
368.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
369.     if (error) {
370.       return "";
371.     }
372. 
373.     const user = data?.user;
374.     if (!user) {
375.       return "";
376.     }
377. 
378.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
379.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
380.       : "";
381. 
382.     if (metadataUsername) {
383.       return metadataUsername;
384.     }
385. 
386.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
387.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
388.     }
389. 
390.     return "";
391.   }
392. 
393.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
394.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
395. 
396.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
397.       window.supabaseClient
398.         .from("movie_reviews")
399.         .select("username")
400.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
401.         .not("username", "is", null)
402.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
403.         .limit(25),
404.       getCurrentUserUsername()
405.     ]);
406. 
407.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
408.       return;
409.     }
410. 
411.     if (error) {
412.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
413.       return;
414.     }
415. 
416.     const dbUsernames = (data || [])
417.       .map((row) => (typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : ""))
418.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0);
419. 
420.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
421.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
422.       ? [currentUsername]
423.       : [];
424. 
425.     const uniqueUsernames = [...new Set([...localMatches, ...dbUsernames])]
426.       .slice(0, 10);
427. 
428.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
429.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
430.       return;
431.     }
432. 
433.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
434.   }
435. 
436.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
437.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
438.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
439. 
440.     if (!query) {
441.       closeSuggestions();
442.       clearSuggestions();
443.       currentResults = [];
444.       return;
445.     }
446. 
447.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
448.       requestCounter += 1;
449.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
450.     }, 300);
451.   });
452. 
453.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
454.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
455. 
456.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
457.       event.preventDefault();
458.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
459.       syncActiveItem();
460.       openSuggestions();
461.       return;
462.     }
463. 
464.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
465.       event.preventDefault();
466.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
467.       syncActiveItem();
468.       openSuggestions();
469.       return;
470.     }
```

</details>

1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. let isRedirecting = false;
9. 
10. function redirectTo(path) {
11.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14.   isRedirecting = true;
15.   window.location.replace(path);
16. }
17. 
18. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
19.   if (!authMessage) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22. 
23.   authMessage.textContent = message;
24.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
25.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
26. }
27. 
28. function showApp() {
29.   if (appShell) {
30.     appShell.hidden = false;
31.   }
32. }
33. 
34. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
35.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
36.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
37.     return metadata.username.trim();
38.   }
39.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
40.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
41.   }
42.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
43.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
44.   }
45.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
46.   if (email.includes("@")) {
47.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
48.   }
49.   return "";
50. }
51. 
52. async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
53.   if (!userId) {
54.     return "";
55.   }
56.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
57.     .from("profiles")
58.     .select("username")
59.     .eq("id", userId)
60.     .maybeSingle();
61.   if (error) {
62.     return "";
63.   }
64.   return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
65. }
66. 
67. async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
68.   const userId = session?.user?.id;
69.   if (!userId) {
70.     return;
71.   }
72. 
73.   const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
74.   if (!username) {
75.     return;
76.   }
77. 
78.   await window.supabaseClient
79.     .from("profiles")
80.     .upsert(
81.       {
82.         id: userId,
83.         username,
84.       },
85.       { onConflict: "id" }
86.     );
87. }
88. 
89. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
90.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
91.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
92.     return;
93.   }
94. 
95.   if (appShell) {
96.     appShell.hidden = false;
97.   }
98. 
99.   if (authMessage) {
100.     setMessage(message, true);
101.     return;
102.   }
103. 
104.   window.alert(message);
105. }
106. 
107. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
108.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
109.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
110. }
111. 
112. async function getSession() {
113.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
114.   if (error) {
115.     throw error;
116.   }
117.   return data.session;
118. }
119. 
120. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
121.   const session = await getSession();
122. 
123.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") && !session) {
124.     redirectTo("auth.html");
125.     return null;
126.   }
127. 
128.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
129.     redirectTo("index.html");
130.     return session;
131.   }
132. 
133.   if (session?.user?.id) {
134.     await ensureProfileRow(session);
135.   }
136. 
137.   if (navUser && session?.user?.id) {
138.     const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
139.     navUser.textContent = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
140.   }
141. 
142.   showApp();
143.   return session;
144. }
145. 
146. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
147.   if (session?.user?.id) {
148.     ensureProfileRow(session);
149.   }
150. 
151.   if (navUser) {
152.     if (session?.user?.id) {
153.       getProfileUsername(session.user.id).then((username) => {
154.         navUser.textContent = username || session.user.email || "";
155.       });
156.     } else {
157.       navUser.textContent = "";
158.     }
159.   }
160. 
161.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie")) {
162.     redirectTo("auth.html");
163.   }
164. 
165.   if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
166.     redirectTo("index.html");
167.   }
168. });
169. 
170. enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
171.   showApp();
172.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
173.     redirectTo("auth.html");
174.     return;
175.   }
176. 
177.   setMessage(`Session check failed: ${error.message}`, true);
178. });
179. 
180. if (signupForm) {
181.   signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
182.     event.preventDefault();
183. 
184.     const email = signupForm.email.value.trim();
185.     const password = signupForm.password.value;
186. 
187.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
188.       email,
189.       password,
190.     });
191. 
192.     if (error) {
193.       setMessage(`Sign up failed: ${error.message}`, true);
194.       return;
195.     }
196. 
197.     if (data.user && !data.session) {
198.       setMessage("Sign up successful. Check your email to confirm your account.");
199.       return;
200.     }
201. 
202.     setMessage("Sign up successful. You are now logged in.");
203.     signupForm.reset();
204.   });
205. }
206. 
207. if (loginForm) {
208.   loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
209.     event.preventDefault();
210. 
211.     const email = loginForm.email.value.trim();
212.     const password = loginForm.password.value;
213. 
214.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
215.       email,
216.       password,
217.     });
218. 
219.     if (error) {
220.       setMessage(`Login failed: ${error.message}`, true);
221.       return;
222.     }
223. 
224.     setMessage("Login successful.");
225.     loginForm.reset();
226.     redirectTo("index.html");
227.   });
228. }
229. 
230. if (logoutButton) {
231.   logoutButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
232.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
233. 
234.     if (error) {
235.       if (authMessage) {
236.         setMessage(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`, true);
237.       } else {
238.         window.alert(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`);
239.       }
240.       return;
241.     }
242. 
243.     redirectTo("auth.html");
244.   });
245. }
246.

1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
19. 
20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
107. }
108. 
109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
118.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
119.       ? storedUsername
120.       : "Unknown User";
121.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
122.     const bylineText = ownReview ? `By ${reviewUsername} (You)` : `By ${reviewUsername}`;
123.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline", bylineText);
124.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
125.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
126.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
127.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
128. 
129.     card.appendChild(byline);
130.     card.appendChild(heading);
```

</details>

 5. Save and wait for deployment.
 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.

+## Supabase Profiles Setup (for public user pages)
+
+Run this once in Supabase SQL Editor:
+
+```sql
+create table if not exists public.profiles (
+  id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
+  username text not null unique,
+  display_name text,
+  bio text,
+  avatar_url text,
+  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
+  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
+);
+
+create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()
+returns trigger
+language plpgsql
+security definer
+set search_path = public
+as $$
+declare
+  base_username text;
+begin
+  base_username := coalesce(
+    nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),
+    split_part(new.email, '@', 1),
+    'user'
+  );
+
+  insert into public.profiles (id, username)
+  values (new.id, base_username)
+  on conflict (id) do nothing;
+
+  return new;
+end;
+$$;
+
+drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;
+create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile
+after insert on auth.users
+for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();
+
+alter table public.profiles enable row level security;
+
+drop policy if exists "profiles public read" on public.profiles;
+create policy "profiles public read"
+on public.profiles
+for select
+to authenticated
+using (true);
+
+drop policy if exists "profiles owner insert" on public.profiles;
+create policy "profiles owner insert"
+on public.profiles
+for insert
+to authenticated
+with check (auth.uid() = id);
+
+drop policy if exists "profiles owner update" on public.profiles;
+create policy "profiles owner update"
+on public.profiles
+for update
+to authenticated
+using (auth.uid() = id)
+with check (auth.uid() = id);
+```
+
+The app now reads usernames from `profiles` for user search and nav display, with fallback to email prefix.
+
 ## Project Structure

 ```
 .
-├── index.html              # Protected home page (client-side session check)
+├── index.html              # Protected home page
 ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
+├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
 ├── style.css               # Shared styling
 └── js/
-    ├── supabase-config.js  # Supabase credentials
-    └── auth.js             # Auth logic and route guards
+    ├── supabase-config.example.js  # Template config (safe to commit)
+    ├── supabase-config.js          # Local secrets (gitignored)
+    ├── auth.js                     # Auth logic and route guards
+    ├── index-search.js             # Index typeahead search
+    └── search.js                   # TMDB connection test logic
 ```
+
diff --git a/js/auth.js b/js/auth.js
index 5d74b6d..f79a7d4 100644
--- a/js/auth.js
+++ b/js/auth.js
@@ -31,8 +31,63 @@ function showApp() {
   }
 }

+function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
+  const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
+  if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
+    return metadata.username.trim();
+  }
+  if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
+    return metadata.display_name.trim();
+  }
+  if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
+    return metadata.full_name.trim();
+  }
+  const email = session?.user?.email || "";
+  if (email.includes("@")) {
+    return email.split("@")[0].trim();
+  }
+  return "";
+}
+
+async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
+  if (!userId) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .select("username")
+    .eq("id", userId)
+    .maybeSingle();
+  if (error) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
+}
+
+async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
+  const userId = session?.user?.id;
+  if (!userId) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .upsert(
+      {
+        id: userId,
+        username,
+      },
+      { onConflict: "id" }
+    );
+}
+
 function showFatalAuthError(message) {
-  if (currentPage === "index") {
+  if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
     return;
   }
@@ -65,7 +120,7 @@ async function getSession() {
 async function enforceRouteGuard() {
   const session = await getSession();

-  if (currentPage === "index" && !session) {
+  if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") && !session) {
     redirectTo("auth.html");
     return null;
   }
@@ -75,8 +130,13 @@ async function enforceRouteGuard() {
     return session;
   }

-  if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
-    navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
+  if (session?.user?.id) {
+    await ensureProfileRow(session);
+  }
+
+  if (navUser && session?.user?.id) {
+    const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
+    navUser.textContent = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
   }

   showApp();
@@ -84,11 +144,21 @@ async function enforceRouteGuard() {
 }

 window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
+  if (session?.user?.id) {
+    ensureProfileRow(session);
+  }
+
   if (navUser) {
-    navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
+    if (session?.user?.id) {
+      getProfileUsername(session.user.id).then((username) => {
+        navUser.textContent = username || session.user.email || "";
+      });
+    } else {
+      navUser.textContent = "";
+    }
   }

-  if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && currentPage === "index") {
+  if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie")) {    
     redirectTo("auth.html");
   }

@@ -99,7 +169,7 @@ window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {

 enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {

1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
19. 
20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
107. }
108. 
109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
118.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
119.       ? storedUsername
120.       : "Unknown User";
121.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
122.     const bylineText = ownReview ? `By ${reviewUsername} (You)` : `By ${reviewUsername}`;
123.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline", bylineText);
124.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
125.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
126.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
127.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
128. 
129.     card.appendChild(byline);
130.     card.appendChild(heading);
131.     card.appendChild(body);
132.     card.appendChild(stamp);
133.     return card;
134.   });
135. 
136.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
137. }
138. 
139. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
140.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
141. 
142.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
143.     .from("movie_reviews")
144.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
145.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
146.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
147. 
148.   if (error) {
149.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
150.     return;
151.   }
152. 
153.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
154. }
155. 
156. function openReviewModal() {
157.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
158.     return;
159.   }
160. 
161.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
162.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
163.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
164.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
165.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
166. 
167.   clearReviewFormStatus();
168.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
169. }
170. 
171. function closeReviewModal() {
172.   if (!reviewModal) {
173.     return;
174.   }
175.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
176.   clearReviewFormStatus();
177. }
178. 
179. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
180.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
181.   currentMovie = movie;
182. 
183.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
184.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
185.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
186.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
187. 
188.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
189.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
190.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
191.     poster.loading = "lazy";
192.   }
193. 
194.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
195.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
196.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
197.   heading.appendChild(year);
198. 
199.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
200.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
201.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
202.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
203.     : "Genres unavailable";
204. 
205.   content.appendChild(heading);
206.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
207.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
208.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
209.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
210.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
211.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
212.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
213. 
214.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
215.   reviewButton.type = "button";
216.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
217.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
218. 
219.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
220.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
221. }
222. 
223. async function loadMoviePage() {
224.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
225.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
226. 
227.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
228.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
229.     return;
230.   }
231. 
232.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
233.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
234.     return;
235.   }
236. 
237.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
238.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
239.     return;
240.   }
241. 
242.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
243.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
244.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
245.     return;
246.   }
247. 
248.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
249.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
250.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
251. 
252.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
253. 
254.   try {
255.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
256.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
257.     const payload = await response.json();
258. 
259.     if (!response.ok) {
260.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
261.     }
262. 
263.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
264.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
265.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
266.   } catch (error) {
267.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
268.   }
269. }
270. 
271. if (reviewModalClose) {
272.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
273. }
274. 
275. if (reviewModal) {
276.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
277.     const target = event.target;
278.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
279.       closeReviewModal();
280.     }
281.   });
282. }
283. 
284. if (reviewForm) {
285.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
286.     event.preventDefault();
287. 
288.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
289.       return;
290.     }
291. 
292.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
293. 
294.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
295.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
296.       return;
297.     }
298. 
299.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
300.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
301. 
302.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
303.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
304.       return;
305.     }
306. 
307.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
308.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
309.       return;
310.     }
311. 
312.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
313.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
314.     if (submitButton) {
315.       submitButton.disabled = true;
316.     }
317. 
318.     const payload = {
319.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
320.       username: currentUsername,
321.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
322.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
323.       rating: ratingValue,
324.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
325.     };
326. 
327.     try {
328.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
329.         .from("movie_reviews")
330.         .insert(payload);
331. 
332.       if (error) {
333.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
334.         return;
335.       }
336. 
337.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
338.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
339.       reviewForm.reset();
340.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
341.     } finally {
342.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
343.       if (submitButton) {
344.         submitButton.disabled = false;
345.       }
346.     }
347.   });
348. }
349. 
350. loadMoviePage();
351.
```

</details>

1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. let isRedirecting = false;
9. 
10. function redirectTo(path) {
11.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14.   isRedirecting = true;
15.   window.location.replace(path);
16. }
17. 
18. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
19.   if (!authMessage) {
20.     return;
21.   }
22. 
23.   authMessage.textContent = message;
24.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
25.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
26. }
27. 
28. function showApp() {
29.   if (appShell) {
30.     appShell.hidden = false;
31.   }
32. }
33. 
34. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
35.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
36.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
37.     return metadata.username.trim();
38.   }
39.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
40.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
41.   }
42.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
43.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
44.   }
45.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
46.   if (email.includes("@")) {
47.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
48.   }
49.   return "";
50. }
51. 
52. async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
53.   if (!userId) {
54.     return "";
55.   }
56.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
57.     .from("profiles")
58.     .select("username")
59.     .eq("id", userId)
60.     .maybeSingle();
61.   if (error) {
62.     return "";
63.   }
64.   return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
65. }
66. 
67. async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
68.   const userId = session?.user?.id;
69.   if (!userId) {
70.     return;
71.   }
72. 
73.   const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
74.   if (!username) {
75.     return;
76.   }
77. 
78.   await window.supabaseClient
79.     .from("profiles")
80.     .upsert(
81.       {
82.         id: userId,
83.         username,
84.       },
85.       { onConflict: "id" }
86.     );
87. }
88. 
89. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
90.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
91.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
92.     return;
93.   }
94. 
95.   if (appShell) {
96.     appShell.hidden = false;
97.   }
98. 
99.   if (authMessage) {
100.     setMessage(message, true);
101.     return;
102.   }
103. 
104.   window.alert(message);
105. }
106. 
107. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
108.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
109.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
110. }
111. 
112. async function getSession() {
113.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
114.   if (error) {
115.     throw error;
116.   }
117.   return data.session;
118. }
119. 
120. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
121.   const session = await getSession();
122. 
123.   if ((currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") && !session) {
124.     redirectTo("auth.html");
125.     return null;
126.   }
127. 
128.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
129.     redirectTo("index.html");
130.     return session;
131.   }
132. 
133.   if (session?.user?.id) {
134.     await ensureProfileRow(session);
135.   }
136. 
137.   if (navUser && session?.user?.id) {
138.     const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
139.     navUser.textContent = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
140.   }
141. 
142.   showApp();
143.   return session;
144. }
145. 
146. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
147.   if (session?.user?.id) {
148.     ensureProfileRow(session);
149.   }
150. 
151.   if (navUser) {
152.     if (session?.user?.id) {
153.       getProfileUsername(session.user.id).then((username) => {
154.         navUser.textContent = username || session.user.email || "";
155.       });
156.     } else {
157.       navUser.textContent = "";
158.     }
159.   }
160. 
161.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie")) {
162.     redirectTo("auth.html");
163.   }
164. 
165.   if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
166.     redirectTo("index.html");
167.   }
168. });
169. 
170. enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
171.   showApp();
172.   if (currentPage === "index" || currentPage === "search" || currentPage === "movie") {
173.     redirectTo("auth.html");
174.     return;
175.   }
176. 
177.   setMessage(`Session check failed: ${error.message}`, true);
178. });
179. 
180. if (signupForm) {
181.   signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
182.     event.preventDefault();
183. 
184.     const email = signupForm.email.value.trim();
185.     const password = signupForm.password.value;
186. 
187.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
188.       email,
189.       password,
190.     });
191. 
192.     if (error) {
193.       setMessage(`Sign up failed: ${error.message}`, true);
194.       return;
195.     }
196. 
197.     if (data.user && !data.session) {
198.       setMessage("Sign up successful. Check your email to confirm your account.");
199.       return;
200.     }
201. 
202.     setMessage("Sign up successful. You are now logged in.");
203.     signupForm.reset();
204.   });
205. }
206. 
207. if (loginForm) {
208.   loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
209.     event.preventDefault();
210. 
211.     const email = loginForm.email.value.trim();
212.     const password = loginForm.password.value;
213. 
214.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
215.       email,
216.       password,
217.     });
218. 
219.     if (error) {
220.       setMessage(`Login failed: ${error.message}`, true);
221.       return;
222.     }
223. 
224.     setMessage("Login successful.");
225.     loginForm.reset();
226.     redirectTo("index.html");
227.   });
228. }
229. 
230. if (logoutButton) {
231.   logoutButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
232.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
233. 
234.     if (error) {
235.       if (authMessage) {
236.         setMessage(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`, true);
237.       } else {
238.         window.alert(`Logout failed: ${error.message}`);
239.       }
240.       return;
241.     }
242. 
243.     redirectTo("auth.html");
244.   });
245. }
246.
```

<details>
<summary>594 lines</summary>

```
1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
30.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   let debounceHandle;
35.   let requestCounter = 0;
36.   let activeIndex = -1;
37.   let currentResults = [];
38. 
39.   function getMovieYear(item) {
40.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
41.   }
42. 
43.   function clearSuggestions() {
44.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
45.   }
46. 
47.   function openSuggestions() {
48.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
49.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
50.   }
51. 
52.   function closeSuggestions() {
53.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
54.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
55.     activeIndex = -1;
56.   }
57. 
58.   function syncActiveItem() {
59.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
60.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
61.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
62.         item.classList.add("active");
63.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
64.       } else {
65.         item.classList.remove("active");
66.       }
67.     });
68.   }
69. 
70.   function createPosterElement(item) {
71.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
72. 
73.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
74.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
75.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
76.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
77.       return fallback;
78.     }
79. 
80.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
81.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
82.     poster.loading = "lazy";
83.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
84.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
85.     return poster;
86.   }
87. 
88.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
89.     currentResults = items;
90.     clearSuggestions();
91.     activeIndex = -1;
92. 
93.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
94.       const li = document.createElement("li");
95.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
96.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
97.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
98.       li.tabIndex = -1;
99. 
100.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
101. 
102.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
103.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
104. 
105.       const title = document.createElement("span");
106.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
107.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
108. 
109.       const year = document.createElement("span");
110.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
111.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
112. 
113.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
114.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
115.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
116. 
117.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
118.         event.preventDefault();
119.       });
120. 
121.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
122.         activeIndex = index;
123.         syncActiveItem();
124.       });
125. 
126.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
127.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
128.       });
129. 
130.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
131.     }
132. 
133.     openSuggestions();
134.   }
135. 
136.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
137.     currentResults = [];
138.     activeIndex = -1;
139.     clearSuggestions();
140. 
141.     const li = document.createElement("li");
142.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
143.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
144.     li.textContent = message;
145.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
146. 
147.     openSuggestions();
148.   }
149. 
150.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
151.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
152.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
153.       return;
154.     }
155. 
156.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
157.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
158. 
159.     try {
160.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
161.       const payload = await response.json();
162. 
163.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
164.         return;
165.       }
166. 
167.       if (!response.ok) {
168.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
169.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
170.         return;
171.       }
172. 
173.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
174. 
175.       if (results.length === 0) {
176.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
177.         return;
178.       }
179. 
180.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
181.     } catch (error) {
182.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
183.         return;
184.       }
185.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
186.     }
187.   }
188. 
189.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
190.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
191.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
192. 
193.     if (!query) {
194.       closeSuggestions();
195.       clearSuggestions();
196.       currentResults = [];
197.       return;
198.     }
199. 
200.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
201.       requestCounter += 1;
202.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
203.     }, 300);
204.   });
205. 
206.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
207.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
208. 
209.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
210.       event.preventDefault();
211.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
212.       syncActiveItem();
213.       openSuggestions();
214.       return;
215.     }
216. 
217.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
218.       event.preventDefault();
219.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
220.       syncActiveItem();
221.       openSuggestions();
222.       return;
223.     }
224. 
225.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
226.       closeSuggestions();
227.       return;
228.     }
229. 
230.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
231.       event.preventDefault();
232.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
233.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
234.         return;
235.       }
236.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
237.     }
238.   });
239. 
240.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
241.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
242.       openSuggestions();
243.     }
244.   });
245. 
246.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
247.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
248.   });
249. 
250.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
251.     event.preventDefault();
252.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
253.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
254.       return;
255.     }
256.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
257.   });
258. }
259. 
260. function setupUserTypeahead() {
261.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
262.     return;
263.   }
264. 
265.   let debounceHandle;
266.   let requestCounter = 0;
267.   let activeIndex = -1;
268.   let currentResults = [];
269. 
270.   function clearSuggestions() {
271.     userSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
272.   }
273. 
274.   function openSuggestions() {
275.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
276.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
277.   }
278. 
279.   function closeSuggestions() {
280.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
281.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
282.     activeIndex = -1;
283.   }
284. 
285.   function syncActiveItem() {
286.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
287.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
288.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
289.         item.classList.add("active");
290.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
291.       } else {
292.         item.classList.remove("active");
293.       }
294.     });
295.   }
296. 
297.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
298.     currentResults = [];
299.     activeIndex = -1;
300.     clearSuggestions();
301. 
302.     const li = document.createElement("li");
303.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
304.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
305.     li.textContent = message;
306.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
307. 
308.     openSuggestions();
309.   }
310. 
311.   function createUserAvatar(username) {
312.     const avatar = document.createElement("div");
313.     avatar.className = "suggestion-avatar";
314.     avatar.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
315.     return avatar;
316.   }
317. 
318.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
319.     currentResults = items;
320.     clearSuggestions();
321.     activeIndex = -1;
322. 
323.     for (const [index, username] of items.entries()) {
324.       const li = document.createElement("li");
325.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
326.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
327.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
328.       li.tabIndex = -1;
329. 
330.       li.appendChild(createUserAvatar(username));
331. 
332.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
333.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
334. 
335.       const name = document.createElement("span");
336.       name.className = "suggestion-title";
337.       name.textContent = username;
338. 
339.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
340.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
341.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
342. 
343.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
344.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
345.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
346. 
347.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
348.         event.preventDefault();
349.       });
350. 
351.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
352.         activeIndex = index;
353.         syncActiveItem();
354.       });
355. 
356.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
357.         userSearchInput.value = username;
358.         closeSuggestions();
359.       });
360. 
361.       userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
362.     }
363. 
364.     openSuggestions();
365.   }
366. 
367.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
368.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
369.     if (error) {
370.       return "";
371.     }
372. 
373.     const user = data?.user;
374.     if (!user) {
375.       return "";
376.     }
377. 
378.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
379.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
380.       : "";
381. 
382.     if (metadataUsername) {
383.       return metadataUsername;
384.     }
385. 
386.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
387.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
388.     }
389. 
390.     return "";
391.   }
392. 
393.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
394.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
395. 
396.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
397.       window.supabaseClient
398.         .from("profiles")
399.         .select("username")
400.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
401.         .not("username", "is", null)
402.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
403.         .limit(25),
404.       getCurrentUserUsername()
405.     ]);
406. 
407.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
408.       return;
409.     }
410. 
411.     if (error) {
412.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
413.       return;
414.     }
415. 
416.     const dbUsernames = (data || [])
417.       .map((row) => (typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : ""))
418.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0);
419. 
420.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
421.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
422.       ? [currentUsername]
423.       : [];
424. 
425.     const uniqueUsernames = [...new Set([...localMatches, ...dbUsernames])]
426.       .slice(0, 10);
427. 
428.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
429.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
430.       return;
431.     }
432. 
433.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
434.   }
435. 
436.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
437.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
438.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
439. 
440.     if (!query) {
441.       closeSuggestions();
442.       clearSuggestions();
443.       currentResults = [];
444.       return;
445.     }
446. 
447.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
448.       requestCounter += 1;
449.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
450.     }, 300);
451.   });
452. 
453.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
454.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
455. 
456.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
457.       event.preventDefault();
458.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
459.       syncActiveItem();
460.       openSuggestions();
461.       return;
462.     }
463. 
464.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
465.       event.preventDefault();
466.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
467.       syncActiveItem();
468.       openSuggestions();
469.       return;
470.     }
471. 
472.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
473.       closeSuggestions();
474.       return;
475.     }
476. 
477.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
478.       event.preventDefault();
479.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
480.         userSearchInput.value = currentResults[activeIndex];
481.         closeSuggestions();
482.       }
483.     }
484.   });
485. 
486.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
487.     if (userSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
488.       openSuggestions();
489.     }
490.   });
491. 
492.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
493.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
494.   });
495. 
496.   userSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
497.     event.preventDefault();
498.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
499.       userSearchInput.value = currentResults[activeIndex];
500.       closeSuggestions();
501.     }
502.   });
503. }
504. 
505. async function loadRecentReviews() {
506.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
507.     return;
508.   }
509. 
510.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
511.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
512.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
513.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
514.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
515. 
516.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
517.     .from("movie_reviews")
518.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
519.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
520.     .limit(20);
521. 
522.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
523. 
524.   if (error) {
525.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
526.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
527.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
528.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
529.     return;
530.   }
531. 
532.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
533.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
534.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
535.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
536.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
537.     return;
538.   }
539. 
540.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
541.     const card = document.createElement("article");
542.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
543.     card.tabIndex = 0;
544. 
545.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
546.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
547. 
548.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
549.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
550.     byline.textContent = `By ${review.username || "Unknown"}`;
551. 
552.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
553.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
554.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
555. 
556.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
557.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
558.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
559. 
560.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
561.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
562.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
563. 
564.     card.appendChild(title);
565.     card.appendChild(byline);
566.     card.appendChild(rating);
567.     card.appendChild(snippet);
568.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
569. 
570.     const openMovie = () => {
571.       if (!review.movie_id) {
572.         return;
573.       }
574.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
575.     };
576. 
577.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
578.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
579.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
580.         event.preventDefault();
581.         openMovie();
582.       }
583.     });
584. 
585.     return card;
586.   });
587. 
588.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
589. }
590. 
591. setupMovieTypeahead();
592. setupUserTypeahead();
593. loadRecentReviews();
594.
```

</details>
