currentSession = null;\nlet viewedProfile = null;\nlet isOwnerView = false;\n\nfunction setStatus(message, kind = \"info\") {\n  if (!userPageStatus) {\n    return;\n  }\n  userPageStatus.textContent = message;\n  userPageStatus.classList.remove(\"success\", \"error\", \"info\");\n  userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);\n}\n\nfunction makeElement(tag, className, text) {\n  const element = document.createElement(tag);\n  if (className) {\n    element.className = className;\n  }\n  if (typeof text === \"string\") {\n    element.textContent = text;\n  }\n  return element;\n}\n\nfunction getProfileParam() {\n  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n  const username = params.get(\"username\");\n  const userId = params.get(\"id\");\n\n  if (username && username.trim()) {\n    return { type: \"username\", value: username.trim() };\n  }\n\n  if (userId && userId.trim()) {\n    return { type: \"id\", value: userId.trim() };\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {\n  const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};\n  if (typeof metadata.username === \"string\" && metadata.username.trim()) {\n    return metadata.username.trim();\n  }\n  if (typeof metadata.display_name === \"string\" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {\n    return metadata.display_name.trim();\n  }\n  if (typeof metadata.full_name === \"string\" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {\n    return metadata.full_name.trim();\n  }\n  const email = session?.user?.email || \"\";\n  if (email.includes(\"@\")) {\n    return email.split(\"@\")[0].trim();\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\n\nfunction resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {\n  if (typeof profile.avatar_url === \"string\" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {\n    return profile.avatar_url.trim();\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\n\nfunction renderProfileHeader(profile) {\n  userProfileCard.replaceChildren();\n\n  const wrap = makeElement(\"div\", \"user-profile-header\");\n  const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);\n  let avatar;\n\n  if (avatarUrl) {\n    avatar = makeElement(\"img\", \"user-profile-avatar\");\n    avatar.src = avatarUrl;\n    avatar.alt = `${profile.username || \"User\"} avatar`;\n    avatar.loading = \"lazy\";\n  } else {\n    avatar = makeElement(\"div\", \"user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback\", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || \"?\").toUpperCase());\n  }\n\n  const body = makeElement(\"div\", \"user-profile-body\");\n  const heading = makeElement(\"h1\", \"\", profile.username || \"Unknown User\");\n  const bio = makeElement(\"p\", \"user-profile-bio\", profile.bio || \"No bio yet.\");\n\n  body.appendChild(heading);\n  body.appendChild(bio);\n\n  wrap.appendChild(avatar);\n  wrap.appendChild(body);\n\n  userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);\n}\n\nfunction buildProfileEditForm(profile) {\n  const form = makeElement(\"form\", \"profile-edit-form\");\n  form.id = \"profile-edit-form\";\n\n  const usernameLabel = makeElement(\"label\", \"\", \"Username\");\n  usernameLabel.htmlFor = \"profile-username\";\n  const usernameInput = makeElement(\"input\", \"\");\n  usernameInput.id = \"profile-username\";\n  usernameInput.name = \"username\";\n  usernameInput.required = true;\n  usernameInput.maxLength = 50;\n  usernameInput.value = profile.username || \"\";\n\n  const avatarLabel = makeElement(\"label\", \"\", \"Profile picture URL\");\n  avatarLabel.htmlFor = \"profile-avatar-url\";\n  const avatarInput = makeElement(\"input\", \"\");\n  avatarInput.id = \"profile-avatar-url\";\n  avatarInput.name = \"avatarUrl\";\n  avatarInput.type = \"url\";\n  avatarInput.placeholder = \"https://...\";\n  avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || \"\";\n\n  const bioLabel = makeElement(\"label\", \"\", \"Bio\");\n  bioLabel.htmlFor = \"profile-bio\";\n  const bioInput = makeElement(\"textarea\", \"\");\n  bioInput.id = \"profile-bio\";\n  bioInput.name = \"bio\";\n  bioInput.rows = 4;\n  bioInput.maxLength = 500;\n  bioInput.value = profile.bio || \"\";\n\n  const status = makeElement(\"p\", \"tmdb-status info\", \"\");\n  status.id = \"profile-edit-status\";\n  status.hidden = true;\n\n  const saveButton = makeElement(\"button\", \"auth-btn\", \"Save Profile\");\n  saveButton.type = \"submit\";\n\n  form.appendChild(usernameLabel);\n  form.appendChild(usernameInput);\n  form.appendChild(avatarLabel);\n  form.appendChild(avatarInput);\n  form.appendChild(bioLabel);\n  form.appendChild(bioInput);\n  form.appendChild(status);\n  form.appendChild(saveButton);\n\n  form.addEventListener(\"submit\", async (event) => {\n    event.preventDefault();\n\n    const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();\n    const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();\n    const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();\n\n    if (!nextUsername) {\n      status.hidden = false;\n      status.textContent = \"Username is required.\";\n      status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"info\");\n      status.classList.add(\"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    status.hidden = false;\n    status.textContent = \"Saving profile...\";\n    status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"error\");\n    status.classList.add(\"info\");\n\n    const { error } = await window.supabaseClient\n      .from(\"profiles\")\n      .update({\n        username: nextUsername,\n        avatar_url: nextAvatar || null,\n        bio: nextBio || null,\n      })\n      .eq(\"id\", profile.id);\n\n    if (error) {\n      status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;\n      status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"info\");\n      status.classList.add(\"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const oldUsername = profile.username;\n    profile.username = nextUsername;\n    profile.avatar_url = nextAvatar || null;\n    profile.bio = nextBio || null;\n\n    if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {\n      await window.supabaseClient\n        .from(\"movie_reviews\")\n        .update({ username: nextUsername })\n        .eq(\"user_id\", profile.id);\n    }\n\n    status.textContent = \"Profile updated.\";\n    status.classList.remove(\"error\", \"info\");\n    status.classList.add(\"success\");\n\n    renderProfileHeader(profile);\n    if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {\n      window.history.replaceState({}, \"\", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(nextUsername)}`);\n    }\n    await loadUserReviews(profile.id);\n  });\n\n  return form;\n}\n\nfunction buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {\n  const form = makeElement(\"form\", \"review-inline-edit-form\");\n\n  const ratingLabel = makeElement(\"label\", \"\", \"Rating (1-10)\");\n  const ratingInput = makeElement(\"input\", \"\");\n  ratingInput.type = \"number\";\n  ratingInput.min = \"1\";\n  ratingInput.max = \"10\";\n  ratingInput.step = \"1\";\n  ratingInput.required = true;\n  ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));\n\n  const textLabel = makeElement(\"label\", \"\", \"Review text\");\n  const textInput = makeElement(\"textarea\", \"\");\n  textInput.rows = 4;\n  textInput.maxLength = 3000;\n  textInput.required = true;\n  textInput.value = review.review_text || \"\";\n\n  const controls = makeElement(\"div\", \"review-inline-edit-controls\");\n  const saveButton = makeElement(\"button\", \"auth-btn\", \"Save Review\");\n  saveButton.type = \"submit\";\n  const cancelButton = makeElement(\"button\", \"btn btn-outline btn-sm\", \"Cancel\");\n  cancelButton.type = \"button\";\n\n  controls.appendChild(saveButton);\n  controls.appendChild(cancelButton);\n\n  const status = makeElement(\"p\", \"tmdb-status info\", \"\");\n  status.hidden = true;\n\n  cancelButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n    onSaved(false);\n  });\n\n  form.addEventListener(\"submit\", async (event) => {\n    event.preventDefault();\n\n    const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);\n    const nextText = textInput.value.trim();\n\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {\n      status.hidden = false;\n      status.textContent = \"Rating must be between 1 and 10.\";\n      status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"info\");\n      status.classList.add(\"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (nextText.length < 5) {\n      status.hidden = false;\n      status.textContent = \"Review text must be at least 5 characters.\";\n      status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"info\");\n      status.classList.add(\"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    status.hidden = false;\n    status.textContent = \"Saving review...\";\n    status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"error\");\n    status.classList.add(\"info\");\n\n    const { error } = await window.supabaseClient\n      .from(\"movie_reviews\")\n      .update({\n        rating: nextRating,\n        review_text: nextText,\n      })\n      .eq(\"id\", review.id)\n      .eq(\"user_id\", currentSession?.user?.id || \"\");\n\n    if (error) {\n      status.textContent = `Could not update review: ${error.message}`;\n      status.classList.remove(\"success\", \"info\");\n      status.classList.add(\"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    onSaved(true);\n  });\n\n  form.appendChild(ratingLabel);\n  form.appendChild(ratingInput);\n  form.appendChild(textLabel);\n  form.appendChild(textInput);\n  form.appendChild(status);\n  form.appendChild(controls);\n\n  return form;\n}\n\nfunction renderReviewCards(reviews) {\n  if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {\n    userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement(\"div\", \"reviews-empty-box\", \"No reviews yet.\"));\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const cards = reviews.map((review) => {\n    const card = makeElement(\"article\", \"user-review-card\");\n\n    const title = makeElement(\"h3\", \"user-review-movie-title\", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);\n    const titleLink = makeElement(\"a\", \"\", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);\n    titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || \"\"))}`;\n    title.replaceChildren(titleLink);\n\n    const rating = makeElement(\"p\", \"user-review-rating\", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);\n    const text = makeElement(\"p\", \"user-review-text\", review.review_text || \"\");\n    const date = makeElement(\"p\", \"user-review-date\", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : \"\");\n\n    card.appendChild(title);\n    card.appendChild(rating);\n    card.appendChild(text);\n    card.appendChild(date);\n\n    if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {\n      const editButton = makeElement(\"button\", \"btn btn-outline btn-sm\", \"Edit Review\");\n      editButton.type = \"button\";\n\n      editButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n        const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {\n          if (saved) {\n            await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);\n          } else {\n            await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);\n          }\n        });\n\n        card.appendChild(editForm);\n        editButton.disabled = true;\n      });\n\n      card.appendChild(editButton);\n    }\n\n    return card;\n  });\n\n  userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);\n}\n\nasync function loadUserReviews(profileId) {\n  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient\n    .from(\"movie_reviews\")\n    .select(\"id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at\")\n    .eq(\"user_id\", profileId)\n    .order(\"created_at\", { ascending: false });\n\n  if (error) {\n    setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, \"error\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  renderReviewCards(data || []);\n}\n\nasync function loadProfile() {\n  const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();\n  if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {\n    setStatus(\"You must be signed in.\", \"error\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  currentSession = sessionData.session;\n\n  const profileQuery = getProfileParam();\n  let profile;\n  let profileError;\n\n  if (!profileQuery) {\n    const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);\n    if (!fallbackUsername) {\n      setStatus(\"No user specified.\", \"error\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient\n      .from(\"profiles\")\n      .select(\"id, username, avatar_url, bio\")\n      .eq(\"username\", fallbackUsername)\n      .maybeSingle());\n  } else if (profileQuery.type === \"username\") {\n    ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient\n      .from(\"profiles\")\n      .select(\"id, username, avatar_url, bio\")\n      .eq(\"username\", profileQuery.value)\n      .maybeSingle());\n  } else {\n    ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient\n      .from(\"profiles\")\n      .select(\"id, username, avatar_url, bio\")\n      .eq(\"id\", profileQuery.value)\n      .maybeSingle());\n  }\n\n  if (profileError) {\n    setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, \"error\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!profile?.id) {\n    setStatus(\"User profile not found.\", \"error\");\n    userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement(\"div\", \"reviews-empty-box\", \"This user does not exist yet.\"));\n    return;\n  }\n\n  viewedProfile = profile;\n  isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;\n\n  renderProfileHeader(profile);\n\n  if (isOwnerView) {\n    userProfileCard.appendChild(buildProfileEditForm(profile));\n  }\n\n  await loadUserReviews(profile.id);\n  setStatus(\"User profile loaded.\", \"success\");\n}\n\nloadProfile();\n'@ | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. 
5. let currentSession = null;
6. let viewedProfile = null;
7. let isOwnerView = false;
8. 
9. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
10.   if (!userPageStatus) {
11.     return;
12.   }
13.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
14.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
15.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
16. }
17. 
18. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
19.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
20.   if (className) {
21.     element.className = className;
22.   }
23.   if (typeof text === "string") {
24.     element.textContent = text;
25.   }
26.   return element;
27. }
28. 
29. function getProfileParam() {
30.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
31.   const username = params.get("username");
32.   const userId = params.get("id");
33. 
34.   if (username && username.trim()) {
35.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
36.   }
37. 
38.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
39.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
40.   }
41. 
42.   return null;
43. }
44. 
45. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
46.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
47.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
48.     return metadata.username.trim();
49.   }
50.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
51.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
52.   }
53.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
54.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
55.   }
56.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
57.   if (email.includes("@")) {
58.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
59.   }
60.   return "";
61. }
62. 
63. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
64.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
65.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
66.   }
67.   return "";
68. }
69. 
70. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
71.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
72. 
73.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
74.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
75.   let avatar;
76. 
77.   if (avatarUrl) {
78.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
79.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
80.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
81.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
82.   } else {
83.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
84.   }
85. 
86.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
87.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
88.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
89. 
90.   body.appendChild(heading);
91.   body.appendChild(bio);
92. 
93.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
94.   wrap.appendChild(body);
95. 
96.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
97. }
98. 
99. function buildProfileEditForm(profile) {
100.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
101.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
102. 
103.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
104.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
105.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
106.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
107.   usernameInput.name = "username";
108.   usernameInput.required = true;
109.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
110.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
111. 
112.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
113.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
114.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
115.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
116.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
117.   avatarInput.type = "url";
118.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
119.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
120. 
121.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
122.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
123.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
124.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
125.   bioInput.name = "bio";
126.   bioInput.rows = 4;
127.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
128.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
129. 
130.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
131.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
132.   status.hidden = true;
133. 
134.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
135.   saveButton.type = "submit";
136. 
137.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
138.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
139.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
140.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
141.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
142.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
143.   form.appendChild(status);
144.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
145. 
146.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
147.     event.preventDefault();
148. 
149.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
150.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
151.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
152. 
153.     if (!nextUsername) {
154.       status.hidden = false;
155.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
156.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
157.       status.classList.add("error");
158.       return;
159.     }
160. 
161.     status.hidden = false;
162.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
163.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
164.     status.classList.add("info");
165. 
166.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
167.       .from("profiles")
168.       .update({
169.         username: nextUsername,
170.         avatar_url: nextAvatar || null,
171.         bio: nextBio || null,
172.       })
173.       .eq("id", profile.id);
174. 
175.     if (error) {
176.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
177.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
178.       status.classList.add("error");
179.       return;
180.     }
181. 
182.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
183.     profile.username = nextUsername;
184.     profile.avatar_url = nextAvatar || null;
185.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
186. 
187.     if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {
188.       await window.supabaseClient
189.         .from("movie_reviews")
190.         .update({ username: nextUsername })
191.         .eq("user_id", profile.id);
192.     }
193. 
194.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
195.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
196.     status.classList.add("success");
197. 
198.     renderProfileHeader(profile);
199.     if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {
200.       window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(nextUsername)}`);
201.     }
202.     await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
203.   });
204. 
205.   return form;
206. }
207. 
208. function buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {
209.   const form = makeElement("form", "review-inline-edit-form");
210. 
211.   const ratingLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Rating (1-10)");
212.   const ratingInput = makeElement("input", "");
213.   ratingInput.type = "number";
214.   ratingInput.min = "1";
215.   ratingInput.max = "10";
216.   ratingInput.step = "1";
217.   ratingInput.required = true;
218.   ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));
219. 
220.   const textLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Review text");
221.   const textInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
222.   textInput.rows = 4;
223.   textInput.maxLength = 3000;
224.   textInput.required = true;
225.   textInput.value = review.review_text || "";
226. 
227.   const controls = makeElement("div", "review-inline-edit-controls");
228.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Review");
229.   saveButton.type = "submit";
230.   const cancelButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Cancel");
231.   cancelButton.type = "button";
232. 
233.   controls.appendChild(saveButton);
234.   controls.appendChild(cancelButton);
235. 
236.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
237.   status.hidden = true;
238. 
239.   cancelButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
240.     onSaved(false);
241.   });
242. 
243.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
244.     event.preventDefault();
245. 
246.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);
247.     const nextText = textInput.value.trim();
248. 
249.     if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {
250.       status.hidden = false;
251.       status.textContent = "Rating must be between 1 and 10.";
252.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
253.       status.classList.add("error");
254.       return;
255.     }
256. 
257.     if (nextText.length < 5) {
258.       status.hidden = false;
259.       status.textContent = "Review text must be at least 5 characters.";
260.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
261.       status.classList.add("error");
262.       return;
263.     }
264. 
265.     status.hidden = false;
266.     status.textContent = "Saving review...";
267.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
268.     status.classList.add("info");
269. 
270.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
271.       .from("movie_reviews")
272.       .update({
273.         rating: nextRating,
274.         review_text: nextText,
275.       })
276.       .eq("id", review.id)
277.       .eq("user_id", currentSession?.user?.id || "");
278. 
279.     if (error) {
280.       status.textContent = `Could not update review: ${error.message}`;
281.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
282.       status.classList.add("error");
283.       return;
284.     }
285. 
286.     onSaved(true);
287.   });
288. 
289.   form.appendChild(ratingLabel);
290.   form.appendChild(ratingInput);
291.   form.appendChild(textLabel);
292.   form.appendChild(textInput);
293.   form.appendChild(status);
294.   form.appendChild(controls);
295. 
296.   return form;
297. }
298. 
299. function renderReviewCards(reviews) {
300.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
301.     userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet."));
302.     return;
303.   }
304. 
305.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
306.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
307. 
308.     const title = makeElement("h3", "user-review-movie-title", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
309.     const titleLink = makeElement("a", "", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
310.     titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || ""))}`;
311.     title.replaceChildren(titleLink);
312. 
313.     const rating = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
314.     const text = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
315.     const date = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : "");
316. 
317.     card.appendChild(title);
318.     card.appendChild(rating);
319.     card.appendChild(text);
320.     card.appendChild(date);
321. 
322.     if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
323.       const editButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Review");
324.       editButton.type = "button";
325. 
326.       editButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
327.         const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {
328.           if (saved) {
329.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
330.           } else {
331.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
332.           }
333.         });
334. 
335.         card.appendChild(editForm);
336.         editButton.disabled = true;
337.       });
338. 
339.       card.appendChild(editButton);
340.     }
341. 
342.     return card;
343.   });
344. 
345.   userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);
346. }
347. 
348. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
349.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
350.     .from("movie_reviews")
351.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
352.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
353.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
354. 
355.   if (error) {
356.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
357.     return;
358.   }
359. 
360.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
361. }
362. 
363. async function loadProfile() {
364.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
365.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
366.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
367.     return;
368.   }
369. 
370.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
371. 
372.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
373.   let profile;
374.   let profileError;
375. 
376.   if (!profileQuery) {
377.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
378.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
379.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
380.       return;
381.     }
382. 
383.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
384.       .from("profiles")
385.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
386.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
387.       .maybeSingle());
388.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
389.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
390.       .from("profiles")
391.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
392.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
393.       .maybeSingle());
394.   } else {
395.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
396.       .from("profiles")
397.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
398.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
399.       .maybeSingle());
400.   }
401. 
402.   if (profileError) {
403.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
404.     return;
405.   }
406. 
407.   if (!profile?.id) {
408.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
409.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
410.     return;
411.   }
412. 
413.   viewedProfile = profile;
414.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
415. 
416.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
417. 
418.   if (isOwnerView) {
419.     userProfileCard.appendChild(buildProfileEditForm(profile));
420.   }
421. 
422.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
423.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
424. }
425. 
426. loadProfile();
427.
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>424 lines</summary>

```
1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
3. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
4. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("search-suggestion-list");
5. const resultsGrid = document.getElementById("search-results");
6. 
7. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342";
8. const SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9. 
10. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
11.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14. 
15.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
16.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
17.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
18. }
19. 
20. function getYear(dateString) {
21.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
22. }
23. 
24. function getDirector(credits) {
25.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
26.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
27.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getCast(credits) {
31.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
32.   if (cast.length === 0) {
33.     return "Unknown";
34.   }
35.   return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
36. }
37. 
38. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
39.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
40.   if (className) {
41.     el.className = className;
42.   }
43.   if (typeof text === "string") {
44.     el.textContent = text;
45.   }
46.   return el;
47. }
48. 
49. function createPoster(movie) {
50.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
51. 
52.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
53.     return makeElement("div", "result-poster result-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
54.   }
55. 
56.   const img = makeElement("img", "result-poster");
57.   img.loading = "lazy";
58.   img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
59.   img.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
60.   return img;
61. }
62. 
63. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
64.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
65.   if (!label) {
66.     p.textContent = value;
67.     return p;
68.   }
69. 
70.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
71.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
72.   p.appendChild(strong);
73.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
74.   return p;
75. }
76. 
77. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
78.   if (!movieId) {
79.     return;
80.   }
81.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
82. }
83. 
84. function createResultCard(movie) {
85.   const article = makeElement("article", "result-card");
86.   article.tabIndex = 0;
87.   article.setAttribute("role", "button");
88. 
89.   article.addEventListener("click", () => {
90.     goToMoviePage(movie.id);
91.   });
92. 
93.   article.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
94.     if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
95.       event.preventDefault();
96.       goToMoviePage(movie.id);
97.     }
98.   });
99. 
100.   article.appendChild(createPoster(movie));
101. 
102.   const content = makeElement("div", "result-content");
103. 
104.   const titleRow = makeElement("h2");
105.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(movie.title || "Untitled"));
106.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
107.   const year = makeElement("span", "", `(${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
108.   titleRow.appendChild(year);
109. 
110.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
111.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
112.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
113.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
114.     : "Genres unavailable";
115. 
116.   content.appendChild(titleRow);
117.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("", `⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}`));
118.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", movie.director || "Unknown"));
119.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", movie.cast || "Unknown"));
120.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
121.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
122. 
123.   article.appendChild(content);
124.   return article;
125. }
126. 
127. function setResultsMessage(className, text) {
128.   resultsGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("p", className, text));
129. }
130. 
131. async function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {
132.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
133.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
134.   const payload = await response.json();
135. 
136.   if (!response.ok) {
137.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
138.   }
139. 
140.   return {
141.     ...payload,
142.     director: getDirector(payload.credits),
143.     cast: getCast(payload.credits),
144.   };
145. }
146. 
147. async function performSearch(rawQuery) {
148.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
149.   const query = rawQuery.trim();
150. 
151.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
152.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
153.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
154.     return;
155.   }
156. 
157.   if (!query) {
158.     setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title to search.", "info");
159.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
160.     return;
161.   }
162. 
163.   setTmdbStatus("Searching TMDB...", "info");
164.   setResultsMessage("results-loading", "Loading results...");
165. 
166.   try {
167.     const searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
168.     const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);
169.     const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();
170. 
171.     if (!searchResponse.ok) {
172.       throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || "TMDB search failed.");
173.     }
174. 
175.     const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];
176. 
177.     if (baseResults.length === 0) {
178.       setTmdbStatus("No movies matched your search.", "info");
179.       setResultsMessage("results-empty", "No results found.");
180.       return;
181.     }
182. 
183.     const detailedResults = await Promise.all(
184.       baseResults.map((movie) =>
185.         fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: "Unknown", cast: "Unknown" }))
186.       )
187.     );
188. 
189.     const cards = detailedResults.map(createResultCard);
190.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
191.     setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for "${query}".`, "success");
192.   } catch (error) {
193.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
194.     setResultsMessage("results-empty", "Unable to load results right now.");
195.   }
196. }
197. 
198. if (searchForm && searchInput && suggestionList) {
199.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
200.   let debounceHandle;
201.   let requestCounter = 0;
202.   let activeIndex = -1;
203.   let currentSuggestions = [];
204. 
205.   function clearSuggestions() {
206.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
207.   }
208. 
209.   function openSuggestions() {
210.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
211.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
212.   }
213. 
214.   function closeSuggestions() {
215.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
216.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
217.     activeIndex = -1;
218.   }
219. 
220.   function syncActiveSuggestion() {
221.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
222.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
223.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
224.         item.classList.add("active");
225.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
226.       } else {
227.         item.classList.remove("active");
228.       }
229.     });
230.   }
231. 
232.   function renderSuggestionInfo(message, state = "info") {
233.     currentSuggestions = [];
234.     activeIndex = -1;
235.     clearSuggestions();
236. 
237.     const li = makeElement("li", `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`, message);
238.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
239.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
240.     openSuggestions();
241.   }
242. 
243.   function createSuggestionPoster(movie) {
244.     const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
245. 
246.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
247.       return makeElement("div", "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback", "No image");
248.     }
249. 
250.     const img = makeElement("img", "suggestion-poster");
251.     img.loading = "lazy";
252.     img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
253.     img.src = `${SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
254.     return img;
255.   }
256. 
257.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
258.     currentSuggestions = items;
259.     activeIndex = -1;
260.     clearSuggestions();
261. 
262.     items.forEach((movie, index) => {
263.       const li = makeElement("li", "suggestion-item");
264.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
265.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
266.       li.tabIndex = -1;
267. 
268.       li.appendChild(createSuggestionPoster(movie));
269. 
270.       const textWrap = makeElement("div", "suggestion-text");
271.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-title", movie.title || "Untitled"));
272.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-year", getYear(movie.release_date)));
273.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
274. 
275.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
276.         event.preventDefault();
277.       });
278. 
279.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
280.         activeIndex = index;
281.         syncActiveSuggestion();
282.       });
283. 
284.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
285.         goToMoviePage(movie.id);
286.       });
287. 
288.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
289.     });
290. 
291.     openSuggestions();
292.   }
293. 
294.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
295.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
296.       renderSuggestionInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
297.       return;
298.     }
299. 
300.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
301.     renderSuggestionInfo("Searching...", "loading");
302. 
303.     try {
304.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
305.       const payload = await response.json();
306. 
307.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
308.         return;
309.       }
310. 
311.       if (!response.ok) {
312.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
313.         renderSuggestionInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
314.         return;
315.       }
316. 
317.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
318. 
319.       if (results.length === 0) {
320.         renderSuggestionInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
321.         return;
322.       }
323. 
324.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
325.     } catch (error) {
326.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
327.         return;
328.       }
329.       renderSuggestionInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
330.     }
331.   }
332. 
333.   function submitQuery(query) {
334.     const trimmed = query.trim();
335.     if (!trimmed) {
336.       return;
337.     }
338. 
339.     searchInput.value = trimmed;
340.     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
341.     params.set("query", trimmed);
342.     const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
343.     window.history.replaceState({}, "", nextUrl);
344.     closeSuggestions();
345.     performSearch(trimmed);
346.   }
347. 
348.   searchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
349.     const query = searchInput.value.trim();
350.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
351. 
352.     if (!query) {
353.       closeSuggestions();
354.       clearSuggestions();
355.       currentSuggestions = [];
356.       return;
357.     }
358. 
359.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
360.       requestCounter += 1;
361.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
362.     }, 300);
363.   });
364. 
365.   searchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
366.     const hasSelectable = currentSuggestions.length > 0;
367. 
368.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
369.       event.preventDefault();
370.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentSuggestions.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
371.       syncActiveSuggestion();
372.       openSuggestions();
373.       return;
374.     }
375. 
376.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
377.       event.preventDefault();
378.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentSuggestions.length - 1;
379.       syncActiveSuggestion();
380.       openSuggestions();
381.       return;
382.     }
383. 
384.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
385.       closeSuggestions();
386.       return;
387.     }
388. 
389.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
390.       event.preventDefault();
391.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
392.         goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
393.         return;
394.       }
395.       submitQuery(searchInput.value);
396.     }
397.   });
398. 
399.   searchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
400.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
401.       openSuggestions();
402.     }
403.   });
404. 
405.   searchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
406.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
407.   });
408. 
409.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
410.     event.preventDefault();
411.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
412.       goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
413.       return;
414.     }
415.     submitQuery(searchInput.value);
416.   });
417. 
418.   const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("query") || "";
419.   if (urlQuery) {
420.     searchInput.value = urlQuery;
421.     performSearch(urlQuery);
422.   }
423. }
424.
```

</details>

diff --git a/js/auth.js b/js/auth.js
index 5d74b6d..7a2d1ba 100644
--- a/js/auth.js
+++ b/js/auth.js
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");       
 const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
 const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
 const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
+const protectedPages = new Set(["index", "search", "movie", "user"]);
 let isRedirecting = false;

 function redirectTo(path) {
@@ -31,8 +32,100 @@ function showApp() {
   }
 }

+function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
+  const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
+  if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {        
+    return metadata.username.trim();
+  }
+  if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
+    return metadata.display_name.trim();
+  }
+  if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {      
+    return metadata.full_name.trim();
+  }
+  const email = session?.user?.email || "";
+  if (email.includes("@")) {
+    return email.split("@")[0].trim();
+  }
+  return "";
+}
+
+async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
+  if (!userId) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .select("username")
+    .eq("id", userId)
+    .maybeSingle();
+  if (error) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
+}
+
+async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
+  const userId = session?.user?.id;
+  if (!userId) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .upsert(
+      {
+        id: userId,
+        username,
+      },
+      { onConflict: "id", ignoreDuplicates: true }
+    );
+}
+
+function goToOwnUserPage(session) {
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+  window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`;
+}
+
+async function setNavUser(session) {
+  if (!navUser) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  navUser.replaceChildren();
+
+  if (!session?.user?.id) {
+    navUser.textContent = "";
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
+  const displayValue = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
+
+  const profileLink = document.createElement("a");
+  profileLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(displayValue)}`;
+  profileLink.textContent = displayValue;
+  profileLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
+    if (!displayValue.includes("@")) {
+      return;
+    }
+    event.preventDefault();
+    goToOwnUserPage(session);
+  });
+
+  navUser.appendChild(profileLink);
+}
+
 function showFatalAuthError(message) {
-  if (currentPage === "index") {
+  if (protectedPages.has(currentPage)) {
     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
     return;
   }
@@ -65,7 +158,7 @@ async function getSession() {
 async function enforceRouteGuard() {
   const session = await getSession();

-  if (currentPage === "index" && !session) {
+  if (protectedPages.has(currentPage) && !session) {
     redirectTo("auth.html");
     return null;
   }
@@ -75,20 +168,24 @@ async function enforceRouteGuard() {
     return session;
   }

-  if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
-    navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
+  if (session?.user?.id) {
+    await ensureProfileRow(session);
   }

+  await setNavUser(session);
+
   showApp();
   return session;
 }

 window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
-  if (navUser) {
-    navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
+  if (session?.user?.id) {
+    ensureProfileRow(session);
   }

-  if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && currentPage === "index") {
+  setNavUser(session);
+
+  if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && protectedPages.has(currentPage)) {
     redirectTo("auth.html");
   }

@@ -99,7 +196,7 @@ window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {

 enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
   showApp();
-  if (currentPage === "index") {
+  if (protectedPages.has(currentPage)) {
     redirectTo("auth.html");
     return;
   }
diff --git a/style.css b/style.css
index 4d41d62..0b8d441 100644
--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -376,3 +376,761 @@
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;

+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;

+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);

+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);

+
+.profile-edit-form input,
+.profile-edit-form textarea,
+.review-inline-edit-form input,
+.review-inline-edit-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form input:focus,
+.profile-edit-form textarea:focus,
+.review-inline-edit-form input:focus,
+.review-inline-edit-form textarea:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title {
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title a {
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title a:hover {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.review-inline-edit-form {
+  margin-top: 0.8rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+}
+
+.review-inline-edit-controls {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .user-profile-header {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+    justify-items: center;
+    text-align: center;
+  }
+}
+

<sub>⏱️ 1301m 34s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Implemented ✅ full user pages via `user.html` + `js/user.js`.

### Added
- Public profile view by `?username=...` (or `?id=...`)
- Shows username, avatar, bio, reviews, and a **Top Five Movies** placeholder section
- Owner-only editing (if viewing own profile):
  - username
  - profile pic URL
  - bio
  - inline review editing (rating + text)

### Wired links
- Nav username now links to own user page
- User search results now open user pages
- Review bylines (index rail + movie page) link to user pages

Also updated styles and auth guard for `data-page="user"`. JS syntax checks passed.

If `movie_reviews` RLS lacks `UPDATE`, add an owner-update policy in Supabase.

1. const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
2. const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
3. const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
4. const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
5. const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
6. const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
7. const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
8. const protectedPages = new Set(["index", "search", "movie", "user"]);
9. let isRedirecting = false;
10. 
11. function redirectTo(path) {
12.   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
13.     return;
14.   }
15.   isRedirecting = true;
16.   window.location.replace(path);
17. }
18. 
19. function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
20.   if (!authMessage) {
21.     return;
22.   }
23. 
24.   authMessage.textContent = message;
25.   authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
26.   authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
27. }
28. 
29. function showApp() {
30.   if (appShell) {
31.     appShell.hidden = false;
32.   }
33. }
34. 
35. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
36.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
37.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
38.     return metadata.username.trim();
39.   }
40.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
41.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
42.   }
43.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
44.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
45.   }
46.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
47.   if (email.includes("@")) {
48.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
49.   }
50.   return "";
51. }
52. 
53. async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
54.   if (!userId) {
55.     return "";
56.   }
57.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
58.     .from("profiles")
59.     .select("username")
60.     .eq("id", userId)
61.     .maybeSingle();
62.   if (error) {
63.     return "";
64.   }
65.   return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
66. }
67. 
68. async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
69.   const userId = session?.user?.id;
70.   if (!userId) {
71.     return;
72.   }
73. 
74.   const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
75.   if (!username) {
76.     return;
77.   }
78. 
79.   await window.supabaseClient
80.     .from("profiles")
81.     .upsert(
82.       {
83.         id: userId,
84.         username,
85.       },
86.       { onConflict: "id", ignoreDuplicates: true }
87.     );
88. }
89. 
90. function goToOwnUserPage(session) {
91.   const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
92.   if (!username) {
93.     return;
94.   }
95.   window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`;
96. }
97. 
98. async function setNavUser(session) {
99.   if (!navUser) {
100.     return;
101.   }
102. 
103.   navUser.replaceChildren();
104. 
105.   if (!session?.user?.id) {
106.     navUser.textContent = "";
107.     return;
108.   }
109. 
110.   const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
111.   const displayValue = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
112. 
113.   const profileLink = document.createElement("a");
114.   profileLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(displayValue)}`;
115.   profileLink.textContent = displayValue;
116.   profileLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
117.     if (!displayValue.includes("@")) {
118.       return;
119.     }
120.     event.preventDefault();
121.     goToOwnUserPage(session);
122.   });
123. 
124.   navUser.appendChild(profileLink);
125. }
126. 
127. function showFatalAuthError(message) {
128.   if (protectedPages.has(currentPage)) {
129.     redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
130.     return;
131.   }
132. 
133.   if (appShell) {
134.     appShell.hidden = false;
135.   }
136. 
137.   if (authMessage) {
138.     setMessage(message, true);
139.     return;
140.   }
141. 
142.   window.alert(message);
143. }
144. 
145. if (!window.supabaseClient) {
146.   showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
147.   throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
148. }
149. 
150. async function getSession() {
151.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
152.   if (error) {
153.     throw error;
154.   }
155.   return data.session;
156. }
157. 
158. async function enforceRouteGuard() {
159.   const session = await getSession();
160. 
161.   if (protectedPages.has(currentPage) && !session) {
162.     redirectTo("auth.html");
163.     return null;
164.   }
165. 
166.   if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
167.     redirectTo("index.html");
168.     return session;
169.   }
170. 
171.   if (session?.user?.id) {
172.     await ensureProfileRow(session);
173.   }
174. 
175.   await setNavUser(session);
176. 
177.   showApp();
178.   return session;
179. }
180. 
181. window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
182.   if (session?.user?.id) {
183.     ensureProfileRow(session);
184.   }
185. 
186.   setNavUser(session);
187. 
188.   if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && protectedPages.has(currentPage)) {
189.     redirectTo("auth.html");
190.   }

<sub>⏱️ 1302m 59s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Fixed — that was caused by overlapping async nav updates.

I added a render guard in `js/auth.js` (`navRenderVersion`) so only the latest `setNavUser()` call is allowed to write to the nav. That prevents multiple username links from being appended during rapid auth/session updates.

Also re-clears the nav right before append for safety.

Please hard-refresh once (`Ctrl+F5`) and check again. If you still see duplicates, I’ll patch any duplicate `#nav-user` markup next.

70. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
71.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
72. 
73.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
74.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
75.   let avatar;
76. 
77.   if (avatarUrl) {
78.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
79.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
80.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
81.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
82.   } else {
83.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
84.   }
85. 
86.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
87.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
88.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
89. 
90.   body.appendChild(heading);
91.   body.appendChild(bio);
92. 
93.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
94.   wrap.appendChild(body);
95. 
96.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
97. }
98. 
99. function buildProfileEditForm(profile) {
100.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
101.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
102. 
103.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
104.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
105.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
106.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
107.   usernameInput.name = "username";
108.   usernameInput.required = true;
109.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
110.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
111. 
112.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
113.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
114.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
115.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
116.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
117.   avatarInput.type = "url";
118.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
119.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
120. 
121.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
122.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
123.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
124.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
125.   bioInput.name = "bio";
126.   bioInput.rows = 4;
127.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
128.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
129. 
130.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
131.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
132.   status.hidden = true;
133. 
134.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
135.   saveButton.type = "submit";
136. 
137.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
138.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
139.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
140.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
141.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
142.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
143.   form.appendChild(status);
144.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
145. 
146.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
147.     event.preventDefault();
148. 
149.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
150.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
151.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
152. 
153.     if (!nextUsername) {
154.       status.hidden = false;
155.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
156.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
157.       status.classList.add("error");
158.       return;
159.     }
160. 
161.     status.hidden = false;
162.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
163.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
164.     status.classList.add("info");
165. 
166.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
167.       .from("profiles")
168.       .update({
169.         username: nextUsername,
170.         avatar_url: nextAvatar || null,
171.         bio: nextBio || null,
172.       })
173.       .eq("id", profile.id);
174. 
175.     if (error) {
176.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
177.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
178.       status.classList.add("error");
179.       return;
180.     }
181. 
182.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
183.     profile.username = nextUsername;
184.     profile.avatar_url = nextAvatar || null;
185.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
186. 
187.     if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {
188.       await window.supabaseClient
189.         .from("movie_reviews")
190.         .update({ username: nextUsername })
191.         .eq("user_id", profile.id);

 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */        
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);       
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);      
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);  
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.movie-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 280px;
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.movie-poster-fallback {
+  min-height: 420px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.write-review-btn {

+}
+
+.movie-reviews-placeholder {

+}
+
+.reviews-empty-box {

+@media (max-width: 860px) {
+  .movie-detail-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .movie-poster,
+  .movie-poster-fallback {
+    max-width: 220px;

+  }
+}
+
+.reviews-list {

+.user-review-card {

+.user-review-byline {

+.user-review-rating {

+
+.user-review-text {

+}
+
+.user-review-date {
+  margin-top: 0.5rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 400;
+}
+
+.review-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.review-modal-content {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-close {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0.7rem;
+  right: 0.7rem;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 7px;
+  padding: 0.2rem 0.45rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.review-modal-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 94px 1fr;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  align-items: center;
+  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-poster {
+  width: 94px;
+  height: 140px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.review-modal-subtitle {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.review-form {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.review-form label {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-form input,
+.review-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.review-form textarea {
+  resize: vertical;
+}
+
+.review-form input:focus,
+.review-form textarea:focus {

+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.hero-search {

+  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
+  width: min(760px, 100%);
+}
+
+.hero-user-search {
+  margin-top: -0.45rem;
+  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
+}
+
+.hero-search label {

+}
+
+.recent-reviews {

+  background: var(--bg-secondary);
+}
+
+.recent-reviews-rail {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-auto-flow: column;
+  grid-auto-columns: minmax(250px, 310px);
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  overflow-x: auto;
+  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+  min-height: 180px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+}
+
+.recent-review-card:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card h3 {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline,
+.recent-review-time {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.82rem;
+}
+
+.recent-review-rating {
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  margin: 0.45rem 0;
+}
+
+.recent-review-snippet {
+  color: #d4dbea;
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  display: -webkit-box;
+  -webkit-line-clamp: 4;
+  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card-info {
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card-info:hover {
+  border-color: var(--border);
+  transform: none;
+}
+
+
+.suggestion-avatar {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 46px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  background: #23252f;
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline a,
+.user-review-byline a {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline a:hover,
+.user-review-byline a:hover {
+  text-decoration: underline;
+}
+
+.user-page {
+  max-width: 1100px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.user-profile-card,
+.user-top-five,
+.user-reviews-section {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.user-profile-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  align-items: center;
+}
+
+.user-profile-avatar {
+  width: 120px;
+  height: 120px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.user-profile-avatar-fallback {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  font-size: 2rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  background: #23252f;
+}
+
+.user-profile-body h1 {
+  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
+}
+
+.user-profile-bio {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.profile-owner-actions {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form label {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form input,
+.profile-edit-form textarea,
+.review-inline-edit-form input,
+.review-inline-edit-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form input:focus,
+.profile-edit-form textarea:focus,
+.review-inline-edit-form input:focus,
+.review-inline-edit-form textarea:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title {
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title a {
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title a:hover {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.review-inline-edit-form {
+  margin-top: 0.8rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+}
+
+.review-inline-edit-controls {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .user-profile-header {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+    justify-items: center;
+    text-align: center;
+  }
+}
+
<exited with exit code 0>
```
