### 💬 Copilot

Done — profile editing is now hidden by default.

On your own user page, you’ll now see an **“Edit Profile”** button. Clicking it toggles the editor form open/closed (`Hide Edit Profile` when open). After save, it refreshes the header/reviews and stays clean.

This only appears for the signed-in user viewing their own profile; other users still see read-only profile info.

If you want, I can do the same pattern for review editing too (collapsed by default with one “Manage Reviews” toggle).

--- a/js/auth.js
+++ b/js/auth.js
@@ -5,7 +5,9 @@ const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");       
 const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
 const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
 const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
+const protectedPages = new Set(["index", "search", "movie", "user"]);
 let isRedirecting = false;
+let navRenderVersion = 0;

 function redirectTo(path) {
   if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
@@ -31,8 +33,105 @@ function showApp() {
   }
 }

+function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
+  const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
+  if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {        
+    return metadata.username.trim();
+  }
+  if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
+    return metadata.display_name.trim();
+  }
+  if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {      
+    return metadata.full_name.trim();
+  }
+  const email = session?.user?.email || "";
+  if (email.includes("@")) {
+    return email.split("@")[0].trim();
+  }
+  return "";
+}
+
+async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
+  if (!userId) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .select("username")
+    .eq("id", userId)
+    .maybeSingle();
+  if (error) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
+}
+
+async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
+  const userId = session?.user?.id;
+  if (!userId) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .upsert(
+      {
+        id: userId,
+        username,
+      },
+      { onConflict: "id", ignoreDuplicates: true }
+    );
+}
+
+function goToOwnUserPage(session) {
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+  window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`;
+}
+
+async function setNavUser(session) {
+  if (!navUser) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const renderVersion = ++navRenderVersion;
+  navUser.replaceChildren();
+
+  if (!session?.user?.id) {
+    navUser.textContent = "";
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
+  if (renderVersion !== navRenderVersion) {
+    return;
+  }
+  const displayValue = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
+
+  const profileLink = document.createElement("a");
+  profileLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(displayValue)}`;
+  profileLink.textContent = displayValue;
+  profileLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
+    if (!displayValue.includes("@")) {
+      return;
+    }
+    event.preventDefault();
+    goToOwnUserPage(session);
+  });
+
+  navUser.replaceChildren();
+  navUser.appendChild(profileLink);
+}
+
 function showFatalAuthError(message) {

```
1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. 
5. let currentSession = null;
6. let viewedProfile = null;
7. let isOwnerView = false;
8. 
9. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
10.   if (!userPageStatus) {
11.     return;
12.   }
13.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
14.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
15.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
16. }
17. 
18. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
19.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
20.   if (className) {
21.     element.className = className;
22.   }
23.   if (typeof text === "string") {
24.     element.textContent = text;
25.   }
26.   return element;
27. }
28. 
29. function getProfileParam() {
30.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
31.   const username = params.get("username");
32.   const userId = params.get("id");
33. 
34.   if (username && username.trim()) {
35.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
36.   }
37. 
38.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
39.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
40.   }
41. 
42.   return null;
43. }
44. 
45. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
46.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
47.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
48.     return metadata.username.trim();
49.   }
50.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
51.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
52.   }
53.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
54.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
55.   }
56.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
57.   if (email.includes("@")) {
58.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
59.   }
60.   return "";
61. }
62. 
63. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
64.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
65.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
66.   }
67.   return "";
68. }
69. 
70. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
71.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
72. 
73.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
74.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
75.   let avatar;
76. 
77.   if (avatarUrl) {
78.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
79.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
80.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
81.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
82.   } else {
83.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
84.   }
85. 
86.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
87.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
88.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
89. 
90.   body.appendChild(heading);
91.   body.appendChild(bio);
92. 
93.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
94.   wrap.appendChild(body);
95. 
96.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
97. }
98. 
99. function buildProfileEditForm(profile, onSaved) {
100.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
101.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
102. 
103.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
104.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
105.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
106.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
107.   usernameInput.name = "username";
108.   usernameInput.required = true;
109.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
110.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
111. 
112.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
113.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
114.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
115.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
116.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
117.   avatarInput.type = "url";
118.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
119.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
120. 
121.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
122.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
123.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
124.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
125.   bioInput.name = "bio";
126.   bioInput.rows = 4;
127.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
128.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
129. 
130.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
131.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
132.   status.hidden = true;
133. 
134.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
135.   saveButton.type = "submit";
136. 
137.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
138.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
139.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
140.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
141.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
142.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
143.   form.appendChild(status);
144.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
145. 
146.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
147.     event.preventDefault();
148. 
149.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
150.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
151.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
152. 
153.     if (!nextUsername) {
154.       status.hidden = false;
155.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
156.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
157.       status.classList.add("error");
158.       return;
159.     }
160. 
161.     status.hidden = false;
162.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
163.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
164.     status.classList.add("info");
165. 
166.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
167.       .from("profiles")
168.       .update({
169.         username: nextUsername,
170.         avatar_url: nextAvatar || null,
171.         bio: nextBio || null,
172.       })
173.       .eq("id", profile.id);
174. 
175.     if (error) {
176.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
177.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
178.       status.classList.add("error");
179.       return;
180.     }
181. 
182.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
183.     profile.username = nextUsername;
184.     profile.avatar_url = nextAvatar || null;
185.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
186. 
187.     if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {
188.       await window.supabaseClient
189.         .from("movie_reviews")
190.         .update({ username: nextUsername })
191.         .eq("user_id", profile.id);
192.     }
193. 
194.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
195.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
196.     status.classList.add("success");
197. 
198.     if (typeof onSaved === "function") {
199.       await onSaved(oldUsername !== nextUsername);
200.     }
201.   });
202. 
203.   return form;
204. }
205. 
206. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
207.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
208.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
209.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
210.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
211.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
212. 
213.   let editForm = null;
214. 
215.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
216.     if (editForm) {
217.       editForm.remove();
218.       editForm = null;
219.       editToggleButton.textContent = "Edit Profile";
220.       return;
221.     }
222. 
223.     editForm = buildProfileEditForm(profile, async (usernameChanged) => {
224.       renderProfileHeader(profile);
225.       renderOwnerControls(profile);
226.       if (usernameChanged) {
227.         window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(profile.username)}`);
228.       }
229.       await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
230.     });
231. 
232.     userProfileCard.appendChild(editForm);
233.     editToggleButton.textContent = "Hide Edit Profile";
234.   });
235. }
236. 
237. function buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {
238.   const form = makeElement("form", "review-inline-edit-form");
239. 
240.   const ratingLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Rating (1-10)");
241.   const ratingInput = makeElement("input", "");
242.   ratingInput.type = "number";
243.   ratingInput.min = "1";
244.   ratingInput.max = "10";
245.   ratingInput.step = "1";
246.   ratingInput.required = true;
247.   ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));
248. 
249.   const textLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Review text");
250.   const textInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
251.   textInput.rows = 4;
252.   textInput.maxLength = 3000;
253.   textInput.required = true;
254.   textInput.value = review.review_text || "";
255. 
256.   const controls = makeElement("div", "review-inline-edit-controls");
257.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Review");
258.   saveButton.type = "submit";
259.   const cancelButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Cancel");
260.   cancelButton.type = "button";
261. 
262.   controls.appendChild(saveButton);
263.   controls.appendChild(cancelButton);
264. 
265.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
266.   status.hidden = true;
267. 
268.   cancelButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
269.     onSaved(false);
270.   });
271. 
272.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
273.     event.preventDefault();
274. 
275.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);
276.     const nextText = textInput.value.trim();
277. 
278.     if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {
279.       status.hidden = false;
280.       status.textContent = "Rating must be between 1 and 10.";
281.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
282.       status.classList.add("error");
283.       return;
284.     }
285. 
286.     if (nextText.length < 5) {
287.       status.hidden = false;
288.       status.textContent = "Review text must be at least 5 characters.";
289.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
290.       status.classList.add("error");
291.       return;
292.     }
293. 
294.     status.hidden = false;
295.     status.textContent = "Saving review...";
296.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
297.     status.classList.add("info");
298. 
299.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
300.       .from("movie_reviews")
301.       .update({
302.         rating: nextRating,
303.         review_text: nextText,
304.       })
305.       .eq("id", review.id)
306.       .eq("user_id", currentSession?.user?.id || "");
307. 
308.     if (error) {
309.       status.textContent = `Could not update review: ${error.message}`;
310.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
311.       status.classList.add("error");
312.       return;
313.     }
314. 
315.     onSaved(true);
316.   });
317. 
318.   form.appendChild(ratingLabel);
319.   form.appendChild(ratingInput);
320.   form.appendChild(textLabel);
321.   form.appendChild(textInput);
322.   form.appendChild(status);
323.   form.appendChild(controls);
324. 
325.   return form;
326. }
327. 
328. function renderReviewCards(reviews) {
329.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
330.     userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet."));
331.     return;
332.   }
333. 
334.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
335.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
336. 
337.     const title = makeElement("h3", "user-review-movie-title", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
338.     const titleLink = makeElement("a", "", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
339.     titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || ""))}`;
340.     title.replaceChildren(titleLink);
341. 
342.     const rating = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
343.     const text = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
344.     const date = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : "");
345. 
346.     card.appendChild(title);
347.     card.appendChild(rating);
348.     card.appendChild(text);
349.     card.appendChild(date);
350. 
351.     if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
352.       const editButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Review");
353.       editButton.type = "button";
354. 
355.       editButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
356.         const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {
357.           if (saved) {
358.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
359.           } else {
360.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
361.           }
362.         });
363. 
364.         card.appendChild(editForm);
365.         editButton.disabled = true;
366.       });
367. 
368.       card.appendChild(editButton);
369.     }
370. 
371.     return card;
372.   });
373. 
374.   userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);
375. }
376. 
377. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
378.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
379.     .from("movie_reviews")
380.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
381.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
382.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
383. 
384.   if (error) {
385.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
386.     return;
387.   }
388. 
389.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
390. }
391. 
392. async function loadProfile() {
393.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
394.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
395.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
396.     return;
397.   }
398. 
399.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
400. 
401.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
402.   let profile;
403.   let profileError;
404. 
405.   if (!profileQuery) {
406.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
407.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
408.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
409.       return;
410.     }
411. 
412.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
413.       .from("profiles")
414.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
415.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
416.       .maybeSingle());
417.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
418.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
419.       .from("profiles")
420.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
421.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
422.       .maybeSingle());
423.   } else {
424.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
425.       .from("profiles")
426.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
427.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
428.       .maybeSingle());
429.   }
430. 
431.   if (profileError) {
432.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
433.     return;
434.   }
435. 
436.   if (!profile?.id) {
437.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
438.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
439.     return;
440.   }
441. 
442.   viewedProfile = profile;
443.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
444. 
445.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
446. 
447.   if (isOwnerView) {
448.     renderOwnerControls(profile);
449.   }
450. 
451.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
452.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
453. }
454. 
455. loadProfile();
456.
```

</details>

1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function goToUserPage(username) {
30.   const trimmed = typeof username === "string" ? username.trim() : "";
31.   if (!trimmed) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34.   window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
35. }
36. 
37. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
38.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
39.     return;
40.   }
41. 
42.   let debounceHandle;
43.   let requestCounter = 0;
44.   let activeIndex = -1;
45.   let currentResults = [];
46. 
47.   function getMovieYear(item) {
48.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
49.   }
50. 
51.   function clearSuggestions() {
52.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
53.   }
54. 
55.   function openSuggestions() {
56.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
57.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
58.   }
59. 
60.   function closeSuggestions() {
61.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
62.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
63.     activeIndex = -1;
64.   }
65. 
66.   function syncActiveItem() {
67.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
68.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
69.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
70.         item.classList.add("active");
71.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
72.       } else {
73.         item.classList.remove("active");
74.       }
75.     });
76.   }
77. 
78.   function createPosterElement(item) {
79.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
80. 
81.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
82.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
83.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
84.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
85.       return fallback;
86.     }
87. 
88.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
89.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
90.     poster.loading = "lazy";
91.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
92.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
93.     return poster;
94.   }
95. 
96.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
97.     currentResults = items;
98.     clearSuggestions();
99.     activeIndex = -1;
100. 
101.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
102.       const li = document.createElement("li");
103.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
104.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
105.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
106.       li.tabIndex = -1;
107. 
108.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
109. 
110.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
111.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
112. 
113.       const title = document.createElement("span");
114.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
115.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
116. 
117.       const year = document.createElement("span");
118.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
119.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
120. 
121.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
122.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
123.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
124. 
125.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
126.         event.preventDefault();
127.       });
128. 
129.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
130.         activeIndex = index;
131.         syncActiveItem();
132.       });
133. 
134.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
135.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
136.       });
137. 
138.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
139.     }
140. 
141.     openSuggestions();
142.   }
143. 
144.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
145.     currentResults = [];
146.     activeIndex = -1;
147.     clearSuggestions();
148. 
149.     const li = document.createElement("li");
150.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
151.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
152.     li.textContent = message;
153.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
154. 
155.     openSuggestions();
156.   }
157. 
158.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
159.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
160.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
161.       return;
162.     }
163. 
164.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
165.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
166. 
167.     try {
168.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
169.       const payload = await response.json();
170. 
171.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
172.         return;
173.       }
174. 
175.       if (!response.ok) {
176.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
177.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
178.         return;
179.       }
180. 
181.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
182. 
183.       if (results.length === 0) {
184.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
185.         return;
186.       }
187. 
188.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
189.     } catch (error) {
190.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
191.         return;
192.       }
193.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
194.     }
195.   }
196. 
197.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
198.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
199.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
200. 
201.     if (!query) {
202.       closeSuggestions();
203.       clearSuggestions();
204.       currentResults = [];
205.       return;
206.     }
207. 
208.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
209.       requestCounter += 1;
210.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
211.     }, 300);
212.   });
213. 
214.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
215.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
216. 
217.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
218.       event.preventDefault();
219.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
220.       syncActiveItem();
221.       openSuggestions();
222.       return;
223.     }
224. 
225.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
226.       event.preventDefault();
227.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
228.       syncActiveItem();
229.       openSuggestions();
230.       return;
231.     }
232. 
233.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
234.       closeSuggestions();
235.       return;
236.     }
237. 
238.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
239.       event.preventDefault();
240.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
241.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
242.         return;
243.       }
244.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
245.     }
246.   });
247. 
248.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
249.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
250.       openSuggestions();
251.     }
252.   });
253. 
254.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
255.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
256.   });
257. 
258.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
259.     event.preventDefault();
260.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
261.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
262.       return;
263.     }
264.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
265.   });
266. }
267. 
268. function setupUserTypeahead() {
269.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
270.     return;
271.   }
272. 
273.   let debounceHandle;
274.   let requestCounter = 0;
275.   let activeIndex = -1;
276.   let currentResults = [];
277. 
278.   function clearSuggestions() {
279.     userSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
280.   }
281. 
282.   function openSuggestions() {
283.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
284.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
285.   }
286. 
287.   function closeSuggestions() {
288.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
289.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
290.     activeIndex = -1;
291.   }
292. 
293.   function syncActiveItem() {
294.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
295.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
296.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
297.         item.classList.add("active");
298.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
299.       } else {
300.         item.classList.remove("active");
301.       }
302.     });
303.   }
304. 
305.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
306.     currentResults = [];
307.     activeIndex = -1;
308.     clearSuggestions();
309. 
310.     const li = document.createElement("li");
311.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
312.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
313.     li.textContent = message;
314.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
315. 
316.     openSuggestions();
317.   }
318. 
319.   function createUserAvatar(username) {
320.     const avatar = document.createElement("div");
321.     avatar.className = "suggestion-avatar";
322.     avatar.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
323.     return avatar;
324.   }
325. 
326.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
327.     currentResults = items;
328.     clearSuggestions();
329.     activeIndex = -1;
330. 
331.     for (const [index, username] of items.entries()) {
332.       const li = document.createElement("li");
333.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
334.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
335.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
336.       li.tabIndex = -1;
337. 
338.       li.appendChild(createUserAvatar(username));
339. 
340.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
341.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
342. 
343.       const name = document.createElement("span");
344.       name.className = "suggestion-title";
345.       name.textContent = username;
346. 
347.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
348.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
349.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
350. 
351.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
352.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
353.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
354. 
355.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
356.         event.preventDefault();
357.       });
358. 
359.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
360.         activeIndex = index;
361.         syncActiveItem();
362.       });
363. 
364.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
365.         goToUserPage(username);
366.       });
367. 
368.       userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
369.     }
370. 
371.     openSuggestions();
372.   }
373. 
374.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
375.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
376.     if (error) {
377.       return "";
378.     }
379. 
380.     const user = data?.user;
381.     if (!user) {
382.       return "";
383.     }
384. 
385.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
386.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
387.       : "";
388. 
389.     if (metadataUsername) {
390.       return metadataUsername;
391.     }
392. 
393.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
394.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
395.     }
396. 
397.     return "";
398.   }
399. 
400.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
401.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
402. 
403.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
404.       window.supabaseClient
405.         .from("profiles")
406.         .select("username")
407.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
408.         .not("username", "is", null)
409.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
410.         .limit(25),
411.       getCurrentUserUsername()
412.     ]);
413. 
414.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
415.       return;
416.     }
417. 
418.     if (error) {
419.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
420.       return;
421.     }
422. 
423.     const dbUsernames = (data || [])
424.       .map((row) => (typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : ""))
425.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0);
426. 
427.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
428.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
429.       ? [currentUsername]
430.       : [];
431. 
432.     const uniqueUsernames = [...new Set([...localMatches, ...dbUsernames])]
433.       .slice(0, 10);
434. 
435.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
436.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
437.       return;
438.     }
439. 
440.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
441.   }
442. 
443.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
444.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
445.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
446. 
447.     if (!query) {
448.       closeSuggestions();
449.       clearSuggestions();
450.       currentResults = [];
451.       return;
452.     }
453. 
454.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
455.       requestCounter += 1;
456.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
457.     }, 300);
458.   });
459. 
460.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
461.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
462. 
463.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
464.       event.preventDefault();
465.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
466.       syncActiveItem();
467.       openSuggestions();
468.       return;
469.     }
470. 
471.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
472.       event.preventDefault();
473.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
474.       syncActiveItem();
475.       openSuggestions();
476.       return;
477.     }
478. 
479.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
480.       closeSuggestions();
481.       return;
482.     }
483. 
484.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
485.       event.preventDefault();
486.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
487.         goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex]);
488.       }
489.     }
490.   });
491. 
492.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
493.     if (userSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
494.       openSuggestions();
495.     }
496.   });
497. 
498.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
499.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
500.   });
501. 
502.   userSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
503.     event.preventDefault();
504.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
505.       goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex]);
506.       return;
507.     }
508.     goToUserPage(userSearchInput.value);
509.   });
510. }
511. 
512. async function loadRecentReviews() {
513.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
514.     return;
515.   }
516. 
517.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
518.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
519.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
520.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
521.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
522. 
523.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
524.     .from("movie_reviews")
525.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
526.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
527.     .limit(20);
528. 
529.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
530. 
531.   if (error) {
532.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
533.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
534.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
535.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
536.     return;
537.   }
538. 
539.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
540.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
541.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
542.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
543.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
544.     return;
545.   }
546. 
547.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
548.     const card = document.createElement("article");
549.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
550.     card.tabIndex = 0;
551. 
552.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
553.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
554. 
555.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
556.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
557.     const bylineLink = document.createElement("a");
558.     bylineLink.href = "#";
559.     bylineLink.textContent = review.username || "Unknown";
560.     bylineLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
561.       event.preventDefault();
562.       event.stopPropagation();
563.       goToUserPage(review.username || "");
564.     });
565.     byline.append("By ", bylineLink);
566. 
567.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
568.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
569.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
570. 
571.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
572.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
573.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
574. 
575.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
576.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
577.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
578. 
579.     card.appendChild(title);
580.     card.appendChild(byline);
581.     card.appendChild(rating);
582.     card.appendChild(snippet);
583.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
584. 
585.     const openMovie = () => {
586.       if (!review.movie_id) {
587.         return;
588.       }
589.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
590.     };
591. 
592.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
593.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
594.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
595.         event.preventDefault();
596.         openMovie();
597.       }
598.     });
599. 
600.     return card;
601.   });
602. 
603.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
604. }
605. 
606. setupMovieTypeahead();
607. setupUserTypeahead();
608. loadRecentReviews();
609.
```

1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;

20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
107. }

109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
118.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
119.       ? storedUsername
120.       : "Unknown User";
121.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
122.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
123.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
124.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
125.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
126.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
127.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
128.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
129.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
130. 
131.     card.appendChild(byline);
132.     card.appendChild(heading);
133.     card.appendChild(body);
134.     card.appendChild(stamp);
135.     return card;
136.   });
137. 
138.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
139. }

141. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
142.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
143. 
144.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
145.     .from("movie_reviews")
146.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
147.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
148.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
149. 
150.   if (error) {
151.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
152.     return;
153.   }
154. 
155.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
156. }
157. 
158. function openReviewModal() {
159.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
160.     return;
161.   }
162. 
163.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
164.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
165.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
166.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
167.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
168. 
169.   clearReviewFormStatus();
170.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
171. }
172.

175.     return;
176.   }
177.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
178.   clearReviewFormStatus();
179. }

181. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
182.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
183.   currentMovie = movie;
184. 
185.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
186.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
187.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
188.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
189. 
190.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
191.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
192.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
193.     poster.loading = "lazy";
194.   }
195. 
196.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
197.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
198.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
199.   heading.appendChild(year);
200. 
201.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
202.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
203.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
204.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
205.     : "Genres unavailable";
206. 
207.   content.appendChild(heading);
208.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
209.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
210.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
211.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
212.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
213.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
214.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
215. 
216.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
217.   reviewButton.type = "button";
218.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
219.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
220. 
221.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
222.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
223. }
224. 
225. async function loadMoviePage() {
226.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
227.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
228. 
229.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
230.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
231.     return;
232.   }
233. 
234.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
235.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
236.     return;
237.   }
238. 
239.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
240.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
241.     return;
242.   }
243. 
244.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
245.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
246.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
247.     return;
248.   }
249. 
250.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
251.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
252.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
253. 
254.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
255. 
256.   try {
257.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
258.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
259.     const payload = await response.json();
260. 
261.     if (!response.ok) {
262.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
263.     }
264. 
265.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
266.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
267.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
268.   } catch (error) {
269.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
270.   }
271. }
272. 
273. if (reviewModalClose) {
274.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
275. }
276. 
277. if (reviewModal) {
278.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
279.     const target = event.target;
280.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
281.       closeReviewModal();
282.     }
283.   });
284. }
285. 
286. if (reviewForm) {
287.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
288.     event.preventDefault();
289. 
290.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
291.       return;
292.     }
293. 
294.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
295. 
296.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
297.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
298.       return;
299.     }
300. 
301.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
302.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
303. 
304.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
305.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
306.       return;
307.     }
308. 
309.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
310.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
311.       return;
312.     }
313. 
314.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
315.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
316.     if (submitButton) {
317.       submitButton.disabled = true;
318.     }
319. 
320.     const payload = {
321.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
322.       username: currentUsername,
323.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
324.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
325.       rating: ratingValue,
326.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
327.     };
328. 
329.     try {
330.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
331.         .from("movie_reviews")
332.         .insert(payload);
333. 
334.       if (error) {
335.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
336.         return;
337.       }
338. 
339.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
340.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
341.       reviewForm.reset();
342.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
343.     } finally {
344.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
345.       if (submitButton) {
346.         submitButton.disabled = false;
347.       }
348.     }
349.   });
350. }
351. 
352. loadMoviePage();
353.
```

const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");    
const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");      
const logoutButton = document.getElementById("logout-button");
const authMessage = document.getElementById("auth-message");
const navUser = document.getElementById("nav-user");
const currentPage = document.body.dataset.page;
const appShell = document.getElementById("app-shell");
let isRedirecting = false;

function redirectTo(path) {
  if (isRedirecting || window.location.pathname.endsWith(path)) {
    return;
  }
  isRedirecting = true;
  window.location.replace(path);
}

function setMessage(message, isError = false) {
  if (!authMessage) {
    return;
  }

  authMessage.textContent = message;
  authMessage.classList.remove("success", "error");
  authMessage.classList.add(isError ? "error" : "success");
}

function showApp() {
  if (appShell) {
    appShell.hidden = false;
  }
}

function showFatalAuthError(message) {
  if (currentPage === "index") {
    redirectTo("auth.html?error=auth_unavailable");
    return;
  }

  if (appShell) {
    appShell.hidden = false;
  }

  if (authMessage) {
    setMessage(message, true);
    return;
  }

  window.alert(message);
}

if (!window.supabaseClient) {
  showFatalAuthError("Authentication SDK failed to initialize. Refresh and try again.");
  throw new Error("Supabase client is unavailable.");
}

async function getSession() {
  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
  if (error) {
    throw error;
  }
  return data.session;
}

async function enforceRouteGuard() {
  const session = await getSession();

  if (currentPage === "index" && !session) {
    redirectTo("auth.html");
    return null;
  }

  if (currentPage === "auth" && session) {
    redirectTo("index.html");
    return session;
  }

  if (navUser && session?.user?.email) {
    navUser.textContent = session.user.email;
  }

  showApp();
  return session;
}

window.supabaseClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
  if (navUser) {
    navUser.textContent = session?.user?.email ?? "";
  }

  if (event === "SIGNED_OUT" && currentPage === "index") {
    redirectTo("auth.html");
  }

  if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && currentPage === "auth") {
    redirectTo("index.html");
  }
});

enforceRouteGuard().catch((error) => {
<exited with exit code 0>

60. create table if not exists public.profiles (

66.   created_at timestamptz not null default now(),

68. );
69. 
70. create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()
71. returns trigger
72. language plpgsql
73. security definer
74. set search_path = public
75. as $$
76. declare
77.   base_username text;
78. begin
79.   base_username := coalesce(
80.     nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),
81.     split_part(new.email, '@', 1),
82.     'user'
83.   );
84. 
85.   insert into public.profiles (id, username)
86.   values (new.id, base_username)
87.   on conflict (id) do nothing;
88. 
89.   return new;
90. end;
91. $$;
92. 
93. drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;
94. create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile
95. after insert on auth.users
96. for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();
97. 
98. alter table public.profiles enable row level security;
99. 
100. drop policy if exists "profiles public read" on public.profiles;
101. create policy "profiles public read"
102. on public.profiles
103. for select
104. to authenticated
105. using (true);
106. 
107. drop policy if exists "profiles owner insert" on public.profiles;
108. create policy "profiles owner insert"
109. on public.profiles
110. for insert
111. to authenticated
112. with check (auth.uid() = id);
113. 
114. drop policy if exists "profiles owner update" on public.profiles;
115. create policy "profiles owner update"
116. on public.profiles
117. for update
118. to authenticated
119. using (auth.uid() = id)
120. with check (auth.uid() = id);
```

Perfect! Now I have a complete picture. Let me provide a comprehensive summary based on all the code analysis:

## Movie Reviews Table Schema Definition

Based on my search of the entire codebase, I found **no explicit `CREATE TABLE` statement** for the `movie_reviews` table in the documentation or SQL files. However, the table structure is **fully defined implicitly through the application code**.

### **movie_reviews Table Schema**

**Inferred from Supabase client queries across the application:**

| Column | Type | Constraints | Purpose |
|--------|------|-----------|---------|
| `id` | UUID/Text | Primary Key | Unique review identifier |
| `user_id` | UUID | Foreign Key (references auth.users) | Links review to user account |
| `username` | Text | Not Null | Denormalized username for display |
| `movie_id` | Integer | Not Null | TMDB movie identifier |
| `movie_title` | Text | Not Null | Denormalized movie title for display |
| `rating` | Numeric | 1-10 range | Star rating value |
| `review_text` | Text | Min 5 chars | User's written review |
| `created_at` | Timestamptz | Default now() | Review creation timestamp |

### **Key Evidence:**

**1. Column Discovery from SELECT queries** (js/movie.js:146, js/user.js:380, js/index-search.js:525):
```javascript
.select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
.select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
```

**2. INSERT payload** (js/movie.js:320-327):
```javascript
const payload = {
  user_id: currentSession.user.id,
  username: currentUsername,
  movie_id: currentMovie.id,
  movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
  rating: ratingValue,
  review_text: reviewTextValue,
};
```

**3. UPDATE operations** (js/user.js:189-190, 301-303):
- Update `username` field when user changes profile
- Update `rating` and `review_text` for review edits

**4. Filtering/Constraints**:
- `movie_id` is queried with `.eq("movie_id", movieId)`
- `user_id` is queried with `.eq("user_id", profileId)`
- Rating validated as 1-10 (js/movie.js:304)
- Review text requires minimum 5 characters (js/movie.js:309)

### **Status in README:**

The README.md shows Phase 2 features are **"In Progress"** with write/edit/delete capabilities partially checkmarked, indicating the table may need to be manually created in Supabase. The README only includes the SQL for the `profiles` table setup, not `movie_reviews`. This schema definition **should be created as a setup step** in the Supabase SQL Editor before the application can save reviews.
````

</details>


### 💬 Copilot

Now let me analyze the code for bugs, security issues, race conditions, and data integrity problems:

## Issue: Race condition in nav user rendering
**File:** js/auth.js:71-97
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** The `setNavUser` function increments `navRenderVersion` and then performs an async database query, but only checks if the version has changed after the query completes. If multiple rapid auth state changes occur (e.g., rapid page navigation or auth refreshes), the version counter can increment multiple times, but all pending queries will still render since they only check the version once. This can lead to incorrect nav display or flashing between different usernames.

**Evidence:** 
- Line 71: `const renderVersion = ++navRenderVersion;` increments before async call
- Line 79: `await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);` async DB call
- Line 80-82: Version check happens once after query
- Lines 184, 192: `setNavUser` is called from both `enforceRouteGuard` and `onAuthStateChange` without coordination

**Suggested fix:** Add an additional check before rendering:
```javascript
const profileUsername = await getProfileUsername(session.user.id);
if (renderVersion !== navRenderVersion) {
  return;
}
// Add another check right before DOM mutation
if (renderVersion !== navRenderVersion) {
  return;
}
const displayValue = profileUsername || session.user.email || "";
```

---

## Issue: Username denormalization without transaction safety
**File:** js/user.js:187-192
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** When a user changes their username, the code updates the profile table and then separately updates all movie_reviews to propagate the username change. These are two separate database operations without transaction boundaries. If the second update fails, reviews will show the old username while the profile shows the new username, causing data inconsistency. Users could have reviews attributed to usernames they no longer own.

**Evidence:**
```javascript
const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("profiles")
  .update({ username: nextUsername, ... })
  .eq("id", profile.id);

if (error) { return; }

// Separate query - can fail independently
await window.supabaseClient
  .from("movie_reviews")
  .update({ username: nextUsername })
  .eq("user_id", profile.id);
```

**Suggested fix:** Use Supabase RPC to execute both updates in a database transaction, or handle errors from the second update and rollback/notify the user:
```javascript
const { error: reviewUpdateError } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("movie_reviews")
  .update({ username: nextUsername })
  .eq("user_id", profile.id);

if (reviewUpdateError) {
  status.textContent = `Profile updated but reviews not synced: ${reviewUpdateError.message}`;
  status.classList.add("error");
}
```

---

## Issue: Concurrent profile upsert race condition
**File:** js/auth.js:37-56
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** The `ensureProfileRow` function uses `upsert` with `ignoreDuplicates: true`, but doesn't handle the race condition where multiple simultaneous calls could try to insert with different usernames. If two tabs/requests derive different usernames from session metadata (e.g., due to timing of metadata updates), the first one wins arbitrarily, and subsequent calls are silently ignored even if they have a "better" username.

**Evidence:**
```javascript
await window.supabaseClient
  .from("profiles")
  .upsert({ id: userId, username }, 
    { onConflict: "id", ignoreDuplicates: true });
```
Line 184: Called from `enforceRouteGuard`
Line 188: Called from `onAuthStateChange`
Both can fire concurrently during page load or auth state transitions.

**Suggested fix:** Either remove `ignoreDuplicates` and handle conflicts explicitly, or query first to check if profile exists before upserting:
```javascript
const { data: existing } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("profiles")
  .select("id")
  .eq("id", userId)
  .maybeSingle();

if (!existing) {
  await window.supabaseClient
    .from("profiles")
    .insert({ id: userId, username });
}
```

---

## Issue: Missing error handling for concurrent review edits
**File:** js/user.js:299-313
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** When editing a review, the update query includes `.eq("user_id", currentSession?.user?.id || "")` as an additional security check, but if `currentSession` becomes null between form render and submit (e.g., session expires), the query will use an empty string and fail silently or update wrong data. The error handling only shows the Supabase error message but doesn't explain this edge case.

**Evidence:**
```javascript
const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("movie_reviews")
  .update({ rating: nextRating, review_text: nextText })
  .eq("id", review.id)
  .eq("user_id", currentSession?.user?.id || "");
```

**Suggested fix:** Validate session exists before the update:
```javascript
if (!currentSession?.user?.id) {
  status.textContent = "Your session has expired. Please refresh the page.";
  status.classList.add("error");
  return;
}

const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("movie_reviews")
  .update({ rating: nextRating, review_text: nextText })
  .eq("id", review.id)
  .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
```

---

## Issue: Email-based navigation bypass vulnerability
**File:** js/auth.js:86-94
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** The nav user link has special handling where clicking on an email address (containing "@") triggers `goToOwnUserPage(session)` which derives a username from session metadata. However, if a user sets their username to contain "@" (e.g., "user@domain"), clicking on it will incorrectly trigger the email logic instead of navigating to their actual username-based profile page. This creates inconsistent navigation behavior and potential access to wrong profiles.

**Evidence:**
```javascript
profileLink.addEventListener("click", (event) =\> {
  if (!displayValue.includes("@")) {
    return;
  }
  event.preventDefault();
  goToOwnUserPage(session);
});
```
The logic assumes `displayValue` containing "@" means it's an email fallback, but `displayValue` could be a username from the database that happens to contain "@".

**Suggested fix:** Track whether we're displaying an email fallback vs a real username:
```javascript
const isEmailFallback = !profileUsername && displayValue.includes("@");
profileLink.addEventListener("click", (event) =\> {
  if (!isEmailFallback) {
    return;
  }
  event.preventDefault();
  goToOwnUserPage(session);
});
```

---

## Issue: Unvalidated avatar URL allows XSS via javascript: protocol
**File:** js/user.js:114-119
**Severity:** Critical
**Problem:** The profile edit form accepts any URL for the avatar without validating the protocol. While the input type is "url", HTML5 URL validation allows `javascript:` URLs. If a malicious user sets their avatar_url to `javascript:alert(document.cookie)` and this gets rendered in an `\<img\>` tag, it could execute in certain browsers or when the URL is used in other contexts. More critically, if the avatar URL is later used in an `\<a\>` tag or other context, it becomes a stored XSS vulnerability.

**Evidence:**
```javascript
const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
avatarInput.type = "url";  // Only basic URL format validation
avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
```

Line 78-79 in renderProfileHeader shows it's used in `\<img\>` tag:
```javascript
avatar.src = avatarUrl;
```

**Suggested fix:** Validate the URL protocol before saving:
```javascript
form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) =\> {
  event.preventDefault();
  const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
  
  if (nextAvatar) {
    try {
      const url = new URL(nextAvatar);
      if (!['http:', 'https:'].includes(url.protocol)) {
        status.textContent = "Avatar URL must use http:// or https://";
        status.classList.add("error");
        return;
      }
    } catch {
      status.textContent = "Invalid avatar URL format";
      status.classList.add("error");
      return;
    }
  }
  // ... rest of submit logic
});
```

+function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
+  const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
+  if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
+    return metadata.username.trim();

+  if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
+    return metadata.display_name.trim();

+  if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
+    return metadata.full_name.trim();
+  }

+  if (email.includes("@")) {
+    return email.split("@")[0].trim();
+  }
+  return "";

+async function getProfileUsername(userId) {
+  if (!userId) {
+    return "";

+  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .select("username")
+    .eq("id", userId)
+    .maybeSingle();
+  if (error) {
+    return "";
+  }
+  return typeof data?.username === "string" ? data.username.trim() : "";
+}
+
+async function ensureProfileRow(session) {
+  const userId = session?.user?.id;
+  if (!userId) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const { data: existingProfile, error: existingProfileError } = await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .select("id")
+    .eq("id", userId)
+    .maybeSingle();
+
+  if (existingProfileError) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (existingProfile?.id) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  await window.supabaseClient
+    .from("profiles")
+    .insert({
+      id: userId,
+      username,
+    });
+}
+
+function goToOwnUserPage(session) {
+  const username = deriveUsernameFromSession(session);
+  if (!username) {
+    return;
+  }
+  window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`;
+}
+

+  if (!navUser) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const renderVersion = ++navRenderVersion;

+

+    return;

mail;
+
+  const profileLink = document.createElement("a");
+  profileLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(displayValue)}`;
+  profileLink.textContent = displayValue;
+  profileLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
+    if (!isEmailFallback) {
+      return;
+    }
+    event.preventDefault();
+    goToOwnUserPage(session);
+  });
+
+  if (renderVersion !== navRenderVersion) {
+    return;
+  }
+  navUser.replaceChildren();
+  navUser.appendChild(profileLink);
+}

<sub>⏱️ 1315m 14s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Patched ✅ all requested code-review issues:

- Fixed nav async rendering race with version guards.
- Fixed nav email-vs-username link logic (only treats true email fallback as email).
- Added avatar URL sanitization (`http/https` only) before profile save.
- Added explicit session-expired guard before review update.
- Improved username sync error handling: if profile updates but review-username sync fails, it now surfaces an error and stops success flow.
- Reduced profile creation race risk by checking for existing profile before insert.

If you want, next I can also add a small SQL RPC transaction for “profile + review username sync” to make that update fully atomic.

---

<sub>⏱️ 1317m 18s</sub>

### 👤 User

what would that be for

---

<sub>⏱️ 1317m 24s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Great question.

It’d be for **data consistency** when changing username.

Right now, profile username and `movie_reviews.username` update in two separate calls. If call 1 succeeds and call 2 fails, you get mixed data.

An RPC (Postgres function) can run both updates in one DB transaction so they either both succeed or both roll back. That prevents partial updates and keeps profile + review bylines in sync.

Since we already surface errors, you’re safe-ish now, but RPC is the “clean” reliability upgrade.

---

161.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
162. 
163.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
164.     event.preventDefault();
165. 
166.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
167.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
168.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
169. 
170.     if (!nextUsername) {
171.       status.hidden = false;
172.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
173.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
174.       status.classList.add("error");
175.       return;
176.     }
177. 
178.     const avatarCheck = sanitizeAvatarUrl(nextAvatar);
179.     if (!avatarCheck.ok) {
180.       status.hidden = false;
181.       status.textContent = avatarCheck.error;
182.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
183.       status.classList.add("error");
184.       return;
185.     }
186. 
187.     status.hidden = false;
188.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
189.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
190.     status.classList.add("info");
191. 
192.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
193.       .from("profiles")
194.       .update({
195.         username: nextUsername,
196.         avatar_url: avatarCheck.value || null,
197.         bio: nextBio || null,
198.       })
199.       .eq("id", profile.id);
200. 
201.     if (error) {
202.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
203.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
204.       status.classList.add("error");
205.       return;
206.     }
207. 
208.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
209.     profile.username = nextUsername;
210.     profile.avatar_url = avatarCheck.value || null;
211.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
212. 
213.     if (oldUsername !== nextUsername) {
214.       const { error: reviewUsernameSyncError } = await window.supabaseClient
215.         .from("movie_reviews")
216.         .update({ username: nextUsername })
217.         .eq("user_id", profile.id);
218. 
219.       if (reviewUsernameSyncError) {
220.         status.textContent = `Profile saved, but review usernames were not synced: ${reviewUsernameSyncError.message}`;
221.         status.classList.remove("success", "info");
222.         status.classList.add("error");
223.         return;
224.       }
225.     }
226. 
227.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
228.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
229.     status.classList.add("success");
230. 
231.     if (typeof onSaved === "function") {
232.       await onSaved(oldUsername !== nextUsername);
233.     }
234.   });
235. 
236.   return form;
237. }
238. 
239. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
240.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
241.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
242.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
243.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
244.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
245. 
246.   let editForm = null;
247. 
248.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
249.     if (editForm) {
250.       editForm.remove();
```

<details>

````
46. ## Deploying to GitHub Pages
47. 
48. 1. Push this repo to GitHub.
49. 2. In repository settings, open **Pages**.
50. 3. Set source to **Deploy from a branch**.
51. 4. Choose branch (usually `main`) and folder `/ (root)`.
52. 5. Save and wait for deployment.
53. 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.
54. 
55. ## Supabase Profiles Setup (for public user pages)
56. 
57. Run this once in Supabase SQL Editor:
58. 
59. ```sql
60. create table if not exists public.profiles (
61.   id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
62.   username text not null unique,
63.   display_name text,
64.   bio text,
65.   avatar_url text,
66.   created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
67.   updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
68. );
69. 
70. create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()
71. returns trigger
72. language plpgsql
73. security definer
74. set search_path = public
75. as $$
76. declare
77.   base_username text;
78. begin
79.   base_username := coalesce(
80.     nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),
81.     split_part(new.email, '@', 1),
82.     'user'
83.   );
84. 
85.   insert into public.profiles (id, username)
86.   values (new.id, base_username)
87.   on conflict (id) do nothing;
88. 
89.   return new;
90. end;
91. $$;
92. 
93. drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;
94. create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile
95. after insert on auth.users
96. for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();
97. 
98. alter table public.profiles enable row level security;
99. 
100. drop policy if exists "profiles public read" on public.profiles;
101. create policy "profiles public read"
102. on public.profiles
103. for select
104. to authenticated
105. using (true);
106. 
107. drop policy if exists "profiles owner insert" on public.profiles;
108. create policy "profiles owner insert"
109. on public.profiles
110. for insert
111. to authenticated
112. with check (auth.uid() = id);
113. 
114. drop policy if exists "profiles owner update" on public.profiles;
115. create policy "profiles owner update"
116. on public.profiles
117. for update
118. to authenticated
119. using (auth.uid() = id)
120. with check (auth.uid() = id);
121. ```
122. 
123. The app now reads usernames from `profiles` for user search and nav display, with fallback to email prefix.
124. 
125. ## Project Structure
126. 
127. ```
128. .
129. ├── index.html              # Protected home page
130. ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
131. ├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
132. ├── style.css               # Shared styling
133. └── js/
134.     ├── supabase-config.example.js  # Template config (safe to commit)
135.     ├── supabase-config.js          # Local secrets (gitignored)
136.     ├── auth.js                     # Auth logic and route guards
137.     ├── index-search.js             # Index typeahead search
138.     └── search.js                   # TMDB connection test logic
139. ```
140. 
141.
````
