+## Supabase Profiles Setup (for public user pages)
+
+Run this once in Supabase SQL Editor:
+
+```sql
+create table if not exists public.profiles (
+  id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
+  username text not null unique,
+  display_name text,
+  bio text,
+  avatar_url text,
+  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
+  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
+);
+
+create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()
+returns trigger
+language plpgsql
+security definer
+set search_path = public
+as $$
+declare
+  base_username text;
+begin
+  base_username := coalesce(
+    nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),
+    split_part(new.email, '@', 1),
+    'user'
+  );
+
+  insert into public.profiles (id, username)
+  values (new.id, base_username)
+  on conflict (id) do nothing;
+
+  return new;
+end;
+$$;
+
+drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;
+create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile
+after insert on auth.users
+for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();
+
+alter table public.profiles enable row level security;
+
+drop policy if exists "profiles public read" on public.profiles;
+create policy "profiles public read"
+on public.profiles
+for select
+to authenticated
+using (true);
+
+drop policy if exists "profiles owner insert" on public.profiles;
+create policy "profiles owner insert"
+on public.profiles
+for insert
+to authenticated
+with check (auth.uid() = id);
+
+drop policy if exists "profiles owner update" on public.profiles;
+create policy "profiles owner update"
+on public.profiles
+for update
+to authenticated
+using (auth.uid() = id)
+with check (auth.uid() = id);
+
+create or replace function public.update_profile_and_review_usernames(
+  p_user_id uuid,
+  p_username text,
+  p_avatar_url text,
+  p_bio text
+)
+returns void
+language plpgsql
+security definer
+set search_path = public
+as $$
+begin
+  if auth.uid() is distinct from p_user_id then
+    raise exception 'Not allowed';
+  end if;
+
+  update public.profiles
+  set
+    username = p_username,
+    avatar_url = p_avatar_url,
+    bio = p_bio,
+    updated_at = now()
+  where id = p_user_id;
+
+  update public.movie_reviews
+  set username = p_username
+  where user_id = p_user_id;
+end;
+$$;
+
+grant execute on function public.update_profile_and_review_usernames(uuid, text, text, text) to authenticated;
+```
+
+The app now reads usernames from `profiles` for user search and nav display, with fallback to email prefix.
+
 ## Project Structure

 ```
 .
-├── index.html              # Protected home page (client-side session check)
+├── index.html              # Protected home page
 ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
+├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
 ├── style.css               # Shared styling
 └── js/
-    ├── supabase-config.js  # Supabase credentials
-    └── auth.js             # Auth logic and route guards
+    ├── supabase-config.example.js  # Template config (safe to commit)
+    ├── supabase-config.js          # Local secrets (gitignored)
+    ├── auth.js                     # Auth logic and route guards
+    ├── index-search.js             # Index typeahead search
+    └── search.js                   # TMDB connection test logic
 ```

### 💬 Copilot

Done — I added the atomic path.

### What changed

- `js/user.js`
  - Profile save now calls:
  - `rpc("update_profile_and_review_usernames", { p_user_id, p_username, p_avatar_url, p_bio })`
  - So profile + review username updates happen together in one DB transaction.

- `README.md`
  - Added SQL function:
  - `public.update_profile_and_review_usernames(...)`
  - Includes auth check (`auth.uid() = p_user_id`) and `GRANT EXECUTE`.

### What you need to do

Run the new SQL from README once in Supabase SQL Editor.

After that, username changes are atomic and won’t partially desync profile/reviews.

<sub>⏱️ 1471m 2s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Absolutely — done. I removed that RPC SQL block from `README.md`.

Run this in Supabase SQL Editor:

```sql
create or replace function public.update_profile_and_review_usernames(
  p_user_id uuid,
  p_username text,
  p_avatar_url text,
  p_bio text
)
returns void
language plpgsql
security definer
set search_path = public
as $$
begin
  if auth.uid() is distinct from p_user_id then
    raise exception 'Not allowed';
  end if;

  update public.profiles
  set
    username = p_username,
    avatar_url = p_avatar_url,
    bio = p_bio,
    updated_at = now()
  where id = p_user_id;

  update public.movie_reviews
  set username = p_username
  where user_id = p_user_id;
end;
$$;

grant execute on function public.update_profile_and_review_usernames(uuid, text, text, text) to authenticated;
```

```
1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function goToUserPage(username) {
30.   const trimmed = typeof username === "string" ? username.trim() : "";
31.   if (!trimmed) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34.   window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
35. }
36. 
37. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
38.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
39.     return;
40.   }
41. 
42.   let debounceHandle;
43.   let requestCounter = 0;
44.   let activeIndex = -1;
45.   let currentResults = [];
46. 
47.   function getMovieYear(item) {
48.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
49.   }
50. 
51.   function clearSuggestions() {
52.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
53.   }
54. 
55.   function openSuggestions() {
56.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
57.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
58.   }
59. 
60.   function closeSuggestions() {
61.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
62.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
63.     activeIndex = -1;
64.   }
65. 
66.   function syncActiveItem() {
67.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
68.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
69.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
70.         item.classList.add("active");
71.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
72.       } else {
73.         item.classList.remove("active");
74.       }
75.     });
76.   }
77. 
78.   function createPosterElement(item) {
79.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
80. 
81.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
82.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
83.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
84.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
85.       return fallback;
86.     }
87. 
88.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
89.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
90.     poster.loading = "lazy";
91.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
92.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
93.     return poster;
94.   }
95. 
96.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
97.     currentResults = items;
98.     clearSuggestions();
99.     activeIndex = -1;
100. 
101.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
102.       const li = document.createElement("li");
103.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
104.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
105.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
106.       li.tabIndex = -1;
107. 
108.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
109. 
110.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
111.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
112. 
113.       const title = document.createElement("span");
114.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
115.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
116. 
117.       const year = document.createElement("span");
118.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
119.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
120. 
121.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
122.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
123.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
124. 
125.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
126.         event.preventDefault();
127.       });
128. 
129.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
130.         activeIndex = index;
131.         syncActiveItem();
132.       });
133. 
134.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
135.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
136.       });
137. 
138.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
139.     }
140. 
141.     openSuggestions();
142.   }
143. 
144.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
145.     currentResults = [];
146.     activeIndex = -1;
147.     clearSuggestions();
148. 
149.     const li = document.createElement("li");
150.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
151.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
152.     li.textContent = message;
153.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
154. 
155.     openSuggestions();
156.   }
157. 
158.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
159.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
160.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
161.       return;
162.     }
163. 
164.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
165.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
166. 
167.     try {
168.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
169.       const payload = await response.json();
170. 
171.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
172.         return;
173.       }
174. 
175.       if (!response.ok) {
176.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
177.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
178.         return;
179.       }
180. 
181.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
182. 
183.       if (results.length === 0) {
184.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
185.         return;
186.       }
187. 
188.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
189.     } catch (error) {
190.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
191.         return;
192.       }
193.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
194.     }
195.   }
196. 
197.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
198.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
199.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
200. 
201.     if (!query) {
202.       closeSuggestions();
203.       clearSuggestions();
204.       currentResults = [];
205.       return;
206.     }
207. 
208.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
209.       requestCounter += 1;
210.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
211.     }, 300);
212.   });
213. 
214.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
215.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
216. 
217.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
218.       event.preventDefault();
219.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
220.       syncActiveItem();
221.       openSuggestions();
222.       return;
223.     }
224. 
225.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
226.       event.preventDefault();
227.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
228.       syncActiveItem();
229.       openSuggestions();
230.       return;
231.     }
232. 
233.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
234.       closeSuggestions();
235.       return;
236.     }
237. 
238.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
239.       event.preventDefault();
240.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
241.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
242.         return;
243.       }
244.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
245.     }
246.   });
247. 
248.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
249.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
250.       openSuggestions();
251.     }
252.   });
253. 
254.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
255.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
256.   });
257. 
258.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
259.     event.preventDefault();
260.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
261.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
262.       return;
263.     }
264.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
265.   });
266. }

292. 
293.   function syncActiveItem() {

319.   function createUserAvatar(username) {
320.     const avatar = document.createElement("div");
321.     avatar.className = "suggestion-avatar";
322.     avatar.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
323.     return avatar;
324.   }
325. 
326.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
327.     currentResults = items;
328.     clearSuggestions();
329.     activeIndex = -1;
330. 
331.     for (const [index, username] of items.entries()) {
332.       const li = document.createElement("li");
333.       li.className = "suggestion-item";

335.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
336.       li.tabIndex = -1;
337. 
338.       li.appendChild(createUserAvatar(username));
339.

342. 
343.       const name = document.createElement("span");
344.       name.className = "suggestion-title";

346. 
347.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
348.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
349.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
350. 
351.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
352.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
353.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
354. 
355.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
356.         event.preventDefault();
357.       });
358. 
359.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
360.         activeIndex = index;
361.         syncActiveItem();
362.       });
363. 
364.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {

366.       });
367.

369.     }

372.   }
373. 
374.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
375.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
376.     if (error) {
377.       return "";
378.     }
379. 
380.     const user = data?.user;
381.     if (!user) {
382.       return "";
383.     }
384. 
385.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
386.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
387.       : "";
388. 
389.     if (metadataUsername) {
390.       return metadataUsername;
391.     }
392. 
393.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
394.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
395.     }
396. 
397.     return "";
398.   }
399. 
400.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
401.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
402. 
403.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
404.       window.supabaseClient
405.         .from("profiles")
406.         .select("username")
407.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
408.         .not("username", "is", null)
409.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
410.         .limit(25),
411.       getCurrentUserUsername()
412.     ]);
413. 
414.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
415.       return;
416.     }
417. 
418.     if (error) {
419.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
420.       return;
421.     }
422. 
423.     const dbUsernames = (data || [])
424.       .map((row) => (typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : ""))
425.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0);
426. 
427.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
428.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
429.       ? [currentUsername]
430.       : [];
431. 
432.     const uniqueUsernames = [...new Set([...localMatches, ...dbUsernames])]
433.       .slice(0, 10);
434. 
435.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
436.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
437.       return;
438.     }
439. 
440.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
441.   }
442. 
443.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
444.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
445.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
446. 
447.     if (!query) {
448.       closeSuggestions();
449.       clearSuggestions();
450.       currentResults = [];
451.       return;
452.     }
453. 
454.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
455.       requestCounter += 1;
456.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
457.     }, 300);
458.   });
459. 
460.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
461.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
462. 
463.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
464.       event.preventDefault();
465.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
466.       syncActiveItem();
467.       openSuggestions();
468.       return;
469.     }
470. 
471.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
472.       event.preventDefault();
473.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
474.       syncActiveItem();
475.       openSuggestions();
476.       return;
477.     }
478. 
479.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
480.       closeSuggestions();
481.       return;
482.     }
483. 
484.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
485.       event.preventDefault();
486.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
487.         goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex]);
488.       }
489.     }
490.   });
491. 
492.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
493.     if (userSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
494.       openSuggestions();
495.     }
496.   });
497. 
498.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
499.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
500.   });
501. 
502.   userSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
503.     event.preventDefault();
504.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
505.       goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex]);
506.       return;
507.     }
508.     goToUserPage(userSearchInput.value);
509.   });
510. }
511. 
512. async function loadRecentReviews() {
513.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
514.     return;
515.   }
516. 
517.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
518.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
519.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
520.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
521.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
522. 
523.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
524.     .from("movie_reviews")
525.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
526.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
527.     .limit(20);
528. 
529.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
530. 
531.   if (error) {
532.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
533.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
534.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
535.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
536.     return;
537.   }
538. 
539.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
540.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
541.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
542.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
543.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
544.     return;
545.   }
546. 
547.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
548.     const card = document.createElement("article");
549.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
550.     card.tabIndex = 0;
551. 
552.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
553.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
554. 
555.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
556.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
557.     const bylineLink = document.createElement("a");
558.     bylineLink.href = "#";
559.     bylineLink.textContent = review.username || "Unknown";
560.     bylineLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
561.       event.preventDefault();
562.       event.stopPropagation();
563.       goToUserPage(review.username || "");
564.     });
565.     byline.append("By ", bylineLink);
566. 
567.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
568.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
569.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
570. 
571.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
572.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
573.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
574. 
575.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
576.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
577.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
578. 
579.     card.appendChild(title);
580.     card.appendChild(byline);
581.     card.appendChild(rating);
582.     card.appendChild(snippet);
583.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
584. 
585.     const openMovie = () => {
586.       if (!review.movie_id) {
587.         return;
588.       }
589.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
590.     };
591. 
592.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
593.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
594.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
595.         event.preventDefault();
596.         openMovie();
597.       }
598.     });
599. 
600.     return card;
601.   });
602. 
603.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
604. }
605. 
606. setupMovieTypeahead();
607. setupUserTypeahead();
608. loadRecentReviews();
609.
```

</details>

1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
19. 
20. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
21.   if (!movieStatus) {
22.     return;
23.   }
24.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
25.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
26.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
27. }
28. 
29. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
30.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
31.     return;
32.   }
33. 
34.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
35.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
36.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
38. }
39. 
40. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
41.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
42.     return;
43.   }
44.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
45.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
46.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
47. }
48. 
49. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
50.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
51.   if (className) {
52.     el.className = className;
53.   }
54.   if (typeof text === "string") {
55.     el.textContent = text;
56.   }
57.   return el;
58. }
59. 
60. function getYear(dateString) {
61.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
62. }
63. 
64. function getDirector(credits) {
65.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
66.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
67.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
68. }
69. 
70. function getCast(credits) {
71.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
72.   if (cast.length === 0) {
73.     return "Unknown";
74.   }
75.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
76. }
77. 
78. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
79.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
80.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
81.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
82.   p.appendChild(strong);
83.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
84.   return p;
85. }
86. 
87. function resolveUsername(session) {
88.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
89.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
90.     return metadata.username.trim();
91.   }
92.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
93.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
94.   }
95.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
96.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
97.   }
98.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
99.   if (email.includes("@")) {
100.     return email.split("@")[0];
101.   }
102.   return "Current User";
103. }
104. 
105. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
106.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
107. }
108. 
109. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
110.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
111.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
112.     return;
113.   }
114. 
115.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
116.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
117.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
118.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
119.       ? storedUsername
120.       : "Unknown User";
121.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
122.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
123.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
124.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
125.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
126.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
127.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
128.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
129.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
130. 
131.     card.appendChild(byline);
132.     card.appendChild(heading);
133.     card.appendChild(body);
134.     card.appendChild(stamp);
135.     return card;
136.   });
137. 
138.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
139. }
140. 
141. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
142.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
143. 
144.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
145.     .from("movie_reviews")
146.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
147.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
148.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
149. 
150.   if (error) {
151.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
152.     return;
153.   }
154. 
155.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
156. }
157. 
158. function openReviewModal() {
159.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
160.     return;
161.   }
162. 
163.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
164.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
165.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
166.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
167.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
168. 
169.   clearReviewFormStatus();
170.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
171. }
172. 
173. function closeReviewModal() {
174.   if (!reviewModal) {
175.     return;
176.   }
177.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
178.   clearReviewFormStatus();
179. }
180. 
181. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
182.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
183.   currentMovie = movie;
184. 
185.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
186.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
187.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
188.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
189. 
190.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
191.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
192.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
193.     poster.loading = "lazy";
194.   }
195. 
196.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
197.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
198.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
199.   heading.appendChild(year);
200. 
201.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
202.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
203.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
204.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
205.     : "Genres unavailable";
206. 
207.   content.appendChild(heading);
208.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
209.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
210.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
211.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
212.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
213.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
214.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
215. 
216.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
217.   reviewButton.type = "button";
218.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
219.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
220. 
221.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
222.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
223. }
224. 
225. async function loadMoviePage() {
226.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
227.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
228. 
229.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
230.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
231.     return;
232.   }
233. 
234.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
235.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
236.     return;
237.   }
238. 
239.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
240.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
241.     return;
242.   }
243. 
244.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
245.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
246.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
247.     return;
248.   }
249. 
250.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
251.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
252.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
253. 
254.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
255. 
256.   try {
257.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
258.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
259.     const payload = await response.json();
260. 
261.     if (!response.ok) {
262.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
263.     }
264. 
265.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
266.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
267.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
268.   } catch (error) {
269.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
270.   }
271. }
272. 
273. if (reviewModalClose) {
274.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
275. }
276. 
277. if (reviewModal) {
278.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
279.     const target = event.target;
280.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
281.       closeReviewModal();
282.     }
283.   });
284. }
285. 
286. if (reviewForm) {
287.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
288.     event.preventDefault();
289. 
290.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
291.       return;
292.     }
293. 
294.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
295. 
296.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
297.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
298.       return;
299.     }
300. 
301.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
302.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
303. 
304.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
305.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
306.       return;
307.     }
308. 
309.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
310.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
311.       return;
312.     }
313. 
314.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
315.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
316.     if (submitButton) {
317.       submitButton.disabled = true;
318.     }
319. 
320.     const payload = {
321.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
322.       username: currentUsername,
323.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
324.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
325.       rating: ratingValue,
326.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
327.     };
328. 
329.     try {
330.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
331.         .from("movie_reviews")
332.         .insert(payload);
333. 
334.       if (error) {
335.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
336.         return;
337.       }
338. 
339.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
340.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
341.       reviewForm.reset();
342.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
343.     } finally {
344.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
345.       if (submitButton) {
346.         submitButton.disabled = false;
347.       }
348.     }
349.   });
350. }
351. 
352. loadMoviePage();
353.
```

</details>

105. 
106. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
107.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
108. }
109. 
110. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
111.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
112.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
113.     return;
114.   }
115. 
116.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
117.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
118.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
119.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
120.       ? storedUsername
121.       : "Unknown User";
122.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
123.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
124.     const avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
125.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
126.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
127. 
128.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
129.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
130.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
131.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
132.     } else {
133.       avatar.replaceWith(makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase()));
134.     }
135. 
136.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
137.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
138.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
139.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
140.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
141.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
142.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
143.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
144. 
145.     avatarWrap.appendChild(card.querySelector(".review-avatar") || makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase()));
146.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
147.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
148.     card.appendChild(heading);
149.     card.appendChild(body);
150.     card.appendChild(stamp);
151.     return card;
152.   });
153. 
154.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
155. }
156. 
157. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
158.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
159. 
160.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
161.     .from("movie_reviews")
162.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
163.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
164.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
165. 
166.   if (error) {
167.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
168.     return;
169.   }
170. 
171.   const usernames = [...new Set(
172.     (data || [])
173.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
174.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
175.   )];
176. 
177.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
178.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
179.       .from("profiles")
180.       .select("username, avatar_url")
181.       .in("username", usernames);
182. 
183.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
184.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
185.       if (!key) {
186.         continue;
187.       }
188.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
189.     }
190.   }
191. 
192.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
193. }
194. 
195. function openReviewModal() {
196.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
197.     return;
198.   }
199. 
200.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
201.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
202.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
203.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
204.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
205. 
206.   clearReviewFormStatus();
207.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
208. }
209. 
210. function closeReviewModal() {
211.   if (!reviewModal) {
212.     return;
213.   }
214.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
215.   clearReviewFormStatus();
216. }

218. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
219.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
220.   currentMovie = movie;

300.   function openSuggestions() {
301.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
302.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
303.   }
304. 
305.   function closeSuggestions() {
306.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
307.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
308.     activeIndex = -1;
309.   }
310. 
311.   function syncActiveItem() {
312.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
313.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
314.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
315.         item.classList.add("active");
316.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
317.       } else {
318.         item.classList.remove("active");
319.       }
320.     });
321.   }
322. 
323.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
324.     currentResults = [];
325.     activeIndex = -1;
326.     clearSuggestions();
327. 
328.     const li = document.createElement("li");
329.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
330.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
331.     li.textContent = message;
332.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
333. 
334.     openSuggestions();
335.   }
336. 
337.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
338.     currentResults = items;
339.     clearSuggestions();
340.     activeIndex = -1;
341. 
342.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
343.       const username = item.username;
344.       const li = document.createElement("li");
345.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
346.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
347.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
348.       li.tabIndex = -1;
349. 
350.       li.appendChild(createProfileAvatarElement(username, item.avatar_url));
351. 
352.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
353.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
354. 
355.       const name = document.createElement("span");
356.       name.className = "suggestion-title";
357.       name.textContent = username;
358. 
359.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
360.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
361.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
362. 
363.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
364.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
365.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
366. 
367.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
368.         event.preventDefault();
369.       });
370. 
371.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
372.         activeIndex = index;
373.         syncActiveItem();
374.       });
375. 
376.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
377.         goToUserPage(username);
378.       });
379. 
380.       userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
381.     }
382. 
383.     openSuggestions();
384.   }
385. 
386.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
387.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
388.     if (error) {
389.       return "";
390.     }
391. 
392.     const user = data?.user;
393.     if (!user) {
394.       return "";
395.     }
396. 
397.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
398.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
399.       : "";
400. 
401.     if (metadataUsername) {
402.       return metadataUsername;
403.     }
404. 
405.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
406.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
407.     }
408. 
409.     return "";
410.   }
411. 
412.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
413.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
414. 
415.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
416.       window.supabaseClient
417.         .from("profiles")
418.         .select("username, avatar_url")
419.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
420.         .not("username", "is", null)
421.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
422.         .limit(25),
423.       getCurrentUserUsername()
424.     ]);
425. 
426.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
427.       return;
428.     }
429. 
430.     if (error) {
431.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
432.       return;
433.     }
434. 
435.     const profileRows = (data || [])
436.       .map((row) => ({
437.         username: typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : "",
438.         avatar_url: typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : ""
439.       }))
440.       .filter((row) => row.username.length > 0);
441. 
442.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
443.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
444.       ? [{ username: currentUsername, avatar_url: "" }]
445.       : [];
446. 
447.     const uniqueUsernames = [];
448.     const seen = new Set();
449.     for (const row of [...localMatches, ...profileRows]) {
450.       const key = row.username.toLowerCase();
451.       if (seen.has(key)) {
452.         continue;
453.       }
454.       seen.add(key);
455.       uniqueUsernames.push(row);
456.       if (uniqueUsernames.length >= 10) {
457.         break;
458.       }
459.     }
460.
```

diff --git a/style.css b/style.css
index 4d41d62..fd851b9 100644
--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -376,3 +376,799 @@
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */        
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);       
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);      
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);  
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);

+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);

+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {

+.reviews-list {

+.review-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 400;
+}
+
+.review-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.review-modal-content {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-close {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0.7rem;
+  right: 0.7rem;

+}

+.review-modal-header {

+}

<sub>⏱️ 1476m 6s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Patched ✅

### What I changed

- **User search dropdown now uses real profile pictures**
  - `js/index-search.js` now fetches `username, avatar_url` from `profiles`
  - Suggestions render avatar image if available, otherwise initials fallback
  - So when you update your profile photo, it appears in user search results

- **Added profile pictures to reviews**
  - Index **Recent Reviews** cards now show reviewer avatars
  - `movie.html` review cards now show reviewer avatars
  - Both use `profiles.avatar_url` with initials fallback

- **Styling updated** in `style.css` for review/avatar layouts.

If you don’t see it immediately, hard refresh (`Ctrl+F5`).

<sub>⏱️ 1479m 26s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

You’re actually already filtered correctly in code:

- **Movie page:** `movie_reviews` filtered by `.eq("movie_id", movieId)`
- **Profile page:** filtered by `.eq("user_id", profileId)`
- **Recent reviews:** global recent (`limit 20`) for all users

So the missing piece is almost certainly **Supabase RLS read policy** on `movie_reviews`.

Run this SQL:

```sql
alter table public.movie_reviews enable row level security;

drop policy if exists "movie_reviews authenticated read" on public.movie_reviews;
create policy "movie_reviews authenticated read"
on public.movie_reviews
for select
to authenticated
using (true);
```

If needed, I can also give matching insert/update owner policies in one block.

1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. 
5. let currentSession = null;
6. let viewedProfile = null;
7. let isOwnerView = false;
8. 
9. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
10.   if (!userPageStatus) {
11.     return;
12.   }
13.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
14.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
15.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
16. }
17. 
18. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
19.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
20.   if (className) {
21.     element.className = className;
22.   }
23.   if (typeof text === "string") {
24.     element.textContent = text;
25.   }
26.   return element;
27. }
28. 
29. function getProfileParam() {
30.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
31.   const username = params.get("username");
32.   const userId = params.get("id");
33. 
34.   if (username && username.trim()) {
35.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
36.   }
37. 
38.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
39.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
40.   }
41. 
42.   return null;
43. }
44. 
45. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
46.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
47.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
48.     return metadata.username.trim();
49.   }
50.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
51.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
52.   }
53.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
54.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
55.   }
56.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
57.   if (email.includes("@")) {
58.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
59.   }
60.   return "";
61. }
62. 
63. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
64.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
65.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
66.   }
67.   return "";
68. }
69. 
70. function sanitizeAvatarUrl(rawValue) {
71.   const value = typeof rawValue === "string" ? rawValue.trim() : "";
72.   if (!value) {
73.     return { ok: true, value: "" };
74.   }
75. 
76.   try {
77.     const parsed = new URL(value);
78.     if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
79.       return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://." };
80.     }
81.     return { ok: true, value: parsed.toString() };
82.   } catch {
83.     return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL is invalid." };
84.   }
85. }
86. 
87. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
88.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
89. 
90.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
91.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
92.   let avatar;
93. 
94.   if (avatarUrl) {
95.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
96.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
97.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
98.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
99.   } else {
100.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
101.   }
102. 
103.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
104.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
105.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
106. 
107.   body.appendChild(heading);
108.   body.appendChild(bio);
109. 
110.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
111.   wrap.appendChild(body);
112. 
113.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
114. }
115. 
116. function buildProfileEditForm(profile, onSaved) {
117.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
118.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
119. 
120.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
121.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
122.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
123.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
124.   usernameInput.name = "username";
125.   usernameInput.required = true;
126.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
127.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
128. 
129.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
130.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
131.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
132.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
133.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
134.   avatarInput.type = "url";
135.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
136.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
137. 
138.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
139.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
140.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
141.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
142.   bioInput.name = "bio";
143.   bioInput.rows = 4;
144.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
145.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
146. 
147.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
148.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
149.   status.hidden = true;
150. 
151.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
152.   saveButton.type = "submit";
153. 
154.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
155.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
156.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
157.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
158.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
159.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
160.   form.appendChild(status);
161.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
162. 
163.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
164.     event.preventDefault();
165. 
166.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
167.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
168.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
169. 
170.     if (!nextUsername) {
171.       status.hidden = false;
172.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
173.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
174.       status.classList.add("error");
175.       return;
176.     }
177. 
178.     const avatarCheck = sanitizeAvatarUrl(nextAvatar);
179.     if (!avatarCheck.ok) {
180.       status.hidden = false;
181.       status.textContent = avatarCheck.error;
182.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
183.       status.classList.add("error");
184.       return;
185.     }
186. 
187.     status.hidden = false;
188.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
189.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
190.     status.classList.add("info");
191. 
192.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
193.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.rpc("update_profile_and_review_usernames", {
194.       p_user_id: profile.id,
195.       p_username: nextUsername,
196.       p_avatar_url: avatarCheck.value || null,
197.       p_bio: nextBio || null
198.     });
199. 
200.     if (error) {
201.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
202.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
203.       status.classList.add("error");
204.       return;
205.     }
206. 
207.     profile.username = nextUsername;
208.     profile.avatar_url = avatarCheck.value || null;
209.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
210. 
211.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
212.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
213.     status.classList.add("success");
214. 
215.     if (typeof onSaved === "function") {
216.       await onSaved(oldUsername !== nextUsername);
217.     }
218.   });
219. 
220.   return form;
221. }
222. 
223. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
224.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
225.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
226.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
227.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
228.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
229. 
230.   let editForm = null;
231. 
232.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
233.     if (editForm) {
234.       editForm.remove();
235.       editForm = null;
236.       editToggleButton.textContent = "Edit Profile";
237.       return;
238.     }
239. 
240.     editForm = buildProfileEditForm(profile, async (usernameChanged) => {
241.       renderProfileHeader(profile);
242.       renderOwnerControls(profile);
243.       if (usernameChanged) {
244.         window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(profile.username)}`);
245.       }
246.       await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
247.     });
248. 
249.     userProfileCard.appendChild(editForm);
250.     editToggleButton.textContent = "Hide Edit Profile";
251.   });
252. }
253. 
254. function buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {
255.   const form = makeElement("form", "review-inline-edit-form");
256. 
257.   const ratingLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Rating (1-10)");
258.   const ratingInput = makeElement("input", "");
259.   ratingInput.type = "number";
260.   ratingInput.min = "1";
261.   ratingInput.max = "10";
262.   ratingInput.step = "1";
263.   ratingInput.required = true;
264.   ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));
265. 
266.   const textLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Review text");
267.   const textInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
268.   textInput.rows = 4;
269.   textInput.maxLength = 3000;
270.   textInput.required = true;
271.   textInput.value = review.review_text || "";
272. 
273.   const controls = makeElement("div", "review-inline-edit-controls");
274.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Review");
275.   saveButton.type = "submit";
276.   const cancelButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Cancel");
277.   cancelButton.type = "button";
278. 
279.   controls.appendChild(saveButton);
280.   controls.appendChild(cancelButton);
281. 
282.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
283.   status.hidden = true;
284. 
285.   cancelButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
286.     onSaved(false);
287.   });
288. 
289.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
290.     event.preventDefault();
291. 
292.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);
293.     const nextText = textInput.value.trim();
294. 
295.     if (!currentSession?.user?.id) {
296.       status.hidden = false;
297.       status.textContent = "Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.";
298.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
299.       status.classList.add("error");
300.       return;
301.     }
302. 
303.     if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {
304.       status.hidden = false;
305.       status.textContent = "Rating must be between 1 and 10.";
306.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
307.       status.classList.add("error");
308.       return;
309.     }
310. 
311.     if (nextText.length < 5) {
312.       status.hidden = false;
313.       status.textContent = "Review text must be at least 5 characters.";
314.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
315.       status.classList.add("error");
316.       return;
317.     }
318. 
319.     status.hidden = false;
320.     status.textContent = "Saving review...";
321.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
322.     status.classList.add("info");
323. 
324.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
325.       .from("movie_reviews")
326.       .update({
327.         rating: nextRating,
328.         review_text: nextText,
329.       })
330.       .eq("id", review.id)
331.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
332. 
333.     if (error) {
334.       status.textContent = `Could not update review: ${error.message}`;
335.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
336.       status.classList.add("error");
337.       return;
338.     }
339. 
340.     onSaved(true);
341.   });
342. 
343.   form.appendChild(ratingLabel);
344.   form.appendChild(ratingInput);
345.   form.appendChild(textLabel);
346.   form.appendChild(textInput);
347.   form.appendChild(status);
348.   form.appendChild(controls);
349. 
350.   return form;
351. }
352. 
353. function renderReviewCards(reviews) {
354.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
355.     userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet."));
356.     return;
357.   }
358. 
359.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
360.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
361. 
362.     const title = makeElement("h3", "user-review-movie-title", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
363.     const titleLink = makeElement("a", "", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
364.     titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || ""))}`;
365.     title.replaceChildren(titleLink);
366. 
367.     const rating = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
368.     const text = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
369.     const date = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : "");
370. 
371.     card.appendChild(title);
372.     card.appendChild(rating);
373.     card.appendChild(text);
374.     card.appendChild(date);
375. 
376.     if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
377.       const editButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Review");
378.       editButton.type = "button";
379. 
380.       editButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
381.         const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {
382.           if (saved) {
383.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
384.           } else {
385.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
386.           }
387.         });
388. 
389.         card.appendChild(editForm);
390.         editButton.disabled = true;
391.       });
392. 
393.       card.appendChild(editButton);
394.     }
395. 
396.     return card;
397.   });
398. 
399.   userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);
400. }
401. 
402. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
403.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
404.     .from("movie_reviews")
405.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
406.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
407.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
408. 
409.   if (error) {
410.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
411.     return;
412.   }
413. 
414.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
415. }
416. 
417. async function loadProfile() {
418.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
419.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
420.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
421.     return;
422.   }
423. 
424.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
425. 
426.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
427.   let profile;
428.   let profileError;
429. 
430.   if (!profileQuery) {
431.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
432.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
433.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
434.       return;
435.     }
436. 
437.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
438.       .from("profiles")
439.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
440.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
441.       .maybeSingle());
442.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
443.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
444.       .from("profiles")
445.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
446.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
447.       .maybeSingle());
448.   } else {
449.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
450.       .from("profiles")
451.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
452.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
453.       .maybeSingle());
454.   }
455. 
456.   if (profileError) {
457.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
458.     return;
459.   }
460. 
461.   if (!profile?.id) {
462.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
463.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
464.     return;
465.   }
466. 
467.   viewedProfile = profile;
468.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
469. 
470.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
471. 
472.   if (isOwnerView) {
473.     renderOwnerControls(profile);
474.   }
475. 
476.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
477.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
478. }
479. 
480. loadProfile();
481.
```
