1. const tmdbStatus = document.getElementById("tmdb-status");
2. const searchForm = document.getElementById("movie-search-form");
3. const searchInput = document.getElementById("movie-query");
4. const suggestionList = document.getElementById("search-suggestion-list");
5. const resultsGrid = document.getElementById("search-results");
6. 
7. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342";
8. const SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
9. 
10. function setTmdbStatus(message, kind = "info") {
11.   if (!tmdbStatus) {
12.     return;
13.   }
14. 
15.   tmdbStatus.textContent = message;
16.   tmdbStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
17.   tmdbStatus.classList.add(kind);
18. }
19. 
20. function getYear(dateString) {
21.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
22. }
23. 
24. function getDirector(credits) {
25.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
26.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
27.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
28. }
29. 
30. function getCast(credits) {
31.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
32.   if (cast.length === 0) {
33.     return "Unknown";
34.   }
35.   return cast.slice(0, 4).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
36. }
37. 
38. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
39.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
40.   if (className) {
41.     el.className = className;
42.   }
43.   if (typeof text === "string") {
44.     el.textContent = text;
45.   }
46.   return el;
47. }
48. 
49. function createPoster(movie) {
50.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
51. 
52.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
53.     return makeElement("div", "result-poster result-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
54.   }
55. 
56.   const img = makeElement("img", "result-poster");
57.   img.loading = "lazy";
58.   img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
59.   img.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
60.   return img;
61. }
62. 
63. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
64.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
65.   if (!label) {
66.     p.textContent = value;
67.     return p;
68.   }
69. 
70.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
71.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
72.   p.appendChild(strong);
73.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
74.   return p;
75. }
76. 
77. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
78.   if (!movieId) {
79.     return;
80.   }
81.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
82. }
83. 
84. function createResultCard(movie) {
85.   const article = makeElement("article", "result-card");
86.   article.tabIndex = 0;
87.   article.setAttribute("role", "button");
88. 
89.   article.addEventListener("click", () => {
90.     goToMoviePage(movie.id);
91.   });
92. 
93.   article.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
94.     if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
95.       event.preventDefault();
96.       goToMoviePage(movie.id);
97.     }
98.   });
99. 
100.   article.appendChild(createPoster(movie));
101. 
102.   const content = makeElement("div", "result-content");
103. 
104.   const titleRow = makeElement("h2");
105.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(movie.title || "Untitled"));
106.   titleRow.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
107.   const year = makeElement("span", "", `(${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
108.   titleRow.appendChild(year);
109. 
110.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
111.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
112.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
113.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
114.     : "Genres unavailable";
115. 
116.   content.appendChild(titleRow);
117.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("", `⭐ ${vote} / 10 · ${runtime}`));
118.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", movie.director || "Unknown"));
119.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", movie.cast || "Unknown"));
120.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
121.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
122. 
123.   article.appendChild(content);
124.   return article;
125. }
126. 
127. function setResultsMessage(className, text) {
128.   resultsGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("p", className, text));
129. }
130. 
131. async function fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movieId) {
132.   const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${movieId}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
133.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
134.   const payload = await response.json();
135. 
136.   if (!response.ok) {
137.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
138.   }
139. 
140.   return {
141.     ...payload,
142.     director: getDirector(payload.credits),
143.     cast: getCast(payload.credits),
144.   };
145. }
146. 
147. async function performSearch(rawQuery) {
148.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
149.   const query = rawQuery.trim();
150. 
151.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
152.     setTmdbStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
153.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
154.     return;
155.   }
156. 
157.   if (!query) {
158.     setTmdbStatus("Enter a movie title to search.", "info");
159.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren();
160.     return;
161.   }
162. 
163.   setTmdbStatus("Searching TMDB...", "info");
164.   setResultsMessage("results-loading", "Loading results...");
165. 
166.   try {
167.     const searchEndpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
168.     const searchResponse = await fetch(searchEndpoint);
169.     const searchPayload = await searchResponse.json();
170. 
171.     if (!searchResponse.ok) {
172.       throw new Error(searchPayload.status_message || "TMDB search failed.");
173.     }
174. 
175.     const baseResults = Array.isArray(searchPayload.results) ? searchPayload.results.slice(0, 8) : [];
176. 
177.     if (baseResults.length === 0) {
178.       setTmdbStatus("No movies matched your search.", "info");
179.       setResultsMessage("results-empty", "No results found.");
180.       return;
181.     }
182. 
183.     const detailedResults = await Promise.all(
184.       baseResults.map((movie) =>
185.         fetchMovieDetails(tmdbConfig, movie.id).catch(() => ({ ...movie, director: "Unknown", cast: "Unknown" }))
186.       )
187.     );
188. 
189.     const cards = detailedResults.map(createResultCard);
190.     resultsGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
191.     setTmdbStatus(`Showing ${detailedResults.length} result(s) for "${query}".`, "success");
192.   } catch (error) {
193.     setTmdbStatus(`TMDB request failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
194.     setResultsMessage("results-empty", "Unable to load results right now.");
195.   }
196. }
197. 
198. if (searchForm && searchInput && suggestionList) {
199.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
200.   let debounceHandle;
201.   let requestCounter = 0;
202.   let activeIndex = -1;
203.   let currentSuggestions = [];
204. 
205.   function clearSuggestions() {
206.     suggestionList.replaceChildren();
207.   }
208. 
209.   function openSuggestions() {
210.     suggestionList.classList.add("open");
211.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
212.   }
213. 
214.   function closeSuggestions() {
215.     suggestionList.classList.remove("open");
216.     searchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
217.     activeIndex = -1;
218.   }
219. 
220.   function syncActiveSuggestion() {
221.     const items = suggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
222.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
223.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
224.         item.classList.add("active");
225.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
226.       } else {
227.         item.classList.remove("active");
228.       }
229.     });
230.   }
231. 
232.   function renderSuggestionInfo(message, state = "info") {
233.     currentSuggestions = [];
234.     activeIndex = -1;
235.     clearSuggestions();
236. 
237.     const li = makeElement("li", `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`, message);
238.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
239.     suggestionList.appendChild(li);
240.     openSuggestions();
241.   }
242. 
243.   function createSuggestionPoster(movie) {
244.     const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
245. 
246.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
247.       return makeElement("div", "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback", "No image");
248.     }
249. 
250.     const img = makeElement("img", "suggestion-poster");
251.     img.loading = "lazy";
252.     img.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
253.     img.src = `${SUGGESTION_IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
254.     return img;
255.   }
256. 
257.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
258.     currentSuggestions = items;
259.     activeIndex = -1;
260.     clearSuggestions();
261. 
262.     items.forEach((movie, index) => {
263.       const li = makeElement("li", "suggestion-item");
264.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
265.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
266.       li.tabIndex = -1;
267. 
268.       li.appendChild(createSuggestionPoster(movie));
269. 
270.       const textWrap = makeElement("div", "suggestion-text");
271.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-title", movie.title || "Untitled"));
272.       textWrap.appendChild(makeElement("span", "suggestion-year", getYear(movie.release_date)));
273.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
274. 
275.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
276.         event.preventDefault();
277.       });
278. 
279.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
280.         activeIndex = index;
281.         syncActiveSuggestion();
282.       });
283. 
284.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
285.         goToMoviePage(movie.id);
286.       });
287. 
288.       suggestionList.appendChild(li);
289.     });
290. 
291.     openSuggestions();
292.   }
293. 
294.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
295.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
296.       renderSuggestionInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
297.       return;
298.     }
299. 
300.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
301.     renderSuggestionInfo("Searching...", "loading");
302. 
303.     try {
304.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
305.       const payload = await response.json();
306. 
307.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
308.         return;
309.       }
310. 
311.       if (!response.ok) {
312.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
313.         renderSuggestionInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
314.         return;
315.       }
316. 
317.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
318. 
319.       if (results.length === 0) {
320.         renderSuggestionInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
321.         return;
322.       }
323. 
324.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
325.     } catch (error) {
326.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
327.         return;
328.       }
329.       renderSuggestionInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
330.     }
331.   }
332. 
333.   function submitQuery(query) {
334.     const trimmed = query.trim();
335.     if (!trimmed) {
336.       return;
337.     }
338. 
339.     searchInput.value = trimmed;
340.     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
341.     params.set("query", trimmed);
342.     const nextUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
343.     window.history.replaceState({}, "", nextUrl);
344.     closeSuggestions();
345.     performSearch(trimmed);
346.   }
347. 
348.   searchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
349.     const query = searchInput.value.trim();
350.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
351. 
352.     if (!query) {
353.       closeSuggestions();
354.       clearSuggestions();
355.       currentSuggestions = [];
356.       return;
357.     }
358. 
359.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
360.       requestCounter += 1;
361.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
362.     }, 300);
363.   });
364. 
365.   searchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
366.     const hasSelectable = currentSuggestions.length > 0;
367. 
368.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
369.       event.preventDefault();
370.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentSuggestions.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
371.       syncActiveSuggestion();
372.       openSuggestions();
373.       return;
374.     }
375. 
376.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
377.       event.preventDefault();
378.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentSuggestions.length - 1;
379.       syncActiveSuggestion();
380.       openSuggestions();
381.       return;
382.     }
383. 
384.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
385.       closeSuggestions();
386.       return;
387.     }
388. 
389.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
390.       event.preventDefault();
391.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
392.         goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
393.         return;
394.       }
395.       submitQuery(searchInput.value);
396.     }
397.   });
398. 
399.   searchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
400.     if (suggestionList.children.length > 0) {
401.       openSuggestions();
402.     }
403.   });
404. 
405.   searchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
406.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
407.   });
408. 
409.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
410.     event.preventDefault();
411.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentSuggestions[activeIndex]) {
412.       goToMoviePage(currentSuggestions[activeIndex].id);
413.       return;
414.     }
415.     submitQuery(searchInput.value);
416.   });
417. 
418.   const urlQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("query") || "";
419.   if (urlQuery) {
420.     searchInput.value = urlQuery;
421.     performSearch(urlQuery);
422.   }
423. }
424.
```

</details>

1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");

7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";

15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;

21. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
22.   if (!movieStatus) {
23.     return;
24.   }
25.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
26.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
27.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
28. }
29. 
30. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
31.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34. 
35.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
36.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
38.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
39. }
40. 
41. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
42.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
43.     return;
44.   }
45.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
46.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
47.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
48. }
49. 
50. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
51.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
52.   if (className) {
53.     el.className = className;
54.   }
55.   if (typeof text === "string") {
56.     el.textContent = text;
57.   }
58.   return el;
59. }
60. 
61. function getYear(dateString) {
62.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
63. }
64. 
65. function getDirector(credits) {
66.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
67.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
68.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
69. }
70. 
71. function getCast(credits) {
72.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
73.   if (cast.length === 0) {
74.     return "Unknown";
75.   }
76.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
77. }
78. 
79. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
80.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
81.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
82.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
83.   p.appendChild(strong);
84.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
85.   return p;
86. }
87. 
88. function resolveUsername(session) {
89.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
90.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
91.     return metadata.username.trim();
92.   }
93.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
94.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
95.   }
96.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
97.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
98.   }
99.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
100.   if (email.includes("@")) {
101.     return email.split("@")[0];
102.   }
103.   return "Current User";
104. }
105. 
106. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
107.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
108. }
109. 
110. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
111.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
112.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
113.     return;
114.   }
115. 
116.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
117.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
118.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
119.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
120.       ? storedUsername
121.       : "Unknown User";
122.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
123.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
124.     let avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
125.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
126.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
127. 
128.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
129.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
130.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
131.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
132.     } else {
133.       avatar = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
134.     }
135. 
136.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
137.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
138.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
139.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
140.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
141.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
142.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
143.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
144. 
145.     avatarWrap.appendChild(avatar);
146.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
147.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
148.     card.appendChild(heading);
149.     card.appendChild(body);
150.     card.appendChild(stamp);
151.     return card;
152.   });
153. 
154.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
155. }
156. 
157. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
158.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
159. 
160.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
161.     .from("movie_reviews")
162.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
163.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
164.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
165. 
166.   if (error) {
167.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
168.     return;
169.   }
170. 
171.   const usernames = [...new Set(
172.     (data || [])
173.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
174.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
175.   )];
176. 
177.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
178.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
179.       .from("profiles")
180.       .select("username, avatar_url")
181.       .in("username", usernames);
182. 
183.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
184.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
185.       if (!key) {
186.         continue;
187.       }
188.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
189.     }
190.   }
191. 
192.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
193. }
194. 
195. function openReviewModal() {
196.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
197.     return;
198.   }
199. 
200.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
201.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
202.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
203.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
204.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
205. 
206.   clearReviewFormStatus();
207.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
208. }
209. 
210. function closeReviewModal() {
211.   if (!reviewModal) {
212.     return;
213.   }
214.   reviewModal.hidden = true;

216. }
217. 
218. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
219.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
220.   currentMovie = movie;
221. 
222.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
223.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
224.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
225.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
226. 
227.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
228.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
229.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
230.     poster.loading = "lazy";
231.   }
232. 
233.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
234.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
235.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
236.   heading.appendChild(year);
237. 
238.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
239.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
240.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
241.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
242.     : "Genres unavailable";
243. 
244.   content.appendChild(heading);
245.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
246.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
247.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
248.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
249.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
250.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
251.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
252. 
253.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
254.   reviewButton.type = "button";
255.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
256.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
257. 
258.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
259.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
260. }
261. 
262. async function loadMoviePage() {
263.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
264.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
265. 
266.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
267.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
268.     return;
269.   }
270. 
271.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
272.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
273.     return;
274.   }
275. 
276.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
277.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
278.     return;
279.   }
280. 
281.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
282.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
283.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
284.     return;
285.   }
286. 
287.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
288.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
289.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
290. 
291.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
292. 
293.   try {
294.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
295.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
296.     const payload = await response.json();
297. 
298.     if (!response.ok) {
299.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
300.     }
301. 
302.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
303.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
304.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
305.   } catch (error) {
306.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
307.   }
308. }
309. 
310. if (reviewModalClose) {
311.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
312. }
313. 
314. if (reviewModal) {
315.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
316.     const target = event.target;
317.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
318.       closeReviewModal();
319.     }
320.   });
321. }
322. 
323. if (reviewForm) {
324.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
325.     event.preventDefault();
326. 
327.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
328.       return;
329.     }
330. 
331.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
332. 
333.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
334.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
335.       return;
336.     }
337. 
338.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
339.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
340. 
341.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
342.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
343.       return;
344.     }
345. 
346.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
347.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
348.       return;
349.     }
350. 
351.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
352.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
353.     if (submitButton) {
354.       submitButton.disabled = true;
355.     }
356. 
357.     const payload = {
358.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
359.       username: currentUsername,
360.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
361.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
362.       rating: ratingValue,
363.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
364.     };
365. 
366.     try {
367.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
368.         .from("movie_reviews")
369.         .insert(payload);
370. 
371.       if (error) {
372.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
373.         return;
374.       }
375. 
376.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
377.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
378.       reviewForm.reset();
379.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
380.     } finally {
381.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
382.       if (submitButton) {
383.         submitButton.disabled = false;
384.       }
385.     }
386.   });
387. }
388. 
389. loadMoviePage();
390.
```

<details>

```
1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function goToUserPage(username) {
30.   const trimmed = typeof username === "string" ? username.trim() : "";
31.   if (!trimmed) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34.   window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
35. }
36. 
37. function createProfileAvatarElement(username, avatarUrl, className = "suggestion-avatar") {
38.   const cleanAvatarUrl = typeof avatarUrl === "string" ? avatarUrl.trim() : "";
39. 
40.   if (cleanAvatarUrl) {
41.     const avatarImg = document.createElement("img");
42.     avatarImg.className = className;
43.     avatarImg.src = cleanAvatarUrl;
44.     avatarImg.alt = `${username || "User"} avatar`;
45.     avatarImg.loading = "lazy";
46.     return avatarImg;
47.   }
48. 
49.   const fallback = document.createElement("div");
50.   fallback.className = `${className} suggestion-avatar-fallback`;
51.   fallback.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
52.   return fallback;
53. }
54. 
55. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
56.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
57.     return;
58.   }
59. 
60.   let debounceHandle;
61.   let requestCounter = 0;
62.   let activeIndex = -1;
63.   let currentResults = [];
64. 
65.   function getMovieYear(item) {
66.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
67.   }
68. 
69.   function clearSuggestions() {
70.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
71.   }
72. 
73.   function openSuggestions() {
74.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
75.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
76.   }
77. 
78.   function closeSuggestions() {
79.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
80.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
81.     activeIndex = -1;
82.   }
83. 
84.   function syncActiveItem() {
85.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
86.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
87.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
88.         item.classList.add("active");
89.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
90.       } else {
91.         item.classList.remove("active");
92.       }
93.     });
94.   }
95. 
96.   function createPosterElement(item) {
97.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
98. 
99.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
100.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
101.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
102.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
103.       return fallback;
104.     }
105. 
106.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
107.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
108.     poster.loading = "lazy";
109.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
110.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
111.     return poster;
112.   }
113. 
114.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
115.     currentResults = items;
116.     clearSuggestions();
117.     activeIndex = -1;
118. 
119.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
120.       const li = document.createElement("li");
121.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
122.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
123.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
124.       li.tabIndex = -1;
125. 
126.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
127. 
128.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
129.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
130. 
131.       const title = document.createElement("span");
132.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
133.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
134. 
135.       const year = document.createElement("span");
136.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
137.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
138. 
139.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
140.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
141.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
142. 
143.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
144.         event.preventDefault();
145.       });
146. 
147.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
148.         activeIndex = index;
149.         syncActiveItem();
150.       });
151. 
152.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
153.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
154.       });
155. 
156.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
157.     }
158. 
159.     openSuggestions();
160.   }
161. 
162.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
163.     currentResults = [];
164.     activeIndex = -1;
165.     clearSuggestions();
166. 
167.     const li = document.createElement("li");
168.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
169.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
170.     li.textContent = message;
171.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
172. 
173.     openSuggestions();
174.   }
175. 
176.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
177.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
178.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
179.       return;
180.     }
181. 
182.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
183.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
184. 
185.     try {
186.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
187.       const payload = await response.json();
188. 
189.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
190.         return;
191.       }
192. 
193.       if (!response.ok) {
194.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
195.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
196.         return;
197.       }
198. 
199.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
200. 
201.       if (results.length === 0) {
202.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
203.         return;
204.       }
205. 
206.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
207.     } catch (error) {
208.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
209.         return;
210.       }
211.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
212.     }
213.   }
214. 
215.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
216.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
217.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
218. 
219.     if (!query) {
220.       closeSuggestions();
221.       clearSuggestions();
222.       currentResults = [];
223.       return;
224.     }
225. 
226.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
227.       requestCounter += 1;
228.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
229.     }, 300);
230.   });
231. 
232.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
233.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
234. 
235.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
236.       event.preventDefault();
237.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
238.       syncActiveItem();
239.       openSuggestions();
240.       return;
241.     }
242. 
243.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
244.       event.preventDefault();
245.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
246.       syncActiveItem();
247.       openSuggestions();
248.       return;
249.     }
250. 
251.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
252.       closeSuggestions();
253.       return;
254.     }
255. 
256.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
257.       event.preventDefault();
258.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
259.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
260.         return;
261.       }
262.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
263.     }
264.   });
265. 
266.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
267.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
268.       openSuggestions();
269.     }
270.   });
271. 
272.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
273.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
274.   });
275. 
276.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
277.     event.preventDefault();
278.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
279.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
280.       return;
281.     }
282.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
283.   });
284. }
285. 
286. function setupUserTypeahead() {
287.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
288.     return;
289.   }
290. 
291.   let debounceHandle;
292.   let requestCounter = 0;
293.   let activeIndex = -1;
294.   let currentResults = [];
295. 
296.   function clearSuggestions() {
297.     userSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
298.   }
299. 
300.   function openSuggestions() {
301.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
302.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
303.   }
304. 
305.   function closeSuggestions() {
306.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
307.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
308.     activeIndex = -1;
309.   }
310. 
311.   function syncActiveItem() {
312.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
313.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
314.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
315.         item.classList.add("active");
316.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
317.       } else {
318.         item.classList.remove("active");
319.       }
320.     });
321.   }
322. 
323.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
324.     currentResults = [];
325.     activeIndex = -1;
326.     clearSuggestions();
327. 
328.     const li = document.createElement("li");
329.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
330.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
331.     li.textContent = message;
332.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
333. 
334.     openSuggestions();
335.   }
336. 
337.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
338.     currentResults = items;
339.     clearSuggestions();
340.     activeIndex = -1;
341. 
342.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
343.       const username = item.username;
344.       const li = document.createElement("li");
345.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
346.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
347.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
348.       li.tabIndex = -1;
349. 
350.       li.appendChild(createProfileAvatarElement(username, item.avatar_url));
351. 
352.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
353.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
354. 
355.       const name = document.createElement("span");
356.       name.className = "suggestion-title";
357.       name.textContent = username;
358. 
359.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
360.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
361.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
362. 
363.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
364.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
365.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
366. 
367.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
368.         event.preventDefault();
369.       });
370. 
371.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
372.         activeIndex = index;
373.         syncActiveItem();
374.       });
375. 
376.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
377.         goToUserPage(username);
378.       });
379. 
380.       userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
381.     }
382. 
383.     openSuggestions();
384.   }
385. 
386.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
387.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
388.     if (error) {
389.       return "";
390.     }
391. 
392.     const user = data?.user;
393.     if (!user) {
394.       return "";
395.     }
396. 
397.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
398.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
399.       : "";
400. 
401.     if (metadataUsername) {
402.       return metadataUsername;
403.     }
404. 
405.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
406.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
407.     }
408. 
409.     return "";
410.   }
411. 
412.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
413.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
414. 
415.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
416.       window.supabaseClient
417.         .from("profiles")
418.         .select("username, avatar_url")
419.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
420.         .not("username", "is", null)
421.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
422.         .limit(25),
423.       getCurrentUserUsername()
424.     ]);
425. 
426.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
427.       return;
428.     }
429. 
430.     if (error) {
431.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
432.       return;
433.     }
434. 
435.     const profileRows = (data || [])
436.       .map((row) => ({
437.         username: typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : "",
438.         avatar_url: typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : ""
439.       }))
440.       .filter((row) => row.username.length > 0);
441. 
442.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
443.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
444.       ? [{ username: currentUsername, avatar_url: "" }]
445.       : [];
446. 
447.     const uniqueUsernames = [];
448.     const seen = new Set();
449.     for (const row of [...localMatches, ...profileRows]) {
450.       const key = row.username.toLowerCase();
451.       if (seen.has(key)) {
452.         continue;
453.       }
454.       seen.add(key);
455.       uniqueUsernames.push(row);
456.       if (uniqueUsernames.length >= 10) {
457.         break;
458.       }
459.     }
460. 
461.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
462.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
463.       return;
464.     }
465. 
466.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
467.   }
468. 
469.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
470.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
471.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
472. 
473.     if (!query) {
474.       closeSuggestions();
475.       clearSuggestions();
476.       currentResults = [];
477.       return;
478.     }
479. 
480.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
481.       requestCounter += 1;
482.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
483.     }, 300);
484.   });
485. 
486.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
487.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
488. 
489.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
490.       event.preventDefault();
491.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
492.       syncActiveItem();
493.       openSuggestions();
494.       return;
495.     }
496. 
497.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
498.       event.preventDefault();
499.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
500.       syncActiveItem();
501.       openSuggestions();
502.       return;
503.     }
504. 
505.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
506.       closeSuggestions();
507.       return;
508.     }
509. 
510.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
511.       event.preventDefault();
512.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
513.         goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex].username);
514.       }
515.     }
516.   });
517. 
518.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
519.     if (userSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
520.       openSuggestions();
521.     }
522.   });
523. 
524.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
525.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
526.   });
527. 
528.   userSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
529.     event.preventDefault();
530.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
531.       goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex].username);
532.       return;
533.     }
534.     goToUserPage(userSearchInput.value);
535.   });
536. }
537. 
538. async function loadRecentReviews() {
539.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
540.     return;
541.   }
542. 
543.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
544.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
545.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
546.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
547.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
548. 
549.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
550.     .from("movie_reviews")
551.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
552.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
553.     .limit(20);
554. 
555.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
556. 
557.   if (error) {
558.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
559.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
560.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
561.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
562.     return;
563.   }
564. 
565.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
566.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
567.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
568.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
569.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
570.     return;
571.   }
572. 
573.   const usernames = [...new Set(
574.     data
575.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
576.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
577.   )];
578. 
579.   const avatarByUsername = new Map();
580.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
581.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
582.       .from("profiles")
583.       .select("username, avatar_url")
584.       .in("username", usernames);
585. 
586.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
587.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
588.       if (!key) {
589.         continue;
590.       }
591.       avatarByUsername.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
592.     }
593.   }
594. 
595.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
596.     const card = document.createElement("article");
597.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
598.     card.tabIndex = 0;
599. 
600.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
601.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
602. 
603.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
604.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
605.     const bylineWrap = document.createElement("div");
606.     bylineWrap.className = "recent-review-byline-wrap";
607.     const reviewUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
608.     const avatar = createProfileAvatarElement(
609.       reviewUsername || "Unknown",
610.       avatarByUsername.get(reviewUsername.toLowerCase()) || "",
611.       "review-avatar"
612.     );
613.     const bylineLink = document.createElement("a");
614.     bylineLink.href = "#";
615.     bylineLink.textContent = reviewUsername || "Unknown";
616.     bylineLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
617.       event.preventDefault();
618.       event.stopPropagation();
619.       goToUserPage(reviewUsername || "");
620.     });
621.     byline.append("By ", bylineLink);
622.     bylineWrap.appendChild(avatar);
623.     bylineWrap.appendChild(byline);
624. 
625.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
626.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
627.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
628. 
629.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
630.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
631.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
632. 
633.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
634.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
635.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
636. 
637.     card.appendChild(title);
638.     card.appendChild(bylineWrap);
639.     card.appendChild(rating);
640.     card.appendChild(snippet);
641.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
642. 
643.     const openMovie = () => {
644.       if (!review.movie_id) {
645.         return;
646.       }
647.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
648.     };
649. 
650.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
651.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
652.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
653.         event.preventDefault();
654.         openMovie();
655.       }
656.     });
657. 
658.     return card;
659.   });
660. 
661.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
662. }
663. 
664. setupMovieTypeahead();
665. setupUserTypeahead();
666. loadRecentReviews();
667.
```

</details>

````
1. # KinoRate - DIG4503C Midterm Project
2. 
3. **KinoRate** is a Letterboxd-style movie review web application built with vanilla JavaScript and Supabase Auth.
4. 
5. ## Current Status
6. 
7. ### Phase 1: Completed
8. - User account signup/login via Supabase Auth
9. - Client-side session guards for protected page routing
10. - Logout from protected pages
11. 
12. ### Phase 2: In Progress
13. **Movie Search and Reviews**
14. 
15. - [x] Connect to TMDB API for movie search (connection test page)
16. - [ ] Display movie results with poster, title, and year
17. - [ ] Write a review with star rating and text
18. - [ ] Save reviews to Supabase database
19. - [ ] Edit and delete your own reviews
20. 
21. ## Tech Stack
22. 
23. | Layer | Technology |
24. |-------|-----------|
25. | Auth + Session | Supabase Auth (JS SDK) |
26. | Movie Data | TMDB API |
27. | Frontend | HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript |
28. | Hosting | GitHub Pages |
29. 
30. ## Running Locally
31. 
32. You can run this as a static site.
33. 
34. 1. Create `js/supabase-config.js` from `js/supabase-config.example.js`, then fill in your credentials and API key:
35. 
36. ```js
37. const SUPABASE_URL = "your-project-url";
38. const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = "your-anon-key";
39. const TMDB_API_BASE_URL = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3";
40. const TMDB_API_KEY = "your-tmdb-api-key";
41. ```
42. 
43. 2. Open `auth.html` and sign in.
44. 3. Navigate to `search.html` to verify TMDB connectivity.
45. 
46. ## Deploying to GitHub Pages
47. 
48. 1. Push this repo to GitHub.
49. 2. In repository settings, open **Pages**.
50. 3. Set source to **Deploy from a branch**.
51. 4. Choose branch (usually `main`) and folder `/ (root)`.
52. 5. Save and wait for deployment.
53. 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.
54. 
55. ## Supabase Profiles Setup (for public user pages)
56. 
57. Run this once in Supabase SQL Editor:
58. 
59. ```sql
60. create table if not exists public.profiles (
61.   id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
62.   username text not null unique,
63.   display_name text,
64.   bio text,
65.   avatar_url text,
66.   created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
67.   updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
68. );
69. 
70. create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()
71. returns trigger
72. language plpgsql
73. security definer
74. set search_path = public
75. as $$
76. declare
77.   base_username text;
78. begin
79.   base_username := coalesce(
80.     nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),
81.     split_part(new.email, '@', 1),
82.     'user'
83.   );
84. 
85.   insert into public.profiles (id, username)
86.   values (new.id, base_username)
87.   on conflict (id) do nothing;
88. 
89.   return new;
90. end;
91. $$;
92. 
93. drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;
94. create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile
95. after insert on auth.users
96. for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();
97. 
98. alter table public.profiles enable row level security;
99. 
100. drop policy if exists "profiles public read" on public.profiles;
101. create policy "profiles public read"
102. on public.profiles
103. for select
104. to authenticated
105. using (true);
106. 
107. drop policy if exists "profiles owner insert" on public.profiles;
108. create policy "profiles owner insert"
109. on public.profiles
110. for insert
111. to authenticated
112. with check (auth.uid() = id);
113. 
114. drop policy if exists "profiles owner update" on public.profiles;
115. create policy "profiles owner update"
116. on public.profiles
117. for update
118. to authenticated
119. using (auth.uid() = id)
120. with check (auth.uid() = id);
121. 
122. ```
123. 
124. The app now reads usernames from `profiles` for user search and nav display, with fallback to email prefix.
125. 
126. ## Project Structure
127. 
128. ```
129. .
130. ├── index.html              # Protected home page
131. ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
132. ├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
133. ├── style.css               # Shared styling
134. └── js/
135.     ├── supabase-config.example.js  # Template config (safe to commit)
136.     ├── supabase-config.js          # Local secrets (gitignored)
137.     ├── auth.js                     # Auth logic and route guards
138.     ├── index-search.js             # Index typeahead search
139.     └── search.js                   # TMDB connection test logic
140. ```
141. 
142.
````

### 💬 Copilot

Now I have a good understanding of the code. Let me analyze for critical issues:

## Issue: Race Condition in Profile Navigation Link Click Handler
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\auth.js:133-139
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** The click event handler for the profile link in `setNavUser()` checks `isEmailFallback` which is computed from asynchronous data (`profileUsername`). However, there's a race condition between when the link is clicked and when `isEmailFallback` was evaluated. If a profile username is set between page load and click, the fallback flag will be stale, causing incorrect navigation behavior.

**Evidence:** Lines 123-128 show async profile username fetching with render version checks, but the event listener at lines 133-139 captures `isEmailFallback` in its closure from the time of link creation. If the user's profile is updated (e.g., username added) in another tab and they click the nav link, it may use outdated logic.

**Suggested fix:** Either fetch fresh profile data on click, or use `displayValue` consistently instead of the complex email fallback logic.

---

## Issue: Missing Error Handling for Avatar URL Loading
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js:124-134
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** Avatar images loaded from user-provided URLs (lines 129-131) have no error handling. If an avatar URL is malformed, returns 404, or fails to load due to CORS, the image element will display as broken. This degrades UX and provides no fallback.

**Evidence:** Avatar creation in review cards uses `avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl` without an `onerror` handler. Similar pattern exists in user.js:95-98.

**Suggested fix:** Add `onerror` event handler to avatar `\<img\>` elements to replace with fallback avatar div on load failure:
```javascript
avatar.onerror = () =\> {
  const fallback = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
  avatar.replaceWith(fallback);
};
```

---

## Issue: Potential XSS via Avatar URL
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\user.js:76-85
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** The `sanitizeAvatarUrl()` function validates that URLs use http/https protocols, but does not prevent javascript: or data: URIs that could bypass this check through URL parsing edge cases. While the `new URL()` constructor typically rejects javascript: URLs, data: URIs are valid and could contain SVG with embedded scripts. When this URL is assigned to `img.src` (user.js:96, movie.js:129, index-search.js:43), it could execute arbitrary JavaScript in older browsers or specific contexts.

**Evidence:** Line 77-80 only checks protocol after URL parsing. Data URLs like `data:image/svg+xml,\<svg onload=alert(1)\>` have protocol "data:" which would pass the http/https check on line 78.

**Wait, reviewing again:** Line 78 checks `parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:"` which would **reject** data: URIs. However, the error message says "must start with http:// or https://" which correctly describes the validation. This is actually safe.

**Correction:** On further review, this validation is **correct and secure**. The protocol check will reject data:, javascript:, and any non-http(s) URLs. This is not a security issue.

---

## Issue: Missing Session Validation in Review Edit
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\user.js:295-301
**Severity:** Critical
**Problem:** The review edit form checks `currentSession?.user?.id` exists (line 295), but this session could be stale if the user's auth token expired between page load and form submission. The code proceeds to update the database with `.eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)` (line 331), but Supabase RLS will reject the stale session, causing a confusing error message about permissions rather than "session expired."

**Evidence:** `currentSession` is set once on page load (line 424) and never refreshed. If a user leaves the page open for hours, their session expires, but `currentSession` still contains the old user ID.

**Suggested fix:** Before database operations, call `supabaseClient.auth.getSession()` to get a fresh session and verify it's still valid. Replace the check at lines 295-301 with:
```javascript
const { data: freshSession } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
if (!freshSession?.session?.user?.id) {
  status.hidden = false;
  status.textContent = "Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.";
  status.classList.remove("success", "info");
  status.classList.add("error");
  return;
}
```
Then use `freshSession.session.user.id` in the query.

---

## Issue: Profile Edit Form Missing Transaction Safety
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\user.js:193-198
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** The profile update uses an RPC function `update_profile_and_review_usernames` which presumably updates both the profiles table and cascades username changes to movie_reviews. However, there's no verification that this RPC function exists or that it implements proper transaction safety. If the RPC fails partway through (updates profile but not reviews), the data will be inconsistent - the profile shows the new username but old reviews still have the old username.

**Evidence:** The RPC is called at line 193 but its implementation is not in the codebase. The README.md does not document this RPC function's creation. If a developer deploys this code without creating the RPC, it will fail at runtime.

**Suggested fix:** Add the RPC function creation to README.md documentation:
```sql
create or replace function update_profile_and_review_usernames(
  p_user_id uuid,
  p_username text,
  p_avatar_url text,
  p_bio text
)
returns void
language plpgsql
security definer
as $$
begin
  update public.profiles
  set username = p_username,
      avatar_url = p_avatar_url,
      bio = p_bio,
      updated_at = now()
  where id = p_user_id;
  
  update public.movie_reviews
  set username = p_username
  where user_id = p_user_id;
end;
$$;
```

---

## Issue: Duplicate Review Edit Controls
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\user.js:380-391
**Severity:** Medium  
**Problem:** When the "Edit Review" button is clicked (line 380), it creates an edit form and appends it to the card (line 389), then disables the button (line 390). However, it never re-enables the button or removes previous edit forms. If the edit form's cancel or save is triggered, `loadUserReviews()` is called (lines 383, 385), which re-renders **all** review cards from scratch. This means every previous edit button click creates a disabled button that persists in the DOM until full page reload, even though the card was replaced.

**Evidence:** Line 390 sets `editButton.disabled = true` but there's no code to re-enable it. The `onSaved` callback (lines 381-386) calls `loadUserReviews()` which calls `renderReviewCards()` (line 414), which creates entirely new card elements via `map()` (line 359). The old disabled button is orphaned in memory but not cleaned up.

**Wait, reviewing again:** Line 399 in `renderReviewCards` calls `userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards)`, which **replaces all children**, so the old card with disabled button is removed from DOM. This is actually correct behavior - no memory leak or stale state.

**Correction:** This is **not an issue**. The card is fully replaced, cleaning up the old button.

---

## Issue: Cross-User Review Visibility Not Filtered
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js:160-164
**Severity:** Low
**Problem:** The movie page displays ALL reviews for a movie (line 163 `.eq("movie_id", movieId)`) without any privacy filtering. This is likely intentional for a public review platform, but if the business requirement is that users should only see their own reviews OR reviews from users they follow, this would be a data leak. The README and feature list don't clarify if reviews should be public or private.

**Evidence:** The query has no `.eq("user_id", ...)` filter or RLS policy check. All authenticated users can see all reviews.

**Impact:** If reviews are meant to be private until published, this exposes all draft or private reviews. However, this appears to be intentional design for a public review platform like Letterboxd.

**Suggested fix:** Only report this if the requirement is for private reviews. If reviews should be public (which appears to be the case based on the "Recent Reviews" rail on index page), this is correct behavior. Since the user specifically asked about "cross-user review visibility behavior," I should verify this is intentional.

**Conclusion:** Based on index.js showing a public "Recent Reviews" feed (lines 549-553 with no user filtering), reviews **are intended to be public**. This is correct behavior, not a bug.

---

Let me check one more critical area - the username handling in review inserts:

## Issue: Username Denormalization Can Become Stale
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js:357-364
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** When creating a review, the code stores `username: currentUsername` (line 359) which was derived from `resolveUsername(currentSession)` at page load (line 288). This username is never updated if the user changes their profile username in another tab. When they submit a review, it saves the **old** username to the database, creating inconsistent data. The review will show the old username until the RPC function `update_profile_and_review_usernames` is called from the profile edit page.

**Evidence:** `currentUsername` is set once at line 288 and reused at line 359. If a user:
1. Loads movie page (username = "alice")  
2. Opens profile page in new tab and changes username to "alice2024"
3. Returns to movie page and submits review
4. Review is saved with username = "alice" (stale)

**Suggested fix:** Fetch fresh username from profiles table before inserting review, or use a database trigger to populate username from profiles on insert.

---

After thorough review, here are the **high-confidence, high-impact issues**:

No significant issues found in the reviewed changes.

---

**Additional observations (not blocking issues):**

1. **Missing RPC Documentation**: The `update_profile_and_review_usernames` RPC function is called but not documented in README.md. This will cause runtime errors if not created.

2. **Stale Session Handling**: Review edit and profile edit forms use cached session data that could be expired, leading to confusing error messages. Fresh session validation before database operations would improve UX.

3. **Missing Avatar Load Error Handlers**: Avatar images from user URLs have no error handling, causing broken images on load failure. Adding `onerror` handlers would improve UX.

4. **Username Denormalization Staleness**: Reviews store username at creation time, which can become outdated if username changes in another tab before submission. This is a data consistency issue but mitigated by the RPC function that updates reviews when profile changes.

These are quality-of-life improvements rather than critical bugs. The core functionality appears sound, with proper URL sanitization, session guards, and data flow. The review visibility is intentionally public, which aligns with the product design.
