```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. 
13. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
14. 
15. let currentMovie = null;
16. let currentSession = null;
17. let currentUsername = "Current User";
18. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
19. const profileAvatarCache = new Map();
20. 
21. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
22.   if (!movieStatus) {
23.     return;
24.   }
25.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
26.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
27.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
28. }
29. 
30. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
31.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34. 
35.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
36.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
37.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
38.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
39. }
40. 
41. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
42.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
43.     return;
44.   }
45.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
46.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
47.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
48. }
49. 
50. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
51.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
52.   if (className) {
53.     el.className = className;
54.   }
55.   if (typeof text === "string") {
56.     el.textContent = text;
57.   }
58.   return el;
59. }
60. 
61. function getYear(dateString) {
62.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
63. }
64. 
65. function getDirector(credits) {
66.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
67.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
68.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
69. }
70. 
71. function getCast(credits) {
72.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
73.   if (cast.length === 0) {
74.     return "Unknown";
75.   }
76.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
77. }
78. 
79. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
80.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
81.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
82.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
83.   p.appendChild(strong);
84.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
85.   return p;
86. }
87. 
88. function resolveUsername(session) {
89.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
90.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
91.     return metadata.username.trim();
92.   }
93.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
94.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
95.   }
96.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
97.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
98.   }
99.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
100.   if (email.includes("@")) {
101.     return email.split("@")[0];
102.   }
103.   return "Current User";
104. }
105. 
106. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
107.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
108. }
109. 
110. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
111.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
112.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
113.     return;
114.   }
115. 
116.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
117.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
118.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
119.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
120.       ? storedUsername
121.       : "Unknown User";
122.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
123.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
124.     let avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
125.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
126.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
127. 
128.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
129.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
130.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
131.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
132.     } else {
133.       avatar = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
134.     }
135. 
136.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
137.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
138.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
139.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
140.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
141.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
142.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
143.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
144. 
145.     avatarWrap.appendChild(avatar);
146.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
147.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
148.     card.appendChild(heading);
149.     card.appendChild(body);
150.     card.appendChild(stamp);
151.     return card;
152.   });
153. 
154.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
155. }
156. 
157. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
158.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
159. 
160.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
161.     .from("movie_reviews")
162.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
163.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
164.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
165. 
166.   if (error) {
167.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
168.     return;
169.   }
170. 
171.   const usernames = [...new Set(
172.     (data || [])
173.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
174.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
175.   )];
176. 
177.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
178.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
179.       .from("profiles")
180.       .select("username, avatar_url")
181.       .in("username", usernames);
182. 
183.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
184.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
185.       if (!key) {
186.         continue;
187.       }
188.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
189.     }
190.   }
191. 
192.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
193. }
194. 
195. function openReviewModal() {
196.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
197.     return;
198.   }
199. 
200.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
201.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
202.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
203.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
204.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
205. 
206.   clearReviewFormStatus();
207.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
208. }
209. 
210. function closeReviewModal() {
211.   if (!reviewModal) {
212.     return;
213.   }
214.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
215.   clearReviewFormStatus();
216. }
217. 
218. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
219.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
220.   currentMovie = movie;
221. 
222.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
223.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
224.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
225.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
226. 
227.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
228.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
229.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
230.     poster.loading = "lazy";
231.   }
232. 
233.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
234.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
235.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
236.   heading.appendChild(year);
237. 
238.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
239.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
240.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
241.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
242.     : "Genres unavailable";
243. 
244.   content.appendChild(heading);
245.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
246.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
247.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
248.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
249.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
250.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
251.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
252. 
253.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
254.   reviewButton.type = "button";
255.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
256.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
257. 
258.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
259.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
260. }
261. 
262. async function loadMoviePage() {
263.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
264.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
265. 
266.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
267.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
268.     return;
269.   }
270. 
271.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
272.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
273.     return;
274.   }
275. 
276.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
277.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
278.     return;
279.   }
280. 
281.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
282.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
283.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
284.     return;
285.   }
286. 
287.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
288.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
289.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
290. 
291.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
292. 
293.   try {
294.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
295.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
296.     const payload = await response.json();
297. 
298.     if (!response.ok) {
299.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
300.     }
301. 
302.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
303.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
304.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
305.   } catch (error) {
306.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
307.   }
308. }
309. 
310. if (reviewModalClose) {
311.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
312. }
313. 
314. if (reviewModal) {
315.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
316.     const target = event.target;
317.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
318.       closeReviewModal();
319.     }
320.   });
321. }
322. 
323. if (reviewForm) {
324.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
325.     event.preventDefault();
326. 
327.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
328.       return;
329.     }
330. 
331.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
332. 
333.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
334.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
335.       return;
336.     }
337. 
338.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
339.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
340. 
341.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
342.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
343.       return;
344.     }
345. 
346.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
347.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
348.       return;
349.     }
350. 
351.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
352.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
353.     if (submitButton) {
354.       submitButton.disabled = true;
355.     }
356. 
357.     const payload = {
358.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
359.       username: currentUsername,
360.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
361.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
362.       rating: ratingValue,
363.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
364.     };
365. 
366.     try {
367.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
368.         .from("movie_reviews")
369.         .insert(payload);
370. 
371.       if (error) {
372.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
373.         return;
374.       }
375. 
376.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
377.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
378.       reviewForm.reset();
379.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
380.     } finally {
381.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
382.       if (submitButton) {
383.         submitButton.disabled = false;
384.       }
385.     }
386.   });
387. }
388. 
389. loadMoviePage();
390.
```

</details>

```
1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. 
5. let currentSession = null;
6. let viewedProfile = null;
7. let isOwnerView = false;
8. 
9. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
10.   if (!userPageStatus) {
11.     return;
12.   }
13.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
14.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
15.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
16. }
17. 
18. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
19.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
20.   if (className) {
21.     element.className = className;
22.   }
23.   if (typeof text === "string") {
24.     element.textContent = text;
25.   }
26.   return element;
27. }
28. 
29. function getProfileParam() {
30.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
31.   const username = params.get("username");
32.   const userId = params.get("id");
33. 
34.   if (username && username.trim()) {
35.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
36.   }
37. 
38.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
39.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
40.   }
41. 
42.   return null;
43. }
44. 
45. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
46.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
47.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
48.     return metadata.username.trim();
49.   }
50.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
51.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
52.   }
53.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
54.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
55.   }
56.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
57.   if (email.includes("@")) {
58.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
59.   }
60.   return "";
61. }
62. 
63. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
64.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
65.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
66.   }
67.   return "";
68. }
69. 
70. function sanitizeAvatarUrl(rawValue) {
71.   const value = typeof rawValue === "string" ? rawValue.trim() : "";
72.   if (!value) {
73.     return { ok: true, value: "" };
74.   }
75. 
76.   try {
77.     const parsed = new URL(value);
78.     if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
79.       return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://." };
80.     }
81.     return { ok: true, value: parsed.toString() };
82.   } catch {
83.     return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL is invalid." };
84.   }
85. }
86. 
87. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
88.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
89. 
90.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
91.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
92.   let avatar;
93. 
94.   if (avatarUrl) {
95.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
96.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
97.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
98.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
99.   } else {
100.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
101.   }
102. 
103.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
104.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
105.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
106. 
107.   body.appendChild(heading);
108.   body.appendChild(bio);
109. 
110.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
111.   wrap.appendChild(body);
112. 
113.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
114. }
115. 
116. function buildProfileEditForm(profile, onSaved) {
117.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
118.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
119. 
120.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
121.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
122.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
123.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
124.   usernameInput.name = "username";
125.   usernameInput.required = true;
126.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
127.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
128. 
129.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
130.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
131.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
132.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
133.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
134.   avatarInput.type = "url";
135.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
136.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
137. 
138.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
139.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
140.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
141.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
142.   bioInput.name = "bio";
143.   bioInput.rows = 4;
144.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
145.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
146. 
147.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
148.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
149.   status.hidden = true;
150. 
151.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
152.   saveButton.type = "submit";
153. 
154.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
155.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
156.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
157.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
158.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
159.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
160.   form.appendChild(status);
161.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
162. 
163.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
164.     event.preventDefault();
165. 
166.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
167.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
168.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
169. 
170.     if (!nextUsername) {
171.       status.hidden = false;
172.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
173.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
174.       status.classList.add("error");
175.       return;
176.     }
177. 
178.     const avatarCheck = sanitizeAvatarUrl(nextAvatar);
179.     if (!avatarCheck.ok) {
180.       status.hidden = false;
181.       status.textContent = avatarCheck.error;
182.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
183.       status.classList.add("error");
184.       return;
185.     }
186. 
187.     status.hidden = false;
188.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
189.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
190.     status.classList.add("info");
191. 
192.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
193.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.rpc("update_profile_and_review_usernames", {
194.       p_user_id: profile.id,
195.       p_username: nextUsername,
196.       p_avatar_url: avatarCheck.value || null,
197.       p_bio: nextBio || null
198.     });
199. 
200.     if (error) {
201.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
202.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
203.       status.classList.add("error");
204.       return;
205.     }
206. 
207.     profile.username = nextUsername;
208.     profile.avatar_url = avatarCheck.value || null;
209.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
210. 
211.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
212.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
213.     status.classList.add("success");
214. 
215.     if (typeof onSaved === "function") {
216.       await onSaved(oldUsername !== nextUsername);
217.     }
218.   });
219. 
220.   return form;
221. }
222. 
223. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
224.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
225.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
226.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
227.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
228.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
229. 
230.   let editForm = null;
231. 
232.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
233.     if (editForm) {
234.       editForm.remove();
235.       editForm = null;
236.       editToggleButton.textContent = "Edit Profile";
237.       return;
238.     }
239. 
240.     editForm = buildProfileEditForm(profile, async (usernameChanged) => {
241.       renderProfileHeader(profile);
242.       renderOwnerControls(profile);
243.       if (usernameChanged) {
244.         window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(profile.username)}`);
245.       }
246.       await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
247.     });
248. 
249.     userProfileCard.appendChild(editForm);
250.     editToggleButton.textContent = "Hide Edit Profile";
251.   });
252. }
253. 
254. function buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {
255.   const form = makeElement("form", "review-inline-edit-form");
256. 
257.   const ratingLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Rating (1-10)");
258.   const ratingInput = makeElement("input", "");
259.   ratingInput.type = "number";
260.   ratingInput.min = "1";
261.   ratingInput.max = "10";
262.   ratingInput.step = "1";
263.   ratingInput.required = true;
264.   ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));
265. 
266.   const textLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Review text");
267.   const textInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
268.   textInput.rows = 4;
269.   textInput.maxLength = 3000;
270.   textInput.required = true;
271.   textInput.value = review.review_text || "";
272. 
273.   const controls = makeElement("div", "review-inline-edit-controls");
274.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Review");
275.   saveButton.type = "submit";
276.   const cancelButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Cancel");
277.   cancelButton.type = "button";
278. 
279.   controls.appendChild(saveButton);
280.   controls.appendChild(cancelButton);
281. 
282.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
283.   status.hidden = true;
284. 
285.   cancelButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
286.     onSaved(false);
287.   });
288. 
289.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
290.     event.preventDefault();
291. 
292.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);
293.     const nextText = textInput.value.trim();
294. 
295.     if (!currentSession?.user?.id) {
296.       status.hidden = false;
297.       status.textContent = "Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.";
298.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
299.       status.classList.add("error");
300.       return;
301.     }
302. 
303.     if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {
304.       status.hidden = false;
305.       status.textContent = "Rating must be between 1 and 10.";
306.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
307.       status.classList.add("error");
308.       return;
309.     }
310. 
311.     if (nextText.length < 5) {
312.       status.hidden = false;
313.       status.textContent = "Review text must be at least 5 characters.";
314.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
315.       status.classList.add("error");
316.       return;
317.     }
318. 
319.     status.hidden = false;
320.     status.textContent = "Saving review...";
321.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
322.     status.classList.add("info");
323. 
324.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
325.       .from("movie_reviews")
326.       .update({
327.         rating: nextRating,
328.         review_text: nextText,
329.       })
330.       .eq("id", review.id)
331.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
332. 
333.     if (error) {
334.       status.textContent = `Could not update review: ${error.message}`;
335.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
336.       status.classList.add("error");
337.       return;
338.     }
339. 
340.     onSaved(true);
341.   });
342. 
343.   form.appendChild(ratingLabel);
344.   form.appendChild(ratingInput);
345.   form.appendChild(textLabel);
346.   form.appendChild(textInput);
347.   form.appendChild(status);
348.   form.appendChild(controls);
349. 
350.   return form;
351. }
352. 
353. function renderReviewCards(reviews) {
354.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
355.     userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet."));
356.     return;
357.   }
358. 
359.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
360.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
361. 
362.     const title = makeElement("h3", "user-review-movie-title", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
363.     const titleLink = makeElement("a", "", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
364.     titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || ""))}`;
365.     title.replaceChildren(titleLink);
366. 
367.     const rating = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
368.     const text = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
369.     const date = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : "");
370. 
371.     card.appendChild(title);
372.     card.appendChild(rating);
373.     card.appendChild(text);
374.     card.appendChild(date);
375. 
376.     if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
377.       const editButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Review");
378.       editButton.type = "button";
379. 
380.       editButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
381.         const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {
382.           if (saved) {
383.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
384.           } else {
385.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
386.           }
387.         });
388. 
389.         card.appendChild(editForm);
390.         editButton.disabled = true;
391.       });
392. 
393.       card.appendChild(editButton);
394.     }
395. 
396.     return card;
397.   });
398. 
399.   userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);
400. }
401. 
402. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
403.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
404.     .from("movie_reviews")
405.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
406.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
407.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
408. 
409.   if (error) {
410.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
411.     return;
412.   }
413. 
414.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
415. }
416. 
417. async function loadProfile() {
418.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
419.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
420.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
421.     return;
422.   }
423. 
424.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
425. 
426.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
427.   let profile;
428.   let profileError;
429. 
430.   if (!profileQuery) {
431.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
432.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
433.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
434.       return;
435.     }
436. 
437.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
438.       .from("profiles")
439.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
440.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
441.       .maybeSingle());
442.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
443.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
444.       .from("profiles")
445.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
446.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
447.       .maybeSingle());
448.   } else {
449.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
450.       .from("profiles")
451.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
452.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
453.       .maybeSingle());
454.   }
455. 
456.   if (profileError) {
457.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
458.     return;
459.   }
460. 
461.   if (!profile?.id) {
462.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
463.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
464.     return;
465.   }
466. 
467.   viewedProfile = profile;
468.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
469. 
470.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
471. 
472.   if (isOwnerView) {
473.     renderOwnerControls(profile);
474.   }
475. 
476.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
477.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
478. }
479. 
480. loadProfile();
481.
```

</details>

```
1020.   color: var(--accent-alt);
1021.   text-decoration: none;
1022. }
1023. 
1024. .recent-review-byline a:hover,

1028.
```

```
1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. 
5. let currentSession = null;
6. let viewedProfile = null;

8. 
9. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
10.   if (!userPageStatus) {
11.     return;
12.   }
13.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
14.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
15.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
16. }
17. 
18. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
19.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
20.   if (className) {
21.     element.className = className;
22.   }
23.   if (typeof text === "string") {
24.     element.textContent = text;
25.   }
26.   return element;
27. }
28. 
29. function getProfileParam() {
30.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
31.   const username = params.get("username");
32.   const userId = params.get("id");
33. 
34.   if (username && username.trim()) {
35.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
36.   }
37. 
38.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
39.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
40.   }
41. 
42.   return null;
43. }
44. 
45. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
46.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
47.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
48.     return metadata.username.trim();
49.   }
50.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
51.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
52.   }
53.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
54.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
55.   }
56.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
57.   if (email.includes("@")) {
58.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
59.   }
60.   return "";
61. }
62. 
63. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
64.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
65.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
66.   }
67.   return "";
68. }
69. 
70. function sanitizeAvatarUrl(rawValue) {
71.   const value = typeof rawValue === "string" ? rawValue.trim() : "";
72.   if (!value) {
73.     return { ok: true, value: "" };
74.   }
75. 
76.   try {
77.     const parsed = new URL(value);
78.     if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
79.       return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://." };
80.     }
81.     return { ok: true, value: parsed.toString() };
82.   } catch {
83.     return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL is invalid." };
84.   }
85. }
86. 
87. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
88.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
89. 
90.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
91.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
92.   let avatar;
93. 
94.   if (avatarUrl) {
95.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
96.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
97.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
98.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
99.   } else {
100.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
101.   }
102. 
103.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
104.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
105.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
106. 
107.   body.appendChild(heading);
108.   body.appendChild(bio);
109. 
110.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
111.   wrap.appendChild(body);
112. 
113.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
114. }

117.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
118.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
119. 
120.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
```

```
254. function buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {

264.   ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));
265. 
266.   const textLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Review text");
267.   const textInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
268.   textInput.rows = 4;
269.   textInput.maxLength = 3000;
270.   textInput.required = true;
271.   textInput.value = review.review_text || "";
272. 
273.   const controls = makeElement("div", "review-inline-edit-controls");
274.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Review");
275.   saveButton.type = "submit";
276.   const cancelButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Cancel");
277.   cancelButton.type = "button";
278. 
279.   controls.appendChild(saveButton);
280.   controls.appendChild(cancelButton);
281. 
282.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
283.   status.hidden = true;
284. 
285.   cancelButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
286.     onSaved(false);
287.   });
288. 
289.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
290.     event.preventDefault();
291. 
292.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);
293.     const nextText = textInput.value.trim();
294. 
295.     if (!currentSession?.user?.id) {
296.       status.hidden = false;
297.       status.textContent = "Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.";
298.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
299.       status.classList.add("error");
300.       return;
301.     }
302. 
303.     if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {
304.       status.hidden = false;
305.       status.textContent = "Rating must be between 1 and 10.";
306.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
307.       status.classList.add("error");
308.       return;
309.     }
310. 
311.     if (nextText.length < 5) {
312.       status.hidden = false;
313.       status.textContent = "Review text must be at least 5 characters.";
314.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
315.       status.classList.add("error");
316.       return;
317.     }
318. 
319.     status.hidden = false;
320.     status.textContent = "Saving review...";
```

```
402. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
403.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
404.     .from("movie_reviews")
405.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
406.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
407.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
408. 
409.   if (error) {
410.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
411.     return;
412.   }
413. 
414.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
415. }
416. 
417. async function loadProfile() {
418.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
419.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
420.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
421.     return;
422.   }
423. 
424.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
425. 
426.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
427.   let profile;
428.   let profileError;
429. 
430.   if (!profileQuery) {
431.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
432.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
433.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
434.       return;
435.     }
436. 
437.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
438.       .from("profiles")
439.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
440.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
441.       .maybeSingle());
442.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
443.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
444.       .from("profiles")
445.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
446.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
447.       .maybeSingle());
448.   } else {
449.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
450.       .from("profiles")
451.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
452.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
453.       .maybeSingle());
454.   }
455. 
456.   if (profileError) {
457.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
458.     return;
459.   }
460. 
461.   if (!profile?.id) {
462.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
463.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
464.     return;
465.   }
466. 
467.   viewedProfile = profile;
468.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
469. 
470.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
471. 
472.   if (isOwnerView) {
473.     renderOwnerControls(profile);
474.   }
475. 
476.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
477.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
478. }
479. 
480. loadProfile();
481.
```

```diff
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */        
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);       
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);      
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);  
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.movie-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 280px;
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.movie-poster-fallback {
+  min-height: 420px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.write-review-btn {
+  margin-top: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.movie-reviews-placeholder {
+  margin-top: 2rem;
+}
+
+.reviews-empty-box {
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.1rem;
+  text-align: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 860px) {
+  .movie-detail-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .movie-poster,
+  .movie-poster-fallback {
+    max-width: 220px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.reviews-list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-card {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-byline {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  margin-bottom: 0.32rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-rating {
+  font-weight: 700;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-text {
+  color: #d5dce8;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+}
+
+.user-review-date {
+  margin-top: 0.5rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 400;
+}
+
+.review-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.review-modal-content {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-close {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0.7rem;
+  right: 0.7rem;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 7px;
+  padding: 0.2rem 0.45rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.review-modal-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 94px 1fr;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  align-items: center;
+  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-poster {
+  width: 94px;
+  height: 140px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 8px;

+}
+
+.review-modal-subtitle {

+}
+
+.review-form {

+
+.review-form label {

+
+.review-form input,
+.review-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.review-form textarea {
+  resize: vertical;

+.review-form input:focus,
+.review-form textarea:focus {

+}

+.hero-search {

+.hero-user-search {

+}
+
+.hero-search label {

+
+.recent-reviews {

+}
+
+.recent-reviews-rail {

+.recent-review-card {
```

<sub>⏱️ 1488m 32s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Implemented ✅ Top 5 favorites feature end-to-end.

### What’s now working

- **Movie page**
  - Added **“Add to Top Five”** button.
  - Enforces max 5 favorites per user.
  - Prevents duplicates.
  - Shows status feedback (`#favorite-form-status`).

- **Profile page**
  - Replaced placeholder with a real favorites grid.
  - Shows favorite **posters + titles + links** to `movie.html?id=...`.
  - Owner gets **Edit Favorites** toggle.
  - In edit mode, owner sees **Remove** button per favorite.

### Important SQL to run in Supabase (once)

```sql
create table if not exists public.user_favorites (
  id bigint generated always as identity primary key,
  user_id uuid not null references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
  movie_id integer not null,
  movie_title text not null,
  poster_path text,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
  unique (user_id, movie_id)
);

alter table public.user_favorites enable row level security;

drop policy if exists "user_favorites read authenticated" on public.user_favorites;
create policy "user_favorites read authenticated"
on public.user_favorites
for select
to authenticated
using (true);

drop policy if exists "user_favorites owner insert" on public.user_favorites;
create policy "user_favorites owner insert"
on public.user_favorites
for insert
to authenticated
with check (auth.uid() = user_id);

drop policy if exists "user_favorites owner delete" on public.user_favorites;
create policy "user_favorites owner delete"
on public.user_favorites
for delete
to authenticated
using (auth.uid() = user_id);
```

If you want, next I can add drag/drop or ordering controls (rank 1–5).

```
1. const movieStatus = document.getElementById("movie-status");
2. const movieDetailCard = document.getElementById("movie-detail-card");
3. const movieUserReviews = document.getElementById("movie-user-reviews");
4. const reviewModal = document.getElementById("review-modal");
5. const reviewModalClose = document.getElementById("review-modal-close");
6. const reviewModalPoster = document.getElementById("review-modal-poster");
7. const reviewModalSubtitle = document.getElementById("review-modal-subtitle");
8. const reviewForm = document.getElementById("review-form");
9. const reviewRatingInput = document.getElementById("review-rating");
10. const reviewTextInput = document.getElementById("review-text");
11. const reviewFormStatus = document.getElementById("review-form-status");
12. const favoriteFormStatus = document.getElementById("favorite-form-status");
13. 
14. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500";
15. 
16. let currentMovie = null;
17. let currentSession = null;
18. let currentUsername = "Current User";
19. let isReviewSubmitting = false;
20. let isFavoriteSubmitting = false;
21. const profileAvatarCache = new Map();
22. 
23. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
24.   if (!movieStatus) {
25.     return;
26.   }
27.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
28.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
29.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
30. }
31. 
32. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
33.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
34.     return;
35.   }
36. 
37.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
38.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
39.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
40.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
41. }
42. 
43. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
44.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
45.     return;
46.   }
47.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
48.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
49.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
50. }
51. 
52. function setFavoriteStatus(message, kind = "info") {
53.   if (!favoriteFormStatus) {
54.     return;
55.   }
56.   favoriteFormStatus.hidden = false;
57.   favoriteFormStatus.textContent = message;
58.   favoriteFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
59.   favoriteFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
60. }
61. 
62. async function saveFavoriteMovie(movie) {
63.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !movie?.id) {
64.     setFavoriteStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
65.     return;
66.   }
67. 
68.   if (isFavoriteSubmitting) {
69.     return;
70.   }
71. 
72.   isFavoriteSubmitting = true;
73.   setFavoriteStatus("Saving favorite...", "info");
74. 
75.   try {
76.     const { data: existingFavorites, error: existingError } = await window.supabaseClient
77.       .from("user_favorites")
78.       .select("id, movie_id")
79.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)
80.       .order("created_at", { ascending: true });
81. 
82.     if (existingError) {
83.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not check favorites: ${existingError.message}`, "error");
84.       return;
85.     }
86. 
87.     const favorites = existingFavorites || [];
88.     if (favorites.some((favorite) => favorite.movie_id === movie.id)) {
89.       setFavoriteStatus("This movie is already in your top five.", "info");
90.       return;
91.     }
92. 
93.     if (favorites.length >= 5) {
94.       setFavoriteStatus("You can only have five favorite movies.", "error");
95.       return;
96.     }
97. 
98.     const { error: insertError } = await window.supabaseClient
99.       .from("user_favorites")
100.       .insert({
101.         user_id: currentSession.user.id,
102.         movie_id: movie.id,
103.         movie_title: movie.title || "Untitled",
104.         poster_path: typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : null,
105.       });
106. 
107.     if (insertError) {
108.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not save favorite: ${insertError.message}`, "error");
109.       return;
110.     }
111. 
112.     setFavoriteStatus("Added to your top five favorites.", "success");
113.   } finally {
114.     isFavoriteSubmitting = false;
115.   }
116. }
117. 
118. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
119.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
120.   if (className) {
121.     el.className = className;
122.   }
123.   if (typeof text === "string") {
124.     el.textContent = text;
125.   }
126.   return el;
127. }
128. 
129. function getYear(dateString) {
130.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
131. }
132. 
133. function getDirector(credits) {
134.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
135.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
136.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
137. }
138. 
139. function getCast(credits) {
140.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
141.   if (cast.length === 0) {
142.     return "Unknown";
143.   }
144.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
145. }
146. 
147. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
148.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
149.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
150.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
151.   p.appendChild(strong);
152.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
153.   return p;
154. }
155. 
156. function resolveUsername(session) {
157.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
158.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
159.     return metadata.username.trim();
160.   }
161.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
162.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
163.   }
164.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
165.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
166.   }
167.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
168.   if (email.includes("@")) {
169.     return email.split("@")[0];
170.   }
171.   return "Current User";
172. }
173. 
174. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
175.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
176. }
177. 
178. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
179.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
180.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
181.     return;
182.   }
183. 
184.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
185.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
186.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
187.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
188.       ? storedUsername
189.       : "Unknown User";
190.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
191.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
192.     let avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
193.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
194.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
195. 
196.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
197.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
198.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
199.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
200.     } else {
201.       avatar = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
202.     }
203. 
204.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
205.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
206.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
207.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
208.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
209.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
210.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
211.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
212. 
213.     avatarWrap.appendChild(avatar);
214.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
215.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
216.     card.appendChild(heading);
217.     card.appendChild(body);
218.     card.appendChild(stamp);
219.     return card;
220.   });
221. 
222.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
223. }
224. 
225. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
226.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
227. 
228.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
229.     .from("movie_reviews")
230.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
231.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
232.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
233. 
234.   if (error) {
235.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
236.     return;
237.   }
238. 
239.   const usernames = [...new Set(
240.     (data || [])
241.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
242.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
243.   )];
244. 
245.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
246.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
247.       .from("profiles")
248.       .select("username, avatar_url")
249.       .in("username", usernames);
250. 
251.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
252.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
253.       if (!key) {
254.         continue;
255.       }
256.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
257.     }
258.   }
259. 
260.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
261. }
262. 
263. function openReviewModal() {
264.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
265.     return;
266.   }
267. 
268.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
269.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
270.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
271.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
272.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
273. 
274.   clearReviewFormStatus();
275.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
276. }
277. 
278. function closeReviewModal() {
279.   if (!reviewModal) {
280.     return;
281.   }
282.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
283.   clearReviewFormStatus();
284. }
285. 
286. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
287.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
288.   currentMovie = movie;
289. 
290.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
291.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
292.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
293.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
294. 
295.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
296.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
297.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
298.     poster.loading = "lazy";
299.   }
300. 
301.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
302.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
303.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
304.   heading.appendChild(year);
305. 
306.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
307.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
308.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
309.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
310.     : "Genres unavailable";
311. 
312.   content.appendChild(heading);
313.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
314.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
315.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
316.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
317.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
318.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
319.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
320. 
321.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
322.   reviewButton.type = "button";
323.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
324.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
325. 
326.   const favoriteButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline write-review-btn", "Add to Top Five");
327.   favoriteButton.type = "button";
328.   favoriteButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
329.     saveFavoriteMovie(movie);
330.   });
331.   content.appendChild(favoriteButton);
332. 
333.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
334.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
335. }
336. 
337. async function loadMoviePage() {
338.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
339.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
340. 
341.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
342.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
343.     return;
344.   }
345. 
346.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
347.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
348.     return;
349.   }
350. 
351.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
352.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
353.     return;
354.   }
355. 
356.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
357.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
358.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
359.     return;
360.   }
361. 
362.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
363.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
364.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
365. 
366.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
367. 
368.   try {
369.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
370.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
371.     const payload = await response.json();
372. 
373.     if (!response.ok) {
374.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
375.     }
376. 
377.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
378.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
379.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
380.   } catch (error) {
381.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
382.   }
383. }
384. 
385. if (reviewModalClose) {
386.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
387. }
388. 
389. if (reviewModal) {
390.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
391.     const target = event.target;
392.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
393.       closeReviewModal();
394.     }
395.   });
396. }
397. 
398. if (reviewForm) {
399.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
400.     event.preventDefault();
401. 
402.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
403.       return;
404.     }
405. 
406.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
407. 
408.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
409.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
410.       return;
411.     }
412. 
413.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
414.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
415. 
416.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
417.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
418.       return;
419.     }
420. 
421.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
422.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
423.       return;
424.     }
425. 
426.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
427.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
428.     if (submitButton) {
429.       submitButton.disabled = true;
430.     }
431. 
432.     const payload = {
433.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
434.       username: currentUsername,
435.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
436.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
437.       rating: ratingValue,
438.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
439.     };
440. 
441.     try {
442.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
443.         .from("movie_reviews")
444.         .insert(payload);
445. 
446.       if (error) {
447.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
448.         return;
449.       }
450. 
451.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
452.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
453.       reviewForm.reset();
454.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
455.     } finally {
456.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
457.       if (submitButton) {
458.         submitButton.disabled = false;
459.       }
460.     }
461.   });
462. }
463. 
464. loadMoviePage();
465.
```

</details>
