```
1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. const userFavoritesGrid = document.getElementById("user-favorites-grid");
5. 
6. let currentSession = null;
7. let viewedProfile = null;
8. let isOwnerView = false;
9. let isFavoritesEditMode = false;
10. 
11. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
12.   if (!userPageStatus) {
13.     return;
14.   }
15.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
16.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
17.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
18. }
19. 
20. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
21.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
22.   if (className) {
23.     element.className = className;
24.   }
25.   if (typeof text === "string") {
26.     element.textContent = text;
27.   }
28.   return element;
29. }
30. 
31. function getProfileParam() {
32.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
33.   const username = params.get("username");
34.   const userId = params.get("id");
35. 
36.   if (username && username.trim()) {
37.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
38.   }
39. 
40.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
41.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
42.   }
43. 
44.   return null;
45. }
46. 
47. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
48.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
49.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
50.     return metadata.username.trim();
51.   }
52.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
53.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
54.   }
55.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
56.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
57.   }
58.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
59.   if (email.includes("@")) {
60.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
61.   }
62.   return "";
63. }
64. 
65. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
66.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
67.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
68.   }
69.   return "";
70. }
71. 
72. function sanitizeAvatarUrl(rawValue) {
73.   const value = typeof rawValue === "string" ? rawValue.trim() : "";
74.   if (!value) {
75.     return { ok: true, value: "" };
76.   }
77. 
78.   try {
79.     const parsed = new URL(value);
80.     if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
81.       return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://." };
82.     }
83.     return { ok: true, value: parsed.toString() };
84.   } catch {
85.     return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL is invalid." };
86.   }
87. }
88. 
89. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
90.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
91. 
92.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
93.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
94.   let avatar;
95. 
96.   if (avatarUrl) {
97.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
98.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
99.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
100.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
101.   } else {
102.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
103.   }
104. 
105.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
106.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
107.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
108. 
109.   body.appendChild(heading);
110.   body.appendChild(bio);
111. 
112.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
113.   wrap.appendChild(body);
114. 
115.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
116. }
117. 
118. function buildProfileEditForm(profile, onSaved) {
119.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
120.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
121. 
122.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
123.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
124.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
125.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
126.   usernameInput.name = "username";
127.   usernameInput.required = true;
128.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
129.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
130. 
131.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
132.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
133.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
134.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
135.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
136.   avatarInput.type = "url";
137.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
138.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
139. 
140.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
141.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
142.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
143.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
144.   bioInput.name = "bio";
145.   bioInput.rows = 4;
146.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
147.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
148. 
149.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
150.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
151.   status.hidden = true;
152. 
153.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
154.   saveButton.type = "submit";
155. 
156.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
157.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
158.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
159.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
160.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
161.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
162.   form.appendChild(status);
163.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
164. 
165.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
166.     event.preventDefault();
167. 
168.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
169.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
170.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
171. 
172.     if (!nextUsername) {
173.       status.hidden = false;
174.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
175.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
176.       status.classList.add("error");
177.       return;
178.     }
179. 
180.     const avatarCheck = sanitizeAvatarUrl(nextAvatar);
181.     if (!avatarCheck.ok) {
182.       status.hidden = false;
183.       status.textContent = avatarCheck.error;
184.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
185.       status.classList.add("error");
186.       return;
187.     }
188. 
189.     status.hidden = false;
190.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
191.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
192.     status.classList.add("info");
193. 
194.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
195.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.rpc("update_profile_and_review_usernames", {
196.       p_user_id: profile.id,
197.       p_username: nextUsername,
198.       p_avatar_url: avatarCheck.value || null,
199.       p_bio: nextBio || null
200.     });
201. 
202.     if (error) {
203.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
204.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
205.       status.classList.add("error");
206.       return;
207.     }
208. 
209.     profile.username = nextUsername;
210.     profile.avatar_url = avatarCheck.value || null;
211.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
212. 
213.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
214.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
215.     status.classList.add("success");
216. 
217.     if (typeof onSaved === "function") {
218.       await onSaved(oldUsername !== nextUsername);
219.     }
220.   });
221. 
222.   return form;
223. }
224. 
225. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
226.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
227.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
228.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
229.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
230.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
231. 
232.   let editForm = null;
233. 
234.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
235.     if (editForm) {
236.       editForm.remove();
237.       editForm = null;
238.       editToggleButton.textContent = "Edit Profile";
239.       return;
240.     }
241. 
242.     editForm = buildProfileEditForm(profile, async (usernameChanged) => {
243.       renderProfileHeader(profile);
244.       renderOwnerControls(profile);
245.       if (usernameChanged) {
246.         window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(profile.username)}`);
247.       }
248.       await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
249.       await loadUserFavorites(profile.id);
250.     });
251. 
252.     userProfileCard.appendChild(editForm);
253.     editToggleButton.textContent = "Hide Edit Profile";
254.   });
255. }
256. 
257. function createFavoritePoster(favorite) {
258.   const posterPath = typeof favorite.poster_path === "string" ? favorite.poster_path : "";
259.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
260.     return makeElement("div", "favorite-movie-poster favorite-movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
261.   }
262. 
263.   const poster = makeElement("img", "favorite-movie-poster");
264.   poster.src = `https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342${posterPath}`;
265.   poster.alt = `${favorite.movie_title || "Movie"} poster`;
266.   poster.loading = "lazy";
267.   return poster;
268. }
269. 
270. function renderFavorites(favorites) {
271.   if (!userFavoritesGrid) {
272.     return;
273.   }
274. 
275.   if (!Array.isArray(favorites) || favorites.length === 0) {
276.     userFavoritesGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No favorites added yet."));
277.     return;
278.   }
279. 
280.   const cards = favorites.map((favorite) => {
281.     const card = makeElement("article", "favorite-movie-card");
282. 
283.     const link = makeElement("a", "favorite-movie-link");
284.     link.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(favorite.movie_id))}`;
285.     link.appendChild(createFavoritePoster(favorite));
286.     link.appendChild(makeElement("p", "favorite-movie-title", favorite.movie_title || `Movie #${favorite.movie_id}`));
287.     card.appendChild(link);
288. 
289.     if (isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode && favorite.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
290.       const removeButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Remove");
291.       removeButton.type = "button";
292.       removeButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
293.         removeButton.disabled = true;
294.         const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
295.           .from("user_favorites")
296.           .delete()
297.           .eq("id", favorite.id)
298.           .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
299. 
300.         if (error) {
301.           setStatus(`Could not remove favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
302.           removeButton.disabled = false;
303.           return;
304.         }
305. 
306.         await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
307.       });
308.       card.appendChild(removeButton);
309.     }
310. 
311.     return card;
312.   });
313. 
314.   userFavoritesGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
315. }
316. 
317. function renderFavoritesOwnerControls() {
318.   const topFiveSection = document.getElementById("user-top-five");
319.   if (!topFiveSection || !isOwnerView) {
320.     return;
321.   }
322. 
323.   const existing = topFiveSection.querySelector(".favorites-owner-actions");
324.   if (existing) {
325.     existing.remove();
326.   }
327. 
328.   const actions = makeElement("div", "favorites-owner-actions");
329.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", isFavoritesEditMode ? "Done Editing Favorites" : "Edit Favorites");
330.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
331.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
332.     isFavoritesEditMode = !isFavoritesEditMode;
333.     await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
334.   });
335. 
336.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
337.   topFiveSection.appendChild(actions);
338. }
339. 
340. function buildReviewEditForm(review, onSaved) {
341.   const form = makeElement("form", "review-inline-edit-form");
342. 
343.   const ratingLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Rating (1-10)");
344.   const ratingInput = makeElement("input", "");
345.   ratingInput.type = "number";
346.   ratingInput.min = "1";
347.   ratingInput.max = "10";
348.   ratingInput.step = "1";
349.   ratingInput.required = true;
350.   ratingInput.value = String(Math.round(Number(review.rating) || 1));
351. 
352.   const textLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Review text");
353.   const textInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
354.   textInput.rows = 4;
355.   textInput.maxLength = 3000;
356.   textInput.required = true;
357.   textInput.value = review.review_text || "";
358. 
359.   const controls = makeElement("div", "review-inline-edit-controls");
360.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Review");
361.   saveButton.type = "submit";
362.   const cancelButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Cancel");
363.   cancelButton.type = "button";
364. 
365.   controls.appendChild(saveButton);
366.   controls.appendChild(cancelButton);
367. 
368.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
369.   status.hidden = true;
370. 
371.   cancelButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
372.     onSaved(false);
373.   });
374. 
375.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
376.     event.preventDefault();
377. 
378.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);
379.     const nextText = textInput.value.trim();
380. 
381.     if (!currentSession?.user?.id) {
382.       status.hidden = false;
383.       status.textContent = "Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.";
384.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
385.       status.classList.add("error");
386.       return;
387.     }
388. 
389.     if (!Number.isFinite(nextRating) || nextRating < 1 || nextRating > 10) {
390.       status.hidden = false;
391.       status.textContent = "Rating must be between 1 and 10.";
392.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
393.       status.classList.add("error");
394.       return;
395.     }
396. 
397.     if (nextText.length < 5) {
398.       status.hidden = false;
399.       status.textContent = "Review text must be at least 5 characters.";
400.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
401.       status.classList.add("error");
402.       return;
403.     }
404. 
405.     status.hidden = false;
406.     status.textContent = "Saving review...";
407.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
408.     status.classList.add("info");
409. 
410.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
411.       .from("movie_reviews")
412.       .update({
413.         rating: nextRating,
414.         review_text: nextText,
415.       })
416.       .eq("id", review.id)
417.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
418. 
419.     if (error) {
420.       status.textContent = `Could not update review: ${error.message}`;
421.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
422.       status.classList.add("error");
423.       return;
424.     }
425. 
426.     onSaved(true);
427.   });
428. 
429.   form.appendChild(ratingLabel);
430.   form.appendChild(ratingInput);
431.   form.appendChild(textLabel);
432.   form.appendChild(textInput);
433.   form.appendChild(status);
434.   form.appendChild(controls);
435. 
436.   return form;
437. }
438. 
439. function renderReviewCards(reviews) {
440.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
441.     userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet."));
442.     return;
443.   }
444. 
445.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
446.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
447. 
448.     const title = makeElement("h3", "user-review-movie-title", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
449.     const titleLink = makeElement("a", "", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
450.     titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || ""))}`;
451.     title.replaceChildren(titleLink);
452. 
453.     const rating = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
454.     const text = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
455.     const date = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : "");
456. 
457.     card.appendChild(title);
458.     card.appendChild(rating);
459.     card.appendChild(text);
460.     card.appendChild(date);
461. 
462.     if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
463.       const editButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Review");
464.       editButton.type = "button";
465. 
466.       editButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
467.         const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {
468.           if (saved) {
469.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
470.           } else {
471.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
472.           }
473.         });
474. 
475.         card.appendChild(editForm);
476.         editButton.disabled = true;
477.       });
478. 
479.       card.appendChild(editButton);
480.     }
481. 
482.     return card;
483.   });
484. 
485.   userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);
486. }
487. 
488. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
489.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
490.     .from("movie_reviews")
491.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
492.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
493.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
494. 
495.   if (error) {
496.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
497.     return;
498.   }
499. 
500.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
501. }
502. 
503. async function loadUserFavorites(profileId) {
504.   if (!userFavoritesGrid) {
505.     return;
506.   }
507. 
508.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
509.     .from("user_favorites")
510.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, poster_path, created_at")
511.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
512.     .order("created_at", { ascending: true })
513.     .limit(5);
514. 
515.   if (error) {
516.     setStatus(`Could not load favorites: ${error.message}`, "error");
517.     return;
518.   }
519. 
520.   renderFavoritesOwnerControls();
521.   renderFavorites(data || []);
522. }
523. 
524. async function loadProfile() {
525.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
526.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
527.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
528.     return;
529.   }
530. 
531.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
532. 
533.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
534.   let profile;
535.   let profileError;
536. 
537.   if (!profileQuery) {
538.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
539.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
540.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
541.       return;
542.     }
543. 
544.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
545.       .from("profiles")
546.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
547.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
548.       .maybeSingle());
549.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
550.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
551.       .from("profiles")
552.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
553.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
554.       .maybeSingle());
555.   } else {
556.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
557.       .from("profiles")
558.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
559.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
560.       .maybeSingle());
561.   }
562. 
563.   if (profileError) {
564.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
565.     return;
566.   }
567. 
568.   if (!profile?.id) {
569.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
570.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
571.     return;
572.   }
573. 
574.   viewedProfile = profile;
575.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
576. 
577.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
578. 
579.   if (isOwnerView) {
580.     renderOwnerControls(profile);
581.   }
582. 
583.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
584.   await loadUserFavorites(profile.id);
585.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
586. }
587. 
588. loadProfile();
589.
```

</details>

1. <!DOCTYPE html>
2. <html lang="en">
3. <head>
4.   <meta charset="UTF-8" />
5.   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
6.   <title>KinoRate User</title>
7.   <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" />
8. </head>
9. <body data-page="user">
10.   <div id="app-shell" hidden>
11.     <nav>
12.       <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">Kino<span>Rate</span></a>
13.       <ul class="nav-links">

18.       </ul>
19.     </nav>
20. 
21.     <main class="user-page">
22.       <p id="user-page-status" class="tmdb-status info">Loading user profile...</p>
23. 
24.       <section class="user-profile-card" id="user-profile-card" aria-live="polite"></section>
25. 
26.       <section class="user-top-five" id="user-top-five">
27.         <div class="section-header">
28.           <h2>Top <span>Five Movies</span></h2>
29.           <p>Favorite films from this user.</p>
30.         </div>
31.         <div id="user-favorites-grid" class="user-favorites-grid" aria-live="polite"></div>
32.       </section>
33. 
34.       <section class="user-reviews-section" id="user-reviews-section">
35.         <div class="section-header">
36.           <h2>User <span>Reviews</span></h2>
37.           <p>All reviews written by this user.</p>
38.         </div>
39.         <div id="user-reviews-list" class="reviews-list" aria-live="polite"></div>
40.       </section>
41.     </main>
42.   </div>
43.

1.   /* ── Reset & base ── */
2.     *, *::before, *::after {
3.       box-sizing: border-box;
4.       margin: 0;
5.       padding: 0;
6.     }
7. 
8.     :root {
9.       --bg-primary:   #0d0d0f;
10.       --bg-secondary: #16161a;
11.       --bg-card:      #1e1e24;
12.       --accent:       #e63946;
13.       --accent-alt:   #f4a261;
14.       --text-primary: #fffffe;
15.       --text-muted:   #94a1b2;
16.       --border:       #2c2c35;
17.       --radius:       10px;
18.     }
19. 
20.     html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
21. 
22.     body {
23.       background-color: var(--bg-primary);
24.       color: var(--text-primary);
25.       font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
26.       line-height: 1.6;
27.     }
28. 
29.     /* ── Nav ── */
30.     nav {
31.       position: sticky;
32.       top: 0;
33.       z-index: 100;
34.       display: flex;
35.       align-items: center;
36.       justify-content: space-between;
37.       padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
38.       background: rgba(13, 13, 15, 0.85);
39.       backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
40.       border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
41.     }
42. 
43.     .nav-logo {
44.       font-size: 1.5rem;
45.       font-weight: 800;
46.       letter-spacing: -0.5px;
47.       color: var(--text-primary);
48.       text-decoration: none;
49.     }
50. 
51.     .nav-logo span {
52.       color: var(--accent);
53.     }
54. 
55.     .nav-links {
56.       display: flex;
57.       gap: 1.8rem;
58.       list-style: none;
59.     }
60. 
61.     .nav-links a {
62.       color: var(--text-muted);
63.       text-decoration: none;
64.       font-size: 0.95rem;
65.       transition: color 0.2s;
66.     }
67. 
68.     .nav-links a:hover {
69.       color: var(--accent-alt);
70.     }
71. 
72.     /* ── Hero ── */
73.     .hero {
74.       display: flex;
75.       flex-direction: column;
76.       align-items: center;
77.       justify-content: center;
78.       text-align: center;
79.       min-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
80.       padding: 4rem 1.5rem;
81.       background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
82.     }
83. 
84.     .hero-badge {
85.       display: inline-block;
86.       padding: 0.3rem 0.9rem;
87.       border-radius: 999px;
88.       border: 1px solid var(--accent);
89.       color: var(--accent);
90.       font-size: 0.78rem;
91.       font-weight: 600;
92.       letter-spacing: 1px;
93.       text-transform: uppercase;
94.       margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
95.     }
96. 
97.     .hero h1 {
98.       font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem);
99.       font-weight: 900;
100.       letter-spacing: -2px;
101.       line-height: 1.05;
102.       margin-bottom: 1rem;
103.     }
104. 
105.     .hero h1 .highlight {
106.       color: var(--accent);
107.     }
108. 
109.     .hero p {
110.       max-width: 620px;
111.       font-size: 1.15rem;
112.       color: var(--text-muted);
113.       margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
114.     }
115. 
116.     .btn-group {
117.       display: flex;
118.       gap: 1rem;
119.       flex-wrap: wrap;
120.       justify-content: center;
121.     }
122. 
123.     .btn {
124.       display: inline-block;
125.       padding: 0.75rem 1.8rem;
126.       border-radius: var(--radius);
127.       font-size: 0.95rem;
128.       font-weight: 600;
129.       text-decoration: none;
130.       cursor: pointer;
131.       transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
132.     }
133. 
134.     .btn:hover {
135.       transform: translateY(-2px);
136.     }
137. 
138.     .btn-primary {
139.       background: var(--accent);
140.       color: #fff;
141.       box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.4);
142.     }
143. 
144.     .btn-primary:hover {
145.       box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.6);
146.     }
147. 
148.     .btn-outline {
149.       background: transparent;
150.       color: var(--text-primary);
151.       border: 1px solid var(--border);
152.     }
153. 
154.     .btn-outline:hover {
155.       border-color: var(--accent-alt);
156.       color: var(--accent-alt);
157.     }
158. 
159.     /* ── Features ── */
160.     .features {
161.       padding: 6rem 1.5rem;
162.       background: var(--bg-secondary);
163.     }
164. 
165.     .section-header {
166.       text-align: center;
167.       margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
168.     }
169. 
170.     .section-header h2 {
171.       font-size: 2.2rem;
172.       font-weight: 800;
173.       letter-spacing: -0.5px;
174.       margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
175.     }
176. 
177.     .section-header h2 span {
178.       color: var(--accent-alt);
179.     }
180. 
181.     .section-header p {
182.       color: var(--text-muted);
183.       max-width: 480px;
184.       margin: 0 auto;
185.     }
186. 
187.     .cards {
188.       display: grid;
189.       grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
190.       gap: 1.5rem;
191.       max-width: 1100px;
192.       margin: 0 auto;
193.     }
194. 
195.     .card {
196.       background: var(--bg-card);
197.       border: 1px solid var(--border);
198.       border-radius: var(--radius);
199.       padding: 1.8rem;
200.       transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
201.     }
202. 
203.     .card:hover {
204.       border-color: var(--accent);
205.       transform: translateY(-4px);
206.     }
207. 
208.     .card-icon {
209.       font-size: 2rem;
210.       margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
211.     }
212. 
213.     .card h3 {
214.       font-size: 1.05rem;
215.       font-weight: 700;
216.       margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
217.     }
218. 
219.     .card p {
220.       font-size: 0.9rem;
221.       color: var(--text-muted);
222.     }
223. 
224.     /* ── Stack ── */
225.     .stack {
226.       padding: 6rem 1.5rem;
227.     }
228. 
229.     .stack-list {
230.       display: flex;
231.       flex-wrap: wrap;
232.       gap: 1rem;
233.       justify-content: center;
234.       max-width: 700px;
235.       margin: 0 auto;
236.     }
237. 
238.     .stack-tag {
239.       background: var(--bg-card);
240.       border: 1px solid var(--border);
241.       border-radius: var(--radius);
242.       padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
243.       font-size: 0.9rem;
244.       font-weight: 600;
245.       color: var(--accent-alt);
246.     }
247. 
248.     /* ── Footer ── */
249.     footer {
250.       padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
251.       text-align: center;
252.       border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
253.       color: var(--text-muted);
254.       font-size: 0.85rem;
255.     }
256. 
257.     footer a {
258.       color: var(--accent);
259.       text-decoration: none;
260.     }

<details>
<summary>667 lines</summary>

```
1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function goToUserPage(username) {
30.   const trimmed = typeof username === "string" ? username.trim() : "";
31.   if (!trimmed) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34.   window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
35. }
36. 
37. function createProfileAvatarElement(username, avatarUrl, className = "suggestion-avatar") {
38.   const cleanAvatarUrl = typeof avatarUrl === "string" ? avatarUrl.trim() : "";
39. 
40.   if (cleanAvatarUrl) {
41.     const avatarImg = document.createElement("img");
42.     avatarImg.className = className;
43.     avatarImg.src = cleanAvatarUrl;
44.     avatarImg.alt = `${username || "User"} avatar`;
45.     avatarImg.loading = "lazy";
46.     return avatarImg;
47.   }
48. 
49.   const fallback = document.createElement("div");
50.   fallback.className = `${className} suggestion-avatar-fallback`;
51.   fallback.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
52.   return fallback;
53. }
54. 
55. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
56.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
57.     return;
58.   }
59. 
60.   let debounceHandle;
61.   let requestCounter = 0;
62.   let activeIndex = -1;
63.   let currentResults = [];
64. 
65.   function getMovieYear(item) {
66.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
67.   }
68. 
69.   function clearSuggestions() {
70.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
71.   }
72. 
73.   function openSuggestions() {
74.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
75.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
76.   }
77. 
78.   function closeSuggestions() {
79.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
80.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
81.     activeIndex = -1;
82.   }
83. 
84.   function syncActiveItem() {
85.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
86.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
87.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
88.         item.classList.add("active");
89.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
90.       } else {
91.         item.classList.remove("active");
92.       }
93.     });
94.   }
95. 
96.   function createPosterElement(item) {
97.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
98. 
99.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
100.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
101.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
102.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
103.       return fallback;
104.     }
105. 
106.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
107.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
108.     poster.loading = "lazy";
109.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
110.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
111.     return poster;
112.   }
113. 
114.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
115.     currentResults = items;
116.     clearSuggestions();
117.     activeIndex = -1;
118. 
119.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
120.       const li = document.createElement("li");
121.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
122.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
123.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
124.       li.tabIndex = -1;
125. 
126.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
127. 
128.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
129.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
130. 
131.       const title = document.createElement("span");
132.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
133.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
134. 
135.       const year = document.createElement("span");
136.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
137.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
138. 
139.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
140.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
141.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
142. 
143.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
144.         event.preventDefault();
145.       });
146. 
147.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
148.         activeIndex = index;
149.         syncActiveItem();
150.       });
151. 
152.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
153.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
154.       });
155. 
156.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
157.     }
158. 
159.     openSuggestions();
160.   }
161. 
162.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
163.     currentResults = [];
164.     activeIndex = -1;
165.     clearSuggestions();
166. 
167.     const li = document.createElement("li");
168.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
169.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
170.     li.textContent = message;
171.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
172. 
173.     openSuggestions();
174.   }
175. 
176.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
177.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
178.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
179.       return;
180.     }
181. 
182.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
183.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
184. 
185.     try {
186.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
187.       const payload = await response.json();
188. 
189.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
190.         return;
191.       }
192. 
193.       if (!response.ok) {
194.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
195.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
196.         return;
197.       }
198. 
199.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
200. 
201.       if (results.length === 0) {
202.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
203.         return;
204.       }
205. 
206.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
207.     } catch (error) {
208.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
209.         return;
210.       }
211.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
212.     }
213.   }
214. 
215.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
216.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
217.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
218. 
219.     if (!query) {
220.       closeSuggestions();
221.       clearSuggestions();
222.       currentResults = [];
223.       return;
224.     }
225. 
226.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
227.       requestCounter += 1;
228.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
229.     }, 300);
230.   });
231. 
232.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
233.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
234. 
235.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
236.       event.preventDefault();
237.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
238.       syncActiveItem();
239.       openSuggestions();
240.       return;
241.     }
242. 
243.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
244.       event.preventDefault();
245.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
246.       syncActiveItem();
247.       openSuggestions();
248.       return;
249.     }
250. 
251.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
252.       closeSuggestions();
253.       return;
254.     }
255. 
256.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
257.       event.preventDefault();
258.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
259.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
260.         return;
261.       }
262.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
263.     }
264.   });
265. 
266.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
267.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
268.       openSuggestions();
269.     }
270.   });
271. 
272.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
273.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
274.   });
275. 
276.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
277.     event.preventDefault();
278.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
279.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
280.       return;
281.     }
282.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
283.   });
284. }
285. 
286. function setupUserTypeahead() {
287.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
288.     return;
289.   }
290. 
291.   let debounceHandle;
292.   let requestCounter = 0;
293.   let activeIndex = -1;
294.   let currentResults = [];
295. 
296.   function clearSuggestions() {
297.     userSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
298.   }
299. 
300.   function openSuggestions() {
301.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
302.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
303.   }
304. 
305.   function closeSuggestions() {
306.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
307.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
308.     activeIndex = -1;
309.   }
310. 
311.   function syncActiveItem() {
312.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
313.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
314.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
315.         item.classList.add("active");
316.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
317.       } else {
318.         item.classList.remove("active");
319.       }
320.     });
321.   }
322. 
323.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
324.     currentResults = [];
325.     activeIndex = -1;
326.     clearSuggestions();
327. 
328.     const li = document.createElement("li");
329.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
330.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
331.     li.textContent = message;
332.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
333. 
334.     openSuggestions();
335.   }
336. 
337.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
338.     currentResults = items;
339.     clearSuggestions();
340.     activeIndex = -1;
341. 
342.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
343.       const username = item.username;
344.       const li = document.createElement("li");
345.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
346.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
347.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
348.       li.tabIndex = -1;
349. 
350.       li.appendChild(createProfileAvatarElement(username, item.avatar_url));
351. 
352.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
353.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
354. 
355.       const name = document.createElement("span");
356.       name.className = "suggestion-title";
357.       name.textContent = username;
358. 
359.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
360.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
361.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
362. 
363.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
364.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
365.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
366. 
367.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
368.         event.preventDefault();
369.       });
370. 
371.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
372.         activeIndex = index;
373.         syncActiveItem();
374.       });
375. 
376.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
377.         goToUserPage(username);
378.       });
379. 
380.       userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
381.     }
382. 
383.     openSuggestions();
384.   }
385. 
386.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
387.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
388.     if (error) {
389.       return "";
390.     }
391. 
392.     const user = data?.user;
393.     if (!user) {
394.       return "";
395.     }
396. 
397.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
398.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
399.       : "";
400. 
401.     if (metadataUsername) {
402.       return metadataUsername;
403.     }
404. 
405.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
406.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
407.     }
408. 
409.     return "";
410.   }
411. 
412.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
413.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
414. 
415.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
416.       window.supabaseClient
417.         .from("profiles")
418.         .select("username, avatar_url")
419.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
420.         .not("username", "is", null)
421.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
422.         .limit(25),
423.       getCurrentUserUsername()
424.     ]);
425. 
426.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
427.       return;
428.     }
429. 
430.     if (error) {
431.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
432.       return;
433.     }
434. 
435.     const profileRows = (data || [])
436.       .map((row) => ({
437.         username: typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : "",
438.         avatar_url: typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : ""
439.       }))
440.       .filter((row) => row.username.length > 0);
441. 
442.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
443.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
444.       ? [{ username: currentUsername, avatar_url: "" }]
445.       : [];
446. 
447.     const uniqueUsernames = [];
448.     const seen = new Set();
449.     for (const row of [...localMatches, ...profileRows]) {
450.       const key = row.username.toLowerCase();
451.       if (seen.has(key)) {
452.         continue;
453.       }
454.       seen.add(key);
455.       uniqueUsernames.push(row);
456.       if (uniqueUsernames.length >= 10) {
457.         break;
458.       }
459.     }
460. 
461.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
462.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
463.       return;
464.     }
465. 
466.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
467.   }
468. 
469.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
470.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
471.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
472. 
473.     if (!query) {
474.       closeSuggestions();
475.       clearSuggestions();
476.       currentResults = [];
477.       return;
478.     }
479. 
480.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
481.       requestCounter += 1;
482.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
483.     }, 300);
484.   });
485. 
486.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
487.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
488. 
489.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
490.       event.preventDefault();
491.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
492.       syncActiveItem();
493.       openSuggestions();
494.       return;
495.     }
496. 
497.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
498.       event.preventDefault();
499.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
500.       syncActiveItem();
501.       openSuggestions();
502.       return;
503.     }
504. 
505.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
506.       closeSuggestions();
507.       return;
508.     }
509. 
510.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
511.       event.preventDefault();
512.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
513.         goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex].username);
514.       }
515.     }
516.   });
517. 
518.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
519.     if (userSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
520.       openSuggestions();
521.     }
522.   });
523. 
524.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
525.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
526.   });
527. 
528.   userSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
529.     event.preventDefault();
530.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
531.       goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex].username);
532.       return;
533.     }
534.     goToUserPage(userSearchInput.value);
535.   });
536. }
537. 
538. async function loadRecentReviews() {
539.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
540.     return;
541.   }
542. 
543.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
544.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
545.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
546.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
547.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
548. 
549.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
550.     .from("movie_reviews")
551.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
552.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
553.     .limit(20);
554. 
555.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
556. 
557.   if (error) {
558.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
559.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
560.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
561.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
562.     return;
563.   }
564. 
565.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
566.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
567.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
568.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
569.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
570.     return;
571.   }
572. 
573.   const usernames = [...new Set(
574.     data
575.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
576.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
577.   )];
578. 
579.   const avatarByUsername = new Map();
580.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
581.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
582.       .from("profiles")
583.       .select("username, avatar_url")
584.       .in("username", usernames);
585. 
586.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
587.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
588.       if (!key) {
589.         continue;
590.       }
591.       avatarByUsername.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
592.     }
593.   }
594. 
595.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
596.     const card = document.createElement("article");
597.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
598.     card.tabIndex = 0;
599. 
600.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
601.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
602. 
603.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
604.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
605.     const bylineWrap = document.createElement("div");
606.     bylineWrap.className = "recent-review-byline-wrap";
607.     const reviewUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
608.     const avatar = createProfileAvatarElement(
609.       reviewUsername || "Unknown",
610.       avatarByUsername.get(reviewUsername.toLowerCase()) || "",
611.       "review-avatar"
612.     );
613.     const bylineLink = document.createElement("a");
614.     bylineLink.href = "#";
615.     bylineLink.textContent = reviewUsername || "Unknown";
616.     bylineLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
617.       event.preventDefault();
618.       event.stopPropagation();
619.       goToUserPage(reviewUsername || "");
620.     });
621.     byline.append("By ", bylineLink);
622.     bylineWrap.appendChild(avatar);
623.     bylineWrap.appendChild(byline);
624. 
625.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
626.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
627.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
628. 
629.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
630.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
631.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
632. 
633.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
634.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
635.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
636. 
637.     card.appendChild(title);
638.     card.appendChild(bylineWrap);
639.     card.appendChild(rating);
640.     card.appendChild(snippet);
641.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
642. 
643.     const openMovie = () => {
644.       if (!review.movie_id) {
645.         return;
646.       }
647.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
648.     };
649. 
650.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
651.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
652.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
653.         event.preventDefault();
654.         openMovie();
655.       }
656.     });
657. 
658.     return card;
659.   });
660. 
661.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
662. }
663. 
664. setupMovieTypeahead();
665. setupUserTypeahead();
666. loadRecentReviews();
667.
```

</details>

"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\js\\movie.js\n@@\n let currentMovie = null;\n let currentSession = null;\n let currentUsername = \"Current diff --git a/style.css b/style.css

--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -376,3 +376,944 @@
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */        
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);       
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);      
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);  
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {

+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.2rem;

+.movie-poster {

+}
+
+.movie-poster-fallback {

+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 {

+.movie-detail-content h1 span {

+.review-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 400;
+}
+
+.review-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.review-modal-content {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-close {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0.7rem;
+  right: 0.7rem;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 7px;
+  padding: 0.2rem 0.45rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.review-modal-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 94px 1fr;

+}
+
+.review-modal-poster {

+}
+
+.review-form {

+.review-form label {

+.review-form textarea {

+.review-form textarea {

<sub>⏱️ 1494m 30s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — both UX updates are implemented.

On `movie.html`, the favorite button now **toggles** based on current state:
- Shows `Add to Top Five` if not favorited
- Shows `Remove from Top Five` if already in top five
- Click updates DB and immediately flips button text/state

On `user.html` (owner + edit mode), I added a **plus placeholder card** when favorites are under 5:
- Click opens inline movie search (TMDB, same search behavior style)
- Search results include poster/title/year + `Add` button
- Enforces duplicate and max-five limits

I also updated `plan.md` and marked new SQL todos done.

1. const userPageStatus = document.getElementById("user-page-status");
2. const userProfileCard = document.getElementById("user-profile-card");
3. const userReviewsList = document.getElementById("user-reviews-list");
4. const userFavoritesGrid = document.getElementById("user-favorites-grid");
5. 
6. let currentSession = null;
7. let viewedProfile = null;
8. let isOwnerView = false;
9. let isFavoritesEditMode = false;
10. let currentFavorites = [];
11. const IMAGE_BASE = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342";
12. const TMDB_SEARCH_BASE = `${window.appConfig?.tmdb?.apiBaseUrl || "https://api.themoviedb.org/3"}/search/movie`;
13. 
14. function setStatus(message, kind = "info") {
15.   if (!userPageStatus) {
16.     return;
17.   }
18.   userPageStatus.textContent = message;
19.   userPageStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
20.   userPageStatus.classList.add(kind);
21. }
22. 
23. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
24.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
25.   if (className) {
26.     element.className = className;
27.   }
28.   if (typeof text === "string") {
29.     element.textContent = text;
30.   }
31.   return element;
32. }
33. 
34. function getProfileParam() {
35.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
36.   const username = params.get("username");
37.   const userId = params.get("id");
38. 
39.   if (username && username.trim()) {
40.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
41.   }
42. 
43.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
44.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
45.   }
46. 
47.   return null;
48. }
49. 
50. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
51.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
52.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
53.     return metadata.username.trim();
54.   }
55.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
56.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
57.   }
58.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
59.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
60.   }
61.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
62.   if (email.includes("@")) {
63.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
64.   }
65.   return "";
66. }
67. 
68. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
69.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
70.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
71.   }
72.   return "";
73. }
74. 
75. function sanitizeAvatarUrl(rawValue) {
76.   const value = typeof rawValue === "string" ? rawValue.trim() : "";
77.   if (!value) {
78.     return { ok: true, value: "" };
79.   }
80. 
81.   try {
82.     const parsed = new URL(value);
83.     if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
84.       return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://." };
85.     }
86.     return { ok: true, value: parsed.toString() };
87.   } catch {
88.     return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL is invalid." };
89.   }
90. }
91. 
92. function renderProfileHeader(profile) {
93.   userProfileCard.replaceChildren();
94. 
95.   const wrap = makeElement("div", "user-profile-header");
96.   const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl(profile);
97.   let avatar;
98. 
99.   if (avatarUrl) {
100.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");
101.     avatar.src = avatarUrl;
102.     avatar.alt = `${profile.username || "User"} avatar`;
103.     avatar.loading = "lazy";
104.   } else {
105.     avatar = makeElement("div", "user-profile-avatar user-profile-avatar-fallback", (profile.username?.charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase());
106.   }
107. 
108.   const body = makeElement("div", "user-profile-body");
109.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", profile.username || "Unknown User");
110.   const bio = makeElement("p", "user-profile-bio", profile.bio || "No bio yet.");
111. 
112.   body.appendChild(heading);
113.   body.appendChild(bio);
114. 
115.   wrap.appendChild(avatar);
116.   wrap.appendChild(body);
117. 
118.   userProfileCard.appendChild(wrap);
119. }
120. 
121. function buildProfileEditForm(profile, onSaved) {
122.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
123.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
124. 
125.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
126.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
127.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
128.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
129.   usernameInput.name = "username";
130.   usernameInput.required = true;
131.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
132.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
133. 
134.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
135.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
136.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
137.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
138.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
139.   avatarInput.type = "url";
140.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
141.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
142. 
143.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
144.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
145.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
146.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
147.   bioInput.name = "bio";
148.   bioInput.rows = 4;
149.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
150.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
151. 
152.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
153.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
154.   status.hidden = true;
155. 
156.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
157.   saveButton.type = "submit";
158. 
159.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
160.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
161.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
162.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
163.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
164.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
165.   form.appendChild(status);
166.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
167. 
168.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
169.     event.preventDefault();
170. 
171.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
172.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
173.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
174. 
175.     if (!nextUsername) {
176.       status.hidden = false;
177.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
178.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
179.       status.classList.add("error");
180.       return;
181.     }
182. 
183.     const avatarCheck = sanitizeAvatarUrl(nextAvatar);
184.     if (!avatarCheck.ok) {
185.       status.hidden = false;
186.       status.textContent = avatarCheck.error;
187.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
188.       status.classList.add("error");
189.       return;
190.     }
191. 
192.     status.hidden = false;
193.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
194.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
195.     status.classList.add("info");
196. 
197.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
198.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.rpc("update_profile_and_review_usernames", {
199.       p_user_id: profile.id,
200.       p_username: nextUsername,
201.       p_avatar_url: avatarCheck.value || null,
202.       p_bio: nextBio || null
203.     });
204. 
205.     if (error) {
206.       status.textContent = `Could not update profile: ${error.message}`;
207.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
208.       status.classList.add("error");
209.       return;
210.     }
211. 
212.     profile.username = nextUsername;
213.     profile.avatar_url = avatarCheck.value || null;
214.     profile.bio = nextBio || null;
215. 
216.     status.textContent = "Profile updated.";
217.     status.classList.remove("error", "info");
218.     status.classList.add("success");
219. 
220.     if (typeof onSaved === "function") {
221.       await onSaved(oldUsername !== nextUsername);
222.     }
223.   });
224. 
225.   return form;
226. }
227. 
228. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
229.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
230.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
231.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
232.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
233.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
234. 
235.   let editForm = null;
236. 
237.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
238.     if (editForm) {
239.       editForm.remove();
240.       editForm = null;
241.       editToggleButton.textContent = "Edit Profile";
242.       return;
243.     }
244. 
245.     editForm = buildProfileEditForm(profile, async (usernameChanged) => {
246.       renderProfileHeader(profile);
247.       renderOwnerControls(profile);
248.       if (usernameChanged) {
249.         window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(profile.username)}`);
250.       }
251.       await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
252.       await loadUserFavorites(profile.id);
253.     });
254. 
255.     userProfileCard.appendChild(editForm);
256.     editToggleButton.textContent = "Hide Edit Profile";
257.   });
258. }
