260. function createFavoritePoster(favorite) {
261.   const posterPath = typeof favorite.poster_path === "string" ? favorite.poster_path : "";
262.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
263.     return makeElement("div", "favorite-movie-poster favorite-movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
264.   }
265. 
266.   const poster = makeElement("img", "favorite-movie-poster");
267.   poster.src = `https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342${posterPath}`;
268.   poster.alt = `${favorite.movie_title || "Movie"} poster`;
269.   poster.loading = "lazy";
270.   return poster;
271. }
272. 
273. function createAddFavoriteSlot() {
274.   const button = makeElement("button", "favorite-add-slot", "+");
275.   button.type = "button";
276.   button.setAttribute("aria-label", "Add movie to top five");
277.   const label = makeElement("span", "favorite-add-slot-label", "Add Movie");
278.   button.appendChild(label);
279.   return button;
280. }
281. 
282. function getTmdbApiKey() {
283.   const apiKey = window.appConfig?.tmdb?.apiKey;
284.   return typeof apiKey === "string" && apiKey.trim() ? apiKey.trim() : "";
285. }
286. 
287. async function searchMoviesByTitle(query) {
288.   const apiKey = getTmdbApiKey();
289.   if (!apiKey) {
290.     throw new Error("TMDB API key is missing.");
291.   }
292. 
293.   const endpoint = `${TMDB_SEARCH_BASE}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
294.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
295.   const payload = await response.json();
296. 
297.   if (!response.ok) {
298.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Movie search failed.");
299.   }
300. 
301.   const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results : [];
302.   return results.slice(0, 8).map((movie) => ({
303.     id: Number(movie.id),
304.     title: typeof movie.title === "string" ? movie.title : "Untitled",
305.     poster_path: typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : null,
306.     release_date: typeof movie.release_date === "string" ? movie.release_date : ""
307.   })).filter((movie) => Number.isFinite(movie.id) && movie.id > 0);
308. }
309. 
310. async function addFavoriteFromMovieResult(movie, triggerButton) {
311.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !viewedProfile?.id || !movie?.id) {
312.     setStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
313.     return;
314.   }
315. 
316.   if (viewedProfile.id !== currentSession.user.id) {
317.     setStatus("You can only edit your own top five.", "error");
318.     return;
319.   }
320. 
321.   if (currentFavorites.some((favorite) => favorite.movie_id === movie.id)) {
322.     setStatus("This movie is already in your top five.", "info");
323.     return;
324.   }
325. 
326.   if (currentFavorites.length >= 5) {
327.     setStatus("You can only have five favorite movies.", "error");
328.     return;
329.   }
330. 
331.   if (triggerButton) {
332.     triggerButton.disabled = true;
333.   }
334. 
335.   const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
336.     .from("user_favorites")
337.     .insert({
338.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
339.       movie_id: movie.id,
340.       movie_title: movie.title || "Untitled",
341.       poster_path: movie.poster_path || null
342.     });
343. 
344.   if (triggerButton) {
345.     triggerButton.disabled = false;
346.   }
347. 
348.   if (error) {
349.     setStatus(`Could not add favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
350.     return;
351.   }
352. 
353.   setStatus(`Added "${movie.title}" to your top five.`, "success");
354.   await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
355. }
356. 
357. function buildAddFavoriteCard() {
358.   const card = makeElement("article", "favorite-movie-card favorite-movie-card-add");
359.   const trigger = createAddFavoriteSlot();
360.   const panel = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-panel");
361.   panel.hidden = true;
362. 
363.   const searchForm = makeElement("form", "favorite-add-search-form");
364.   const input = makeElement("input", "favorite-add-input");
365.   input.type = "search";
366.   input.placeholder = "Search movie title...";
367.   input.required = true;
368.   input.maxLength = 120;
369. 
370.   const submit = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Search");
371.   submit.type = "submit";
372. 
373.   searchForm.appendChild(input);
374.   searchForm.appendChild(submit);
375. 
376.   const resultList = makeElement("ul", "favorite-add-results");
377. 
378.   function renderResults(items) {
379.     resultList.replaceChildren();
380.     if (!items.length) {
381.       const empty = makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-info", "No movies found.");
382.       resultList.appendChild(empty);
383.       return;
384.     }
385. 
386.     for (const movie of items) {
387.       const item = makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-item");
388.       const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
389.       let poster;
390.       if (posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
391.         poster = makeElement("img", "favorite-add-result-poster");
392.         poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
393.         poster.alt = `${movie.title} poster`;
394.         poster.loading = "lazy";
395.       } else {
396.         poster = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-result-poster favorite-movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
397.       }
398. 
399.       const text = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-result-text");
400.       text.appendChild(makeElement("span", "favorite-add-result-title", movie.title));
401.       const year = movie.release_date ? movie.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
402.       text.appendChild(makeElement("span", "favorite-add-result-year", year));
403. 
404.       const addButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Add");
405.       addButton.type = "button";
406.       addButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
407.         await addFavoriteFromMovieResult(movie, addButton);
408.       });
409. 
410.       item.appendChild(poster);
411.       item.appendChild(text);
412.       item.appendChild(addButton);
413.       resultList.appendChild(item);
414.     }
415.   }
416. 
417.   trigger.addEventListener("click", () => {
418.     panel.hidden = !panel.hidden;
419.     if (!panel.hidden) {
420.       input.focus();
421.     }
422.   });
423. 
424.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
425.     event.preventDefault();
426.     const query = input.value.trim();
427.     if (!query) {
428.       return;
429.     }
430. 
431.     submit.disabled = true;
432.     resultList.replaceChildren(makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-info", "Searching..."));
433. 
434.     try {
435.       const results = await searchMoviesByTitle(query);
436.       renderResults(results);
437.     } catch (error) {
438.       resultList.replaceChildren(makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-info", `Search failed: ${error.message}`));
439.     } finally {
440.       submit.disabled = false;
441.     }
442.   });
443. 
444.   card.appendChild(trigger);
445.   card.appendChild(panel);
446.   panel.appendChild(searchForm);
447.   panel.appendChild(resultList);
448.   return card;
449. }
450. 
451. function renderFavorites(favorites) {
452.   if (!userFavoritesGrid) {
453.     return;
454.   }
455. 
456.   const safeFavorites = Array.isArray(favorites) ? favorites : [];
457. 
458.   if (safeFavorites.length === 0 && !(isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode)) {
459.     userFavoritesGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No favorites added yet."));
460.     return;
461.   }
462. 
463.   const cards = safeFavorites.map((favorite) => {
464.     const card = makeElement("article", "favorite-movie-card");
465. 
466.     const link = makeElement("a", "favorite-movie-link");
467.     link.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(favorite.movie_id))}`;
468.     link.appendChild(createFavoritePoster(favorite));
469.     link.appendChild(makeElement("p", "favorite-movie-title", favorite.movie_title || `Movie #${favorite.movie_id}`));
470.     card.appendChild(link);
471. 
472.     if (isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode && favorite.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
473.       const removeButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Remove");
474.       removeButton.type = "button";
475.       removeButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
476.         removeButton.disabled = true;
477.         const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
478.           .from("user_favorites")
479.           .delete()
480.           .eq("id", favorite.id)
481.           .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
482. 
483.         if (error) {
484.           setStatus(`Could not remove favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
485.           removeButton.disabled = false;
486.           return;
487.         }
488. 
489.         await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
490.       });
491.       card.appendChild(removeButton);
492.     }
493. 
494.     return card;
495.   });
496. 
497.   if (isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode && safeFavorites.length < 5) {
498.     cards.push(buildAddFavoriteCard());
499.   }
500. 
501.   userFavoritesGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
502. }
503. 
504. function renderFavoritesOwnerControls() {
505.   const topFiveSection = document.getElementById("user-top-five");
506.   if (!topFiveSection || !isOwnerView) {
507.     return;
508.   }
509. 
510.   const existing = topFiveSection.querySelector(".favorites-owner-actions");
511.   if (existing) {
512.     existing.remove();
513.   }
514. 
515.   const actions = makeElement("div", "favorites-owner-actions");
516.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", isFavoritesEditMode ? "Done Editing Favorites" : "Edit Favorites");
517.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
518.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
519.     isFavoritesEditMode = !isFavoritesEditMode;
520.     await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
```

1295. }
1296. 
1297. .favorite-add-result-text {
1298.   display: grid;
1299.   line-height: 1.2;
1300. }
1301. 
1302. .favorite-add-result-title {
1303.   font-size: 0.85rem;
1304. }
1305. 
1306. .favorite-add-result-year,
1307. .favorite-add-result-info {
1308.   font-size: 0.75rem;
1309.   color: var(--text-muted);
1310. }
1311. 
1312. @media (max-width: 760px) {
1313.   .user-profile-header {
1314.     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
1315.     justify-items: center;
1316.     text-align: center;
1317.   }
1318. }
1319. 
1320.
```

diff --git a/style.css b/style.css
index 4d41d62..d508ad5 100644
--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -376,3 +376,975 @@
 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;
 }
+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */        
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);       
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);      
+}
+
+.tmdb-health {
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);  
+  padding-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-health h2 {
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status {
+  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid transparent;
+  padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.info {
+  color: #c8d3e5;
+  background: rgba(52, 71, 103, 0.28);
+  border-color: rgba(94, 130, 189, 0.4);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.success {
+  color: #b5f5c4;
+  background: rgba(33, 102, 63, 0.3);
+  border-color: rgba(59, 181, 111, 0.6);
+}
+
+.tmdb-status.error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+  background: rgba(132, 23, 33, 0.35);
+  border-color: rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.7);
+}
+
+/* ── Index Movie Search Typeahead ── */
+.index-search {
+  padding: 5rem 1.5rem 4rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+}
+
+.index-search-wrap label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap {
+  position: relative;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.suggestion-list {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+  left: 0;
+  right: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0.3rem;
+  background: #161821;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  max-height: 360px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  display: none;
+  z-index: 60;
+}
+
+.suggestion-list.open {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.58rem 0.65rem;
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item + .suggestion-item {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item:hover {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.12);
+}
+
+.suggestion-loading,
+.suggestion-info {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.suggestion-error {
+  color: #ffd4d8;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 50%;
+  right: 0.45rem;
+  transform: translateY(-50%);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.search-submit-btn:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.index-search-input-wrap input {
+  padding-right: 3rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {
+  background: rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.2);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.suggestion-poster-fallback {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 68px;
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.movie-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 280px;
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.movie-poster-fallback {
+  min-height: 420px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.write-review-btn {
+  margin-top: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.movie-reviews-placeholder {
+  margin-top: 2rem;
+}
+
+.reviews-empty-box {
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.1rem;
+  text-align: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 860px) {
+  .movie-detail-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .movie-poster,
+  .movie-poster-fallback {
+    max-width: 220px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.reviews-list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-card {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-byline {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  margin-bottom: 0.32rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-rating {
+  font-weight: 700;
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-text {
+  color: #d5dce8;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+}
+
+.user-review-date {
+  margin-top: 0.5rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 400;
+}
+
+.review-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.review-modal-content {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-close {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0.7rem;
+  right: 0.7rem;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 7px;
+  padding: 0.2rem 0.45rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.review-modal-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 94px 1fr;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  align-items: center;
+  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-poster {
+  width: 94px;
+  height: 140px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.review-modal-subtitle {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.review-form {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.review-form label {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-form input,
+.review-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.review-form textarea {
+  resize: vertical;
+}
+
+.review-form input:focus,
+.review-form textarea:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.hero-search {
+  margin-top: 0.5rem;
+  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
+  width: min(760px, 100%);
+}
+
+.hero-user-search {
+  margin-top: -0.45rem;
+  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
+}
+
+.hero-search label {
+  text-align: left;
+}
+
+.recent-reviews {
+  padding: 3.2rem 1.5rem;
+  background: var(--bg-secondary);
+}
+
+.recent-reviews-rail {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-auto-flow: column;
+  grid-auto-columns: minmax(250px, 310px);
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  overflow-x: auto;
+  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+  min-height: 180px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+}
+
+.recent-review-card:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card h3 {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline,
+.recent-review-time {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.82rem;
+}
+
+.recent-review-rating {
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  margin: 0.45rem 0;
+}
+
+.recent-review-snippet {
+  color: #d4dbea;
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  display: -webkit-box;
+  -webkit-line-clamp: 4;
+  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card-info {
+  cursor: default;
+}
+
+.recent-review-card-info:hover {
+  border-color: var(--border);
+  transform: none;
+}
+
+
+.suggestion-avatar {
+  width: 46px;
+  height: 46px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  display: block;
+  background: #23252f;
+  object-fit: cover;
+}
+
+.suggestion-avatar-fallback {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline a,
+.user-review-byline a {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline a:hover,
+.user-review-byline a:hover {
+  text-decoration: underline;
+}
+
+.recent-review-byline-wrap,
+.user-review-header {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.55rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.review-avatar {
+  width: 34px;
+  height: 34px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  object-fit: cover;
+  background: #23252f;
+  flex: 0 0 auto;
+}
+
+.review-avatar-fallback {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  font-size: 0.78rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.user-page {
+  max-width: 1100px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.user-profile-card,
+.user-top-five,
+.user-reviews-section {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.user-profile-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  align-items: center;
+}
+
+.user-profile-avatar {
+  width: 120px;
+  height: 120px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.user-profile-avatar-fallback {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  font-size: 2rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  background: #23252f;
+}
+
+.user-profile-body h1 {
+  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
+}
+
+.user-profile-bio {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.profile-owner-actions {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.favorites-owner-actions {
+  margin-top: 0.7rem;
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form label {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form input,
+.profile-edit-form textarea,
+.review-inline-edit-form input,
+.review-inline-edit-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.profile-edit-form input:focus,
+.profile-edit-form textarea:focus,
+.review-inline-edit-form input:focus,
+.review-inline-edit-form textarea:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title {
+  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title a {
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.user-review-movie-title a:hover {
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.review-inline-edit-form {
+  margin-top: 0.8rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+}
+
+.review-inline-edit-controls {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.user-favorites-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));
+  gap: 0.85rem;
+}
+
+.favorite-movie-card {
+  background: #181a22;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  padding: 0.55rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.45rem;
+}
+
+.favorite-movie-link {
+  text-decoration: none;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+}
+
+.favorite-movie-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  aspect-ratio: 2 / 3;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.favorite-movie-poster-fallback {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.85rem;
+  background: #101117;
+}
+
+.favorite-movie-title {
+  margin-top: 0.45rem;
+  font-size: 0.88rem;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.favorite-movie-card-add {
+  border-style: dashed;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-slot {
+  width: 100%;
+  aspect-ratio: 2 / 3;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  background: #12131a;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  gap: 0.2rem;
+  font-size: 2rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-slot:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.favorite-add-slot-label {
+  font-size: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.modal-open {
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 500;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.favorite-add-modal-panel {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(860px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-modal-header {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-search-form {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
+  gap: 0.45rem;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-input {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-input:focus {
+  outline: none;
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}
+
+.favorite-add-results {
+  list-style: none;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.35rem;
+  max-height: 60vh;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-result-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr auto;
+  gap: 0.45rem;
+  align-items: center;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  padding: 0.35rem;
+  background: #12141b;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-result-poster {
+  width: 34px;
+  height: 50px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 5px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.favorite-add-result-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-result-title {
+  font-size: 0.85rem;
+}
+
+.favorite-add-result-year,
+.favorite-add-result-info {
+  font-size: 0.75rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .user-profile-header {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+    justify-items: center;
+    text-align: center;
+  }
+}

<sub>⏱️ 1496m 23s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Perfect — changed it to a popup modal.

Now when you click the `+ Add Movie` slot in edit mode, it opens a **large centered modal** with:
- Bigger search input/results area
- Scrollable results (`max-height: 60vh`)
- Backdrop click to close
- `Esc` key close
- Close `×` button

I also keep `Add` behavior the same (duplicate/max-five checks), and close the modal automatically after a successful add.

If you want next, I can also add keyboard focus trapping inside that modal for full accessibility polish.

 #app-shell[hidden] {
   display: none;

+
+/* ── Phase 2 Movie Search ── */        
+.search-page {
+  min-height: calc(100vh - 72px);       
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.search-card {
+  width: min(900px, 100%);
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);      
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.6rem;
+}
+
+.search-header h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.search-header p {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
+}

+.search-form {
+  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
+}
+
+.search-form label {
+  display: block;
+  color: var(--text-muted);

+}
+
+.search-row {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.search-row input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 220px;
+  background: #0f1015;

+  color: var(--text-primary);

+}
+
+.search-row input:focus {

+.index-search {

+}
+

+}
+
+.suggestion-item {

+}
+
+.suggestion-item.active {

+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.7rem;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.suggestion-text {
+  display: grid;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+
+.suggestion-title {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.suggestion-year {
+  font-size: 0.83rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.search-results-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.search-row-main input {
+  min-width: 320px;
+}
+
+.results-grid {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-card {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 170px 1fr;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 170px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.result-poster-fallback {
+  width: 170px;
+  height: 255px;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 {
+  font-size: 1.2rem;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-content h2 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 1rem;
+}
+
+.result-meta {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  color: #d7deea;
+  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
+}
+
+.result-overview {
+  margin-top: 0.55rem;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.results-loading,
+.results-empty {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 760px) {
+  .result-card {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .result-poster,
+  .result-poster-fallback {
+    width: 160px;
+    margin: 0 auto;
+  }
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"] {
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:hover {
+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+  transform: translateY(-2px);
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.18);
+}
+
+.result-card[role="button"]:focus {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent-alt);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.movie-page {
+  max-width: 1200px;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-card {
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  padding: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.movie-poster {
+  width: 100%;
+  max-width: 280px;
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.movie-poster-fallback {
+  min-height: 420px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--border);
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 {
+  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
+  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.movie-detail-content h1 span {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.write-review-btn {
+  margin-top: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.movie-reviews-placeholder {

+}
+
+.reviews-empty-box {

+@media (max-width: 860px) {

+  }

+  .movie-poster-fallback {

+}
+
+.reviews-list {

+.user-review-card {

+.user-review-byline {

+.user-review-rating {

+.user-review-text {

+.user-review-date {
+  margin-top: 0.5rem;

+}
+
+.review-modal {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 400;
+}
+
+.review-modal-backdrop {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
+}
+
+.review-modal-content {
+  position: relative;
+  z-index: 1;
+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
+  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);
+  overflow: auto;
+  margin: 1rem auto;
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 1rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-close {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0.7rem;
+  right: 0.7rem;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: #23252f;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  border-radius: 7px;
+  padding: 0.2rem 0.45rem;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.review-modal-header {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 94px 1fr;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  align-items: center;
+  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-modal-poster {
+  width: 94px;
+  height: 140px;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.review-modal-subtitle {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
+.review-form {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.6rem;
+}
+
+.review-form label {
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.review-form input,
+.review-form textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  background: #0f1015;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  padding: 0.62rem 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.review-form textarea {
+  resize: vertical;
+}

+.review-form input:focus,
+.review-form textarea:focus {

+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);
+}

+.hero-search {

+.hero-user-search {

+}
+
+.hero-search label {
+  text-align: left;
+}
+
+.recent-reviews {
+  padding: 3.2rem 1.5rem;
+  background: var(--bg-secondary);
+}
+
+.recent-reviews-rail {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-auto-flow: column;

+  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;

+.recent-review-card {
+  background: var(--bg-card);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);

+  border-color: var(--accent-alt);

+}

+.recent-review-card-info {

<sub>⏱️ 1497m 44s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Fixed — I shrunk and constrained the `+ Add Movie` tile so it stays inside its card.

### What I changed

- `.favorite-movie-card-add` now has `overflow: hidden`
- `.favorite-add-slot` changed from `aspect-ratio: 2/3` to a fixed `height: 170px`
- Added containment guards: `max-width: 100%`, `padding: 0`, `line-height: 1`, `overflow: hidden`

This prevents the plus tile from oversizing and clipping through the parent box.

If you want it even smaller, I can drop it to `150px` height.

25. function setMovieStatus(message, kind = "info") {
26.   if (!movieStatus) {
27.     return;
28.   }
29.   movieStatus.textContent = message;
30.   movieStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
31.   movieStatus.classList.add(kind);
32. }
33. 
34. function setReviewFormStatus(message, kind = "info") {
35.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
36.     return;
37.   }
38. 
39.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = false;
40.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = message;
41.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
42.   reviewFormStatus.classList.add(kind);
43. }
44. 
45. function clearReviewFormStatus() {
46.   if (!reviewFormStatus) {
47.     return;
48.   }
49.   reviewFormStatus.hidden = true;
50.   reviewFormStatus.textContent = "";
51.   reviewFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
52. }
53. 
54. function setFavoriteStatus(message, kind = "info") {
55.   if (!favoriteFormStatus) {
56.     return;
57.   }
58.   favoriteFormStatus.hidden = false;

64. function clearFavoriteStatus() {
65.   if (!favoriteFormStatus) {
66.     return;
67.   }

70.   favoriteFormStatus.classList.remove("success", "error", "info");
71. }
72. 
73. function updateFavoriteToggleButton() {
74.   if (!favoriteToggleButton) {
75.     return;
76.   }
77.   favoriteToggleButton.textContent = isMovieFavorited ? "Remove from Top Five" : "Add to Top Five";
78. }
79. 
80. async function refreshFavoriteState(movieId) {
81.   if (!favoriteToggleButton || !currentSession?.user?.id || !movieId) {
82.     return;
83.   }
84. 
85.   favoriteToggleButton.disabled = true;
86. 
87.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
88.     .from("user_favorites")
89.     .select("id")
90.     .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)
91.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
92.     .limit(1);
93. 
94.   favoriteToggleButton.disabled = false;
95. 
96.   if (error) {
97.     setFavoriteStatus(`Could not load favorite state: ${error.message}`, "error");
98.     return;
99.   }
100. 
101.   isMovieFavorited = Array.isArray(data) && data.length > 0;
102.   updateFavoriteToggleButton();
103. }
104. 
105. async function saveFavoriteMovie(movie) {
106.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !movie?.id) {
107.     setFavoriteStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
108.     return false;
109.   }
110. 
111.   if (isFavoriteSubmitting) {
112.     return false;
113.   }
114. 
115.   isFavoriteSubmitting = true;
116.   if (favoriteToggleButton) {
117.     favoriteToggleButton.disabled = true;
118.   }
119.   setFavoriteStatus("Saving favorite...", "info");
120. 
121.   try {
122.     const { data: existingFavorites, error: existingError } = await window.supabaseClient
123.       .from("user_favorites")
124.       .select("id, movie_id")
125.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)
126.       .order("created_at", { ascending: true });
127. 
128.     if (existingError) {
129.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not check favorites: ${existingError.message}`, "error");
130.       return false;
131.     }
132. 
133.     const favorites = existingFavorites || [];
134.     if (favorites.some((favorite) => favorite.movie_id === movie.id)) {
135.       setFavoriteStatus("This movie is already in your top five.", "info");
136.       return false;
137.     }
138. 
139.     if (favorites.length >= 5) {
140.       setFavoriteStatus("You can only have five favorite movies.", "error");
141.       return false;
142.     }
143. 
144.     const { error: insertError } = await window.supabaseClient
145.       .from("user_favorites")
146.       .insert({
147.         user_id: currentSession.user.id,
148.         movie_id: movie.id,
149.         movie_title: movie.title || "Untitled",
150.         poster_path: typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : null,
151.       });
152. 
153.     if (insertError) {
154.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not save favorite: ${insertError.message}`, "error");
155.       return false;
156.     }
157. 
158.     setFavoriteStatus("Added to your top five favorites.", "success");
159.     return true;
160.   } finally {
161.     isFavoriteSubmitting = false;
162.     if (favoriteToggleButton) {
163.       favoriteToggleButton.disabled = false;
164.     }
165.   }
166. }
167. 
168. async function removeFavoriteMovie(movie) {
169.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !movie?.id) {
170.     setFavoriteStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
171.     return false;
172.   }
173. 
174.   if (isFavoriteSubmitting) {
175.     return false;
176.   }
177. 
178.   isFavoriteSubmitting = true;
179.   if (favoriteToggleButton) {
180.     favoriteToggleButton.disabled = true;
181.   }
182.   setFavoriteStatus("Removing favorite...", "info");
183. 
184.   try {
185.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
186.       .from("user_favorites")
187.       .delete()
188.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)
189.       .eq("movie_id", movie.id);
190. 
191.     if (error) {
192.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not remove favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
193.       return false;
194.     }
195. 
196.     setFavoriteStatus("Removed from your top five favorites.", "success");
197.     return true;
198.   } finally {
199.     isFavoriteSubmitting = false;
200.     if (favoriteToggleButton) {
201.       favoriteToggleButton.disabled = false;
202.     }
203.   }
204. }
205. 
206. async function toggleFavoriteMovie(movie) {
207.   const success = isMovieFavorited
208.     ? await removeFavoriteMovie(movie)
209.     : await saveFavoriteMovie(movie);
210. 
211.   if (!success) {
212.     await refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
213.     return;
214.   }
215. 
216.   isMovieFavorited = !isMovieFavorited;
217.   updateFavoriteToggleButton();
218. }

220. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
221.   const el = document.createElement(tag);
222.   if (className) {
223.     el.className = className;
224.   }
225.   if (typeof text === "string") {
226.     el.textContent = text;
227.   }
228.   return el;
229. }
230. 
231. function getYear(dateString) {
232.   return dateString ? dateString.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
233. }
234. 
235. function getDirector(credits) {
236.   const crew = Array.isArray(credits?.crew) ? credits.crew : [];
237.   const director = crew.find((member) => member.job === "Director");
238.   return director?.name || "Unknown";
239. }
240. 
241. function getCast(credits) {
242.   const cast = Array.isArray(credits?.cast) ? credits.cast : [];
243.   if (cast.length === 0) {
244.     return "Unknown";
245.   }
246.   return cast.slice(0, 6).map((member) => member.name).join(", ");
247. }
248. 
249. function createMetaLine(label, value) {
250.   const p = makeElement("p", "result-meta");
251.   const strong = document.createElement("strong");
252.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
253.   p.appendChild(strong);
254.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
255.   return p;
256. }
257. 
258. function resolveUsername(session) {
259.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
260.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
261.     return metadata.username.trim();
262.   }
263.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
264.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
265.   }
266.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
267.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
268.   }
269.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
270.   if (email.includes("@")) {
271.     return email.split("@")[0];
272.   }
273.   return "Current User";
274. }
275. 
276. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
277.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
278. }
279. 
280. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
281.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
282.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
283.     return;
284.   }
285. 
286.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
287.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
288.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
289.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
290.       ? storedUsername
291.       : "Unknown User";
292.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
293.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
294.     let avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
295.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
296.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
297. 
298.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
299.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
300.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
301.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
302.     } else {
303.       avatar = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
304.     }
305. 
306.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
307.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
308.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
309.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
310.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
311.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
312.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
313.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
314. 
315.     avatarWrap.appendChild(avatar);
316.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
317.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
318.     card.appendChild(heading);
319.     card.appendChild(body);
320.     card.appendChild(stamp);
321.     return card;
322.   });
323. 
324.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
325. }
326. 
327. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
328.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
329. 
330.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
331.     .from("movie_reviews")
332.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
333.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
334.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
335. 
336.   if (error) {
337.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
338.     return;
339.   }
340. 
341.   const usernames = [...new Set(
342.     (data || [])
343.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
344.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
345.   )];
346. 
347.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
348.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
349.       .from("profiles")
350.       .select("username, avatar_url")
351.       .in("username", usernames);
352. 
353.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
354.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
355.       if (!key) {
356.         continue;
357.       }
358.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
359.     }
360.   }
361. 
362.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
363. }
364. 
365. function openReviewModal() {
366.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
367.     return;
368.   }
369. 
370.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
371.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
372.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
373.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
374.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
375. 
376.   clearReviewFormStatus();
377.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
378. }
379. 
380. function closeReviewModal() {
381.   if (!reviewModal) {
382.     return;
383.   }
384.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
385.   clearReviewFormStatus();
386. }
387. 
388. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
389.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
390.   currentMovie = movie;
391. 
392.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
393.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
394.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
395.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
396. 
397.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
398.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
399.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
400.     poster.loading = "lazy";
401.   }
402. 
403.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
404.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
405.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
406.   heading.appendChild(year);
407. 
408.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
409.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
410.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
411.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
412.     : "Genres unavailable";
413. 
414.   content.appendChild(heading);
415.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
416.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
417.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
418.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
419.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
420.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
421.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
422. 
423.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
424.   reviewButton.type = "button";
425.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
426.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
427. 
428.   favoriteToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline write-review-btn", "Add to Top Five");
429.   favoriteToggleButton.type = "button";
430.   favoriteToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
431.     toggleFavoriteMovie(movie);
432.   });
433.   content.appendChild(favoriteToggleButton);
434. 
435.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
436.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
437.   clearFavoriteStatus();
438.   void refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
439. }
440. 
441. async function loadMoviePage() {
442.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
443.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
444. 
445.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
446.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
447.     return;
448.   }
449. 
450.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
451.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
452.     return;
453.   }
454. 
455.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
456.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
457.     return;
458.   }
459. 
460.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
461.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
462.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
463.     return;
464.   }
465. 
466.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
467.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
468.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
469. 
470.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
471. 
472.   try {
473.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
474.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
475.     const payload = await response.json();
476. 
477.     if (!response.ok) {
478.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
479.     }
480. 
481.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
482.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
483.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
484.   } catch (error) {
485.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
486.   }
487. }
488. 
489. if (reviewModalClose) {
490.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
491. }
492. 
493. if (reviewModal) {
494.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
495.     const target = event.target;
496.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
497.       closeReviewModal();
498.     }
499.   });
500. }
501. 
502. if (reviewForm) {
503.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
504.     event.preventDefault();
505. 
506.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
507.       return;
508.     }
509. 
510.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
511. 
512.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
513.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
514.       return;
515.     }
516. 
517.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
518.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
519. 
520.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
521.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
522.       return;
523.     }
524. 
525.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
526.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
527.       return;
528.     }
529. 
530.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
531.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
532.     if (submitButton) {
533.       submitButton.disabled = true;
534.     }
535. 
536.     const payload = {
537.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
538.       username: currentUsername,
539.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
540.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
541.       rating: ratingValue,
542.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
543.     };
544. 
545.     try {
546.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
547.         .from("movie_reviews")
548.         .insert(payload);
549. 
550.       if (error) {
551.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
552.         return;
553.       }
554. 
555.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
556.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
557.       reviewForm.reset();
558.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
559.     } finally {
560.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
561.       if (submitButton) {
562.         submitButton.disabled = false;
563.       }
564.     }
565.   });
566. }
567. 
568. loadMoviePage();
569.
```

1. <!DOCTYPE html>
2. <html lang="en">
3. <head>
4.   <meta charset="UTF-8" />
5.   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
6.   <title>KinoRate Movie Details</title>
7.   <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" />
8. </head>
9. <body data-page="movie">
10.   <div id="app-shell" hidden>
11.     <nav>
12.       <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">Kino<span>Rate</span></a>
13.       <ul class="nav-links">
14.         <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
15.         <li><a href="search.html">Movie Search</a></li>
16.         <li id="nav-user" class="nav-user"></li>
17.         <li><button id="logout-button" type="button" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Logout</button></li>
18.       </ul>
19.     </nav>
20. 
21.     <main class="movie-page">
22.       <p id="movie-status" class="tmdb-status info">Loading movie details...</p>
23. 
24.       <section id="movie-detail-card" class="movie-detail-card" aria-live="polite"></section>
25.       <p id="favorite-form-status" class="tmdb-status info" hidden></p>
26. 
27.       <section class="movie-reviews-placeholder">
28.         <div class="section-header">
29.           <h2>Movie <span>Reviews</span></h2>
30.           <p>Reviews shown here are for this movie only.</p>
31.         </div>
32.         <div id="movie-user-reviews" class="reviews-list" aria-live="polite"></div>

46.         </div>
47.       </div>

16.     return;
17.   }

23. function makeElement(tag, className, text) {
24.   const element = document.createElement(tag);
25.   if (className) {
26.     element.className = className;
27.   }
28.   if (typeof text === "string") {
29.     element.textContent = text;
30.   }
31.   return element;
32. }
33. 
34. function getProfileParam() {
35.   const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
36.   const username = params.get("username");
37.   const userId = params.get("id");
38. 
39.   if (username && username.trim()) {
40.     return { type: "username", value: username.trim() };
41.   }
42. 
43.   if (userId && userId.trim()) {
44.     return { type: "id", value: userId.trim() };
45.   }
46. 
47.   return null;
48. }
49. 
50. function deriveUsernameFromSession(session) {
51.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
52.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
53.     return metadata.username.trim();
54.   }
55.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
56.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
57.   }
58.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
59.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
60.   }
61.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
62.   if (email.includes("@")) {
63.     return email.split("@")[0].trim();
64.   }
65.   return "";
66. }
67. 
68. function resolveAvatarUrl(profile) {
69.   if (typeof profile.avatar_url === "string" && profile.avatar_url.trim()) {
70.     return profile.avatar_url.trim();
71.   }
72.   return "";
73. }
74. 
75. function sanitizeAvatarUrl(rawValue) {
76.   const value = typeof rawValue === "string" ? rawValue.trim() : "";
77.   if (!value) {
78.     return { ok: true, value: "" };
79.   }
80. 
81.   try {
82.     const parsed = new URL(value);
83.     if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
84.       return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://." };
85.     }
86.     return { ok: true, value: parsed.toString() };
87.   } catch {
88.     return { ok: false, error: "Avatar URL is invalid." };
89.   }
90. }
91.

98. 
99.   if (avatarUrl) {
100.     avatar = makeElement("img", "user-profile-avatar");

121. function buildProfileEditForm(profile, onSaved) {
122.   const form = makeElement("form", "profile-edit-form");
123.   form.id = "profile-edit-form";
124. 
125.   const usernameLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Username");
126.   usernameLabel.htmlFor = "profile-username";
127.   const usernameInput = makeElement("input", "");
128.   usernameInput.id = "profile-username";
129.   usernameInput.name = "username";
130.   usernameInput.required = true;
131.   usernameInput.maxLength = 50;
132.   usernameInput.value = profile.username || "";
133. 
134.   const avatarLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Profile picture URL");
135.   avatarLabel.htmlFor = "profile-avatar-url";
136.   const avatarInput = makeElement("input", "");
137.   avatarInput.id = "profile-avatar-url";
138.   avatarInput.name = "avatarUrl";
139.   avatarInput.type = "url";
140.   avatarInput.placeholder = "https://...";
141.   avatarInput.value = profile.avatar_url || "";
142. 
143.   const bioLabel = makeElement("label", "", "Bio");
144.   bioLabel.htmlFor = "profile-bio";
145.   const bioInput = makeElement("textarea", "");
146.   bioInput.id = "profile-bio";
147.   bioInput.name = "bio";
148.   bioInput.rows = 4;
149.   bioInput.maxLength = 500;
150.   bioInput.value = profile.bio || "";
151. 
152.   const status = makeElement("p", "tmdb-status info", "");
153.   status.id = "profile-edit-status";
154.   status.hidden = true;
155. 
156.   const saveButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn", "Save Profile");
157.   saveButton.type = "submit";
158. 
159.   form.appendChild(usernameLabel);
160.   form.appendChild(usernameInput);
161.   form.appendChild(avatarLabel);
162.   form.appendChild(avatarInput);
163.   form.appendChild(bioLabel);
164.   form.appendChild(bioInput);
165.   form.appendChild(status);
166.   form.appendChild(saveButton);
167. 
168.   form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
169.     event.preventDefault();
170. 
171.     const nextUsername = usernameInput.value.trim();
172.     const nextAvatar = avatarInput.value.trim();
173.     const nextBio = bioInput.value.trim();
174. 
175.     if (!nextUsername) {
176.       status.hidden = false;
177.       status.textContent = "Username is required.";
178.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
179.       status.classList.add("error");
180.       return;
181.     }
182. 
183.     const avatarCheck = sanitizeAvatarUrl(nextAvatar);
184.     if (!avatarCheck.ok) {
185.       status.hidden = false;
186.       status.textContent = avatarCheck.error;
187.       status.classList.remove("success", "info");
188.       status.classList.add("error");
189.       return;
190.     }
191. 
192.     status.hidden = false;
193.     status.textContent = "Saving profile...";
194.     status.classList.remove("success", "error");
195.     status.classList.add("info");
196. 
197.     const oldUsername = profile.username;
198.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient.rpc("update_profile_and_review_usernames", {
199.       p_user_id: profile.id,
200.       p_username: nextUsername,

228. function renderOwnerControls(profile) {
229.   const actions = makeElement("div", "profile-owner-actions");
230.   const editToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Profile");
231.   editToggleButton.type = "button";
232.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
233.   userProfileCard.appendChild(actions);
234. 
235.   let editForm = null;
236. 
237.   editToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
238.     if (editForm) {
239.       editForm.remove();
240.       editForm = null;
241.       editToggleButton.textContent = "Edit Profile";
242.       return;
243.     }
244. 
245.     editForm = buildProfileEditForm(profile, async (usernameChanged) => {
246.       renderProfileHeader(profile);
247.       renderOwnerControls(profile);
248.       if (usernameChanged) {
249.         window.history.replaceState({}, "", `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(profile.username)}`);
250.       }
251.       await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
252.       await loadUserFavorites(profile.id);
253.     });
254. 
255.     userProfileCard.appendChild(editForm);

257.   });
258. }
259. 
260. function createFavoritePoster(favorite) {
261.   const posterPath = typeof favorite.poster_path === "string" ? favorite.poster_path : "";
262.   if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
263.     return makeElement("div", "favorite-movie-poster favorite-movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
264.   }
265. 
266.   const poster = makeElement("img", "favorite-movie-poster");
267.   poster.src = `https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w342${posterPath}`;
268.   poster.alt = `${favorite.movie_title || "Movie"} poster`;
269.   poster.loading = "lazy";
270.   return poster;
271. }
272. 
273. function createAddFavoriteSlot() {
274.   const button = makeElement("button", "favorite-add-slot", "+");
275.   button.type = "button";
276.   button.setAttribute("aria-label", "Add movie to top five");
277.   const label = makeElement("span", "favorite-add-slot-label", "Add Movie");
278.   button.appendChild(label);
279.   return button;
280. }
281. 
282. function getTmdbApiKey() {
283.   const apiKey = window.appConfig?.tmdb?.apiKey;
284.   return typeof apiKey === "string" && apiKey.trim() ? apiKey.trim() : "";
285. }
286. 
287. async function searchMoviesByTitle(query) {
288.   const apiKey = getTmdbApiKey();
289.   if (!apiKey) {
290.     throw new Error("TMDB API key is missing.");
291.   }
292. 
293.   const endpoint = `${TMDB_SEARCH_BASE}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
294.   const response = await fetch(endpoint);
295.   const payload = await response.json();
296. 
297.   if (!response.ok) {
298.     throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Movie search failed.");
299.   }
300.

300. 
301.   const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results : [];
302.   return results.slice(0, 8).map((movie) => ({
303.     id: Number(movie.id),
304.     title: typeof movie.title === "string" ? movie.title : "Untitled",

307.   })).filter((movie) => Number.isFinite(movie.id) && movie.id > 0);

309. 
310. async function addFavoriteFromMovieResult(movie, triggerButton) {
311.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !viewedProfile?.id || !movie?.id) {
312.     setStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
313.     return false;
314.   }
315. 
316.   if (viewedProfile.id !== currentSession.user.id) {
317.     setStatus("You can only edit your own top five.", "error");
318.     return false;
319.   }
320. 
321.   if (currentFavorites.some((favorite) => favorite.movie_id === movie.id)) {
322.     setStatus("This movie is already in your top five.", "info");
323.     return false;
324.   }
325. 
326.   if (currentFavorites.length >= 5) {
327.     setStatus("You can only have five favorite movies.", "error");
328.     return false;
329.   }
330. 
331.   if (triggerButton) {
332.     triggerButton.disabled = true;
333.   }
334. 
335.   const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
336.     .from("user_favorites")
337.     .insert({
338.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
339.       movie_id: movie.id,
340.       movie_title: movie.title || "Untitled",
341.       poster_path: movie.poster_path || null
342.     });
343. 
344.   if (triggerButton) {
345.     triggerButton.disabled = false;
346.   }
347. 
348.   if (error) {
349.     setStatus(`Could not add favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
350.     return false;
351.   }
352. 
353.   setStatus(`Added "${movie.title}" to your top five.`, "success");
354.   await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
355.   return true;
356. }
357. 
358. function openAddFavoriteModal() {
359.   const modal = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-modal");
360.   modal.setAttribute("role", "dialog");
361.   modal.setAttribute("aria-modal", "true");
362.   modal.setAttribute("aria-label", "Add movie to top five");
363. 
364.   const backdrop = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-modal-backdrop");
365.   const panel = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-modal-panel");
366.   const header = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-modal-header");
367.   const title = makeElement("h3", "", "Add Movie to Top Five");
368.   const closeButton = makeElement("button", "review-modal-close", "×");
369.   closeButton.type = "button";
370.   closeButton.setAttribute("aria-label", "Close add movie popup");
371.   header.appendChild(title);
372.   header.appendChild(closeButton);
373. 
374.   const searchForm = makeElement("form", "favorite-add-search-form");
375.   const input = makeElement("input", "favorite-add-input");
376.   input.type = "search";
377.   input.placeholder = "Search movie title...";
378.   input.required = true;
379.   input.maxLength = 120;
380. 
381.   const submit = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Search");
382.   submit.type = "submit";
383.   searchForm.appendChild(input);
384.   searchForm.appendChild(submit);
385. 
386.   const resultList = makeElement("ul", "favorite-add-results");
387. 
388.   function closeModal() {
389.     modal.remove();
390.     document.body.classList.remove("modal-open");
391.     document.removeEventListener("keydown", onEscape);
392.   }
393. 
394.   function onEscape(event) {
395.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
396.       closeModal();
397.     }
398.   }
399. 
400.   function renderResults(items) {
401.     resultList.replaceChildren();
402.     if (!items.length) {
403.       resultList.appendChild(makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-info", "No movies found."));
404.       return;
405.     }
406. 
407.     for (const movie of items) {
408.       const item = makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-item");
409.       const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
410.       let poster;
411.       if (posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
412.         poster = makeElement("img", "favorite-add-result-poster");
413.         poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
414.         poster.alt = `${movie.title} poster`;
415.         poster.loading = "lazy";
416.       } else {
417.         poster = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-result-poster favorite-movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
418.       }
419. 
420.       const text = makeElement("div", "favorite-add-result-text");
421.       text.appendChild(makeElement("span", "favorite-add-result-title", movie.title));
422.       const year = movie.release_date ? movie.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
423.       text.appendChild(makeElement("span", "favorite-add-result-year", year));
424. 
425.       const addButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Add");
426.       addButton.type = "button";
427.       addButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
428.         const added = await addFavoriteFromMovieResult(movie, addButton);
429.         if (added) {
430.           closeModal();
431.         }
432.       });
433. 
434.       item.appendChild(poster);
435.       item.appendChild(text);
436.       item.appendChild(addButton);
437.       resultList.appendChild(item);
438.     }
439.   }
440. 
441.   searchForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
442.     event.preventDefault();
443.     const query = input.value.trim();
444.     if (!query) {
445.       return;
446.     }
447. 
448.     submit.disabled = true;
449.     resultList.replaceChildren(makeElement("li", "favorite-add-result-info", "Searching..."));
450.

475. function buildAddFavoriteCard() {
476.   const card = makeElement("article", "favorite-movie-card favorite-movie-card-add");

485. 
486. function renderFavorites(favorites) {
487.   if (!userFavoritesGrid) {
488.     return;
489.   }
490. 
491.   const safeFavorites = Array.isArray(favorites) ? favorites : [];
492. 
493.   if (safeFavorites.length === 0 && !(isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode)) {
494.     userFavoritesGrid.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No favorites added yet."));
495.     return;
496.   }
497. 
498.   const cards = safeFavorites.map((favorite) => {
499.     const card = makeElement("article", "favorite-movie-card");
500. 
501.     const link = makeElement("a", "favorite-movie-link");
502.     link.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(favorite.movie_id))}`;
503.     link.appendChild(createFavoritePoster(favorite));
504.     link.appendChild(makeElement("p", "favorite-movie-title", favorite.movie_title || `Movie #${favorite.movie_id}`));
505.     card.appendChild(link);
506. 
507.     if (isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode && favorite.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
508.       const removeButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Remove");
509.       removeButton.type = "button";
510.       removeButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
511.         removeButton.disabled = true;
512.         const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
513.           .from("user_favorites")
514.           .delete()
515.           .eq("id", favorite.id)
516.           .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);
517. 
518.         if (error) {
519.           setStatus(`Could not remove favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
520.           removeButton.disabled = false;
521.           return;
522.         }
523. 
524.         await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id);
525.       });
526.       card.appendChild(removeButton);
527.     }
528. 
529.     return card;
530.   });
531. 
532.   if (isOwnerView && isFavoritesEditMode && safeFavorites.length < 5) {
533.     cards.push(buildAddFavoriteCard());
534.   }
535. 
536.   userFavoritesGrid.replaceChildren(...cards);
537. }

539. function renderFavoritesOwnerControls() {
540.   const topFiveSection = document.getElementById("user-top-five");
541.   if (!topFiveSection || !isOwnerView) {

552.   editToggleButton.type = "button";

554.     isFavoritesEditMode = !isFavoritesEditMode;

556.   });
557. 
558.   actions.appendChild(editToggleButton);
559.   topFiveSection.appendChild(actions);
560. }

586.

589.

595.   });
596.

598.     event.preventDefault();
599. 
600.     const nextRating = Number(ratingInput.value);

661. function renderReviewCards(reviews) {
662.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
663.     userReviewsList.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet."));
664.     return;
665.   }
666. 
667.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
668.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
669. 
670.     const title = makeElement("h3", "user-review-movie-title", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
671.     const titleLink = makeElement("a", "", review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`);
672.     titleLink.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(review.movie_id || ""))}`;
673.     title.replaceChildren(titleLink);
674. 
675.     const rating = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
676.     const text = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
677.     const date = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", review.created_at ? `Saved: ${new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString()}` : "");
678. 
679.     card.appendChild(title);
680.     card.appendChild(rating);
681.     card.appendChild(text);
682.     card.appendChild(date);
683. 
684.     if (isOwnerView && review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id) {
685.       const editButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline btn-sm", "Edit Review");
686.       editButton.type = "button";
687. 
688.       editButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
689.         const editForm = buildReviewEditForm(review, async (saved) => {
690.           if (saved) {
691.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
692.           } else {
693.             await loadUserReviews(viewedProfile.id);
694.           }
695.         });
696. 
697.         card.appendChild(editForm);
698.         editButton.disabled = true;
699.       });
700. 
701.       card.appendChild(editButton);
702.     }
703. 
704.     return card;
705.   });
706. 
707.   userReviewsList.replaceChildren(...cards);
708. }
709. 
710. async function loadUserReviews(profileId) {
711.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
712.     .from("movie_reviews")
713.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
714.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
715.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
716. 
717.   if (error) {
718.     setStatus(`Could not load user reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
719.     return;
720.   }
721. 
722.   renderReviewCards(data || []);
723. }
724. 
725. async function loadUserFavorites(profileId) {
726.   if (!userFavoritesGrid) {
727.     return;
728.   }
729. 
730.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
731.     .from("user_favorites")
732.     .select("id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, poster_path, created_at")
733.     .eq("user_id", profileId)
734.     .order("created_at", { ascending: true })
735.     .limit(5);
736. 
737.   if (error) {
738.     setStatus(`Could not load favorites: ${error.message}`, "error");
739.     return;
740.   }
741. 
742.   currentFavorites = data || [];
743.   renderFavoritesOwnerControls();
744.   renderFavorites(currentFavorites);
745. }
746. 
747. async function loadProfile() {
748.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
749.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
750.     setStatus("You must be signed in.", "error");
751.     return;
752.   }
753. 
754.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
755. 
756.   const profileQuery = getProfileParam();
757.   let profile;
758.   let profileError;
759. 
760.   if (!profileQuery) {
761.     const fallbackUsername = deriveUsernameFromSession(currentSession);
762.     if (!fallbackUsername) {
763.       setStatus("No user specified.", "error");
764.       return;
765.     }
766. 
767.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
768.       .from("profiles")
769.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
770.       .eq("username", fallbackUsername)
771.       .maybeSingle());
772.   } else if (profileQuery.type === "username") {
773.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
774.       .from("profiles")
775.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
776.       .eq("username", profileQuery.value)
777.       .maybeSingle());
778.   } else {
779.     ({ data: profile, error: profileError } = await window.supabaseClient
780.       .from("profiles")
781.       .select("id, username, avatar_url, bio")
782.       .eq("id", profileQuery.value)
783.       .maybeSingle());
784.   }
785. 
786.   if (profileError) {
787.     setStatus(`Could not load user profile: ${profileError.message}`, "error");
788.     return;
789.   }
790. 
791.   if (!profile?.id) {
792.     setStatus("User profile not found.", "error");
793.     userProfileCard.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "This user does not exist yet."));
794.     return;
795.   }
796. 
797.   viewedProfile = profile;
798.   isOwnerView = profile.id === currentSession.user.id;
799. 
800.   renderProfileHeader(profile);
801. 
802.   if (isOwnerView) {
803.     renderOwnerControls(profile);
804.   }
805. 
806.   await loadUserReviews(profile.id);
807.   await loadUserFavorites(profile.id);
808.   setStatus("User profile loaded.", "success");
809. }
810. 
811. loadProfile();
812.
```
