C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\copilot-session-7c7d8d16-e140-45cd-8c87-1e150a1ceed9.md:34658:"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\README.md\n@@\n ## Deploying to GitHub Pages\n@@\n 6. Visit the generated Pages URL and open `auth.html`.\n+\n+## Supabase Profiles Setup (for public user pages)\n+\n+Run this once in Supabase SQL Editor:\n+\n+```sql\n+create table if not exists public.profiles (\n+  id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,\n+  username text not null unique,\n+  display_name text,\n+  bio text,\n+  avatar_url text,\n+  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n+  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()\n+);\n+\n+create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()\n+returns trigger\n+language plpgsql\n+security definer\n+set search_path = public\n+as $$\n+declare\n+  base_username text;\n+begin\n+  base_username := coalesce(\n+    nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),\n+    split_part(new.email, '@', 1),\n+    'user'\n+  );\n+\n+  insert into public.profiles (id, username)\n+  values (new.id, base_username)\n+  on conflict (id) do nothing;\n+\n+  return new;\n+end;\n+$$;\n+\n+drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;\n+create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile\n+after insert on auth.users\n+for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();\n+\n+alter table public.profiles enable row level security;\n+\n+drop policy if exists \"profiles public read\" on public.profiles;\n+create policy \"profiles public read\"\n+on public.profiles\n+for select\n+to authenticated\n+using (true);\n+\n+drop policy if exists \"profiles owner insert\" on public.profiles;\n+create policy \"profiles owner insert\"\n+on public.profiles\n+for insert\n+to authenticated\n+with check (auth.uid() = id);\n+\n+drop policy if exists \"profiles owner update\" on public.profiles;\n+create policy \"profiles owner update\"\n+on public.profiles\n+for update\n+to authenticated\n+using (auth.uid() = id)\n+with check (auth.uid() = id);\n+```\n+\n+The app now reads usernames from `profiles` for user search and nav display, with fallback to email prefix.\n*** End Patch\n"

<details>

````
60. create table if not exists public.profiles (
61.   id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
62.   username text not null unique,
63.   display_name text,
64.   bio text,
65.   avatar_url text,
66.   created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
67.   updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
68. );
69. 
70. create or replace function public.handle_new_user_profile()
71. returns trigger
72. language plpgsql
73. security definer
74. set search_path = public
75. as $$
76. declare
77.   base_username text;
78. begin
79.   base_username := coalesce(
80.     nullif(trim(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username'), ''),
81.     split_part(new.email, '@', 1),
82.     'user'
83.   );
84. 
85.   insert into public.profiles (id, username)
86.   values (new.id, base_username)
87.   on conflict (id) do nothing;
88. 
89.   return new;
90. end;
91. $$;
92. 
93. drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created_profile on auth.users;
94. create trigger on_auth_user_created_profile
95. after insert on auth.users
96. for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user_profile();
97. 
98. alter table public.profiles enable row level security;
99. 
100. drop policy if exists "profiles public read" on public.profiles;
101. create policy "profiles public read"
102. on public.profiles
103. for select
104. to authenticated
105. using (true);
106. 
107. drop policy if exists "profiles owner insert" on public.profiles;
108. create policy "profiles owner insert"
109. on public.profiles
110. for insert
111. to authenticated
112. with check (auth.uid() = id);
113. 
114. drop policy if exists "profiles owner update" on public.profiles;
115. create policy "profiles owner update"
116. on public.profiles
117. for update
118. to authenticated
119. using (auth.uid() = id)
120. with check (auth.uid() = id);
121. 
122. ```
123. 
124. The app now reads usernames from `profiles` for user search and nav display, with fallback to email prefix.
125. 
126. ## Project Structure
127. 
128. ```
129. .
130. ├── index.html              # Protected home page
131. ├── auth.html               # Signup/login page
132. ├── search.html             # Phase 2 movie search scaffold + TMDB health check
133. ├── style.css               # Shared styling
134. └── js/
135.     ├── supabase-config.example.js  # Template config (safe to commit)
136.     ├── supabase-config.js          # Local secrets (gitignored)
137.     ├── auth.js                     # Auth logic and route guards
138.     ├── index-search.js             # Index typeahead search
139.     └── search.js                   # TMDB connection test logic
140. ```
141. 
142.
````

105. async function saveFavoriteMovie(movie) {
106.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !movie?.id) {
107.     setFavoriteStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
108.     return false;
109.   }
110. 
111.   if (isFavoriteSubmitting) {
112.     return false;
113.   }
114. 
115.   isFavoriteSubmitting = true;
116.   if (favoriteToggleButton) {
117.     favoriteToggleButton.disabled = true;
118.   }
119.   setFavoriteStatus("Saving favorite...", "info");
120. 
121.   try {
122.     const { data: existingFavorites, error: existingError } = await window.supabaseClient
123.       .from("user_favorites")
124.       .select("id, movie_id")
125.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)
126.       .order("created_at", { ascending: true });
127. 
128.     if (existingError) {
129.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not check favorites: ${existingError.message}`, "error");
130.       return false;
131.     }
132. 
133.     const favorites = existingFavorites || [];
134.     if (favorites.some((favorite) => favorite.movie_id === movie.id)) {
135.       setFavoriteStatus("This movie is already in your top five.", "info");
136.       return false;
137.     }
138. 
139.     if (favorites.length >= 5) {
140.       setFavoriteStatus("You can only have five favorite movies.", "error");
141.       return false;
142.     }
143. 
144.     const { error: insertError } = await window.supabaseClient
145.       .from("user_favorites")
146.       .insert({
147.         user_id: currentSession.user.id,
148.         movie_id: movie.id,
149.         movie_title: movie.title || "Untitled",
150.         poster_path: typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : null,
151.       });
152. 
153.     if (insertError) {
154.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not save favorite: ${insertError.message}`, "error");
155.       return false;
156.     }
157. 
158.     setFavoriteStatus("Added to your top five favorites.", "success");
159.     return true;
160.   } finally {
161.     isFavoriteSubmitting = false;
162.     if (favoriteToggleButton) {
163.       favoriteToggleButton.disabled = false;
164.     }
165.   }
166. }
167. 
168. async function removeFavoriteMovie(movie) {
169.   if (!currentSession?.user?.id || !movie?.id) {
170.     setFavoriteStatus("Session or movie context missing.", "error");
171.     return false;
172.   }
173. 
174.   if (isFavoriteSubmitting) {
175.     return false;
176.   }
177. 
178.   isFavoriteSubmitting = true;
179.   if (favoriteToggleButton) {
180.     favoriteToggleButton.disabled = true;
181.   }
182.   setFavoriteStatus("Removing favorite...", "info");
183. 
184.   try {
185.     const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
186.       .from("user_favorites")
187.       .delete()
188.       .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id)
189.       .eq("movie_id", movie.id);
190. 
191.     if (error) {
192.       setFavoriteStatus(`Could not remove favorite: ${error.message}`, "error");
193.       return false;
194.     }
195. 
196.     setFavoriteStatus("Removed from your top five favorites.", "success");
197.     return true;
198.   } finally {
199.     isFavoriteSubmitting = false;
200.     if (favoriteToggleButton) {
201.       favoriteToggleButton.disabled = false;
202.     }
203.   }
204. }
205. 
206. async function toggleFavoriteMovie(movie) {
207.   const success = isMovieFavorited
208.     ? await removeFavoriteMovie(movie)
209.     : await saveFavoriteMovie(movie);
210. 
211.   if (!success) {
212.     await refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
213.     return;
214.   }
215. 
216.   isMovieFavorited = !isMovieFavorited;
217.   updateFavoriteToggleButton();
218. }

388. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
389.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
390.   currentMovie = movie;
391. 
392.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
393.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
394.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
395.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
396. 
397.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
398.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
399.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
400.     poster.loading = "lazy";
401.   }
402. 
403.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
404.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
405.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
406.   heading.appendChild(year);
407. 
408.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
409.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
410.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
411.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
412.     : "Genres unavailable";
413. 
414.   content.appendChild(heading);
415.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
416.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
417.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
418.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
419.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
420.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
421.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
422. 
423.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
424.   reviewButton.type = "button";
425.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
426.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
427. 
428.   favoriteToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline write-review-btn", "Add to Top Five");
429.   favoriteToggleButton.type = "button";
430.   favoriteToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
431.     toggleFavoriteMovie(movie);
432.   });
433.   content.appendChild(favoriteToggleButton);
434. 
435.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
436.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
437.   clearFavoriteStatus();
438.   void refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
439. }
440.
```

### 💬 Copilot

Great! Now I found a critical race condition. Let me verify the exact issues by examining the code paths more carefully. Let me also check the user.js addFavoriteFromMovieResult function more carefully for race conditions:

Now I have enough information. Let me create a comprehensive report of the substantive issues I found.

## Issue: Race condition in movie.js favorite toggle state management
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js:428-438
**Severity:** High
**Problem:** In `renderMovieDetail()`, the function creates a new favorite toggle button, resets `isMovieFavorited = false` (implicitly via module initialization state), and then asynchronously calls `refreshFavoriteState()` with `void`. This creates a race condition where if a user clicks the toggle button before `refreshFavoriteState()` completes, the `isMovieFavorited` state will be incorrect, causing the wrong action (add instead of remove, or vice versa).

The flow is:
1. Line 428-433: Create new button and attach click handler that reads `isMovieFavorited`
2. Line 437: `clearFavoriteStatus()` 
3. Line 438: `void refreshFavoriteState(movie.id)` - async, not awaited
4. User can click button before line 438 finishes, using stale `isMovieFavorited = false`

**Evidence:** 
- `isMovieFavorited` is a module-level variable (line 21) initialized to `false`
- `renderMovieDetail()` is synchronous and doesn't reset `isMovieFavorited` before calling async `refreshFavoriteState()`
- `toggleFavoriteMovie()` (line 206-218) uses `isMovieFavorited` immediately when button is clicked
- The `void` keyword explicitly discards the promise, so there's no await

**Suggested fix:** Either:
1. Disable the button until `refreshFavoriteState()` completes: `favoriteToggleButton.disabled = true;` before line 438, and have `refreshFavoriteState()` re-enable it
2. Reset `isMovieFavorited = false` explicitly before line 438 and await the refresh call
3. Have `refreshFavoriteState()` return the state and set button disabled state accordingly

---

## Issue: Race condition allowing user to exceed 5 favorites limit
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js:122-142 and js/user.js:321-329
**Severity:** Critical
**Problem:** Both `saveFavoriteMovie()` and `addFavoriteFromMovieResult()` check if the user has 5 favorites using a read-check-write pattern without database-level enforcement. This creates a Time-of-Check-Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition. If a user opens multiple browser tabs or windows and adds favorites simultaneously, they can exceed the 5-favorite limit.

In movie.js:
```javascript
// Lines 122-142: Read existing favorites
const { data: existingFavorites } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("user_favorites")
  .select("id, movie_id")
  .eq("user_id", currentSession.user.id);

// Check count (RACE WINDOW HERE - another tab can insert between check and insert)
if (favorites.length \>= 5) {
  setFavoriteStatus("You can only have five favorite movies.", "error");
  return false;
}

// Lines 144-151: Insert
const { error: insertError } = await window.supabaseClient
  .from("user_favorites")
  .insert({...});
```

The same pattern exists in user.js lines 321-342.

**Evidence:** 
- The check at line 139 (movie.js) and line 326 (user.js) happens in JavaScript, not at the database level
- There's no unique constraint or check constraint in the database preventing more than 5 rows per user_id
- No locking mechanism exists between the SELECT and INSERT operations
- Database transactions are not used to ensure atomicity

**Suggested fix:** Add a database constraint to enforce the limit. Options:
1. Create a unique partial index or constraint that fails on insert #6
2. Use an RPC function with explicit locking: `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE` before checking count
3. Use a `BEFORE INSERT` trigger in Postgres that counts and raises an exception if \>= 5 exist
4. Handle the constraint violation gracefully in the JavaScript error handling

---

## Issue: State inconsistency after failed toggle in movie.js
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\movie.js:206-218
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** In `toggleFavoriteMovie()`, when `saveFavoriteMovie()` or `removeFavoriteMovie()` returns `false` (failure), the function calls `refreshFavoriteState()` to recover. However, `refreshFavoriteState()` is async and not awaited (line 212), meaning the function returns immediately. If there's a network delay, the UI state could show stale information until the refresh completes, and there's no feedback to the user that a refresh is in progress.

Additionally, the button may become re-enabled before the state is refreshed, allowing another click with stale state.

**Evidence:**
```javascript
if (!success) {
  await refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);  // MISSING await!
  return;
}
```

**Suggested fix:** Add `await` on line 212:
```javascript
if (!success) {
  await refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
  return;
}
```

---

## Issue: Missing RLS policy for user_favorites table
**File:** README.md (missing schema documentation) and database schema
**Severity:** Critical (Security)
**Problem:** The code references a `user_favorites` table throughout movie.js and user.js, but there's no schema definition or RLS policies documented in the README. The README only documents RLS policies for `profiles` (lines 98-120) and the session file mentions `movie_reviews` policies, but `user_favorites` is missing.

Without proper RLS policies, either:
1. The table is not accessible (all queries will fail with permission errors)
2. The table has overly permissive policies allowing users to read/modify other users' favorites

**Evidence:**
- README.md lines 60-121 show schema setup for `profiles` only
- grep for "user_favorites" in codebase shows no CREATE TABLE or CREATE POLICY statements
- The code assumes the table exists and is queryable (movie.js:88, 123, 145, 186; user.js:336, 513, 731)
- No documentation exists for the expected schema (columns: id, user_id, movie_id, movie_title, poster_path, created_at)

**Suggested fix:** Add to README.md and implement in Supabase:
```sql
create table if not exists public.user_favorites (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id uuid not null references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
  movie_id integer not null,
  movie_title text not null,
  poster_path text,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
);

alter table public.user_favorites enable row level security;

create policy "user_favorites public read"
  on public.user_favorites for select
  to authenticated
  using (true);

create policy "user_favorites owner insert"
  on public.user_favorites for insert
  to authenticated
  with check (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "user_favorites owner delete"
  on public.user_favorites for delete
  to authenticated
  using (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Add constraint to prevent duplicates
create unique index user_favorites_user_movie_idx 
  on user_favorites(user_id, movie_id);
```

---

## Issue: currentFavorites state not updated after successful add in user.js
**File:** C:\Users\Solar\Downloads\midtermai2\MidtermDIG4503C\js\user.js:310-356
**Severity:** Medium
**Problem:** In `addFavoriteFromMovieResult()`, the function checks `currentFavorites` to enforce the 5-favorite limit and prevent duplicates (lines 321-328). However, `currentFavorites` is a module-level cache that's only updated when `loadUserFavorites()` is called. The function calls `loadUserFavorites()` at line 354, but this is after checking the stale cache, creating a race condition if the user clicks "Add" on multiple movies quickly.

Scenario:
1. User has 4 favorites, `currentFavorites.length = 4`
2. User clicks "Add" on Movie A - passes check (4 \< 5), starts insert
3. While Movie A insert is in flight, user clicks "Add" on Movie B
4. Movie B check runs with stale `currentFavorites.length = 4` - passes!
5. Both inserts succeed, user now has 6 favorites

**Evidence:**
- Line 321-328: Check uses `currentFavorites` (stale cached array)
- Line 335-342: Database insert happens
- Line 354: `await loadUserFavorites()` updates cache AFTER insert
- No mutex/lock prevents concurrent `addFavoriteFromMovieResult()` calls
- `currentFavorites` is module-scoped (line 10), not request-scoped

**Suggested fix:** 
1. Add a loading/submitting guard similar to movie.js's `isFavoriteSubmitting`
2. Refresh `currentFavorites` before the check: `await loadUserFavorites(viewedProfile.id)` before line 321
3. Rely on database constraint (from Issue #2 fix) as the source of truth and handle the error gracefully

---

No significant issues found in the reviewed changes beyond the five critical/high severity issues documented above. The review form editing, profile editing, and search modal flows appear sound with proper validation and error handling.

### 💬 Copilot

I ran a focused review on recent Top Five changes and filtered out false positives.

**Real issues found:**

- **Critical:** max-5 is only enforced client-side (`js/movie.js` and `js/user.js`), so multi-tab/concurrent adds can exceed 5 (TOCTOU race).
- **High:** profile modal add flow uses cached `currentFavorites` checks (`js/user.js:321, 326`) before insert; quick repeated adds can slip past local checks.
- **Medium:** `README.md` currently has no `user_favorites` SQL/policy reference (if you still want docs outside README, this is fine).

Good news: the “missing await” in toggle was a false alarm — it **is** awaited (`js/movie.js:212`).

252.   strong.textContent = `${label}: `;
253.   p.appendChild(strong);
254.   p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(value));
255.   return p;
256. }
257. 
258. function resolveUsername(session) {
259.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
260.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
261.     return metadata.username.trim();
262.   }
263.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
264.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
265.   }
266.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
267.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
268.   }
269.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
270.   if (email.includes("@")) {
271.     return email.split("@")[0];
272.   }
273.   return "Current User";
274. }
275. 
276. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
277.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
278. }
279. 
280. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
281.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
282.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
283.     return;
284.   }
285. 
286.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
287.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
288.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
289.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
290.       ? storedUsername
291.       : "Unknown User";
292.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
293.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
294.     let avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
295.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
296.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
297. 
298.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
299.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
300.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
301.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
302.     } else {
303.       avatar = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
304.     }
305. 
306.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
307.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
308.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
309.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
310.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
311.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
312.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
313.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
314. 
315.     avatarWrap.appendChild(avatar);
316.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
317.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
318.     card.appendChild(heading);
319.     card.appendChild(body);
320.     card.appendChild(stamp);
321.     return card;
322.   });
323. 
324.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
325. }
326. 
327. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
328.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
329. 
330.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
331.     .from("movie_reviews")
332.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
333.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
334.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
335. 
336.   if (error) {
337.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
338.     return;
339.   }
340. 
341.   const usernames = [...new Set(
342.     (data || [])
343.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
344.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
345.   )];
346. 
347.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
348.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
349.       .from("profiles")
350.       .select("username, avatar_url")
351.       .in("username", usernames);
352. 
353.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
354.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
355.       if (!key) {
356.         continue;
357.       }
358.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
359.     }
360.   }
361. 
362.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
363. }
364. 
365. function openReviewModal() {
366.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
367.     return;
368.   }
369. 
370.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
371.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
372.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
373.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
374.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
375. 
376.   clearReviewFormStatus();
377.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
378. }
379. 
380. function closeReviewModal() {
381.   if (!reviewModal) {
382.     return;
383.   }
384.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
385.   clearReviewFormStatus();
386. }
387. 
388. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
389.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
390.   currentMovie = movie;
391. 
392.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
393.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
394.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
395.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
396. 
397.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
398.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
399.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
400.     poster.loading = "lazy";
401.   }
402. 
403.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
404.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
405.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
406.   heading.appendChild(year);
407. 
408.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
409.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
410.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
411.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
412.     : "Genres unavailable";
413. 
414.   content.appendChild(heading);
415.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
416.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
417.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
418.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
419.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
420.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
421.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
422. 
423.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
424.   reviewButton.type = "button";
425.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
426.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
427. 
428.   favoriteToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline write-review-btn", "Add to Top Five");
429.   favoriteToggleButton.type = "button";
430.   favoriteToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
431.     toggleFavoriteMovie(movie);
432.   });
433.   content.appendChild(favoriteToggleButton);
434. 
435.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
436.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
437.   clearFavoriteStatus();
438.   void refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
439. }
440. 
441. async function loadMoviePage() {
442.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
443.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
444. 
445.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
446.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
447.     return;
448.   }
449. 
450.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
451.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
452.     return;
453.   }
454. 
455.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
456.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
457.     return;
458.   }
459. 
460.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
461.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
462.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
463.     return;
464.   }
465. 
466.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
467.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
468.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
469. 
470.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
471. 
472.   try {
473.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
474.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
475.     const payload = await response.json();
476. 
477.     if (!response.ok) {
478.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
479.     }
480. 
481.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
482.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
483.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
484.   } catch (error) {
485.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
486.   }
487. }
488. 
489. if (reviewModalClose) {
490.   reviewModalClose.addEventListener("click", closeReviewModal);
491. }
492. 
493. if (reviewModal) {
494.   reviewModal.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
495.     const target = event.target;
496.     if (target instanceof HTMLElement && target.dataset.closeReviewModal === "true") {
497.       closeReviewModal();
498.     }
499.   });
500. }
501. 
502. if (reviewForm) {
503.   reviewForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
504.     event.preventDefault();
505. 
506.     if (isReviewSubmitting) {
507.       return;
508.     }
509. 
510.     const submitButton = reviewForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
511. 
512.     if (!currentMovie?.id || !currentSession?.user?.id) {
513.       setReviewFormStatus("Movie or session context is missing.", "error");
514.       return;
515.     }
516. 
517.     const ratingValue = Number(reviewRatingInput.value);
518.     const reviewTextValue = reviewTextInput.value.trim();
519. 
520.     if (!Number.isFinite(ratingValue) || ratingValue < 1 || ratingValue > 10) {
521.       setReviewFormStatus("Rating must be between 1 and 10.", "error");
522.       return;
523.     }
524. 
525.     if (reviewTextValue.length < 5) {
526.       setReviewFormStatus("Review text must be at least 5 characters.", "error");
527.       return;
528.     }
529. 
530.     setReviewFormStatus("Saving review...", "info");
531.     isReviewSubmitting = true;
532.     if (submitButton) {
533.       submitButton.disabled = true;
534.     }
535. 
536.     const payload = {
537.       user_id: currentSession.user.id,
538.       username: currentUsername,
539.       movie_id: currentMovie.id,
540.       movie_title: currentMovie.title || "Untitled",
541.       rating: ratingValue,
542.       review_text: reviewTextValue,
543.     };
544. 
545.     try {
546.       const { error } = await window.supabaseClient
547.         .from("movie_reviews")
548.         .insert(payload);
549. 
550.       if (error) {
551.         setReviewFormStatus(`Could not save review: ${error.message}`, "error");
552.         return;
553.       }
554. 
555.       setReviewFormStatus("Review saved.", "success");
556.       await loadUserReviews(currentMovie.id);
557.       reviewForm.reset();
558.       setTimeout(closeReviewModal, 450);
559.     } finally {
560.       isReviewSubmitting = false;
561.       if (submitButton) {
562.         submitButton.disabled = false;
563.       }
564.     }
565.   });
566. }
567. 
568. loadMoviePage();
569.
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>16 lines</summary>

```
1. Problem: Continue favorites UX polish for top-five workflow across movie and profile pages.
2. 
3. Approach:
4. 1) On `movie.html`, detect whether current movie already exists in `user_favorites` and render a toggle button:
5.    - `Add to Top Five` when absent
6.    - `Remove from Top Five` when present
7. 2) Keep button/state in sync after insert/delete, including error handling and status text updates.
8. 3) On `user.html` in owner edit mode, add an empty-slot card with a plus icon when favorites are fewer than five.
9. 4) Add inline movie search UI in that empty slot (TMDB query) and allow selecting a result to insert into `user_favorites`.
10. 5) Preserve max-five and duplicate protections in profile add flow.
11. 
12. Notes:
13. - No backend/PHP changes; Supabase + JS only.
14. - Existing `user_favorites` table + RLS policies are still required.
15. - Keep non-owner profile views read-only.
16.
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1503m 39s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Implemented — I fixed the core issues in code.

### What I changed

- Switched **both add paths** to atomic RPC:
  - `js/movie.js` `saveFavoriteMovie()` now calls `rpc("add_user_favorite", ...)`
  - `js/user.js` `addFavoriteFromMovieResult()` now calls `rpc("add_user_favorite", ...)`
- Added profile-side submit guard:
  - `isFavoriteAddSubmitting` blocks rapid duplicate clicks in the modal flow.
- Kept user-friendly status mapping for duplicate/max-five messages.
- JS syntax checks pass.

### Required Supabase SQL (run this)

```sql
create or replace function public.add_user_favorite(
  p_movie_id integer,
  p_movie_title text,
  p_poster_path text default null
) returns void
language plpgsql
security definer
set search_path = public
as $$
declare
  v_user_id uuid := auth.uid();
  v_count integer;
begin
  if v_user_id is null then
    raise exception 'Not authenticated';
  end if;

  if p_movie_id is null or p_movie_id \<= 0 then
    raise exception 'Invalid movie id';
  end if;

  if trim(coalesce(p_movie_title, '')) = '' then
    raise exception 'Invalid movie title';
  end if;

  if exists (
    select 1 from public.user_favorites
    where user_id = v_user_id and movie_id = p_movie_id
  ) then
    raise exception 'This movie is already in your top five.';
  end if;

  select count(*) into v_count
  from public.user_favorites
  where user_id = v_user_id;

  if v_count \>= 5 then
    raise exception 'You can only have five favorite movies.';
  end if;

  insert into public.user_favorites (user_id, movie_id, movie_title, poster_path)
  values (v_user_id, p_movie_id, p_movie_title, p_poster_path);
end;
$$;

revoke all on function public.add_user_favorite(integer, text, text) from public;
grant execute on function public.add_user_favorite(integer, text, text) to authenticated;
```

241. 
242. function resolveUsername(session) {
243.   const metadata = session?.user?.user_metadata || {};
244.   if (typeof metadata.username === "string" && metadata.username.trim()) {
245.     return metadata.username.trim();
246.   }
247.   if (typeof metadata.display_name === "string" && metadata.display_name.trim()) {
248.     return metadata.display_name.trim();
249.   }
250.   if (typeof metadata.full_name === "string" && metadata.full_name.trim()) {
251.     return metadata.full_name.trim();
252.   }
253.   const email = session?.user?.email || "";
254.   if (email.includes("@")) {
255.     return email.split("@")[0];
256.   }
257.   return "Current User";
258. }
259. 
260. function renderEmptyUserReviews() {
261.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(makeElement("div", "reviews-empty-box", "No reviews yet for this movie."));
262. }
263. 
264. function renderUserReviews(reviews) {
265.   if (!Array.isArray(reviews) || reviews.length === 0) {
266.     renderEmptyUserReviews();
267.     return;
268.   }
269. 
270.   const cards = reviews.map((review) => {
271.     const card = makeElement("article", "user-review-card");
272.     const storedUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
273.     const reviewUsername = storedUsername && storedUsername.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"
274.       ? storedUsername
275.       : "Unknown User";
276.     const ownReview = review.user_id === currentSession?.user?.id;
277.     const avatarWrap = makeElement("div", "user-review-header");
278.     let avatar = makeElement("img", "review-avatar");
279.     const avatarKey = reviewUsername.toLowerCase();
280.     const cachedAvatarUrl = profileAvatarCache.get(avatarKey) || "";
281. 
282.     if (cachedAvatarUrl) {
283.       avatar.src = cachedAvatarUrl;
284.       avatar.alt = `${reviewUsername} avatar`;
285.       avatar.loading = "lazy";
286.     } else {
287.       avatar = makeElement("div", "review-avatar review-avatar-fallback", reviewUsername.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
288.     }
289. 
290.     const byline = makeElement("p", "user-review-byline");
291.     const userLink = makeElement("a", "", reviewUsername);
292.     userLink.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(reviewUsername)}`;
293.     byline.append("By ", userLink, ownReview ? " (You)" : "");
294.     const heading = makeElement("p", "user-review-rating", `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`);
295.     const body = makeElement("p", "user-review-text", review.review_text || "");
296.     const createdAt = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
297.     const stamp = makeElement("p", "user-review-date", createdAt ? `Saved: ${createdAt}` : "");
298. 
299.     avatarWrap.appendChild(avatar);
300.     avatarWrap.appendChild(byline);
301.     card.appendChild(avatarWrap);
302.     card.appendChild(heading);
303.     card.appendChild(body);
304.     card.appendChild(stamp);
305.     return card;
306.   });
307. 
308.   movieUserReviews.replaceChildren(...cards);
309. }
310. 
311. async function loadUserReviews(movieId) {
312.   renderEmptyUserReviews();
313. 
314.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
315.     .from("movie_reviews")
316.     .select("id, user_id, username, rating, review_text, created_at")
317.     .eq("movie_id", movieId)
318.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
319. 
320.   if (error) {
321.     setMovieStatus(`Could not load movie reviews: ${error.message}`, "error");
322.     return;
323.   }
324. 
325.   const usernames = [...new Set(
326.     (data || [])
327.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))

329.   )];

331.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
332.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
333.       .from("profiles")
334.       .select("username, avatar_url")
335.       .in("username", usernames);
336. 
337.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
338.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
339.       if (!key) {

341.       }
342.       profileAvatarCache.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
343.     }
344.   }
345. 
346.   renderUserReviews(data || []);
347. }
348. 
349. function openReviewModal() {
350.   if (!currentMovie || !reviewModal) {
351.     return;
352.   }
353. 
354.   const posterPath = typeof currentMovie.poster_path === "string" ? currentMovie.poster_path : "";
355.   reviewModalPoster.src = posterPath.startsWith("/") ? `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}` : "";
356.   reviewModalPoster.alt = `${currentMovie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
357.   reviewModalPoster.hidden = !posterPath.startsWith("/");
358.   reviewModalSubtitle.textContent = `${currentMovie.title || "Untitled"} (${getYear(currentMovie.release_date)})`;
359. 
360.   clearReviewFormStatus();
361.   reviewModal.hidden = false;
362. }
363. 
364. function closeReviewModal() {
365.   if (!reviewModal) {
366.     return;
367.   }
368.   reviewModal.hidden = true;
369.   clearReviewFormStatus();
370. }
371. 
372. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
373.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
374.   currentMovie = movie;
375. 
376.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
377.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
378.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
379.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
380.

372. function renderMovieDetail(movie) {
373.   movieDetailCard.replaceChildren();
374.   currentMovie = movie;
375. 
376.   const posterPath = typeof movie.poster_path === "string" ? movie.poster_path : "";
377.   const poster = posterPath.startsWith("/")
378.     ? makeElement("img", "movie-poster")
379.     : makeElement("div", "movie-poster movie-poster-fallback", "No Poster");
380. 
381.   if (poster.tagName === "IMG") {
382.     poster.src = `${IMAGE_BASE}${posterPath}`;
383.     poster.alt = `${movie.title || "Movie"} poster`;
384.     poster.loading = "lazy";
385.   }
386. 
387.   const content = makeElement("div", "movie-detail-content");
388.   const heading = makeElement("h1", "", movie.title || "Untitled");
389.   const year = makeElement("span", "", ` (${getYear(movie.release_date)})`);
390.   heading.appendChild(year);
391. 
392.   const vote = typeof movie.vote_average === "number" ? movie.vote_average.toFixed(1) : "N/A";
393.   const runtime = movie.runtime ? `${movie.runtime} min` : "Runtime unavailable";
394.   const genres = Array.isArray(movie.genres) && movie.genres.length > 0
395.     ? movie.genres.map((g) => g.name).join(", ")
396.     : "Genres unavailable";
397. 
398.   content.appendChild(heading);
399.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Rating", `⭐ ${vote} / 10`));
400.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Runtime", runtime));
401.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Release Date", movie.release_date || "Unknown"));
402.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Director", getDirector(movie.credits)));
403.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Cast", getCast(movie.credits)));
404.   content.appendChild(createMetaLine("Genres", genres));
405.   content.appendChild(makeElement("p", "result-overview", movie.overview || "No overview available."));
406. 
407.   const reviewButton = makeElement("button", "auth-btn write-review-btn", "Write Review");
408.   reviewButton.type = "button";
409.   reviewButton.addEventListener("click", openReviewModal);
410.   content.appendChild(reviewButton);
411. 
412.   favoriteToggleButton = makeElement("button", "btn btn-outline write-review-btn", "Add to Top Five");
413.   favoriteToggleButton.type = "button";
414.   favoriteToggleButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
415.     toggleFavoriteMovie(movie);
416.   });
417.   content.appendChild(favoriteToggleButton);
418. 
419.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(poster);
420.   movieDetailCard.appendChild(content);
421.   clearFavoriteStatus();
422.   void refreshFavoriteState(movie.id);
423. }
424. 
425. async function loadMoviePage() {
426.   const movieIdRaw = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("id");
427.   const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
428. 
429.   if (!movieIdRaw) {
430.     setMovieStatus("No movie id provided.", "error");
431.     return;
432.   }
433. 
434.   if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(movieIdRaw) || Number(movieIdRaw) <= 0) {
435.     setMovieStatus("Invalid movie id in URL.", "error");
436.     return;
437.   }
438. 
439.   if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
440.     setMovieStatus("TMDB API key is missing. Set TMDB_API_KEY in js/supabase-config.js.", "error");
441.     return;
442.   }
443. 
444.   const { data: sessionData, error: sessionError } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
445.   if (sessionError || !sessionData?.session?.user?.id) {
446.     setMovieStatus("You must be signed in to view and write reviews.", "error");
447.     return;
448.   }
449. 
450.   currentSession = sessionData.session;
451.   currentUsername = resolveUsername(currentSession);
452.   const movieId = Number(movieIdRaw);
453. 
454.   setMovieStatus("Loading movie details...", "info");
455. 
456.   try {
457.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/movie/${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&append_to_response=credits`;
458.     const response = await fetch(endpoint);
459.     const payload = await response.json();
460. 
461.     if (!response.ok) {
462.       throw new Error(payload.status_message || "Failed to load movie details.");
463.     }
464. 
465.     renderMovieDetail(payload);
466.     await loadUserReviews(movieId);
467.     setMovieStatus("Movie details loaded.", "success");
468.   } catch (error) {
469.     setMovieStatus(`Failed to load movie: ${error.message}`, "error");
470.   }
```

</details>

<sub>⏱️ 1506m 27s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — each movie page now shows a separate **KinoRate User Rating** average from user reviews.

### What I changed

- In `js/movie.js`, added a new metadata line:
  - `KinoRate User Rating: Loading...`
- After fetching `movie_reviews`, it now computes:
  - average of valid `rating` values (1–10)
  - count of ratings
- Display format:
  - `⭐ 8.4 / 10 (5 ratings)`
  - or `No user ratings yet.`
- It also refreshes right after a review is submitted, so the average updates live.

No SQL changes needed for this feature.

1. const movieSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-search-form");
2. const movieSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-movie-query");
3. const movieSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-suggestion-list");
4. 
5. const userSearchForm = document.getElementById("index-user-search-form");
6. const userSearchInput = document.getElementById("index-user-query");
7. const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById("index-user-suggestion-list");
8. 
9. const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById("recent-reviews-rail");
10. 
11. const tmdbConfig = window.appConfig?.tmdb;
12. const imageBase = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w92";
13. 
14. function goToSearchPage(query) {
15.   const trimmed = query.trim();
16.   if (!trimmed) {
17.     return;
18.   }
19.   window.location.href = `search.html?query=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
20. }
21. 
22. function goToMoviePage(movieId) {
23.   if (!movieId) {
24.     return;
25.   }
26.   window.location.href = `movie.html?id=${encodeURIComponent(String(movieId))}`;
27. }
28. 
29. function goToUserPage(username) {
30.   const trimmed = typeof username === "string" ? username.trim() : "";
31.   if (!trimmed) {
32.     return;
33.   }
34.   window.location.href = `user.html?username=${encodeURIComponent(trimmed)}`;
35. }
36. 
37. function createProfileAvatarElement(username, avatarUrl, className = "suggestion-avatar") {
38.   const cleanAvatarUrl = typeof avatarUrl === "string" ? avatarUrl.trim() : "";
39. 
40.   if (cleanAvatarUrl) {
41.     const avatarImg = document.createElement("img");
42.     avatarImg.className = className;
43.     avatarImg.src = cleanAvatarUrl;
44.     avatarImg.alt = `${username || "User"} avatar`;
45.     avatarImg.loading = "lazy";
46.     return avatarImg;
47.   }
48. 
49.   const fallback = document.createElement("div");
50.   fallback.className = `${className} suggestion-avatar-fallback`;
51.   fallback.textContent = (username?.trim().charAt(0) || "?").toUpperCase();
52.   return fallback;
53. }
54. 
55. function setupMovieTypeahead() {
56.   if (!movieSearchForm || !movieSearchInput || !movieSuggestionList) {
57.     return;
58.   }
59. 
60.   let debounceHandle;
61.   let requestCounter = 0;
62.   let activeIndex = -1;
63.   let currentResults = [];
64. 
65.   function getMovieYear(item) {
66.     return item.release_date ? item.release_date.slice(0, 4) : "Unknown";
67.   }
68. 
69.   function clearSuggestions() {
70.     movieSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
71.   }
72. 
73.   function openSuggestions() {
74.     movieSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
75.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
76.   }
77. 
78.   function closeSuggestions() {
79.     movieSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
80.     movieSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
81.     activeIndex = -1;
82.   }
83. 
84.   function syncActiveItem() {
85.     const items = movieSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
86.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
87.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
88.         item.classList.add("active");
89.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
90.       } else {
91.         item.classList.remove("active");
92.       }
93.     });
94.   }
95. 
96.   function createPosterElement(item) {
97.     const posterPath = typeof item.poster_path === "string" ? item.poster_path : "";
98. 
99.     if (!posterPath.startsWith("/")) {
100.       const fallback = document.createElement("div");
101.       fallback.className = "suggestion-poster suggestion-poster-fallback";
102.       fallback.textContent = "No image";
103.       return fallback;
104.     }
105. 
106.     const poster = document.createElement("img");
107.     poster.className = "suggestion-poster";
108.     poster.loading = "lazy";
109.     poster.alt = `${item.title || "Movie"} poster`;
110.     poster.src = `${imageBase}${posterPath}`;
111.     return poster;
112.   }
113. 
114.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
115.     currentResults = items;
116.     clearSuggestions();
117.     activeIndex = -1;
118. 
119.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
120.       const li = document.createElement("li");
121.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
122.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
123.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
124.       li.tabIndex = -1;
125. 
126.       li.appendChild(createPosterElement(item));
127. 
128.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
129.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
130. 
131.       const title = document.createElement("span");
132.       title.className = "suggestion-title";
133.       title.textContent = item.title || "Untitled";
134. 
135.       const year = document.createElement("span");
136.       year.className = "suggestion-year";
137.       year.textContent = getMovieYear(item);
138. 
139.       textWrap.appendChild(title);
140.       textWrap.appendChild(year);
141.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
142. 
143.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
144.         event.preventDefault();
145.       });
146. 
147.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
148.         activeIndex = index;
149.         syncActiveItem();
150.       });
151. 
152.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
153.         goToMoviePage(item.id);
154.       });
155. 
156.       movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
157.     }
158. 
159.     openSuggestions();
160.   }
161. 
162.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
163.     currentResults = [];
164.     activeIndex = -1;
165.     clearSuggestions();
166. 
167.     const li = document.createElement("li");
168.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
169.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
170.     li.textContent = message;
171.     movieSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
172. 
173.     openSuggestions();
174.   }
175. 
176.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
177.     if (!tmdbConfig?.apiKey) {
178.       renderInfo("TMDB API key is missing in js/supabase-config.js", "error");
179.       return;
180.     }
181. 
182.     const endpoint = `${tmdbConfig.apiBaseUrl}/search/movie?api_key=${encodeURIComponent(tmdbConfig.apiKey)}&query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&include_adult=false&page=1`;
183.     renderInfo("Searching...", "loading");
184. 
185.     try {
186.       const response = await fetch(endpoint);
187.       const payload = await response.json();
188. 
189.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
190.         return;
191.       }
192. 
193.       if (!response.ok) {
194.         const errorMessage = payload.status_message || "Search failed.";
195.         renderInfo(`TMDB error: ${errorMessage}`, "error");
196.         return;
197.       }
198. 
199.       const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results.slice(0, 10) : [];
200. 
201.       if (results.length === 0) {
202.         renderInfo("No matches yet.", "info");
203.         return;
204.       }
205. 
206.       renderSuggestionItems(results);
207.     } catch (error) {
208.       if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
209.         return;
210.       }
211.       renderInfo(`Connection error: ${error.message}`, "error");
212.     }
213.   }
214. 
215.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
216.     const query = movieSearchInput.value.trim();
217.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
218. 
219.     if (!query) {
220.       closeSuggestions();
221.       clearSuggestions();
222.       currentResults = [];
223.       return;
224.     }
225. 
226.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
227.       requestCounter += 1;
228.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
229.     }, 300);
230.   });
231. 
232.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
233.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
234. 
235.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
236.       event.preventDefault();
237.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
238.       syncActiveItem();
239.       openSuggestions();
240.       return;
241.     }
242. 
243.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
244.       event.preventDefault();
245.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
246.       syncActiveItem();
247.       openSuggestions();
248.       return;
249.     }
250. 
251.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
252.       closeSuggestions();
253.       return;
254.     }
255. 
256.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
257.       event.preventDefault();
258.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
259.         goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
260.         return;
261.       }
262.       goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
263.     }
264.   });
265. 
266.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
267.     if (movieSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
268.       openSuggestions();
269.     }
270.   });
271. 
272.   movieSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
273.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
274.   });
275. 
276.   movieSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
277.     event.preventDefault();
278.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
279.       goToMoviePage(currentResults[activeIndex].id);
280.       return;
281.     }
282.     goToSearchPage(movieSearchInput.value);
283.   });
284. }
285. 
286. function setupUserTypeahead() {
287.   if (!userSearchForm || !userSearchInput || !userSuggestionList) {
288.     return;
289.   }
290. 
291.   let debounceHandle;
292.   let requestCounter = 0;
293.   let activeIndex = -1;
294.   let currentResults = [];
295. 
296.   function clearSuggestions() {
297.     userSuggestionList.replaceChildren();
298.   }
299. 
300.   function openSuggestions() {
301.     userSuggestionList.classList.add("open");
302.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
303.   }
304. 
305.   function closeSuggestions() {
306.     userSuggestionList.classList.remove("open");
307.     userSearchInput.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
308.     activeIndex = -1;
309.   }
310. 
311.   function syncActiveItem() {
312.     const items = userSuggestionList.querySelectorAll(".suggestion-item[data-index]");
313.     items.forEach((item, idx) => {
314.       if (idx === activeIndex) {
315.         item.classList.add("active");
316.         item.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
317.       } else {
318.         item.classList.remove("active");
319.       }
320.     });
321.   }
322. 
323.   function renderInfo(message, state = "info") {
324.     currentResults = [];
325.     activeIndex = -1;
326.     clearSuggestions();
327. 
328.     const li = document.createElement("li");
329.     li.className = `suggestion-item suggestion-${state}`;
330.     li.setAttribute("role", "option");
331.     li.textContent = message;
332.     userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
333. 
334.     openSuggestions();
335.   }
336. 
337.   function renderSuggestionItems(items) {
338.     currentResults = items;
339.     clearSuggestions();
340.     activeIndex = -1;
341. 
342.     for (const [index, item] of items.entries()) {
343.       const username = item.username;
344.       const li = document.createElement("li");
345.       li.className = "suggestion-item";
346.       li.setAttribute("role", "option");
347.       li.setAttribute("data-index", String(index));
348.       li.tabIndex = -1;
349. 
350.       li.appendChild(createProfileAvatarElement(username, item.avatar_url));
351. 
352.       const textWrap = document.createElement("div");
353.       textWrap.className = "suggestion-text";
354. 
355.       const name = document.createElement("span");
356.       name.className = "suggestion-title";
357.       name.textContent = username;
358. 
359.       const subtitle = document.createElement("span");
360.       subtitle.className = "suggestion-year";
361.       subtitle.textContent = "User";
362. 
363.       textWrap.appendChild(name);
364.       textWrap.appendChild(subtitle);
365.       li.appendChild(textWrap);
366. 
367.       li.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
368.         event.preventDefault();
369.       });
370. 
371.       li.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
372.         activeIndex = index;
373.         syncActiveItem();
374.       });
375. 
376.       li.addEventListener("click", () => {
377.         goToUserPage(username);
378.       });
379. 
380.       userSuggestionList.appendChild(li);
381.     }
382. 
383.     openSuggestions();
384.   }
385. 
386.   async function getCurrentUserUsername() {
387.     const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient.auth.getUser();
388.     if (error) {
389.       return "";
390.     }
391. 
392.     const user = data?.user;
393.     if (!user) {
394.       return "";
395.     }
396. 
397.     const metadataUsername = typeof user.user_metadata?.username === "string"
398.       ? user.user_metadata.username.trim()
399.       : "";
400. 
401.     if (metadataUsername) {
402.       return metadataUsername;
403.     }
404. 
405.     if (typeof user.email === "string" && user.email.includes("@")) {
406.       return user.email.split("@")[0].trim();
407.     }
408. 
409.     return "";
410.   }
411. 
412.   async function fetchSuggestions(query, localRequestId) {
413.     renderInfo("Searching users...", "loading");
414. 
415.     const [{ data, error }, currentUsername] = await Promise.all([
416.       window.supabaseClient
417.         .from("profiles")
418.         .select("username, avatar_url")
419.         .ilike("username", `%${query}%`)
420.         .not("username", "is", null)
421.         .order("username", { ascending: true })
422.         .limit(25),
423.       getCurrentUserUsername()
424.     ]);
425. 
426.     if (localRequestId !== requestCounter) {
427.       return;
428.     }
429. 
430.     if (error) {
431.       renderInfo(`User search error: ${error.message}`, "error");
432.       return;
433.     }
434. 
435.     const profileRows = (data || [])
436.       .map((row) => ({
437.         username: typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim() : "",
438.         avatar_url: typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : ""
439.       }))
440.       .filter((row) => row.username.length > 0);
441. 
442.     const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
443.     const localMatches = currentUsername && currentUsername.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)
444.       ? [{ username: currentUsername, avatar_url: "" }]
445.       : [];
446. 
447.     const uniqueUsernames = [];
448.     const seen = new Set();
449.     for (const row of [...localMatches, ...profileRows]) {
450.       const key = row.username.toLowerCase();
451.       if (seen.has(key)) {
452.         continue;
453.       }
454.       seen.add(key);
455.       uniqueUsernames.push(row);
456.       if (uniqueUsernames.length >= 10) {
457.         break;
458.       }
459.     }
460. 
461.     if (uniqueUsernames.length === 0) {
462.       renderInfo("No users found.", "info");
463.       return;
464.     }
465. 
466.     renderSuggestionItems(uniqueUsernames);
467.   }
468. 
469.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
470.     const query = userSearchInput.value.trim();
471.     clearTimeout(debounceHandle);
472. 
473.     if (!query) {
474.       closeSuggestions();
475.       clearSuggestions();
476.       currentResults = [];
477.       return;
478.     }
479. 
480.     debounceHandle = setTimeout(() => {
481.       requestCounter += 1;
482.       fetchSuggestions(query, requestCounter);
483.     }, 300);
484.   });
485. 
486.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
487.     const hasSelectable = currentResults.length > 0;
488. 
489.     if (event.key === "ArrowDown" && hasSelectable) {
490.       event.preventDefault();
491.       activeIndex = activeIndex < currentResults.length - 1 ? activeIndex + 1 : 0;
492.       syncActiveItem();
493.       openSuggestions();
494.       return;
495.     }
496. 
497.     if (event.key === "ArrowUp" && hasSelectable) {
498.       event.preventDefault();
499.       activeIndex = activeIndex > 0 ? activeIndex - 1 : currentResults.length - 1;
500.       syncActiveItem();
501.       openSuggestions();
502.       return;
503.     }
504. 
505.     if (event.key === "Escape") {
506.       closeSuggestions();
507.       return;
508.     }
509. 
510.     if (event.key === "Enter") {
511.       event.preventDefault();
512.       if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
513.         goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex].username);
514.       }
515.     }
516.   });
517. 
518.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("focus", () => {
519.     if (userSuggestionList.children.length > 0) {
520.       openSuggestions();
521.     }
522.   });
523. 
524.   userSearchInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
525.     setTimeout(closeSuggestions, 120);
526.   });
527. 
528.   userSearchForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
529.     event.preventDefault();
530.     if (activeIndex >= 0 && currentResults[activeIndex]) {
531.       goToUserPage(currentResults[activeIndex].username);
532.       return;
533.     }
534.     goToUserPage(userSearchInput.value);
535.   });
536. }
537. 
538. async function loadRecentReviews() {
539.   if (!recentReviewsRail) {
540.     return;
541.   }
542. 
543.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
544.   const loading = document.createElement("div");
545.   loading.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
546.   loading.textContent = "Loading recent reviews...";
547.   recentReviewsRail.appendChild(loading);
548. 
549.   const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient
550.     .from("movie_reviews")
551.     .select("id, username, movie_id, movie_title, rating, review_text, created_at")
552.     .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
553.     .limit(20);
554. 
555.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren();
556. 
557.   if (error) {
558.     const failure = document.createElement("div");
559.     failure.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
560.     failure.textContent = `Could not load reviews: ${error.message}`;
561.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(failure);
562.     return;
563.   }
564. 
565.   if (!data || data.length === 0) {
566.     const empty = document.createElement("div");
567.     empty.className = "recent-review-card recent-review-card-info";
568.     empty.textContent = "No reviews yet.";
569.     recentReviewsRail.appendChild(empty);
570.     return;
571.   }
572. 
573.   const usernames = [...new Set(
574.     data
575.       .map((review) => (typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : ""))
576.       .filter((username) => username.length > 0 && username.toLowerCase() !== "unknown")
577.   )];
578. 
579.   const avatarByUsername = new Map();
580.   if (usernames.length > 0) {
581.     const { data: profileRows } = await window.supabaseClient
582.       .from("profiles")
583.       .select("username, avatar_url")
584.       .in("username", usernames);
585. 
586.     for (const row of profileRows || []) {
587.       const key = typeof row.username === "string" ? row.username.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
588.       if (!key) {
589.         continue;
590.       }
591.       avatarByUsername.set(key, typeof row.avatar_url === "string" ? row.avatar_url.trim() : "");
592.     }
593.   }
594. 
595.   const cards = data.map((review) => {
596.     const card = document.createElement("article");
597.     card.className = "recent-review-card";
598.     card.tabIndex = 0;
599. 
600.     const title = document.createElement("h3");
601.     title.textContent = review.movie_title || `Movie #${review.movie_id}`;
602. 
603.     const byline = document.createElement("p");
604.     byline.className = "recent-review-byline";
605.     const bylineWrap = document.createElement("div");
606.     bylineWrap.className = "recent-review-byline-wrap";
607.     const reviewUsername = typeof review.username === "string" ? review.username.trim() : "";
608.     const avatar = createProfileAvatarElement(
609.       reviewUsername || "Unknown",
610.       avatarByUsername.get(reviewUsername.toLowerCase()) || "",
611.       "review-avatar"
612.     );
613.     const bylineLink = document.createElement("a");
614.     bylineLink.href = "#";
615.     bylineLink.textContent = reviewUsername || "Unknown";
616.     bylineLink.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
617.       event.preventDefault();
618.       event.stopPropagation();
619.       goToUserPage(reviewUsername || "");
620.     });
621.     byline.append("By ", bylineLink);
622.     bylineWrap.appendChild(avatar);
623.     bylineWrap.appendChild(byline);
624. 
625.     const rating = document.createElement("p");
626.     rating.className = "recent-review-rating";
627.     rating.textContent = `⭐ ${Number(review.rating).toFixed(1)} / 10`;
628. 
629.     const snippet = document.createElement("p");
630.     snippet.className = "recent-review-snippet";
631.     snippet.textContent = review.review_text || "";
632. 
633.     const timestamp = document.createElement("p");
634.     timestamp.className = "recent-review-time";
635.     timestamp.textContent = review.created_at ? new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleString() : "";
636. 
637.     card.appendChild(title);
638.     card.appendChild(bylineWrap);
639.     card.appendChild(rating);
640.     card.appendChild(snippet);
641.     card.appendChild(timestamp);
642. 
643.     const openMovie = () => {
644.       if (!review.movie_id) {
645.         return;
646.       }
647.       goToMoviePage(review.movie_id);
648.     };
649. 
650.     card.addEventListener("click", openMovie);
651.     card.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
652.       if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
653.         event.preventDefault();
654.         openMovie();
655.       }
656.     });
657. 
658.     return card;
659.   });
660. 
661.   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);
662. }
663. 
664. setupMovieTypeahead();
665. setupUserTypeahead();
666. loadRecentReviews();
667.
```

</details>

### ✅ `apply_patch`

<details>
<summary>Arguments</summary>

```json
"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Users\\Solar\\Downloads\\midtermai2\\MidtermDIG4503C\\js\\index-search.js\n@@\n const userSuggestionList = document.getElementById(\"index-user-suggestion-list\");\n \n const recentReviewsRail = document.getElementById(\"recent-reviews-rail\");\n+const highestRatedRail = document.getElementById(\"highest-rated-rail\");\n@@\n async function loadRecentReviews() {\n@@\n   recentReviewsRail.replaceChildren(...cards);\n }\n+\n+function renderHighestRatedInfo(message) {\n+  if (!highestRatedRail) {\n+    return;\n+  }\n+  highestRatedRail.replaceChildren();\n+  const info = document.createElement(\"div\");\n+  info.className = \"highest-rated-card highest-rated-card-info\";\n+  info.textContent = message;\n+  highestRatedRail.appendChild(info);\n+}\n+\n+async function loadHighestRatedMovies() {\n+  if (!highestRatedRail) {\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  renderHighestRatedInfo(\"Loading highest rated movies...\");\n+\n+  const { data, error } = await window.supabaseClient\n+    .from(\"movie_reviews\")\n+    .select(\"movie_id, movie_title, rating\");\n+\n+  if (error) {\n+    renderHighestRatedInfo(`Could not load highest rated movies: ${error.message}`);\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  const byMovie = new Map();\n+  for (const review of data || []) {\n+    const movieId = Number(review.movie_id);\n+    const rating = Number(review.rating);\n+    if (!Number.isFinite(movieId) || movieId <= 0 || !Number.isFinite(rating)) {\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+\n+    const existing = byMovie.get(movieId) || {\n+      movie_id: movieId,\n+      movie_title: typeof review.movie_title === \"string\" && review.movie_title.trim()\n+        ? review.movie_title.trim()\n+        : `Movie #${movieId}`,\n+      sum: 0,\n+      count: 0\n+    };\n+\n+    existing.sum += rating;\n+    existing.count += 1;\n+    byMovie.set(movieId, existing);\n+  }\n+\n+  const ranked = [...byMovie.values()]\n+    .filter((movie) => movie.count >= 2)\n+    .map((movie) => ({\n+      movie_id: movie.movie_id,\n+      movie_title: movie.movie_title,\n+      average: movie.sum / movie.count,\n+      count: movie.count\n+    }))\n+    .sort((a, b) => {\n+      if (b.average !== a.average) {\n+        return b.average - a.average;\n+      }\n+      return b.count - a.count;\n+    })\n+    .slice(0, 10);\n+\n+  if (ranked.length === 0) {\n+    renderHighestRatedInfo(\"Not enough ratings yet (need at least 2 ratings per movie).\");\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  const cards = ranked.map((movie, index) => {\n+    const card = document.createElement(\"article\");\n+    card.className = \"highest-rated-card\";\n+    card.tabIndex = 0;\n+\n+    const rank = document.createElement(\"p\");\n+    rank.className = \"highest-rated-rank\";\n+    rank.textContent = `#${index + 1}`;\n+\n+    const title = document.createElement(\"h4\");\n+    title.textContent = movie.movie_title;\n+\n+    const rating = document.createElement(\"p\");\n+    rating.className = \"highest-rated-score\";\n+    rating.textContent = `⭐ ${movie.average.toFixed(1)} / 10`;\n+\n+    const meta = document.createElement(\"p\");\n+    meta.className = \"highest-rated-meta\";\n+    meta.textContent = `${movie.count} rating${movie.count === 1 ? \"\" : \"s\"}`;\n+\n+    card.appendChild(rank);\n+    card.appendChild(title);\n+    card.appendChild(rating);\n+    card.appendChild(meta);\n+\n+    const openMovie = () => {\n+      goToMoviePage(movie.movie_id);\n+    };\n+\n+    card.addEventListener(\"click\", openMovie);\n+    card.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n+      if (event.key === \"Enter\" || event.key === \" \") {\n+        event.preventDefault();\n+        openMovie();\n+      }\n+    });\n+\n+    return card;\n+  });\n+\n+  highestRatedRail.replaceChildren(...cards);\n+}\n@@\n setupMovieTypeahead();\n setupUserTypeahead();\n loadRecentReviews();\n+loadHighestRatedMovies();\n*** End Patch\n"
```

<sub>⏱️ 1630m 49s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done — I added a **Highest Rated Movies** section directly under Recent Reviews on the homepage.

### What it does

- Pulls `movie_reviews` data
- Computes KinoRate average per movie (`sum / count`)
- Sorts highest to lowest
- Shows top 10 as clickable cards linking to each `movie.html?id=...`
- Displays score and rating count

I also added loading/empty/error states.

Note: I set a small quality filter of **minimum 2 ratings per movie** so one-off ratings don’t dominate. If you want, I can change that to 1 (or 3/5).
